1.1: Biblos geneseōs Iēsou Christou huiou Daueid huiou Abraam.
1.2: Abraam egennēsen ton Isaak, Isaak de egennēsen ton Iakōb, Iakōb de egennēsen ton Ioudan kai tous adelphous autou,
1.3: Ioudas de egennēsen ton Phares kai ton Zara ek tēs Thamar, Phares de egennēsen ton Esrōm, Esrōm de egennēsen ton Aram,
1.4: Aram de egennēsen ton Aminadab, Aminadab de egennēsen ton Naassōn, Naassōn de egennēsen ton Salmōn,
1.5: Salmōn de egennēsen ton Boes ek tēs Rhachab, Boes de egennēsen ton Iōbēd ek tēs Rhouth, Iōbēd de egennēsen ton Iessai,
1.6: Iessai de egennēsen ton Daueid ton basilea. Daueid de egennēsen ton Solomōna ek tēs tou Ouriou,
1.7: Solomōn de egennēsen ton Rhoboam, Rhoboam de egennēsen ton Abia, Abia de egennēsen ton Asaph,
1.8: Asaph de egennēsen ton Iōsaphat, Iōsaphat de egennēsen ton Iōram, Iōram de egennēsen ton Ozeian,
1.9: Ozeias de egennēsen ton Iōatham, Iōatham de egennēsen ton Achaz, Achaz de egennēsen ton Ezekian,
1.10: Ezekias de egennēsen ton Manassē, Manassēs de egennēsen ton Amōs, Amōs de egennēsen ton Iōseian,
1.11: Iōseias de egennēsen ton Iechonian kai tous adelphous autou epi tēs metoikesias Babylōnos.
1.12: Meta de tēn metoikesian Babylōnos Iechonias egennēsen ton Salathiēl, Salathiēl de egennēsen ton Zorobabel,
1.13: Zorobabel de egennēsen ton Abioud, Abioud de egennēsen ton Eliakeim, Eliakeim de egennēsen ton Azōr,
1.14: Azōr de egennēsen ton Sadōk, Sadōk de egennēsen ton Acheim, Acheim de egennēsen ton Elioud,
1.15: Elioud de egennēsen ton Eleazar, Eleazar de egennēsen ton Maththan, Maththan de egennēsen ton Iakōb,
1.16: Iakōb de egennēsen ton Iōsēph ton andra Marias, ex hēs egennēthē Iēsous ho legomenos Christos.
1.17: Pasai oun hai geneai apo Abraam heōs Daueid geneai dekatessares, kai apo Daueid heōs tēs metoikesias Babylōnos geneai dekatessares, kai apo tēs metoikesias Babylōnos heōs tou Christou geneai dekatessares.
1.18: Tou de Iēsou Christou hē genesis houtōs ēn. mnēsteutheisēs tēs mētros autou Marias tō Iōsēph, prin ē synelthein autous heurethē en gastri echousa ek pneumatos hagiou.
1.19: Iōsēph de ho anēr autēs, dikaios ōn kai mē thelōn autēn deigmatisai, eboulēthē lathra apolysai autēn.
1.20: tauta de autou enthymēthentos idou angelos Kyriou kat’ onar ephanē autō legōn Iōsēph huios Daueid, mē phobēthēs paralabein Marian tēn gynaika sou, to gar en autē gennēthen ek Pneumatos estin Hagiou;
1.21: texetai de huion kai kaleseis to onoma autou Iēsoun; autos gar sōsei ton laon autou apo tōn hamartiōn autōn.
1.22: Touto de holon gegonen hina plērōthē to rhēthen hypo Kyriou dia tou prophētou legontos
1.23: Idou hē parthenos en gastri hexei kai texetai huion, kai kalesousin to onoma autou Emmanouēl, ho estin methermēneuomenon Meth’ hēmōn ho Theos.
1.24: egertheis de ho Iōsēph apo tou hypnou epoiēsen hōs prosetaxen autō ho angelos Kyriou, kai parelaben tēn gynaika autou;
1.25: kai ouk eginōsken autēn heōs hou eteken huion; kai ekalesen to onoma autou Iēsoun.

2.1: Tou de Iēsou gennēthentos en Bēthleem tēs Ioudaias en hēmerais Hērōdou tou basileōs, idou magoi apo anatolōn paregenonto eis Hierosolyma
2.2: legontes Pou estin ho techtheis basileus tōn Ioudaiōn? eidomen gar autou ton astera en tē anatolē kai ēlthomen proskynēsai autō.
2.3: akousas de ho basileus Hērōdēs etarachthē, kai pasa Hierosolyma met’ autou,
2.4: kai synagagōn pantas tous archiereis kai grammateis tou laou epynthaneto par’ autōn pou ho Christos gennatai.
2.5: hoi de eipan autō; En Bēthleem tēs Ioudaias; houtōs gar gegraptai dia tou prophētou;
2.6: Kai sy, Bēthleem gē Iouda, oudamōs elachistē ei en tois hēgemosin Iouda; ek sou gar exeleusetai hēgoumenos, hostis poimanei ton laon mou ton Israēl.
2.7: Tote Hērōdēs lathra kalesas tous magous ēkribōsen par’ autōn ton chronon tou phainomenou asteros,
2.8: kai pempsas autous eis Bēthleem eipen; Poreuthentes exetasate akribōs peri tou paidiou; epan de heurēte, apangeilate moi, hopōs kagō elthōn proskynēsō autō.
2.9: hoi de akousantes tou basileōs eporeuthēsan; kai idou ho astēr, hon eidon en tē anatolē, proēgen autous heōs elthōn estathē epanō hou ēn to paidion.
2.10: idontes de ton astera echarēsan charan megalēn sphodra.
2.11: kai elthontes eis tēn oikian eidon to paidion meta Marias tēs mētros autou, kai pesontes prosekynēsan autō, kai anoixantes tous thēsaurous autōn prosēnenkan autō dōra, chryson kai libanon kai smyrnan.
2.12: kai chrēmatisthentes kat’ onar mē anakampsai pros Hērōdēn, di’ allēs hodou anechōrēsan eis tēn chōran autōn.
2.13: Anachōrēsantōn de autōn, idou angelos kyriou phainetai kat’ onar tō Iōsēph legōn Egertheis paralabe to paidion kai tēn mētera autou kai pheuge eis Aigypton, kai isthi ekei heōs an eipō soi; mellei gar Hērōdēs zētein to paidion tou apolesai auto.
2.14: ho de egertheis parelaben to paidion kai tēn mētera autou nyktos kai anechōrēsen eis Aigypton,
2.15: kai ēn ekei heōs tēs teleutēs Hērōdou; hina plērōthē to rhēthen hypo kyriou dia tou prophētou legontos Ex Aigyptou ekalesa ton huion mou.
2.16: Tote Hērōdēs idōn hoti enepaichthē hypo tōn magōn ethymōthē lian, kai aposteilas aneilen pantas tous paidas tous en Bēthleem kai en pasi tois horiois autēs apo dietous kai katōterō, kata ton chronon hon ēkribōsen para tōn magōn.
2.17: tote eplērōthē to rhēthen dia Ieremiou tou prophētou legontos
2.18: Phōnē en Rhama ēkousthē, klauthmos kai odyrmos polys; Rhachēl klaiousa ta tekna autēs, kai ouk ēthelen paraklēthēnai hoti ouk eisin.
2.19: Teleutēsantos de tou Hērōdou, idou angelos Kyriou phainetai kat’ onar tō Iōsēph en Aigyptō
2.20: legōn Egertheis paralabe to paidion kai tēn mētera autou kai poreuou eis gēn Israēl; tethnēkasin gar hoi zētountes tēn psychēn tou paidiou.
2.21: ho de egertheis parelaben to paidion kai tēn mētera autou kai eisēlthen eis gēn Israēl.
2.22: akousas de hoti Archelaos basileuei tēs Ioudaias anti tou patros autou Hērōdou ephobēthē ekei apelthein; chrēmatistheis de kat’ onar anechōrēsen eis ta merē tēs Galilaias,
2.23: kai elthōn katōkēsen eis polin legomenēn Nazaret; hopōs plērōthē to rhēthen dia tōn prophētōn hoti Nazōraios klēthēsetai.

3.1: En de tais hēmerais ekeinais paraginetai Iōanēs ho baptistēs kēryssōn en tē erēmō tēs Ioudaias,
3.2: legōn Metanoeite; ēngiken gar hē basileia tōn ouranōn.
3.3: houtos gar estin ho rhētheis dia Ēsaiou tou prophētou legontos Phōnē boōntos en tē erēmō Hetoimasate tēn hodon Kyriou, eutheias poieite tas tribous autou.
3.4: Autos de ho Iōanēs eichen to endyma autou apo trichōn kamēlou kai zōnēn dermatinēn peri tēn osphyn autou; hē de trophē ēn autou akrides kai meli agrion.
3.5: Tote exeporeueto pros auton Hierosolyma kai pasa hē Ioudaia kai pasa hē perichōros tou Iordanou,
3.6: kai ebaptizonto en tō Iordanē potamō hyp’ autou exomologoumenoi tas hamartias autōn.
3.7: Idōn de pollous tōn Pharisaiōn kai Saddoukaiōn erchomenous epi to baptisma eipen autois Gennēmata echidnōn, tis hypedeixen hymin phygein apo tēs mellousēs orgēs?
3.8: poiēsate oun karpon axion tēs metanoias;
3.9: kai mē doxēte legein en heautois Patera echomen ton Abraam; legō gar hymin hoti dynatai ho Theos ek tōn lithōn toutōn egeirai tekna tō Abraam.
3.10: ēdē de hē axinē pros tēn rhizan tōn dendrōn keitai; pan oun dendron mē poioun karpon kalon ekkoptetai kai eis pyr balletai.
3.11: egō men hymas baptizō en hydati eis metanoian; ho de opisō mou erchomenos ischyroteros mou estin, hou ouk eimi hikanos ta hypodēmata bastasai; autos hymas baptisei en Pneumati Hagiō kai pyri;
3.12: hou to ptyon en tē cheiri autou, kai diakathariei tēn halōna autou, kai synaxei ton siton autou eis tēn apothēkēn, to de achyron katakausei pyri asbestō.
3.13: Tote paraginetai ho Iēsous apo tēs Galilaias epi ton Iordanēn pros ton Iōanēn tou baptisthēnai hyp’ autou.
3.14: ho de diekōlyen auton legōn Egō chreian echō hypo sou baptisthēnai, kai sy erchē pros me?
3.15: apokritheis de ho Iēsous eipen autō Aphes arti; houtōs gar prepon estin hēmin plērōsai pasan dikaiosynēn. tote aphiēsin auton.
3.16: baptistheis de ho Iēsous euthys anebē apo tou hydatos; kai idou ēneōchthēsan hoi ouranoi, kai eiden Pneuma Theou katabainon hōsei peristeran erchomenon ep’ auton;
3.17: kai idou phōnē ek tōn ouranōn legousa Houtos estin ho Huios mou ho agapētos, en hō eudokēsa.

4.1: Tote ho Iēsous anēchthē eis tēn erēmon hypo tou Pneumatos, peirasthēnai hypo tou diabolou.
4.2: kai nēsteusas hēmeras tesserakonta kai tesserakonta nyktas hysteron epeinasen.
4.3: kai proselthōn ho peirazōn eipen autō Ei Huios ei tou Theou, eipe hina hoi lithoi houtoi artoi genōntai.
4.4: ho de apokritheis eipen Gegraptai Ouk ep’ artō monō zēsetai ho anthrōpos, all’ epi panti rhēmati ekporeuomenō dia stomatos Theou.
4.5: Tote paralambanei auton ho diabolos eis tēn hagian polin, kai estēsen auton epi to pterygion tou hierou,
4.6: kai legei autō Ei Huios ei tou Theou, bale seauton katō; gegraptai gar hoti Tois angelois autou enteleitai peri sou kai epi cheirōn arousin se, mē pote proskopsēs pros lithon ton poda sou.
4.7: ephē autō ho Iēsous Palin gegraptai Ouk ekpeiraseis Kyrion ton Theon sou.
4.8: Palin paralambanei auton ho diabolos eis oros hypsēlon lian, kai deiknysin autō pasas tas basileias tou kosmou kai tēn doxan autōn,
4.9: kai eipen autō Tauta soi panta dōsō, ean pesōn proskynēsēs moi.
4.10: tote legei autō ho Iēsous Hypage, Satana; gegraptai gar Kyrion ton theon sou proskynēseis kai autō monō latreuseis.
4.11: Tote aphiēsin auton ho diabolos, kai idou angeloi prosēlthon kai diēkonoun autō.
4.12: Akousas de hoti Iōanēs paredothē anechōrēsen eis tēn Galilaian.
4.13: kai katalipōn tēn Nazara elthōn katōkēsen eis Kapharnaoum tēn parathalassian en horiois Zaboulōn kai Nephthaleim;
4.14: hina plērōthē to rhēthen dia Ēsaiou tou prophētou legontos
4.15: Gē Zaboulōn kai gē Nephthaleim, hodon thalassēs, peran tou Iordanou, Galilaia tōn ethnōn,
4.16: ho laos ho kathēmenos en skotia phōs eiden mega, kai tois kathēmenois en chōra kai skia thanatou phōs aneteilen autois.
4.17: Apo tote ērxato ho Iēsous kēryssein kai legein Metanoeite, ēngiken gar hē basileia tōn ouranōn.
4.18: Peripatōn de para tēn thalassan tēs Galilaias eiden dyo adelphous, Simōna ton legomenon Petron kai Andrean ton adelphon autou, ballontas amphiblēstron eis tēn thalassan; ēsan gar haleeis.
4.19: kai legei autois Deute opisō mou, kai poiēsō hymas haleeis anthrōpōn.
4.20: hoi de eutheōs aphentes ta diktya ēkolouthēsan autō.
4.21: Kai probas ekeithen eiden allous dyo adelphous, Iakōbon ton tou Zebedaiou kai Iōanēn ton adelphon autou, en tō ploiō meta Zebedaiou tou patros autōn katartizontas ta diktya autōn; kai ekalesen autous.
4.22: hoi de eutheōs aphentes to ploion kai ton patera autōn ēkolouthēsan autō.
4.23: Kai periēgen en holē tē Galilaia, didaskōn en tais synagōgais autōn kai kēryssōn to euangelion tēs basileias kai therapeuōn pasan noson kai pasan malakian en tō laō.
4.24: kai apēlthen hē akoē autou eis holēn tēn Syrian; kai prosēnenkan autō pantas tous kakōs echontas poikilais nosois kai basanois synechomenous, daimonizomenous kai selēniazomenous kai paralytikous, kai etherapeusen autous.
4.25: kai ēkolouthēsan autō ochloi polloi apo tēs Galilaias kai Dekapoleōs kai Hierosolymōn kai Ioudaias kai peran tou Iordanou.

5.1: Idōn de tous ochlous anebē eis to oros; kai kathisantos autou prosēlthan autō hoi mathētai autou;
5.2: kai anoixas to stoma autou edidasken autous legōn
5.3: Makarioi hoi ptōchoi tō pneumati, hoti autōn estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn.
5.4: makarioi hoi penthountes, hoti autoi paraklēthēsontai.
5.5: makarioi hoi praeis, hoti autoi klēronomēsousin tēn gēn.
5.6: makarioi hoi peinōntes kai dipsōntes tēn dikaiosynēn, hoti autoi chortasthēsontai.
5.7: makarioi hoi eleēmones, hoti autoi eleēthēsontai.
5.8: makarioi hoi katharoi tē kardia, hoti autoi ton Theon opsontai.
5.9: makarioi hoi eirēnopoioi, hoti autoi huioi Theou klēthēsontai.
5.10: makarioi hoi dediōgmenoi heneken dikaiosynēs, hoti autōn estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn.
5.11: makarioi este hotan oneidisōsin hymas kai diōxōsin kai eipōsin pan ponēron kath’ hymōn pseudomenoi heneken emou.
5.12: chairete kai agalliasthe, hoti ho misthos hymōn polys en tois ouranois; houtōs gar ediōxan tous prophētas tous pro hymōn.
5.13: Hymeis este to halas tēs gēs; ean de to halas mōranthē, en tini halisthēsetai? eis ouden ischyei eti ei mē blēthen exō katapateisthai hypo tōn anthrōpōn.
5.14: Hymeis este to phōs tou kosmou. ou dynatai polis krybēnai epanō orous keimenē;
5.15: oude kaiousin lychnon kai titheasin auton hypo ton modion, all’ epi tēn lychnian, kai lampei pasin tois en tē oikia.
5.16: houtōs lampsatō to phōs hymōn emprosthen tōn anthrōpōn, hopōs idōsin hymōn ta kala erga kai doxasōsin ton patera hymōn ton en tois ouranois.
5.17: Mē nomisēte hoti ēlthon katalysai ton nomon ē tous prophētas; ouk ēlthon katalysai alla plērōsai;
5.18: amēn gar legō hymin, heōs an parelthē ho ouranos kai hē gē, iōta hen ē mia keraia ou mē parelthē apo tou nomou, heōs an panta genētai.
5.19: hos ean oun lysē mian tōn entolōn toutōn tōn elachistōn kai didaxē houtōs tous anthrōpous, elachistos klēthēsetai en tē basileia tōn ouranōn; hos d’ an poiēsē kai didaxē, houtos megas klēthēsetai en tē basileia tōn ouranōn.
5.20: legō gar hymin hoti ean mē perisseusē hymōn hē dikaiosynē pleion tōn grammateōn kai Pharisaiōn, ou mē eiselthēte eis tēn basileian tōn ouranōn.
5.21: Ēkousate hoti errethē tois archaiois Ou phoneuseis; hos d’ an phoneusē, enochos estai tē krisei.
5.22: egō de legō hymin hoti pas ho orgizomenos tō adelphō autou enochos estai tē krisei; hos d’ an eipē tō adelphō autou Rhaka, enochos estai tō synedriō; hos d’ an eipē Mōre, enochos estai eis tēn geennan tou pyros.
5.23: ean oun prospherēs to dōron sou epi to thysiastērion kakei mnēsthēs hoti ho adelphos sou echei ti kata sou,
5.24: aphes ekei to dōron sou emprosthen tou thysiastēriou kai hypage prōton diallagēthi tō adelphō sou, kai tote elthōn prosphere to dōron sou.
5.25: isthi eunoōn tō antidikō sou tachy heōs hotou ei met’ autou en tē hodō; mē pote se paradō ho antidikos tō kritē, kai ho kritēs tō hypēretē, kai eis phylakēn blēthēsē;
5.26: amēn legō soi, ou mē exelthēs ekeithen heōs an apodōs ton eschaton kodrantēn.
5.28: egō de legō hymin hoti pas ho blepōn gynaika pros to epithymēsai autēn ēdē emoicheusen autēn en tē kardia autou.
5.29: ei de ho ophthalmos sou ho dexios skandalizei se, exele auton kai bale apo sou; sympherei gar soi hina apolētai hen tōn melōn sou kai mē holon to sōma sou blēthē eis geennan.
5.30: kai ei hē dexia sou cheir skandalizei se, ekkopson autēn kai bale apo sou; sympherei gar soi hina apolētai hen tōn melōn sou kai mē holon to sōma sou eis geennan apelthē.
5.31: Errethē de Hos an apolysē tēn gynaika autou, dotō autē apostasion.
5.32: egō de legō hymin hoti pas ho apolyōn tēn gynaika autou parektos logou porneias poiei autēn moicheuthēnai, kai hos ean apolelymenēn gamēsē moichatai.
5.33: Palin ēkousate hoti errethē tois archaiois Ouk epiorkēseis, apodōseis de tō Kyriō tous horkous sou.
5.34: egō de legō hymin mē omosai holōs; mēte en tō ouranō, hoti thronos estin tou Theou;
5.35: mēte en tē gē, hoti hypopodion estin tōn podōn autou; mēte eis Hierosolyma, hoti polis estin tou megalou Basileōs;
5.36: mēte en tē kephalē sou omosēs, hoti ou dynasai mian tricha leukēn poiēsai ē melainan.
5.37: estō de ho logos hymōn nai nai, ou ou; to de perisson toutōn ek tou ponērou estin.
5.38: Ēkousate hoti errethē Ophthalmon anti ophthalmou kai odonta anti odontos.
5.39: egō de legō hymin mē antistēnai tō ponērō; all’ hostis se rhapizei eis tēn dexian siagona sou, strepson autō kai tēn allēn;
5.40: kai tō thelonti soi krithēnai kai ton chitōna sou labein, aphes autō kai to himation;
5.41: kai hostis se angareusei milion hen, hypage met’ autou dyo.
5.42: tō aitounti se dos, kai ton thelonta apo sou danisasthai mē apostraphēs.
5.43: Ēkousate hoti errethē Agapēseis ton plēsion sou kai misēseis ton echthron sou.
5.44: egō de legō hymin, agapate tous echthrous hymōn kai proseuchesthe hyper tōn diōkontōn hymas;
5.45: hopōs genēsthe huioi tou Patros hymōn tou en ouranois, hoti ton hēlion autou anatellei epi ponērous kai agathous kai brechei epi dikaious kai adikous.
5.46: ean gar agapēsēte tous agapōntas hymas, tina misthon echete? ouchi kai hoi telōnai to auto poiousin?
5.47: kai ean aspasēsthe tous adelphous hymōn monon, ti perisson poieite? ouchi kai hoi ethnikoi to auto poiousin?
5.48: Esesthe oun hymeis teleioi hōs ho Patēr hymōn ho ouranios teleios estin.

6.1: Prosechete de tēn dikaiosynēn hymōn mē poiein emprosthen tōn anthrōpōn pros to theathēnai autois; ei de mēge, misthon ouk echete para tō Patri hymōn tō en tois ouranois.
6.2: Hotan oun poiēs eleēmosynēn, mē salpisēs emprosthen sou, hōsper hoi hypokritai poiousin en tais synagōgais kai en tais rhymais, hopōs doxasthōsin hypo tōn anthrōpōn; amēn legō hymin, apechousin ton misthon autōn.
6.3: sou de poiountos eleēmosynēn mē gnōtō hē aristera sou ti poiei hē dexia sou,
6.4: hopōs ē sou hē eleēmosynē en tō kryptō; kai ho Patēr sou ho blepōn en tō kryptō apodōsei soi.
6.5: Kai hotan proseuchēsthe, ouk esesthe hōs hoi hypokritai; hoti philousin en tais synagōgais kai en tais gōniais tōn plateiōn hestōtes proseuchesthai, hopōs phanōsin tois anthrōpois; amēn legō hymin, apechousin ton misthon autōn.
6.6: sy de hotan proseuchē, eiselthe eis to tameion sou kai kleisas tēn thyran sou proseuxai tō Patri sou tō en tō kryptō; kai ho Patēr sou ho blepōn en tō kryptō apodōsei soi.
6.7: Proseuchomenoi de mē battalogēsēte hōsper hoi ethnikoi; dokousin gar hoti en tē polylogia autōn eisakousthēsontai.
6.8: mē oun homoiōthēte autois; oiden gar ho Patēr hymōn hōn chreian echete pro tou hymas aitēsai auton.
6.9: houtōs oun proseuchesthe hymeis Pater hēmōn ho en tois ouranois; Hagiasthētō to onoma sou;
6.10: elthatō hē basileia sou; genēthētō to thelēma sou, hōs en ouranō kai epi gēs;
6.11: Ton arton hēmōn ton epiousion dos hēmin sēmeron;
6.12: kai aphes hēmin ta opheilēmata hēmōn, hōs kai hēmeis aphēkamen tois opheiletais hēmōn;
6.13: kai mē eisenenkēs hēmas eis peirasmon, alla rhysai hēmas apo tou ponērou.
6.14: Ean gar aphēte tois anthrōpois ta paraptōmata autōn, aphēsei kai hymin ho Patēr hymōn ho ouranios;
6.15: ean de mē aphēte tois anthrōpois, oude ho Patēr hymōn aphēsei ta paraptōmata hymōn.
6.16: Hotan de nēsteuēte, mē ginesthe hōs hoi hypokritai skythrōpoi; aphanizousin gar ta prosōpa autōn hopōs phanōsin tois anthrōpois nēsteuontes; amēn legō hymin, apechousin ton misthon autōn.
6.17: sy de nēsteuōn aleipsai sou tēn kephalēn kai to prosōpon sou nipsai,
6.18: hopōs mē phanēs tois anthrōpois nēsteuōn alla tō Patri sou tō en tō kryphaiō; kai ho Patēr sou ho blepōn en tō kryphaiō apodōsei soi.
6.19: Mē thēsaurizete hymin thēsaurous epi tēs gēs, hopou sēs kai brōsis aphanizei, kai hopou kleptai dioryssousin kai kleptousin;
6.20: thēsaurizete de hymin thēsaurous en ouranō, hopou oute sēs oute brōsis aphanizei, kai hopou kleptai ou dioryssousin oude kleptousin;
6.21: hopou gar estin ho thēsauros sou, ekei estai kai hē kardia sou.
6.22: HO lychnos tou sōmatos estin ho ophthalmos. ean oun ē ho ophthalmos sou haplous, holon to sōma sou phōteinon estai;
6.23: ean de ho ophthalmos sou ponēros ē, holon to sōma sou skoteinon estai. ei oun to phōs to en soi skotos estin, to skotos poson.
6.24: Oudeis dynatai dysi kyriois douleuein; ē gar ton hena misēsei kai ton heteron agapēsei, ē henos anthexetai kai tou heterou kataphronēsei; ou dynasthe Theō douleuein kai mamōna.
6.25: Dia touto legō hymin, mē merimnate tē psychē hymōn ti phagēte, ē ti piēte mēde tō sōmati hymōn ti endysēsthe; ouchi hē psychē pleion estin tēs trophēs kai to sōma tou endymatos?
6.26: emblepsate eis ta peteina tou ouranou, hoti ou speirousin oude therizousin oude synagousin eis apothēkas, kai ho Patēr hymōn ho ouranios trephei auta; ouch hymeis mallon diapherete autōn?
6.27: tis de ex hymōn merimnōn dynatai prostheinai epi tēn hēlikian autou pēchyn hena?
6.28: kai peri endymatos ti merimnate? katamathete ta krina tou agrou pōs auxanousin; ou kopiōsin oude nēthousin;
6.29: legō de hymin hoti oude Solomōn en pasē tē doxē autou periebaleto hōs hen toutōn.
6.30: ei de ton chorton tou agrou sēmeron onta kai aurion eis klibanon ballomenon ho Theos houtōs amphiennysin, ou pollō mallon hymas, oligopistoi?
6.31: mē oun merimnēsēte legontes; Ti phagōmen? ē; Ti piōmen? ē; Ti peribalōmetha?
6.32: panta gar tauta ta ethnē epizētousin; oiden gar ho Patēr hymōn ho ouranios hoti chrēzete toutōn hapantōn.
6.33: zēteite de prōton tēn basileian kai tēn dikaiosynēn autou, kai tauta panta prostethēsetai hymin.
6.34: mē oun merimnēsēte eis tēn aurion, hē gar aurion merimnēsei heautēs; arketon tē hēmera hē kakia autēs.

7.2: en hō gar krimati krinete krithēsesthe, kai en hō metrō metreite metrēthēsetai hymin.
7.3: ti de blepeis to karphos to en tō ophthalmō tou adelphou sou, tēn de en tō sō ophthalmō dokon ou katanoeis?
7.4: ē pōs ereis tō adelphō sou; Aphes ekbalō to karphos ek tou ophthalmou sou, kai idou hē dokos en tō ophthalmō sou?
7.5: hypokrita, ekbale prōton ek tou ophthalmou sou tēn dokon, kai tote diablepseis ekbalein to karphos ek tou ophthalmou tou adelphou sou.
7.6: Mē dōte to hagion tois kysin, mēde balēte tous margaritas hymōn emprosthen tōn choirōn, mē pote katapatēsousin autous en tois posin autōn kai straphentes rhēxōsin hymas.
7.7: Aiteite, kai dothēsetai hymin; zēteite, kai heurēsete; krouete, kai anoigēsetai hymin.
7.8: pas gar ho aitōn lambanei kai ho zētōn heuriskei kai tō krouonti anoigēsetai.
7.9: ē tis estin ex hymōn anthrōpos, hon aitēsei ho huios autou arton, mē lithon epidōsei autō?
7.10: ē kai ichthyn aitēsei, mē ophin epidōsei autō?
7.11: ei oun hymeis ponēroi ontes oidate domata agatha didonai tois teknois hymōn, posō mallon ho Patēr hymōn ho en tois ouranois dōsei agatha tois aitousin auton.
7.12: Panta oun hosa ean thelēte hina poiōsin hymin hoi anthrōpoi, houtōs kai hymeis poieite autois; houtos gar estin ho nomos kai hoi prophētai.
7.13: Eiselthate dia tēs stenēs pylēs; hoti plateia hē pylē kai eurychōros hē hodos hē apagousa eis tēn apōleian, kai polloi eisin hoi eiserchomenoi di’ autēs;
7.14: hoti stenē hē pylē kai tethlimmenē hē hodos hē apagousa eis tēn zōēn, kai oligoi eisin hoi heuriskontes autēn.
7.15: Prosechete apo tōn pseudoprophētōn, hoitines erchontai pros hymas en endymasin probatōn esōthen de eisin lykoi harpages.
7.16: apo tōn karpōn autōn epignōsesthe autous. mēti syllegousin apo akanthōn staphylas ē apo tribolōn syka?
7.17: houtōs pan dendron agathon karpous kalous poiei, to de sapron dendron karpous ponērous poiei;
7.18: ou dynatai dendron agathon karpous ponērous enenkein, oude dendron sapron karpous kalous enenkein.
7.19: pan dendron mē poioun karpon kalon ekkoptetai kai eis pyr balletai.
7.20: arage apo tōn karpōn autōn epignōsesthe autous.
7.21: Ou pas ho legōn moi Kyrie Kyrie, eiseleusetai eis tēn basileian tōn ouranōn, all’ ho poiōn to thelēma tou Patros mou tou en tois ouranois.
7.22: polloi erousin moi en ekeinē tē hēmera Kyrie Kyrie, ou tō sō onomati eprophēteusamen, kai tō sō onomati daimonia exebalomen, kai tō sō onomati dynameis pollas epoiēsamen?
7.23: kai tote homologēsō autois hoti Oudepote egnōn hymas; apochōreite ap’ emou hoi ergazomenoi tēn anomian.
7.24: Pas oun hostis akouei mou tous logous toutous kai poiei autous, homoiōthēsetai andri phronimō, hostis ōkodomēsen autou tēn oikian epi tēn petran.
7.25: kai katebē hē brochē kai ēlthon hoi potamoi kai epneusan hoi anemoi kai prosepesan tē oikia ekeinē, kai ouk epesen; tethemeliōto gar epi tēn petran.
7.26: kai pas ho akouōn mou tous logous toutous kai mē poiōn autous homoiōthēsetai andri mōrō, hostis ōkodomēsen autou tēn oikian epi tēn ammon.
7.27: kai katebē hē brochē kai ēlthon hoi potamoi kai epneusan hoi anemoi kai prosekopsan tē oikia ekeinē, kai epesen, kai ēn hē ptōsis autēs megalē.
7.28: Kai egeneto hote etelesen ho Iēsous tous logous toutous, exeplēssonto hoi ochloi epi tē didachē autou;
7.29: ēn gar didaskōn autous hōs exousian echōn, kai ouch hōs hoi grammateis autōn.

8.1: Katabantos de autou apo tou orous ēkolouthēsan autō ochloi polloi.
8.2: kai idou lepros proselthōn prosekynei autō legōn Kyrie, ean thelēs dynasai me katharisai.
8.3: kai ekteinas tēn cheira hēpsato autou legōn Thelō, katharisthēti. kai eutheōs ekatheristhē autou hē lepra.
8.4: kai legei autō ho Iēsous Hora mēdeni eipēs, alla hypage seauton deixon tō hierei, kai prosenenkon to dōron ho prosetaxen Mōusēs eis martyrion autois.
8.5: Eiselthontos de autou eis Kapharnaoum prosēlthen autō hekatontarchos parakalōn auton
8.6: kai legōn Kyrie, ho pais mou beblētai en tē oikia paralytikos, deinōs basanizomenos.
8.7: legei autō Egō elthōn therapeusō auton.
8.8: apokritheis de ho hekatontarchos ephē Kyrie, ouk eimi hikanos hina mou hypo tēn stegēn eiselthēs; alla monon eipe logō, kai iathēsetai ho pais mou.
8.9: kai gar egō anthrōpos eimi hypo exousian, echōn hyp’ emauton stratiōtas, kai legō toutō Poreuthēti, kai poreuetai, kai allō Erchou, kai erchetai, kai tō doulō mou Poiēson touto, kai poiei.
8.10: akousas de ho Iēsous ethaumasen kai eipen tois akolouthousin Amēn legō hymin, par’ oudeni tosautēn pistin en tō Israēl heuron.
8.11: legō de hymin hoti polloi apo anatolōn kai dysmōn hēxousin kai anaklithēsontai meta Abraam kai Isaak kai Iakōb en tē basileia tōn ouranōn;
8.12: hoi de huioi tēs basileias ekblēthēsontai eis to skotos to exōteron; ekei estai ho klauthmos kai ho brygmos tōn odontōn.
8.13: kai eipen ho Iēsous tō hekatontarchē Hypage, hōs episteusas genēthētō soi. kai iathē ho pais en tē hōra ekeinē.
8.14: Kai elthōn ho Iēsous eis tēn oikian Petrou eiden tēn pentheran autou beblēmenēn kai pyressousan;
8.15: kai hēpsato tēs cheiros autēs, kai aphēken autēn ho pyretos; kai ēgerthē, kai diēkonei autō.
8.16: Opsias de genomenēs prosēnenkan autō daimonizomenous pollous; kai exebalen ta pneumata logō, kai pantas tous kakōs echontas etherapeusen;
8.17: hopōs plērōthē to rhēthen dia Ēsaiou tou prophētou legontos Autos tas astheneias hēmōn elaben kai tas nosous ebastasen.
8.18: Idōn de ho Iēsous ochlon peri auton ekeleusen apelthein eis to peran.
8.19: Kai proselthōn heis grammateus eipen autō Didaskale, akolouthēsō soi hopou ean aperchē.
8.20: kai legei autō ho Iēsous Hai alōpekes phōleous echousin kai ta peteina tou ouranou kataskēnōseis, ho de Huios tou anthrōpou ouk echei pou tēn kephalēn klinē.
8.21: heteros de tōn mathētōn eipen autō Kyrie, epitrepson moi prōton apelthein kai thapsai ton patera mou.
8.22: ho de Iēsous legei autō Akolouthei moi, kai aphes tous nekrous thapsai tous heautōn nekrous.
8.23: Kai embanti autō eis to ploion ēkolouthēsan autō hoi mathētai autou.
8.24: kai idou seismos megas egeneto en tē thalassē, hōste to ploion kalyptesthai hypo tōn kymatōn; autos de ekatheuden.
8.25: kai proselthontes ēgeiran auton legontes Kyrie, sōson, apollymetha.
8.26: kai legei autois Ti deiloi este, oligopistoi? tote egertheis epetimēsen tois anemois kai tē thalassē, kai egeneto galēnē megalē.
8.27: hoi de anthrōpoi ethaumasan legontes Potapos estin houtos hoti kai hoi anemoi kai hē thalassa autō hypakouousin?
8.28: Kai elthontos autou eis to peran eis tēn chōran tōn Gadarēnōn hypēntēsan autō dyo daimonizomenoi ek tōn mnēmeiōn exerchomenoi, chalepoi lian hōste mē ischyein tina parelthein dia tēs hodou ekeinēs.
8.29: kai idou ekraxan legontes Ti hēmin kai soi, Huie tou Theou? ēlthes hōde pro kairou basanisai hēmas?
8.30: ēn de makran ap’ autōn agelē choirōn pollōn boskomenē.
8.31: hoi de daimones parekaloun auton legontes Ei ekballeis hēmas, aposteilon hēmas eis tēn agelēn tōn choirōn.
8.32: kai eipen autois Hypagete. hoi de exelthontes apēlthon eis tous choirous; kai idou hōrmēsen pasa hē agelē kata tou krēmnou eis tēn thalassan, kai apethanon en tois hydasin.
8.33: hoi de boskontes ephygon, kai apelthontes eis tēn polin apēngeilan panta kai ta tōn daimonizomenōn.
8.34: kai idou pasa hē polis exēlthen eis hypantēsin tō Iēsou, kai idontes auton parekalesan hopōs metabē apo tōn horiōn autōn.

9.1: Kai embas eis ploion dieperasen, kai ēlthen eis tēn idian polin.
9.2: Kai idou prosepheron autō paralytikon epi klinēs beblēmenon. kai idōn ho Iēsous tēn pistin autōn eipen tō paralytikō Tharsei, teknon, aphientai sou hai hamartiai.
9.3: kai idou tines tōn grammateōn eipan en heautois Houtos blasphēmei.
9.4: kai eidōs ho Iēsous tas enthymēseis autōn eipen Hina ti enthymeisthe ponēra en tais kardiais hymōn?
9.5: ti gar estin eukopōteron, eipein Aphientai sou hai hamartiai, ē eipein Egeire kai peripatei?
9.6: hina de eidēte hoti exousian echei ho Huios tou anthrōpou epi tēs gēs aphienai hamartias — tote legei tō paralytikō Egeire aron sou tēn klinēn kai hypage eis ton oikon sou.
9.7: kai egertheis apēlthen eis ton oikon autou.
9.8: idontes de hoi ochloi ephobēthēsan kai edoxasan ton Theon ton donta exousian toiautēn tois anthrōpois.
9.9: Kai paragōn ho Iēsous ekeithen eiden anthrōpon kathēmenon epi to telōnion, Maththaion legomenon, kai legei autō Akolouthei moi. kai anastas ēkolouthēsen autō.
9.10: Kai egeneto autou anakeimenou en tē oikia, kai idou polloi telōnai kai hamartōloi elthontes synanekeinto tō Iēsou kai tois mathētais autou.
9.11: kai idontes hoi Pharisaioi elegon tois mathētais autou Dia ti meta tōn telōnōn kai hamartōlōn esthiei ho didaskalos hymōn?
9.12: ho de akousas eipen Ou chreian echousin hoi ischyontes iatrou all’ hoi kakōs echontes.
9.13: poreuthentes de mathete ti estin Eleos thelō kai ou thysian; ou gar ēlthon kalesai dikaious alla hamartōlous.
9.14: Tote proserchontai autō hoi mathētai Iōanou legontes Dia ti hēmeis kai hoi Pharisaioi nēsteuomen, hoi de mathētai sou ou nēsteuousin?
9.15: kai eipen autois ho Iēsous Mē dynantai hoi huioi tou nymphōnos penthein eph’ hoson met’ autōn estin ho nymphios? eleusontai de hēmerai hotan aparthē ap’ autōn ho nymphios, kai tote nēsteusousin.
9.16: oudeis de epiballei epiblēma rhakous agnaphou epi himatiō palaiō; airei gar to plērōma autou apo tou himatiou, kai cheiron schisma ginetai.
9.17: oude ballousin oinon neon eis askous palaious; ei de mēge, rhēgnyntai hoi askoi, kai ho oinos ekcheitai kai hoi askoi apollyntai; alla ballousin oinon neon eis askous kainous, kai amphoteroi syntērountai.
9.18: Tauta autou lalountos autois idou archōn heis proselthōn prosekynei autō legōn hoti HĒ thygatēr mou arti eteleutēsen; alla elthōn epithes tēn cheira sou ep’ autēn, kai zēsetai.
9.19: kai egertheis ho Iēsous ēkolouthei autō kai hoi mathētai autou.
9.20: Kai idou gynē haimorroousa dōdeka etē proselthousa opisthen hēpsato tou kraspedou tou himatiou autou;
9.21: elegen gar en heautē Ean monon hapsōmai tou himatiou autou sōthēsomai.
9.22: ho de Iēsous strapheis kai idōn autēn eipen Tharsei, thygater; hē pistis sou sesōken se. kai esōthē hē gynē apo tēs hōras ekeinēs.
9.23: kai elthōn ho Iēsous eis tēn oikian tou archontos kai idōn tous aulētas kai ton ochlon thoryboumenon
9.24: elegen; Anachōreite; ou gar apethanen to korasion alla katheudei. kai kategelōn autou.
9.25: hote de exeblēthē ho ochlos, eiselthōn ekratēsen tēs cheiros autēs, kai ēgerthē to korasion.
9.26: kai exēlthen hē phēmē hautē eis holēn tēn gēn ekeinēn.
9.27: Kai paragonti ekeithen tō Iēsou ēkolouthēsan dyo typhloi krazontes kai legontes Eleēson hēmas, huios Daueid.
9.28: elthonti de eis tēn oikian prosēlthon autō hoi typhloi, kai legei autois ho Iēsous Pisteuete hoti dynamai touto poiēsai? legousin autō Nai, Kyrie.
9.29: tote hēpsato tōn ophthalmōn autōn legōn Kata tēn pistin hymōn genēthētō hymin.
9.30: kai ēneōchthēsan autōn hoi ophthalmoi. kai enebrimēthē autois ho Iēsous legōn Horate, mēdeis ginōsketō.
9.31: hoi de exelthontes diephēmisan auton en holē tē gē ekeinē.
9.32: Autōn de exerchomenōn, idou prosēnenkan autō kōphon daimonizomenon.
9.33: kai ekblēthentos tou daimoniou elalēsen ho kōphos. kai ethaumasan hoi ochloi legontes Oudepote ephanē houtōs en tō Israēl.
9.34: hoi de Pharisaioi elegon En tō archonti tōn daimoniōn ekballei ta daimonia.
9.35: Kai periēgen ho Iēsous tas poleis pasas kai tas kōmas, didaskōn en tais synagōgais autōn kai kēryssōn to euangelion tēs basileias kai therapeuōn pasan noson kai pasan malakian.
9.36: Idōn de tous ochlous esplanchnisthē peri autōn, hoti ēsan eskylmenoi kai errimmenoi hōsei probata mē echonta poimena.
9.37: tote legei tois mathētais autou HO men therismos polys, hoi de ergatai oligoi;
9.38: deēthēte oun tou Kyriou tou therismou hopōs ekbalē ergatas eis ton therismon autou.

10.1: Kai proskalesamenos tous dōdeka mathētas autou edōken autois exousian pneumatōn akathartōn hōste ekballein auta kai therapeuein pasan noson kai pasan malakian.
10.2: Tōn de dōdeka apostolōn ta onomata estin tauta; prōtos Simōn ho legomenos Petros kai Andreas ho adelphos autou, kai Iakōbos ho tou Zebedaiou kai Iōanēs ho adelphos autou,
10.3: Philippos kai Bartholomaios, Thōmas kai Maththaios ho telōnēs, Iakōbos ho tou Halphaiou kai Thaddaios,
10.4: Simōn ho Kananaios kai Ioudas ho Iskariōtēs ho kai paradous auton.
10.5: Toutous tous dōdeka apesteilen ho Iēsous parangeilas autois legōn Eis hodon ethnōn mē apelthēte kai eis polin Samareitōn mē eiselthēte;
10.6: poreuesthe de mallon pros ta probata ta apolōlota oikou Israēl.
10.7: poreuomenoi de kēryssete legontes hoti Ēngiken hē basileia tōn ouranōn.
10.8: asthenountas therapeuete, nekrous egeirete, leprous katharizete, daimonia ekballete; dōrean elabete, dōrean dote.
10.9: Mē ktēsēsthe chryson mēde argyron mēde chalkon eis tas zōnas hymōn,
10.10: mē pēran eis hodon mēde dyo chitōnas mēde hypodēmata mēde rhabdon; axios gar ho ergatēs tēs trophēs autou.
10.11: eis hēn d’ an polin ē kōmēn eiselthēte, exetasate tis en autē axios estin; kakei meinate heōs an exelthēte.
10.12: eiserchomenoi de eis tēn oikian aspasasthe autēn;
10.13: kai ean men ē hē oikia axia, elthatō hē eirēnē hymōn ep’ autēn; ean de mē ē axia, hē eirēnē hymōn pros hymas epistraphētō.
10.14: kai hos an mē dexētai hymas mēde akousē tous logous hymōn, exerchomenoi exō tēs oikias ē tēs poleōs ekeinēs ektinaxate ton koniorton tōn podōn hymōn.
10.15: amēn legō hymin, anektoteron estai gē Sodomōn kai Gomorrōn en hēmera kriseōs ē tē polei ekeinē.
10.16: Idou egō apostellō hymas hōs probata en mesō lykōn; ginesthe oun phronimoi hōs hoi opheis kai akeraioi hōs hai peristerai.
10.17: Prosechete de apo tōn anthrōpōn; paradōsousin gar hymas eis synedria, kai en tais synagōgais autōn mastigōsousin hymas;
10.18: kai epi hēgemonas de kai basileis achthēsesthe heneken emou, eis martyrion autois kai tois ethnesin.
10.19: hotan de paradōsin hymas, mē merimnēsēte pōs ē ti lalēsēte; dothēsetai gar hymin en ekeinē tē hōra ti lalēsēte;
10.20: ou gar hymeis este hoi lalountes alla to Pneuma tou Patros hymōn to laloun en hymin.
10.21: paradōsei de adelphos adelphon eis thanaton kai patēr teknon, kai epanastēsontai tekna epi goneis kai thanatōsousin autous.
10.22: kai esesthe misoumenoi hypo pantōn dia to onoma mou; ho de hypomeinas eis telos, houtos sōthēsetai.
10.23: hotan de diōkōsin hymas en tē polei tautē, pheugete eis tēn heteran; amēn gar legō hymin, ou mē telesēte tas poleis tou Israēl heōs elthē ho Huios tou anthrōpou.
10.24: Ouk estin mathētēs hyper ton didaskalon oude doulos hyper ton kyrion autou.
10.25: arketon tō mathētē hina genētai hōs ho didaskalos autou, kai ho doulos hōs ho kyrios autou. ei ton oikodespotēn Beelzeboul epekalesan, posō mallon tous oikiakous autou.
10.26: mē oun phobēthēte autous; ouden gar estin kekalymmenon ho ouk apokalyphthēsetai, kai krypton ho ou gnōsthēsetai.
10.27: ho legō hymin en tē skotia, eipate en tō phōti; kai ho eis to ous akouete, kēryxate epi tōn dōmatōn.
10.28: kai mē phobeisthe apo tōn apoktennontōn to sōma, tēn de psychēn mē dynamenōn apokteinai; phobeisthe de mallon ton dynamenon kai psychēn kai sōma apolesai en geennē.
10.29: ouchi dyo strouthia assariou pōleitai? kai hen ex autōn ou peseitai epi tēn gēn aneu tou Patros hymōn.
10.30: hymōn de kai hai triches tēs kephalēs pasai ērithmēmenai eisin.
10.31: mē oun phobeisthe; pollōn strouthiōn diapherete hymeis.
10.32: Pas oun hostis homologēsei en emoi emprosthen tōn anthrōpōn, homologēsō kagō en autō emprosthen tou Patros mou tou en tois ouranois;
10.33: hostis d’ an arnēsētai me emprosthen tōn anthrōpōn, arnēsomai kagō auton emprosthen tou Patros mou tou en tois ouranois.
10.34: Mē nomisēte hoti ēlthon balein eirēnēn epi tēn gēn; ouk ēlthon balein eirēnēn alla machairan.
10.35: ēlthon gar dichasai anthrōpon kata tou patros autou kai thygatera kata tēs mētros autēs kai nymphēn kata tēs pentheras autēs,
10.36: kai echthroi tou anthrōpou hoi oikiakoi autou.
10.37: HO philōn patera ē mētera hyper eme ouk estin mou axios; kai ho philōn huion ē thygatera hyper eme ouk estin mou axios;
10.38: kai hos ou lambanei ton stauron autou kai akolouthei opisō mou, ouk estin mou axios.
10.39: ho heurōn tēn psychēn autou apolesei autēn, kai ho apolesas tēn psychēn autou heneken emou heurēsei autēn.
10.40: HO dechomenos hymas eme dechetai, kai ho eme dechomenos dechetai ton aposteilanta me.
10.41: ho dechomenos prophētēn eis onoma prophētou misthon prophētou lēmpsetai, kai ho dechomenos dikaion eis onoma dikaiou misthon dikaiou lēmpsetai.
10.42: kai hos ean potisē hena tōn mikrōn toutōn potērion psychrou monon eis onoma mathētou, amēn legō hymin, ou mē apolesē ton misthon autou.

11.1: Kai egeneto hote etelesen ho Iēsous diatassōn tois dōdeka mathētais autou, metebē ekeithen tou didaskein kai kēryssein en tais polesin autōn.
11.2: HO de Iōanēs akousas en tō desmōtēriō ta erga tou Christou, pempsas dia tōn mathētōn autou
11.3: eipen autō Sy ei ho erchomenos, ē heteron prosdokōmen?
11.4: kai apokritheis ho Iēsous eipen autois Poreuthentes apangeilate Iōanei ha akouete kai blepete;
11.5: typhloi anablepousin kai chōloi peripatousin, leproi katharizontai kai kōphoi akouousin, kai nekroi egeirontai kai ptōchoi euangelizontai;
11.6: kai makarios estin hos ean mē skandalisthē en emoi.
11.7: Toutōn de poreuomenōn ērxato ho Iēsous legein tois ochlois peri Iōanou Ti exēlthate eis tēn erēmon theasasthai? kalamon hypo anemou saleuomenon?
11.8: alla ti exēlthate idein? anthrōpon en malakois ēmphiesmenon? idou hoi ta malaka phorountes en tois oikois tōn basileōn.
11.9: alla ti exēlthate? prophētēn idein? nai, legō hymin, kai perissoteron prophētou.
11.10: houtos estin peri hou gegraptai Idou egō apostellō ton angelon mou pro prosōpou sou, hos kataskeuasei tēn hodon sou emprosthen sou.
11.11: amēn legō hymin, ouk egēgertai en gennētois gynaikōn meizōn Iōanou tou Baptistou; ho de mikroteros en tē basileia tōn ouranōn meizōn autou estin.
11.12: apo de tōn hēmerōn Iōanou tou Baptistou heōs arti hē basileia tōn ouranōn biazetai, kai biastai harpazousin autēn.
11.13: pantes gar hoi prophētai kai ho nomos heōs Iōanou eprophēteusan;
11.14: kai ei thelete dexasthai, autos estin Hēleias ho mellōn erchesthai.
11.16: Tini de homoiōsō tēn genean tautēn? homoia estin paidiois kathēmenois en tais agorais ha prosphōnounta tois heterois
11.17: legousin Ēulēsamen hymin kai ouk ōrchēsasthe; ethrēnēsamen kai ouk ekopsasthe;
11.18: ēlthen gar Iōanēs mēte esthiōn mēte pinōn, kai legousin Daimonion echei.
11.19: ēlthen ho Huios tou anthrōpou esthiōn kai pinōn, kai legousin Idou anthrōpos phagos kai oinopotēs, telōnōn philos kai hamartōlōn. kai edikaiōthē hē sophia apo tōn ergōn autēs.
11.20: Tote ērxato oneidizein tas poleis en hais egenonto hai pleistai dynameis autou, hoti ou metenoēsan;
11.21: Ouai soi, Chorazein; ouai soi, Bēthsaidan; hoti ei en Tyrō kai Sidōni egenonto hai dynameis hai genomenai en hymin, palai an en sakkō kai spodō metenoēsan.
11.22: plēn legō hymin, Tyrō kai Sidōni anektoteron estai en hēmera kriseōs ē hymin.
11.23: kai sy, Kapharnaoum, mē heōs ouranou hypsōthēsē? heōs Haidou katabēsē; hoti ei en Sodomois egenēthēsan hai dynameis hai genomenai en soi, emeinen an mechri tēs sēmeron.
11.24: plēn legō hymin hoti gē Sodomōn anektoteron estai en hēmera kriseōs ē soi.
11.25: En ekeinō tō kairō apokritheis ho Iēsous eipen Exomologoumai soi, Pater, Kyrie tou ouranou kai tēs gēs, hoti ekrypsas tauta apo sophōn kai synetōn, kai apekalypsas auta nēpiois;
11.26: nai, ho Patēr, hoti houtōs eudokia egeneto emprosthen sou.
11.27: Panta moi paredothē hypo tou Patros mou, kai oudeis epiginōskei ton Huion ei mē ho Patēr, oude ton Patera tis epiginōskei ei mē ho Huios kai hō ean boulētai ho Huios apokalypsai.
11.28: Deute pros me pantes hoi kopiōntes kai pephortismenoi, kagō anapausō hymas.
11.29: arate ton zygon mou eph’ hymas kai mathete ap’ emou, hoti praus eimi kai tapeinos tē kardia, kai heurēsete anapausin tais psychais hymōn;
11.30: ho gar zygos mou chrēstos kai to phortion mou elaphron estin.

12.1: En ekeinō tō kairō eporeuthē ho Iēsous tois sabbasin dia tōn sporimōn; hoi de mathētai autou epeinasan kai ērxanto tillein stachyas kai esthiein.
12.2: hoi de Pharisaioi idontes eipan autō Idou hoi mathētai sou poiousin ho ouk exestin poiein en sabbatō.
12.3: ho de eipen autois Ouk anegnōte ti epoiēsen Daueid hote epeinasen kai hoi met’ autou?
12.4: pōs eisēlthen eis ton oikon tou Theou kai tous artous tēs protheseōs ephagon, ho ouk exon ēn autō phagein oude tois met’ autou, ei mē tois hiereusin monois?
12.5: ē ouk anegnōte en tō nomō hoti tois sabbasin hoi hiereis en tō hierō to sabbaton bebēlousin kai anaitioi eisin?
12.6: legō de hymin hoti tou hierou meizon estin hōde.
12.7: ei de egnōkeite ti estin Eleos thelō kai ou thysian, ouk an katedikasate tous anaitious.
12.8: kyrios gar estin tou sabbatou ho Huios tou anthrōpou.
12.9: Kai metabas ekeithen ēlthen eis tēn synagōgēn autōn.
12.10: kai idou anthrōpos cheira echōn xēran; kai epērōtēsan auton legontes Ei exestin tois sabbasin therapeusai? hina katēgorēsōsin autou.
12.11: ho de eipen autois Tis estai ex hymōn anthrōpos hos hexei probaton hen, kai ean empesē touto tois sabbasin eis bothynon, ouchi kratēsei auto kai egerei?
12.12: posō oun diapherei anthrōpos probatou. hōste exestin tois sabbasin kalōs poiein.
12.13: tote legei tō anthrōpō Ekteinon sou tēn cheira. kai exeteinen, kai apekatestathē hygiēs hōs hē allē.
12.14: exelthontes de hoi Pharisaioi symboulion elabon kat’ autou hopōs auton apolesōsin.
12.15: HO de Iēsous gnous anechōrēsen ekeithen. kai ēkolouthēsan autō polloi, kai etherapeusen autous pantas,
12.16: kai epetimēsen autois hina mē phaneron auton poiēsōsin;
12.17: hina plērōthē to rhēthen dia Hēsaiou tou prophētou legontos
12.18: Idou ho pais mou hon hēretisa, ho agapētos mou hon eudokēsen hē psychē mou; thēsō to Pneuma mou ep’ auton, kai krisin tois ethnesin apangelei.
12.19: ouk erisei oude kraugasei, oude akousei tis en tais plateiais tēn phōnēn autou.
12.20: kalamon syntetrimmenon ou kateaxei kai linon typhomenon ou sbesei, heōs an ekbalē eis nikos tēn krisin.
12.21: kai tō onomati autou ethnē elpiousin.
12.22: Tote prosēnechthē autō daimonizomenos typhlos kai kōphos; kai etherapeusen auton, hōste ton kōphon lalein kai blepein.
12.23: kai existanto pantes hoi ochloi kai elegon Mēti houtos estin ho huios Daueid?
12.24: hoi de Pharisaioi akousantes eipon Houtos ouk ekballei ta daimonia ei mē en tō Beelzeboul archonti tōn daimoniōn.
12.25: eidōs de tas enthymēseis autōn eipen autois Pasa basileia meristheisa kath’ heautēs erēmoutai, kai pasa polis ē oikia meristheisa kath’ heautēs ou stathēsetai.
12.26: kai ei ho Satanas ton Satanan ekballei, eph’ heauton emeristhē; pōs oun stathēsetai hē basileia autou?
12.27: kai ei egō en Beelzeboul ekballō ta daimonia, hoi huioi hymōn en tini ekballousin? dia touto autoi kritai esontai hymōn.
12.28: ei de en Pneumati Theou egō ekballō ta daimonia, ara ephthasen eph’ hymas hē basileia tou Theou.
12.29: ē pōs dynatai tis eiselthein eis tēn oikian tou ischyrou kai ta skeuē autou harpasai, ean mē prōton dēsē ton ischyron, kai tote tēn oikian autou diarpasei?
12.30: ho mē ōn met’ emou kat’ emou estin, kai ho mē synagōn met’ emou skorpizei.
12.31: Dia touto legō hymin, pasa hamartia kai blasphēmia aphethēsetai tois anthrōpois, hē de tou Pneumatos blasphēmia ouk aphethēsetai.
12.32: kai hos ean eipē logon kata tou Huiou tou anthrōpou, aphethēsetai autō; hos d’ an eipē kata tou Pneumatos tou Hagiou, ouk aphethēsetai autō oute en toutō tō aiōni oute en tō mellonti.
12.33: Ē poiēsate to dendron kalon kai ton karpon autou kalon, ē poiēsate to dendron sapron kai ton karpon autou sapron; ek gar tou karpou to dendron ginōsketai.
12.34: gennēmata echidnōn, pōs dynasthe agatha lalein ponēroi ontes? ek gar tou perisseumatos tēs kardias to stoma lalei.
12.35: ho agathos anthrōpos ek tou agathou thēsaurou ekballei agatha, kai ho ponēros anthrōpos ek tou ponērou thēsaurou ekballei ponēra.
12.36: legō de hymin hoti pan rhēma argon ho lalēsousin hoi anthrōpoi, apodōsousin peri autou logon en hēmera kriseōs;
12.37: ek gar tōn logōn sou dikaiōthēsē, kai ek tōn logōn sou katadikasthēsē.
12.38: Tote apekrithēsan autō tines tōn grammateōn kai Pharisaiōn legontes Didaskale, thelomen apo sou sēmeion idein.
12.39: ho de apokritheis eipen autois Genea ponēra kai moichalis sēmeion epizētei, kai sēmeion ou dothēsetai autē ei mē to sēmeion Iōna tou prophētou.
12.40: hōsper gar ēn Iōnas en tē koilia tou kētous treis hēmeras kai treis nyktas, houtōs estai ho Huios tou anthrōpou en tē kardia tēs gēs treis hēmeras kai treis nyktas.
12.41: andres Nineueitai anastēsontai en tē krisei meta tēs geneas tautēs kai katakrinousin autēn; hoti metenoēsan eis to kērygma Iōna, kai idou pleion Iōna hōde.
12.42: basilissa notou egerthēsetai en tē krisei meta tēs geneas tautēs kai katakrinei autēn; hoti ēlthen ek tōn peratōn tēs gēs akousai tēn sophian Solomōnos, kai idou pleion Solomōnos hōde.
12.43: Hotan de to akatharton pneuma exelthē apo tou anthrōpou, dierchetai di’ anydrōn topōn zētoun anapausin, kai ouch heuriskei.
12.44: tote legei Eis ton oikon mou epistrepsō hothen exēlthon; kai elthon heuriskei scholazonta kai sesarōmenon kai kekosmēmenon.
12.45: tote poreuetai kai paralambanei meth’ heautou hepta hetera pneumata ponērotera heautou, kai eiselthonta katoikei ekei; kai ginetai ta eschata tou anthrōpou ekeinou cheirona tōn prōtōn. houtōs estai kai tē genea tautē tē ponēra.
12.46: Eti autou lalountos tois ochlois idou hē mētēr kai hoi adelphoi autou heistēkeisan exō zētountes autō lalēsai.
12.47: eipen de tis autō Idou hē mētēr sou kai hoi adelphoi sou exō hestēkasin zētountes soi lalēsai.
12.48: ho de apokritheis eipen tō legonti autō Tis estin hē mētēr mou, kai tines eisin hoi adelphoi mou?
12.49: kai ekteinas tēn cheira autou epi tous mathētas autou eipen Idou hē mētēr mou kai hoi adelphoi mou;
12.50: hostis gar an poiēsē to thelēma tou Patros mou tou en ouranois, autos mou adelphos kai adelphē kai mētēr estin.

13.1: En tē hēmera ekeinē exelthōn ho Iēsous tēs oikias ekathēto para tēn thalassan;
13.2: kai synēchthēsan pros auton ochloi polloi, hōste auton eis ploion embanta kathēsthai, kai pas ho ochlos epi ton aigialon heistēkei.
13.3: kai elalēsen autois polla en parabolais legōn Idou exēlthen ho speirōn tou speirein.
13.4: kai en tō speirein auton ha men epesen para tēn hodon, kai elthonta ta peteina katephagen auta.
13.5: alla de epesen epi ta petrōdē hopou ouk eichen gēn pollēn, kai eutheōs exaneteilen dia to mē echein bathos gēs,
13.6: hēliou de anateilantos ekaumatisthē kai dia to mē echein rhizan exēranthē.
13.7: alla de epesen epi tas akanthas, kai anebēsan hai akanthai kai apepnixan auta.
13.8: alla de epesen epi tēn gēn tēn kalēn kai edidou karpon, ho men hekaton ho de hexēkonta ho de triakonta.
13.10: Kai proselthontes hoi mathētai eipan autō Dia ti en parabolais laleis autois?
13.11: ho de apokritheis eipen hoti Hymin dedotai gnōnai ta mystēria tēs basileias tōn ouranōn, ekeinois de ou dedotai.
13.12: hostis gar echei, dothēsetai autō kai perisseuthēsetai; hostis de ouk echei, kai ho echei arthēsetai ap’ autou.
13.13: dia touto en parabolais autois lalō, hoti blepontes ou blepousin kai akouontes ouk akouousin oude syniousin.
13.14: kai anaplēroutai autois hē prophēteia Hēsaiou hē legousa Akoē akousete kai ou mē synēte, kai blepontes blepsete kai ou mē idēte.
13.15: epachynthē gar hē kardia tou laou toutou, kai tois ōsin bareōs ēkousan, kai tous ophthalmous autōn ekammysan; mē pote idōsin tois ophthalmois kai tois ōsin akousōsin kai tē kardia synōsin kai epistrepsōsin, kai iasomai autous.
13.16: hymōn de makarioi hoi ophthalmoi hoti blepousin, kai ta ōta hymōn hoti akouousin.
13.17: amēn gar legō hymin hoti polloi prophētai kai dikaioi epethymēsan idein ha blepete kai ouk eidan, kai akousai ha akouete kai ouk ēkousan.
13.18: Hymeis oun akousate tēn parabolēn tou speirantos.
13.19: Pantos akouontos ton logon tēs basileias kai mē synientos, erchetai ho ponēros kai harpazei to esparmenon en tē kardia autou; houtos estin ho para tēn hodon spareis.
13.20: ho de epi ta petrōdē spareis, houtos estin ho ton logon akouōn kai euthys meta charas lambanōn auton;
13.21: ouk echei de rhizan en heautō alla proskairos estin, genomenēs de thlipseōs ē diōgmou dia ton logon euthys skandalizetai.
13.22: ho de eis tas akanthas spareis, houtos estin ho ton logon akouōn, kai hē merimna tou aiōnos kai hē apatē tou ploutou sympnigei ton logon, kai akarpos ginetai.
13.23: ho de epi tēn kalēn gēn spareis, houtos estin ho ton logon akouōn kai synieis, hos dē karpophorei kai poiei ho men hekaton ho de hexēkonta ho de triakonta.
13.24: Allēn parabolēn parethēken autois legōn Hōmoiōthē hē basileia tōn ouranōn anthrōpō speiranti kalon sperma en tō agrō autou.
13.25: en de tō katheudein tous anthrōpous ēlthen autou ho echthros kai epespeiren zizania ana meson tou sitou kai apēlthen.
13.26: hote de eblastēsen ho chortos kai karpon epoiēsen, tote ephanē kai ta zizania.
13.27: proselthontes de hoi douloi tou oikodespotou eipon autō Kyrie, ouchi kalon sperma espeiras en tō sō agrō? pothen oun echei zizania?
13.28: ho de ephē autois Echthros anthrōpos touto epoiēsen. hoi de douloi autō legousin Theleis oun apelthontes syllexōmen auta?
13.29: ho de phēsin Ou, mē pote syllegontes ta zizania ekrizōsēte hama autois ton siton;
13.30: aphete synauxanesthai amphotera heōs tou therismou; kai en kairō tou therismou erō tois theristais Syllexate prōton ta zizania kai dēsate auta eis desmas pros to katakausai auta, ton de siton synagagete eis tēn apothēkēn mou.
13.31: Allēn parabolēn parethēken autois legōn Homoia estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn kokkō sinapeōs, hon labōn anthrōpos espeiren en tō agrō autou;
13.32: ho mikroteron men estin pantōn tōn spermatōn, hotan de auxēthē, meizon tōn lachanōn estin kai ginetai dendron, hōste elthein ta peteina tou ouranou kai kataskēnoin en tois kladois autou.
13.33: Allēn parabolēn elalēsen autois Homoia estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn zymē, hēn labousa gynē enekrypsen eis aleurou sata tria, heōs hou ezymōthē holon.
13.34: Tauta panta elalēsen ho Iēsous en parabolais tois ochlois, kai chōris parabolēs ouden elalei autois;
13.35: hopōs plērōthē to rhēthen dia tou prophētou legontos Anoixō en parabolais to stoma mou, ereuxomai kekrymmena apo katabolēs.
13.36: Tote apheis tous ochlous ēlthen eis tēn oikian. Kai prosēlthon autō hoi mathētai autou legontes Diasaphēson hēmin tēn parabolēn tōn zizaniōn tou agrou.
13.37: ho de apokritheis eipen HO speirōn to kalon sperma estin ho Huios tou anthrōpou;
13.38: ho de agros estin ho kosmos; to de kalon sperma, houtoi eisin hoi huioi tēs basileias; ta de zizania eisin hoi huioi tou ponērou,
13.39: ho de echthros ho speiras auta estin ho diabolos; ho de therismos synteleia aiōnos estin, hoi de theristai angeloi eisin.
13.40: hōsper oun syllegetai ta zizania kai pyri katakaietai, houtōs estai en tē synteleia tou aiōnos.
13.41: apostelei ho Huios tou anthrōpou tous angelous autou, kai syllexousin ek tēs basileias autou panta ta skandala kai tous poiountas tēn anomian,
13.42: kai balousin autous eis tēn kaminon tou pyros; ekei estai ho klauthmos kai ho brygmos tōn odontōn.
13.43: tote hoi dikaioi eklampsousin hōs ho hēlios en tē basileia tou Patros autōn. ho echōn ōta akouetō.
13.44: Homoia estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn thēsaurō kekrymmenō en tō agrō, hon heurōn anthrōpos ekrypsen, kai apo tēs charas autou hypagei kai pōlei hosa echei kai agorazei ton agron ekeinon.
13.45: Palin homoia estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn emporō zētounti kalous margaritas;
13.46: heurōn de hena polytimon margaritēn apelthōn pepraken panta hosa eichen kai ēgorasen auton.
13.47: Palin homoia estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn sagēnē blētheisē eis tēn thalassan kai ek pantos genous synagagousē;
13.48: hēn hote eplērōthē anabibasantes epi ton aigialon kai kathisantes synelexan ta kala eis angē, ta de sapra exō ebalon.
13.49: houtōs estai en tē synteleia tou aiōnos; exeleusontai hoi angeloi kai aphoriousin tous ponērous ek mesou tōn dikaiōn,
13.50: kai balousin autous eis tēn kaminon tou pyros; ekei estai ho klauthmos kai ho brygmos tōn odontōn.
13.51: Synēkate tauta panta? legousin autō Nai.
13.52: ho de eipen autois Dia touto pas grammateus mathēteutheis tē basileia tōn ouranōn homoios estin anthrōpō oikodespotē hostis ekballei ek tou thēsaurou autou kaina kai palaia.
13.53: Kai egeneto hote etelesen ho Iēsous tas parabolas tautas, metēren ekeithen.
13.54: kai elthōn eis tēn patrida autou edidasken autous en tē synagōgē autōn, hōste ekplēssesthai autous kai legein Pothen toutō hē sophia hautē kai hai dynameis?
13.55: ouch houtos estin ho tou tektonos huios? ouch hē mētēr autou legetai Mariam kai hoi adelphoi autou Iakōbos kai Iōsēph kai Simōn kai Ioudas?
13.56: kai hai adelphai autou ouchi pasai pros hēmas eisin? pothen oun toutō tauta panta?
13.57: kai eskandalizonto en autō. ho de Iēsous eipen autois Ouk estin prophētēs atimos ei mē en tē patridi kai en tē oikia autou.
13.58: kai ouk epoiēsen ekei dynameis pollas dia tēn apistian autōn.

14.1: En ekeinō tō kairō ēkousen Hērōdēs ho tetraarchēs tēn akoēn Iēsou,
14.2: kai eipen tois paisin autou Houtos estin Iōanēs ho Baptistēs; autos ēgerthē apo tōn nekrōn, kai dia touto hai dynameis energousin en autō.
14.3: HO gar Hērōdēs kratēsas ton Iōanēn edēsen kai en phylakē apetheto dia Hērōdiada tēn gynaika Philippou tou adelphou autou;
14.4: elegen gar ho Iōanēs autō Ouk exestin soi echein autēn.
14.5: kai thelōn auton apokteinai ephobēthē ton ochlon, hoti hōs prophētēn auton eichon.
14.6: genesiois de genomenois tou Hērōdou ōrchēsato hē thygatēr tēs Hērōdiados en tō mesō kai ēresen tō Hērōdē,
14.7: hothen meth’ horkou hōmologēsen autē dounai ho ean aitēsētai.
14.8: hē de probibastheisa hypo tēs mētros autēs Dos moi, phēsin, hōde epi pinaki tēn kephalēn Iōanou tou Baptistou.
14.9: kai lypētheis ho basileus dia tous horkous kai tous synanakeimenous ekeleusen dothēnai,
14.10: kai pempsas apekephalisen Iōanēn en tē phylakē.
14.11: kai ēnechthē hē kephalē autou epi pinaki kai edothē tō korasiō, kai ēnenken tē mētri autēs.
14.12: kai proselthontes hoi mathētai autou ēran to ptōma kai ethapsan auton, kai elthontes apēngeilan tō Iēsou.
14.13: Akousas de ho Iēsous anechōrēsen ekeithen en ploiō eis erēmon topon kat’ idian; kai akousantes hoi ochloi ēkolouthēsan autō pezē apo tōn poleōn.
14.14: Kai exelthōn eiden polyn ochlon, kai esplanchnisthē ep’ autois kai etherapeusen tous arrōstous autōn.
14.15: opsias de genomenēs prosēlthon autō hoi mathētai legontes Erēmos estin ho topos kai hē hōra ēdē parēlthen; apolyson oun tous ochlous, hina apelthontes eis tas kōmas agorasōsin heautois brōmata.
14.16: ho de Iēsous eipen autois Ou chreian echousin apelthein; dote autois hymeis phagein.
14.17: hoi de legousin autō Ouk echomen hōde ei mē pente artous kai dyo ichthyas.
14.18: ho de eipen; Pherete moi hōde autous.
14.19: kai keleusas tous ochlous anaklithēnai epi tou chortou, labōn tous pente artous kai tous dyo ichthyas, anablepsas eis ton ouranon eulogēsen, kai klasas edōken tois mathētais tous artous, hoi de mathētai tois ochlois.
14.20: kai ephagon pantes kai echortasthēsan, kai ēran to perisseuon tōn klasmatōn dōdeka kophinous plēreis.
14.21: hoi de esthiontes ēsan andres hōsei pentakischilioi chōris gynaikōn kai paidiōn.
14.22: Kai eutheōs ēnankasen tous mathētas embēnai eis to ploion kai proagein auton eis to peran, heōs hou apolysē tous ochlous.
14.23: kai apolysas tous ochlous anebē eis to oros kat’ idian proseuxasthai. opsias de genomenēs monos ēn ekei.
14.24: to de ploion ēdē stadious pollous apo tēs gēs apeichen, basanizomenon hypo tōn kymatōn, ēn gar enantios ho anemos.
14.25: tetartē de phylakē tēs nyktos ēlthen pros autous peripatōn epi tēn thalassan.
14.26: hoi de mathētai idontes auton epi tēs thalassēs peripatounta etarachthēsan legontes hoti Phantasma estin, kai apo tou phobou ekraxan.
14.27: euthys de elalēsen ho Iēsous autois legōn Tharseite, egō eimi; mē phobeisthe.
14.28: apokritheis de autō ho Petros eipen Kyrie, ei sy ei, keleuson me elthein pros se epi ta hydata.
14.29: ho de eipen Elthe. kai katabas apo tou ploiou Petros periepatēsen epi ta hydata kai ēlthen pros ton Iēsoun.
14.30: blepōn de ton anemon ephobēthē, kai arxamenos katapontizesthai ekraxen legōn Kyrie, sōson me.
14.31: eutheōs de ho Iēsous ekteinas tēn cheira epelabeto autou kai legei autō Oligopiste, eis ti edistasas?
14.32: kai anabantōn autōn eis to ploion ekopasen ho anemos.
14.33: hoi de en tō ploiō prosekynēsan autō legontes Alēthōs Theou Huios ei.
14.34: Kai diaperasantes ēlthon epi tēn gēn eis Gennēsaret.
14.35: kai epignontes auton hoi andres tou topou ekeinou apesteilan eis holēn tēn perichōron ekeinēn, kai prosēnenkan autō pantas tous kakōs echontas,
14.36: kai parekaloun auton hina monon hapsōntai tou kraspedou tou himatiou autou; kai hosoi hēpsanto diesōthēsan.

15.1: Tote proserchontai tō Iēsou apo Hierosolymōn Pharisaioi kai grammateis legontes
15.2: Dia ti hoi mathētai sou parabainousin tēn paradosin tōn presbyterōn? ou gar niptontai tas cheiras hotan arton esthiōsin.
15.3: ho de apokritheis eipen autois Dia ti kai hymeis parabainete tēn entolēn tou Theou dia tēn paradosin hymōn?
15.4: ho gar Theos eipen Tima ton patera kai tēn mētera, kai HO kakologōn patera ē mētera thanatō teleutatō;
15.5: hymeis de legete Hos an eipē tō patri ē tē mētri Dōron ho ean ex emou ōphelēthēs,
15.6: ou mē timēsei ton patera autou ē tēn mētera autou; kai ēkyrōsate ton logon tou Theou dia tēn paradosin hymōn.
15.7: hypokritai, kalōs eprophēteusen peri hymōn Hēsaias legōn
15.8: HO laos houtos tois cheilesin me tima, hē de kardia autōn porrō apechei ap’ emou;
15.9: matēn de sebontai me, didaskontes didaskalias entalmata anthrōpōn.
15.10: Kai proskalesamenos ton ochlon eipen autois Akouete kai syniete;
15.11: ou to eiserchomenon eis to stoma koinoi ton anthrōpon, alla to ekporeuomenon ek tou stomatos touto koinoi ton anthrōpon.
15.12: Tote proselthontes hoi mathētai legousin autō Oidas hoti hoi Pharisaioi akousantes ton logon eskandalisthēsan?
15.13: ho de apokritheis eipen Pasa phyteia hēn ouk ephyteusen ho Patēr mou ho ouranios ekrizōthēsetai.
15.14: aphete autous; typhloi eisin hodēgoi typhlōn; typhlos de typhlon ean hodēgē, amphoteroi eis bothynon pesountai.
15.15: Apokritheis de ho Petros eipen autō Phrason hēmin tēn parabolēn.
15.16: ho de eipen Akmēn kai hymeis asynetoi este?
15.17: ou noeite hoti pan to eisporeuomenon eis to stoma eis tēn koilian chōrei kai eis aphedrōna ekballetai?
15.18: ta de ekporeuomena ek tou stomatos ek tēs kardias exerchetai, kakeina koinoi ton anthrōpon.
15.19: ek gar tēs kardias exerchontai dialogismoi ponēroi, phonoi, moicheiai, porneiai, klopai, pseudomartyriai, blasphēmiai.
15.20: tauta estin ta koinounta ton anthrōpon; to de aniptois chersin phagein ou koinoi ton anthrōpon.
15.21: Kai exelthōn ekeithen ho Iēsous anechōrēsen eis ta merē Tyrou kai Sidōnos.
15.22: kai idou gynē Chananaia apo tōn horiōn ekeinōn exelthousa ekrazen legousa Eleēson me, Kyrie huios Daueid; hē thygatēr mou kakōs daimonizetai.
15.23: ho de ouk apekrithē autē logon. kai proselthontes hoi mathētai autou ērōtoun auton legontes Apolyson autēn, hoti krazei opisthen hēmōn.
15.24: ho de apokritheis eipen Ouk apestalēn ei mē eis ta probata ta apolōlota oikou Israēl.
15.25: hē de elthousa prosekynei autō legousa Kyrie, boēthei moi.
15.26: ho de apokritheis eipen Ouk estin kalon labein ton arton tōn teknōn kai balein tois kynariois.
15.27: hē de eipen Nai, kyrie; kai gar ta kynaria esthiei apo tōn psichiōn tōn piptontōn apo tēs trapezēs tōn kyriōn autōn.
15.28: tote apokritheis ho Iēsous eipen autē Ō gynai, megalē sou hē pistis; genēthētō soi hōs theleis. kai iathē hē thygatēr autēs apo tēs hōras ekeinēs.
15.29: Kai metabas ekeithen ho Iēsous ēlthen para tēn thalassan tēs Galilaias, kai anabas eis to oros ekathēto ekei.
15.30: kai prosēlthon autō ochloi polloi echontes meth’ heautōn chōlous, kyllous, typhlous, kōphous, kai heterous pollous, kai eripsan autous para tous podas autou; kai etherapeusen autous;
15.31: hōste ton ochlon thaumasai blepontas kōphous lalountas kyllous hygieis kai chōlous peripatountas kai typhlous blepontas; kai edoxasan ton Theon Israēl.
15.32: HO de Iēsous proskalesamenos tous mathētas autou eipen Splanchnizomai epi ton ochlon, hoti ēdē hēmerai treis prosmenousin moi kai ouk echousin ti phagōsin; kai apolysai autous nēsteis ou thelō, mē pote eklythōsin en tē hodō.
15.33: kai legousin autō hoi mathētai Pothen hēmin en erēmia artoi tosoutoi hōste chortasai ochlon tosouton?
15.34: kai legei autois ho Iēsous Posous artous echete? hoi de eipan Hepta, kai oliga ichthydia.
15.35: kai parangeilas tō ochlō anapesein epi tēn gēn
15.36: elaben tous hepta artous kai tous ichthyas kai eucharistēsas eklasen kai edidou tois mathētais, hoi de mathētai tois ochlois.
15.37: kai ephagon pantes kai echortasthēsan, kai to perisseuon tōn klasmatōn ēran hepta spyridas plēreis.
15.38: hoi de esthiontes ēsan tetrakischilioi andres chōris gynaikōn kai paidiōn.
15.39: Kai apolysas tous ochlous enebē eis to ploion, kai ēlthen eis ta horia Magadan.

16.1: Kai proselthontes hoi Pharisaioi kai Saddoukaioi peirazontes epērōtēsan auton sēmeion ek tou ouranou epideixai autois.
16.2: ho de apokritheis eipen autois Opsias genomenēs legete Eudia, pyrrazei gar ho ouranos;
16.3: kai prōi Sēmeron cheimōn, pyrrazei gar stygnazōn ho ouranos. to men prosōpon tou ouranou ginōskete diakrinein, ta de sēmeia tōn kairōn ou dynasthe?
16.4: genea ponēra kai moichalis sēmeion epizētei, kai sēmeion ou dothēsetai autē ei mē to sēmeion Iōna. kai katalipōn autous apēlthen.
16.5: Kai elthontes hoi mathētai eis to peran epelathonto artous labein.
16.6: ho de Iēsous eipen autois Horate kai prosechete apo tēs zymēs tōn Pharisaiōn kai Saddoukaiōn.
16.7: hoi de dielogizonto en heautois legontes hoti Artous ouk elabomen.
16.8: gnous de ho Iēsous eipen Ti dialogizesthe en heautois, oligopistoi, hoti artous ouk echete?
16.9: oupō noeite, oude mnēmoneuete tous pente artous tōn pentakischiliōn kai posous kophinous elabete?
16.10: oude tous hepta artous tōn tetrakischiliōn kai posas spyridas elabete?
16.11: pōs ou noeite hoti ou peri artōn eipon hymin? prosechete de apo tēs zymēs tōn Pharisaiōn kai Saddoukaiōn.
16.12: tote synēkan hoti ouk eipen prosechein apo tēs zymēs tōn artōn, alla apo tēs didachēs tōn Pharisaiōn kai Saddoukaiōn.
16.13: Elthōn de ho Iēsous eis ta merē Kaisarias tēs Philippou ērōta tous mathētas autou legōn Tina legousin hoi anthrōpoi einai ton Huion tou anthrōpou?
16.14: hoi de eipan Hoi men Iōanēn ton Baptistēn, alloi de Hēleian, heteroi de Hieremian ē hena tōn prophētōn.
16.15: legei autois Hymeis de tina me legete einai?
16.16: apokritheis de Simōn Petros eipen Sy ei ho Christos ho Huios tou Theou tou zōntos.
16.17: apokritheis de ho Iēsous eipen autō Makarios ei, Simōn Bariōna, hoti sarx kai haima ouk apekalypsen soi all’ ho Patēr mou ho en tois ouranois.
16.18: kagō de soi legō hoti sy ei Petros, kai epi tautē tē petra oikodomēsō mou tēn ekklēsian, kai pylai Haidou ou katischysousin autēs.
16.19: dōsō soi tas kleidas tēs basileias tōn ouranōn, kai ho ean dēsēs epi tēs gēs estai dedemenon en tois ouranois, kai ho ean lysēs epi tēs gēs estai lelymenon en tois ouranois.
16.20: tote epetimēsen tois mathētais hina mēdeni eipōsin hoti autos estin ho Christos.
16.21: Apo tote ērxato Iēsous Christos deiknyein tois mathētais autou hoti dei auton eis Hierosolyma apelthein kai polla pathein apo tōn presbyterōn kai archiereōn kai grammateōn kai apoktanthēnai kai tē tritē hēmera egerthēnai.
16.22: kai proslabomenos auton ho Petros ērxato epitiman autō legōn Hileōs soi, Kyrie; ou mē estai soi touto.
16.23: ho de strapheis eipen tō Petrō Hypage opisō mou, Satana; skandalon ei emou, hoti ou phroneis ta tou Theou alla ta tōn anthrōpōn.
16.24: Tote ho Iēsous eipen tois mathētais autou Ei tis thelei opisō mou elthein, aparnēsasthō heauton kai aratō ton stauron autou, kai akoloutheitō moi.
16.25: hos gar ean thelē tēn psychēn autou sōsai, apolesei autēn; hos d’ an apolesē tēn psychēn autou heneken emou, heurēsei autēn.
16.26: ti gar ōphelēthēsetai anthrōpos ean ton kosmon holon kerdēsē, tēn de psychēn autou zēmiōthē? ē ti dōsei anthrōpos antallagma tēs psychēs autou?
16.27: mellei gar ho Huios tou anthrōpou erchesthai en tē doxē tou Patros autou meta tōn angelōn autou, kai tote apodōsei hekastō kata tēn praxin autou.
16.28: amēn legō hymin hoti eisin tines tōn hōde hestōtōn hoitines ou mē geusōntai thanatou heōs an idōsin ton Huion tou anthrōpou erchomenon en tē basileia autou.

17.1: Kai meth’ hēmeras hex paralambanei ho Iēsous ton Petron kai Iakōbon kai Iōanēn ton adelphon autou, kai anapherei autous eis oros hypsēlon kat’ idian.
17.2: kai metemorphōthē emprosthen autōn, kai elampsen to prosōpon autou hōs ho hēlios, ta de himatia autou egeneto leuka hōs to phōs.
17.3: kai idou ōphthē autois Mōusēs kai Hēleias synlalountes met’ autou.
17.4: apokritheis de ho Petros eipen tō Iēsou Kyrie, kalon estin hēmas hōde einai; ei theleis, poiēsō hōde treis skēnas, soi mian kai Mōusei mian kai Hēleia mian.
17.5: eti autou lalountos, idou nephelē phōteinē epeskiasen autous, kai idou phōnē ek tēs nephelēs legousa Houtos estin ho Huios mou ho agapētos, en hō eudokēsa; akouete autou.
17.6: kai akousantes hoi mathētai epesan epi prosōpon autōn kai ephobēthēsan sphodra.
17.7: kai prosēlthen ho Iēsous kai hapsamenos autōn eipen Egerthēte kai mē phobeisthe.
17.8: eparantes de tous ophthalmous autōn oudena eidon ei mē auton Iēsoun monon.
17.9: Kai katabainontōn autōn ek tou orous eneteilato autois ho Iēsous legōn Mēdeni eipēte to horama heōs hou ho Huios tou anthrōpou ek nekrōn egerthē.
17.10: Kai epērōtēsan auton hoi mathētai legontes Ti oun hoi grammateis legousin hoti Hēleian dei elthein prōton?
17.11: ho de apokritheis eipen Hēleias men erchetai kai apokatastēsei panta;
17.12: legō de hymin hoti Hēleias ēdē ēlthen, kai ouk epegnōsan auton, all’ epoiēsan en autō hosa ēthelēsan; houtōs kai ho Huios tou anthrōpou mellei paschein hyp’ autōn.
17.13: tote synēkan hoi mathētai hoti peri Iōanou tou Baptistou eipen autois.
17.14: Kai elthontōn pros ton ochlon prosēlthen autō anthrōpos gonypetōn auton
17.15: kai legōn Kyrie, eleēson mou ton huion, hoti selēniazetai kai kakōs echei; pollakis gar piptei eis to pyr kai pollakis eis to hydōr.
17.16: kai prosēnenka auton tois mathētais sou, kai ouk ēdynēthēsan auton therapeusai.
17.17: apokritheis de ho Iēsous eipen Ō genea apistos kai diestrammenē, heōs pote meth’ hymōn esomai? heōs pote anexomai hymōn? pherete moi auton hōde.
17.18: kai epetimēsen autō ho Iēsous, kai exēlthen ap’ autou to daimonion, kai etherapeuthē ho pais apo tēs hōras ekeinēs.
17.19: Tote proselthontes hoi mathētai tō Iēsou kat’ idian eipon Dia ti hēmeis ouk ēdynēthēmen ekbalein auto?
17.20: ho de legei autois Dia tēn oligopistian hymōn; amēn gar legō hymin, ean echēte pistin hōs kokkon sinapeōs, ereite tō orei toutō Metaba enthen ekei, kai metabēsetai, kai ouden adynatēsei hymin.
17.22: Systrephomenōn de autōn en tē Galilaia eipen autois ho Iēsous Mellei ho Huios tou anthrōpou paradidosthai eis cheiras anthrōpōn,
17.23: kai apoktenousin auton, kai tē tritē hēmera egerthēsetai. kai elypēthēsan sphodra.
17.24: Elthontōn de autōn eis Kapharnaoum prosēlthon hoi ta didrachma lambanontes tō Petrō kai eipan HO didaskalos hymōn ou telei didrachma?
17.25: legei Nai. kai elthonta eis tēn oikian proephthasen auton ho Iēsous legōn Ti soi dokei, Simōn? hoi basileis tēs gēs apo tinōn lambanousin telē ē kēnson? apo tōn huiōn autōn ē apo tōn allotriōn?
17.26: eipontos de Apo tōn allotriōn, ephē autō ho Iēsous Arage eleutheroi eisin hoi huioi.
17.27: hina de mē skandalisōmen autous, poreutheis eis thalassan bale ankistron kai ton anabanta prōton ichthyn aron, kai anoixas to stoma autou heurēseis statēra; ekeinon labōn dos autois anti emou kai sou.

18.1: En ekeinē tē hōra prosēlthon hoi mathētai tō Iēsou legontes Tis ara meizōn estin en tē basileia tōn ouranōn?
18.2: kai proskalesamenos paidion estēsen auto en mesō autōn
18.3: kai eipen Amēn legō hymin, ean mē straphēte kai genēsthe hōs ta paidia, ou mē eiselthēte eis tēn basileian tōn ouranōn.
18.4: hostis oun tapeinōsei heauton hōs to paidion touto, houtos estin ho meizōn en tē basileia tōn ouranōn.
18.5: kai hos ean dexētai hen paidion toiouto epi tō onomati mou, eme dechetai;
18.6: hos d’ an skandalisē hena tōn mikrōn toutōn tōn pisteuontōn eis eme, sympherei autō hina kremasthē mylos onikos peri ton trachēlon autou kai katapontisthē en tō pelagei tēs thalassēs.
18.7: Ouai tō kosmō apo tōn skandalōn; anankē gar elthein ta skandala, plēn ouai tō anthrōpō di’ hou to skandalon erchetai.
18.8: Ei de hē cheir sou ē ho pous sou skandalizei se, ekkopson auton kai bale apo sou; kalon soi estin eiselthein eis tēn zōēn kyllon ē chōlon, ē dyo cheiras ē dyo podas echonta blēthēnai eis to pyr to aiōnion.
18.9: kai ei ho ophthalmos sou skandalizei se, exele auton kai bale apo sou; kalon soi estin monophthalmon eis tēn zōēn eiselthein, ē dyo ophthalmous echonta blēthēnai eis tēn geennan tou pyros.
18.10: Horate mē kataphronēsēte henos tōn mikrōn toutōn; legō gar hymin hoti hoi angeloi autōn en ouranois dia pantos blepousi to prosōpon tou Patros mou tou en ouranois.
18.12: Ti hymin dokei? ean genētai tini anthrōpō hekaton probata kai planēthē hen ex autōn, ouchi aphēsei ta enenēkonta ennea epi ta orē kai poreutheis zētei to planōmenon?
18.13: kai ean genētai heurein auto, amēn legō hymin hoti chairei ep’ autō mallon ē epi tois enenēkonta ennea tois mē peplanēmenois.
18.14: houtōs ouk estin thelēma emprosthen tou Patros hymōn tou en ouranois hina apolētai hen tōn mikrōn toutōn.
18.15: Ean de hamartēsē ho adelphos sou, hypage elenxon auton metaxy sou kai autou monou. ean sou akousē, ekerdēsas ton adelphon sou;
18.16: ean de mē akousē, paralabe meta sou eti hena ē dyo, hina epi stomatos dyo martyrōn ē triōn stathē pan rhēma;
18.17: ean de parakousē autōn, eipon tē ekklēsia; ean de kai tēs ekklēsias parakousē, estō soi hōsper ho ethnikos kai ho telōnēs.
18.18: Amēn legō hymin, hosa ean dēsēte epi tēs gēs estai dedemena en ouranō, kai hosa ean lysēte epi tēs gēs estai lelymena en ouranō.
18.19: Palin amēn legō hymin hoti ean dyo symphōnēsōsin ex hymōn epi tēs gēs peri pantos pragmatos hou ean aitēsōntai, genēsetai autois para tou Patros mou tou en ouranois.
18.20: hou gar eisin dyo ē treis synēgmenoi eis to emon onoma, ekei eimi en mesō autōn.
18.21: Tote proselthōn ho Petros eipen autō Kyrie, posakis hamartēsei eis eme ho adelphos mou kai aphēsō autō? heōs heptakis?
18.22: legei autō ho Iēsous Ou legō soi heōs heptakis, alla heōs hebdomēkontakis hepta.
18.23: Dia touto hōmoiōthē hē basileia tōn ouranōn anthrōpō basilei hos ēthelēsen synarai logon meta tōn doulōn autou.
18.24: arxamenou de autou synairein prosēchthē heis autō opheiletēs myriōn talantōn.
18.25: mē echontos de autou apodounai ekeleusen auton ho kyrios prathēnai kai tēn gynaika kai ta tekna kai panta hosa echei, kai apodothēnai.
18.26: pesōn oun ho doulos prosekynei autō legōn Makrothymēson ep’ emoi, kai panta apodōsō soi.
18.27: splanchnistheis de ho kyrios tou doulou ekeinou apelysen auton, kai to daneion aphēken autō.
18.28: exelthōn de ho doulos ekeinos heuren hena tōn syndoulōn autou, hos ōpheilen autō hekaton dēnaria, kai kratēsas auton epnigen legōn Apodos ei ti opheileis.
18.29: pesōn oun ho syndoulos autou parekalei auton legōn Makrothymēson ep’ emoi, kai apodōsō soi.
18.30: ho de ouk ēthelen, alla apelthōn ebalen auton eis phylakēn heōs apodō to opheilomenon.
18.31: idontes oun hoi syndouloi autou ta genomena elypēthēsan sphodra, kai elthontes diesaphēsan tō kyriō heautōn panta ta genomena.
18.32: tote proskalesamenos auton ho kyrios autou legei autō Doule ponēre, pasan tēn opheilēn ekeinēn aphēka soi, epei parekalesas me;
18.33: ouk edei kai se eleēsai ton syndoulon sou, hōs kagō se ēleēsa?
18.34: kai orgistheis ho kyrios autou paredōken auton tois basanistais heōs hou apodō pan to opheilomenon autō.
18.35: Houtōs kai ho Patēr mou ho ouranios poiēsei hymin, ean mē aphēte hekastos tō adelphō autou apo tōn kardiōn hymōn.

19.1: Kai egeneto hote etelesen ho Iēsous tous logous toutous, metēren apo tēs Galilaias kai ēlthen eis ta horia tēs Ioudaias peran tou Iordanou.
19.2: kai ēkolouthēsan autō ochloi polloi, kai etherapeusen autous ekei.
19.3: Kai prosēlthon autō Pharisaioi peirazontes auton kai legontes Ei exestin apolysai tēn gynaika autou kata pasan aitian?
19.4: ho de apokritheis eipen Ouk anegnōte hoti ho ktisas ap’ archēs arsen kai thēly epoiēsen autous
19.5: kai eipen Heneka toutou kataleipsei anthrōpos ton patera kai tēn mētera kai kollēthēsetai tē gynaiki autou, kai esontai hoi dyo eis sarka mian?
19.6: hōste ouketi eisin dyo alla sarx mia. ho oun ho Theos synezeuxen, anthrōpos mē chōrizetō.
19.7: legousin autō Ti oun Mōusēs eneteilato dounai biblion apostasiou kai apolysai?
19.8: legei autois Hoti Mōusēs pros tēn sklērokardian hymōn epetrepsen hymin apolysai tas gynaikas hymōn; ap’ archēs de ou gegonen houtōs.
19.9: legō de hymin hoti hos an apolysē tēn gynaika autou mē epi porneia kai gamēsē allēn, moichatai.
19.10: legousin autō hoi mathētai Ei houtōs estin hē aitia tou anthrōpou meta tēs gynaikos, ou sympherei gamēsai.
19.11: ho de eipen autois Ou pantes chōrousin ton logon touton all’ hois dedotai.
19.12: eisin gar eunouchoi hoitines ek koilias mētros egennēthēsan houtōs, kai eisin eunouchoi hoitines eunouchisthēsan hypo tōn anthrōpōn, kai eisin eunouchoi hoitines eunouchisan heautous dia tēn basileian tōn ouranōn. ho dynamenos chōrein chōreitō.
19.13: Tote prosēnechthēsan autō paidia, hina tas cheiras epithē autois kai proseuxētai; hoi de mathētai epetimēsan autois.
19.14: ho de Iēsous eipen Aphete ta paidia kai mē kōlyete auta elthein pros me; tōn gar toioutōn estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn.
19.15: kai epitheis tas cheiras autois eporeuthē ekeithen.
19.16: Kai idou heis proselthōn autō eipen Didaskale, ti agathon poiēsō hina schō zōēn aiōnion?
19.17: ho de eipen autō Ti me erōtas peri tou agathou? heis estin ho agathos; ei de theleis eis tēn zōēn eiselthein, tērei tas entolas.
19.18: legei autō Poias? ho de Iēsous ephē To Ou phoneuseis, Ou moicheuseis, Ou klepseis, Ou pseudomartyrēseis,
19.19: Tima ton patera kai tēn mētera, kai Agapēseis ton plēsion sou hōs seauton.
19.20: legei autō ho neaniskos Tauta panta ephylaxa; ti eti hysterō?
19.21: ephē autō ho Iēsous Ei theleis teleios einai, hypage pōlēson sou ta hyparchonta kai dos ptōchois, kai hexeis thēsauron en ouranois, kai deuro akolouthei moi.
19.22: akousas de ho neaniskos ton logon apēlthen lypoumenos; ēn gar echōn ktēmata polla.
19.23: HO de Iēsous eipen tois mathētais autou Amēn legō hymin hoti plousios dyskolōs eiseleusetai eis tēn basileian tōn ouranōn.
19.24: palin de legō hymin, eukopōteron estin kamēlon dia trēmatos rhaphidos eiselthein ē plousion eis tēn basileian tou Theou.
19.25: akousantes de hoi mathētai exeplēssonto sphodra legontes Tis ara dynatai sōthēnai?
19.26: emblepsas de ho Iēsous eipen autois Para anthrōpois touto adynaton estin, para de Theō panta dynata.
19.27: Tote apokritheis ho Petros eipen autō Idou hēmeis aphēkamen panta kai ēkolouthēsamen soi; ti ara estai hēmin?
19.28: ho de Iēsous eipen autois Amēn legō hymin hoti hymeis hoi akolouthēsantes moi, en tē palingenesia, hotan kathisē ho Huios tou anthrōpou epi thronou doxēs autou, kathēsesthe kai autoi epi dōdeka thronous krinontes tas dōdeka phylas tou Israēl.
19.29: kai pas hostis aphēken oikias ē adelphous ē adelphas ē patera ē mētera ē tekna ē agrous heneken tou emou onomatos, pollaplasiona lēmpsetai kai zōēn aiōnion klēronomēsei.
19.30: Polloi de esontai prōtoi eschatoi kai eschatoi prōtoi.

20.1: Homoia gar estin hē basileia tōn ouranōn anthrōpō oikodespotē, hostis exēlthen hama prōi misthōsasthai ergatas eis ton ampelōna autou.
20.2: symphōnēsas de meta tōn ergatōn ek dēnariou tēn hēmeran apesteilen autous eis ton ampelōna autou.
20.3: kai exelthōn peri tritēn hōran eiden allous hestōtas en tē agora argous,
20.4: kai ekeinois eipen Hypagete kai hymeis eis ton ampelōna, kai ho ean ē dikaion dōsō hymin.
20.5: hoi de apēlthon. palin de exelthōn peri hektēn kai enatēn hōran epoiēsen hōsautōs.
20.6: peri de tēn hendekatēn exelthōn heuren allous hestōtas, kai legei autois Ti hōde hestēkate holēn tēn hēmeran argoi?
20.7: legousin autō Hoti oudeis hēmas emisthōsato. legei autois Hypagete kai hymeis eis ton ampelōna.
20.8: opsias de genomenēs legei ho kyrios tou ampelōnos tō epitropō autou Kaleson tous ergatas kai apodos ton misthon, arxamenos apo tōn eschatōn heōs tōn prōtōn.
20.9: elthontes de hoi peri tēn hendekatēn hōran elabon ana dēnarion.
20.10: kai elthontes hoi prōtoi enomisan hoti pleion lēmpsontai; kai elabon to ana dēnarion kai autoi.
20.11: labontes de egongyzon kata tou oikodespotou
20.12: legontes Houtoi hoi eschatoi mian hōran epoiēsan, kai isous autous hēmin epoiēsas tois bastasasi to baros tēs hēmeras kai ton kausōna.
20.13: ho de apokritheis heni autōn eipen Hetaire, ouk adikō se; ouchi dēnariou synephōnēsas moi?
20.14: aron to son kai hypage; thelō de toutō tō eschatō dounai hōs kai soi;
20.15: ouk exestin moi ho thelō poiēsai en tois emois? ē ho ophthalmos sou ponēros estin hoti egō agathos eimi?
20.16: Houtōs esontai hoi eschatoi prōtoi kai hoi prōtoi eschatoi.
20.17: Mellōn de anabainein Iēsous eis Hierosolyma parelaben tous dōdeka kat’ idian, kai en tē hodō eipen autois
20.18: Idou anabainomen eis Hierosolyma, kai ho Huios tou anthrōpou paradothēsetai tois archiereusin kai grammateusin, kai katakrinousin auton eis thanaton,
20.19: kai paradōsousin auton tois ethnesin eis to empaixai kai mastigōsai kai staurōsai, kai tē tritē hēmera egerthēsetai.
20.20: Tote prosēlthen autō hē mētēr tōn huiōn Zebedaiou meta tōn huiōn autēs proskynousa kai aitousa ti ap’ autou.
20.21: ho de eipen autē Ti theleis? legei autō Eipe hina kathisōsin houtoi hoi dyo huioi mou heis ek dexiōn kai heis ex euōnymōn sou en tē basileia sou.
20.22: apokritheis de ho Iēsous eipen Ouk oidate ti aiteisthe. dynasthe piein to potērion ho egō mellō pinein? legousin autō Dynametha.
20.23: legei autois To men potērion mou piesthe, to de kathisai ek dexiōn mou kai ex euōnymōn ouk estin emon touto dounai, all’ hois hētoimastai hypo tou Patros mou.
20.24: kai akousantes hoi deka ēganaktēsan peri tōn dyo adelphōn.
20.25: ho de Iēsous proskalesamenos autous eipen Oidate hoti hoi archontes tōn ethnōn katakyrieuousin autōn kai hoi megaloi katexousiazousin autōn.
20.26: ouch houtōs estin en hymin; all’ hos ean thelē en hymin megas genesthai, estai hymōn diakonos,
20.27: kai hos an thelē en hymin einai prōtos, estai hymōn doulos;
20.28: hōsper ho Huios tou anthrōpou ouk ēlthen diakonēthēnai, alla diakonēsai kai dounai tēn psychēn autou lytron anti pollōn.
20.29: Kai ekporeuomenōn autōn apo Hiereichō ēkolouthēsen autō ochlos polys.
20.30: kai idou dyo typhloi kathēmenoi para tēn hodon, akousantes hoti Iēsous paragei, ekraxan legontes Kyrie, eleēson hēmas, huios Daueid.
20.31: ho de ochlos epetimēsen autois hina siōpēsōsin; hoi de meizon ekraxan legontes Kyrie, eleēson hēmas, huios Daueid.
20.32: kai stas ho Iēsous ephōnēsen autous kai eipen Ti thelete poiēsō hymin?
20.33: legousin autō Kyrie, hina anoigōsin hoi ophthalmoi hēmōn.
20.34: splanchnistheis de ho Iēsous hēpsato tōn ommatōn autōn, kai eutheōs aneblepsan kai ēkolouthēsan autō.
