21.1: Kai hote ēngisan eis Hierosolyma kai ēlthon eis Bēthphagē eis to oros tōn Elaiōn, tote Iēsous apesteilen dyo mathētas
21.2: legōn autois Poreuesthe eis tēn kōmēn tēn katenanti hymōn, kai euthys heurēsete onon dedemenēn kai pōlon met’ autēs; lysantes agagete moi.
21.3: kai ean tis hymin eipē ti, ereite hoti HO Kyrios autōn chreian echei; euthys de apostelei autous.
21.4: Touto de gegonen hina plērōthē to rhēthen dia tou prophētou legontos
21.5: Eipate tē thygatri Siōn Idou ho Basileus sou erchetai soi praus kai epibebēkōs epi onon kai epi pōlon huion hypozygiou.
21.6: poreuthentes de hoi mathētai kai poiēsantes kathōs synetaxen autois ho Iēsous
21.7: ēgagon tēn onon kai ton pōlon, kai epethēkan ep’ autōn ta himatia, kai epekathisen epanō autōn.
21.8: ho de pleistos ochlos estrōsan heautōn ta himatia en tē hodō, alloi de ekopton kladous apo tōn dendrōn kai estrōnnyon en tē hodō.
21.9: hoi de ochloi hoi proagontes auton kai hoi akolouthountes ekrazon legontes Hōsanna tō huiō Daueid; Eulogēmenos ho erchomenos en onomati Kyriou; Hōsanna en tois hypsistois.
21.10: kai eiselthontos autou eis Hierosolyma eseisthē pasa hē polis legousa Tis estin houtos?
21.11: hoi de ochloi elegon Houtos estin ho prophētēs Iēsous ho apo Nazareth tēs Galilaias.
21.12: Kai eisēlthen Iēsous eis to hieron kai exebalen pantas tous pōlountas kai agorazontas en tō hierō kai tas trapezas tōn kollybistōn katestrepsen kai tas kathedras tōn pōlountōn tas peristeras,
21.13: kai legei autois Gegraptai HO oikos mou oikos proseuchēs klēthēsetai, hymeis de auton poieite spēlaion lēstōn.
21.14: Kai prosēlthon autō typhloi kai chōloi en tō hierō, kai etherapeusen autous.
21.15: idontes de hoi archiereis kai hoi grammateis ta thaumasia ha epoiēsen kai tous paidas tous krazontas en tō hierō kai legontas Hōsanna tō huiō Daueid, ēganaktēsan,
21.16: kai eipan autō Akoueis ti houtoi legousin? ho de Iēsous legei autois Nai; oudepote anegnōte hoti Ek stomatos nēpiōn kai thēlazontōn katērtisō ainon?
21.17: Kai katalipōn autous exēlthen exō tēs poleōs eis Bēthanian, kai ēulisthē ekei.
21.18: Prōi de epanagagōn eis tēn polin epeinasen.
21.19: kai idōn sykēn mian epi tēs hodou ēlthen ep’ autēn, kai ouden heuren en autē ei mē phylla monon, kai legei autē Ou mēketi ek sou karpos genētai eis ton aiōna. kai exēranthē parachrēma hē sykē.
21.20: kai idontes hoi mathētai ethaumasan legontes Pōs parachrēma exēranthē hē sykē?
21.21: apokritheis de ho Iēsous eipen autois Amēn legō hymin, ean echēte pistin kai mē diakrithēte, ou monon to tēs sykēs poiēsete, alla kan tō orei toutō eipēte Arthēti kai blēthēti eis tēn thalassan, genēsetai;
21.22: kai panta hosa an aitēsēte en tē proseuchē pisteuontes lēmpsesthe.
21.23: Kai elthontos autou eis to hieron prosēlthon autō didaskonti hoi archiereis kai hoi presbyteroi tou laou legontes En poia exousia tauta poieis? kai tis soi edōken tēn exousian tautēn?
21.24: apokritheis de ho Iēsous eipen autois Erōtēsō hymas kagō logon hena, hon ean eipēte moi, kagō hymin erō en poia exousia tauta poiō;
21.25: to baptisma to Iōanou pothen ēn? ex ouranou ē ex anthrōpōn? hoi de dielogizonto en heautois legontes; Ean eipōmen Ex ouranou, erei hēmin Dia ti oun ouk episteusate autō?
21.26: ean de eipōmen Ex anthrōpōn, phoboumetha ton ochlon; pantes gar hōs prophētēn echousin ton Iōanēn.
21.27: kai apokrithentes tō Iēsou eipan Ouk oidamen. ephē autois kai autos Oude egō legō hymin en poia exousia tauta poiō.
21.28: Ti de hymin dokei? anthrōpos eichen tekna dyo; proselthōn tō prōtō eipen Teknon, hypage sēmeron ergazou en tō ampelōni.
21.29: ho de apokritheis eipen Egō kyrie, kai ouk apēlthen.
21.30: proselthōn de tō deuterō eipen hōsautōs. ho de apokritheis eipen Ou thelō, hysteron metamelētheis apēlthen.
21.31: tis ek tōn dyo epoiēsen to thelēma tou patros? legousin HO hysteros. legei autois ho Iēsous Amēn legō hymin hoti hoi telōnai kai hai pornai proagousin hymas eis tēn basileian tou Theou.
21.32: ēlthen gar Iōanēs pros hymas en hodō dikaiosynēs, kai ouk episteusate autō; hoi de telōnai kai hai pornai episteusan autō; hymeis de idontes oude metemelēthēte hysteron tou pisteusai autō.
21.33: Allēn parabolēn akousate. Anthrōpos ēn oikodespotēs hostis ephyteusen ampelōna, kai phragmon autō periethēken kai ōryxen en autō lēnon kai ōkodomēsen pyrgon, kai exedeto auton geōrgois, kai apedēmēsen.
21.34: hote de ēngisen ho kairos tōn karpōn, apesteilen tous doulous autou pros tous geōrgous labein tous karpous autou.
21.35: kai labontes hoi geōrgoi tous doulous autou hon men edeiran, hon de apekteinan, hon de elithobolēsan.
21.36: palin apesteilen allous doulous pleionas tōn prōtōn, kai epoiēsan autois hōsautōs.
21.37: hysteron de apesteilen pros autous ton huion autou legōn Entrapēsontai ton huion mou.
21.38: hoi de geōrgoi idontes ton huion eipon en heautois Houtos estin ho klēronomos; deute apokteinōmen auton kai schōmen tēn klēronomian autou;
21.39: kai labontes auton exebalon exō tou ampelōnos kai apekteinan.
21.40: hotan oun elthē ho kyrios tou ampelōnos, ti poiēsei tois geōrgois ekeinois?
21.41: legousin autō Kakous kakōs apolesei autous, kai ton ampelōna ekdōsetai allois geōrgois, hoitines apodōsousin autō tous karpous en tois kairois autōn.
21.42: Legei autois ho Iēsous Oudepote anegnōte en tais graphais Lithon hon apedokimasan hoi oikodomountes, houtos egenēthē eis kephalēn gōnias; para Kyriou egeneto hautē, kai estin thaumastē en ophthalmois hēmōn?
21.43: dia touto legō hymin hoti arthēsetai aph’ hymōn hē basileia tou Theou kai dothēsetai ethnei poiounti tous karpous autēs.
21.44: kai ho pesōn epi ton lithon touton synthlasthēsetai; eph’ hon d’ an pesē, likmēsei auton.
21.45: Kai akousantes hoi archiereis kai hoi Pharisaioi tas parabolas autou egnōsan hoti peri autōn legei;
21.46: kai zētountes auton kratēsai ephobēthēsan tous ochlous, epei eis prophētēn auton eichon.

22.1: Kai apokritheis ho Iēsous palin eipen en parabolais autois legōn
22.2: Hōmoiōthē hē basileia tōn ouranōn anthrōpō basilei, hostis epoiēsen gamous tō huiō autou.
22.3: kai apesteilen tous doulous autou kalesai tous keklēmenous eis tous gamous, kai ouk ēthelon elthein.
22.4: palin apesteilen allous doulous legōn Eipate tois keklēmenois Idou to ariston mou hētoimaka, hoi tauroi mou kai ta sitista tethymena, kai panta hetoima; deute eis tous gamous.
22.5: hoi de amelēsantes apēlthon, hos men eis ton idion agron, hos de epi tēn emporian autou;
22.6: hoi de loipoi kratēsantes tous doulous autou hybrisan kai apekteinan.
22.7: ho de basileus ōrgisthē, kai pempsas ta strateumata autou apōlesen tous phoneis ekeinous kai tēn polin autōn eneprēsen.
22.8: tote legei tois doulois autou HO men gamos hetoimos estin, hoi de keklēmenoi ouk ēsan axioi;
22.9: poreuesthe oun epi tas diexodous tōn hodōn, kai hosous ean heurēte kalesate eis tous gamous.
22.10: kai exelthontes hoi douloi ekeinoi eis tas hodous synēgagon pantas hous heuron, ponērous te kai agathous; kai eplēsthē ho nymphōn anakeimenōn.
22.11: eiselthōn de ho basileus theasasthai tous anakeimenous eiden ekei anthrōpon ouk endedymenon endyma gamou;
22.12: kai legei autō Hetaire, pōs eisēlthes hōde mē echōn endyma gamou? ho de ephimōthē.
22.13: tote ho basileus eipen tois diakonois Dēsantes autou podas kai cheiras ekbalete auton eis to skotos to exōteron; ekei estai ho klauthmos kai ho brygmos tōn odontōn.
22.14: Polloi gar eisin klētoi, oligoi de eklektoi.
22.15: Tote poreuthentes hoi Pharisaioi symboulion elabon hopōs auton pagideusōsin en logō.
22.16: kai apostellousin autō tous mathētas autōn meta tōn Hērōdianōn legontas Didaskale, oidamen hoti alēthēs ei kai tēn hodon tou Theou en alētheia didaskeis, kai ou melei soi peri oudenos, ou gar blepeis eis prosōpon anthrōpōn;
22.17: eipon oun hēmin, ti soi dokei? exestin dounai kēnson Kaisari ē ou?
22.18: gnous de ho Iēsous tēn ponērian autōn eipen Ti me peirazete, hypokritai?
22.19: epideixate moi to nomisma tou kēnsou. hoi de prosēnenkan autō dēnarion.
22.20: kai legei autois Tinos hē eikōn hautē kai hē epigraphē?
22.21: legousin; Kaisaros. tote legei autois Apodote oun ta Kaisaros Kaisari kai ta tou Theou tō Theō.
22.22: kai akousantes ethaumasan, kai aphentes auton apēlthan.
22.23: En ekeinē tē hēmera prosēlthon autō Saddoukaioi, legontes mē einai anastasin, kai epērōtēsan auton
22.24: legontes Didaskale, Mōusēs eipen Ean tis apothanē mē echōn tekna, epigambreusei ho adelphos autou tēn gynaika autou kai anastēsei sperma tō adelphō autou.
22.25: ēsan de par’ hēmin hepta adelphoi; kai ho prōtos gēmas eteleutēsen, kai mē echōn sperma aphēken tēn gynaika autou tō adelphō autou;
22.26: homoiōs kai ho deuteros kai ho tritos, heōs tōn hepta;
22.27: hysteron de pantōn apethanen hē gynē.
22.28: en tē anastasei oun tinos tōn hepta estai gynē? pantes gar eschon autēn.
22.29: apokritheis de ho Iēsous eipen autois Planasthe mē eidotes tas graphas mēde tēn dynamin tou Theou.
22.30: en gar tē anastasei oute gamousin oute gamizontai, all’ hōs angeloi en tō ouranō eisin.
22.31: peri de tēs anastaseōs tōn nekrōn ouk anegnōte to rhēthen hymin hypo tou Theou legontos
22.32: Egō eimi ho Theos Abraam kai ho Theos Isaak kai ho Theos Iakōb? ouk estin ho Theos nekrōn alla zōntōn.
22.33: kai akousantes hoi ochloi exeplēssonto epi tē didachē autou.
22.34: Hoi de Pharisaioi akousantes hoti ephimōsen tous Saddoukaious, synēchthēsan epi to auto,
22.35: kai epērōtēsen heis ex autōn nomikos peirazōn auton
22.36: Didaskale, poia entolē megalē en tō nomō?
22.37: ho de ephē autō Agapēseis kyrion ton Theon sou en holē tē kardia sou kai en holē tē psychē sou kai en holē tē dianoia sou.
22.38: hautē estin hē megalē kai prōtē entolē.
22.39: deutera homoia autē Agapēseis ton plēsion sou hōs seauton.
22.40: en tautais tais dysin entolais holos ho nomos krematai kai hoi prophētai.
22.41: Synēgmenōn de tōn Pharisaiōn epērōtēsen autous ho Iēsous
22.42: legōn Ti hymin dokei peri tou Christou? tinos huios estin? legousin autō Tou Daueid.
22.43: legei autois Pōs oun Daueid en Pneumati kalei auton Kyrion legōn
22.44: Eipen Kyrios tō Kyriō mou Kathou ek dexiōn mou heōs an thō tous echthrous sou hypokatō tōn podōn sou?
22.45: ei oun Daueid kalei auton Kyrion, pōs huios autou estin?
22.46: kai oudeis edynato apokrithēnai autō logon, oude etolmēsen tis ap’ ekeinēs tēs hēmeras eperōtēsai auton ouketi.

23.1: Tote ho Iēsous elalēsen tois ochlois kai tois mathētais autou
23.2: legōn Epi tēs Mōuseōs kathedras ekathisan hoi grammateis kai hoi Pharisaioi.
23.3: panta oun hosa ean eipōsin hymin poiēsate kai tēreite, kata de ta erga autōn mē poieite; legousin gar kai ou poiousin.
23.4: desmeuousin de phortia barea kai epititheasin epi tous ōmous tōn anthrōpōn, autoi de tō daktylō autōn ou thelousin kinēsai auta.
23.5: panta de ta erga autōn poiousin pros to theathēnai tois anthrōpois; platynousin gar ta phylaktēria autōn kai megalynousin ta kraspeda,
23.6: philousin de tēn prōtoklisian en tois deipnois kai tas prōtokathedrias en tais synagōgais
23.7: kai tous aspasmous en tais agorais kai kaleisthai hypo tōn anthrōpōn Rhabbei.
23.8: hymeis de mē klēthēte Rhabbei; heis gar estin hymōn ho didaskalos, pantes de hymeis adelphoi este.
23.9: kai patera mē kalesēte hymōn epi tēs gēs; heis gar estin hymōn ho Patēr ho ouranios.
23.10: mēde klēthēte kathēgētai, hoti kathēgētēs hymōn estin heis ho Christos.
23.11: ho de meizōn hymōn estai hymōn diakonos.
23.12: Hostis de hypsōsei heauton tapeinōthēsetai, kai hostis tapeinōsei heauton hypsōthēsetai.
23.13: Ouai de hymin, grammateis kai Pharisaioi hypokritai, hoti kleiete tēn basileian tōn ouranōn emprosthen tōn anthrōpōn; hymeis gar ouk eiserchesthe, oude tous eiserchomenous aphiete eiselthein.
23.15: Ouai hymin, grammateis kai Pharisaioi hypokritai, hoti periagete tēn thalassan kai tēn xēran poiēsai hena prosēlyton, kai hotan genētai, poieite auton huion geennēs diploteron hymōn.
23.16: Ouai hymin, hodēgoi typhloi hoi legontes Hos an omosē en tō naō, ouden estin; hos d’ an omosē en tō chrysō tou naou, opheilei.
23.17: mōroi kai typhloi, tis gar meizōn estin, ho chrysos ē ho naos ho hagiasas ton chryson?
23.18: kai Hos an omosē en tō thysiastēriō, ouden estin; hos d’ an omosē en tō dōrō tō epanō autou, opheilei.
23.19: typhloi, ti gar meizon, to dōron ē to thysiastērion to hagiazon to dōron?
23.20: ho oun omosas en tō thysiastēriō omnyei en autō kai en pasi tois epanō autou;
23.21: kai ho omosas en tō naō omnyei en autō kai en tō katoikounti auton;
23.22: kai ho omosas en tō ouranō omnyei en tō thronō tou Theou kai en tō kathēmenō epanō autou.
23.23: Ouai hymin, grammateis kai Pharisaioi hypokritai, hoti apodekatoute to hēdyosmon kai to anēthon kai to kyminon, kai aphēkate ta barytera tou nomou, tēn krisin kai to eleos kai tēn pistin; tauta de edei poiēsai kakeina mē apheinai.
23.24: hodēgoi typhloi, hoi diulizontes ton kōnōpa, tēn de kamēlon katapinontes.
23.25: Ouai hymin, grammateis kai Pharisaioi hypokritai, hoti katharizete to exōthen tou potēriou kai tēs paropsidos, esōthen de gemousin ex harpagēs kai akrasias.
23.26: Pharisaie typhle, katharison prōton to entos tou potēriou hina genētai kai to ektos autou katharon.
23.27: Ouai hymin, grammateis kai Pharisaioi hypokritai, hoti paromoiazete taphois kekoniamenois, hoitines exōthen men phainontai hōraioi, esōthen de gemousin osteōn nekrōn kai pasēs akatharsias.
23.28: houtōs kai hymeis exōthen men phainesthe tois anthrōpois dikaioi, esōthen de este mestoi hypokriseōs kai anomias.
23.29: Ouai hymin, grammateis kai Pharisaioi hypokritai, hoti oikodomeite tous taphous tōn prophētōn kai kosmeite ta mnēmeia tōn dikaiōn,
23.30: kai legete Ei ēmetha en tais hēmerais tōn paterōn hēmōn, ouk an ēmetha autōn koinōnoi en tō haimati tōn prophētōn.
23.31: hōste martyreite heautois hoti huioi este tōn phoneusantōn tous prophētas.
23.32: kai hymeis plērōsate to metron tōn paterōn hymōn.
23.33: opheis, gennēmata echidnōn, pōs phygēte apo tēs kriseōs tēs geennēs?
23.34: dia touto idou egō apostellō pros hymas prophētas kai sophous kai grammateis; ex autōn apokteneite kai staurōsete, kai ex autōn mastigōsete en tais synagōgais hymōn kai diōxete apo poleōs eis polin;
23.35: hopōs elthē eph’ hymas pan haima dikaion ekchynnomenon epi tēs gēs apo tou haimatos Habel tou dikaiou heōs tou haimatos Zachariou huiou Barachiou, hon ephoneusate metaxy tou naou kai tou thysiastēriou.
23.36: amēn legō hymin, hēxei tauta panta epi tēn genean tautēn.
23.37: Ierousalēm Ierousalēm, hē apokteinousa tous prophētas kai lithobolousa tous apestalmenous pros autēn, posakis ēthelēsa episynagagein ta tekna sou, hon tropon ornis episynagei ta nossia autēs hypo tas pterygas, kai ouk ēthelēsate.
23.38: idou aphietai hymin ho oikos hymōn.
23.39: legō gar hymin, ou mē me idēte ap’ arti heōs an eipēte Eulogēmenos ho erchomenos en onomati Kyriou.

24.1: Kai exelthōn ho Iēsous apo tou hierou eporeueto, kai prosēlthon hoi mathētai autou epideixai autō tas oikodomas tou hierou.
24.2: ho de apokritheis eipen autois Ou blepete tauta panta? amēn legō hymin, ou mē aphethē hōde lithos epi lithon hos ou katalythēsetai.
24.3: Kathēmenou de autou epi tou orous tōn Elaiōn prosēlthon autō hoi mathētai kat’ idian legontes Eipe hēmin, pote tauta estai, kai ti to sēmeion tēs sēs parousias kai synteleias tou aiōnos?
24.4: kai apokritheis ho Iēsous eipen autois Blepete mē tis hymas planēsē.
24.5: polloi gar eleusontai epi tō onomati mou legontes Egō eimi ho Christos, kai pollous planēsousin.
24.6: mellēsete de akouein polemous kai akoas polemōn; horate, mē throeisthe; dei gar genesthai, all’ oupō estin to telos.
24.7: egerthēsetai gar ethnos epi ethnos kai basileia epi basileian, kai esontai limoi kai seismoi kata topous;
24.9: tote paradōsousin hymas eis thlipsin kai apoktenousin hymas, kai esesthe misoumenoi hypo pantōn tōn ethnōn dia to onoma mou.
24.10: kai tote skandalisthēsontai polloi kai allēlous paradōsousin kai misēsousin allēlous;
24.11: kai polloi pseudoprophētai egerthēsontai kai planēsousin pollous;
24.12: kai dia to plēthynthēnai tēn anomian psygēsetai hē agapē tōn pollōn.
24.13: ho de hypomeinas eis telos, houtos sōthēsetai.
24.14: kai kērychthēsetai touto to euangelion tēs basileias en holē tē oikoumenē eis martyrion pasin tois ethnesin, kai tote hēxei to telos.
24.15: Hotan oun idēte to bdelygma tēs erēmōseōs to rhēthen dia Daniēl tou prophētou hestos en topō hagiō, ho anaginōskōn noeitō,
24.16: tote hoi en tē Ioudaia pheugetōsan eis ta orē,
24.17: ho epi tou dōmatos mē katabatō arai ta ek tēs oikias autou,
24.18: kai ho en tō agrō mē epistrepsatō opisō arai to himation autou.
24.19: ouai de tais en gastri echousais kai tais thēlazousais en ekeinais tais hēmerais.
24.20: proseuchesthe de hina mē genētai hē phygē hymōn cheimōnos mēde sabbatō;
24.21: estai gar tote thlipsis megalē, hoia ou gegonen ap’ archēs kosmou heōs tou nyn oud’ ou mē genētai.
24.22: kai ei mē ekolobōthēsan hai hēmerai ekeinai, ouk an esōthē pasa sarx; dia de tous eklektous kolobōthēsontai hai hēmerai ekeinai.
24.23: tote ean tis hymin eipē Idou hōde ho Christos, ē Hōde, mē pisteusēte;
24.24: egerthēsontai gar pseudochristoi kai pseudoprophētai, kai dōsousin sēmeia megala kai terata hōste planēsai, ei dynaton, kai tous eklektous.
24.26: ean oun eipōsin hymin Idou en tē erēmō estin, mē exelthēte; Idou en tois tameiois, mē pisteusēte;
24.27: hōsper gar hē astrapē exerchetai apo anatolōn kai phainetai heōs dysmōn, houtōs estai hē parousia tou Huiou tou anthrōpou;
24.28: hopou ean ē to ptōma, ekei synachthēsontai hoi aetoi.
24.29: Eutheōs de meta tēn thlipsin tōn hēmerōn ekeinōn ho hēlios skotisthēsetai, kai hē selēnē ou dōsei to phengos autēs, kai hoi asteres pesountai apo tou ouranou, kai hai dynameis tōn ouranōn saleuthēsontai.
24.30: kai tote phanēsetai to sēmeion tou Huiou tou anthrōpou en ouranō, kai tote kopsontai pasai hai phylai tēs gēs kai opsontai ton Huion tou anthrōpou erchomenon epi tōn nephelōn tou ouranou meta dynameōs kai doxēs pollēs;
24.31: kai apostelei tous angelous autou meta salpingos megalēs, kai episynaxousin tous eklektous autou ek tōn tessarōn anemōn ap’ akrōn ouranōn heōs akrōn autōn.
24.32: Apo de tēs sykēs mathete tēn parabolēn; hotan ēdē ho klados autēs genētai hapalos kai ta phylla ekphyē, ginōskete hoti engys to theros;
24.33: houtōs kai hymeis hotan idēte panta tauta, ginōskete hoti engys estin epi thyrais.
24.34: amēn legō hymin hoti ou mē parelthē hē genea hautē heōs an panta tauta genētai.
24.35: ho ouranos kai hē gē pareleusetai, hoi de logoi mou ou mē parelthōsin.
24.36: Peri de tēs hēmeras ekeinēs kai hōras oudeis oiden, oude hoi angeloi tōn ouranōn oude ho Huios, ei mē ho Patēr monos.
24.37: hōsper gar hai hēmerai tou Nōe, houtōs estai hē parousia tou Huiou tou anthrōpou.
24.38: hōs gar ēsan en tais hēmerais ekeinais tais pro tou kataklysmou trōgontes kai pinontes, gamountes kai gamizontes, achri hēs hēmeras eisēlthen Nōe eis tēn kibōton,
24.39: kai ouk egnōsan heōs ēlthen ho kataklysmos kai ēren hapantas, houtōs estai kai hē parousia tou Huiou tou anthrōpou.
24.40: tote esontai dyo en tō agrō, heis paralambanetai kai heis aphietai;
24.41: dyo alēthousai en tō mylō, mia paralambanetai kai mia aphietai.
24.42: grēgoreite oun, hoti ouk oidate poia hēmera ho kyrios hymōn erchetai.
24.43: ekeino de ginōskete hoti ei ēdei ho oikodespotēs poia phylakē ho kleptēs erchetai, egrēgorēsen an kai ouk an eiasen diorychthēnai tēn oikian autou.
24.44: dia touto kai hymeis ginesthe hetoimoi, hoti hē ou dokeite hōra ho Huios tou anthrōpou erchetai.
24.45: Tis ara estin ho pistos doulos kai phronimos hon katestēsen ho kyrios epi tēs oiketeias autou tou dounai autois tēn trophēn en kairō?
24.46: makarios ho doulos ekeinos hon elthōn ho kyrios autou heurēsei houtōs poiounta;
24.47: amēn legō hymin hoti epi pasin tois hyparchousin autou katastēsei auton.
24.48: ean de eipē ho kakos doulos ekeinos en tē kardia autou Chronizei mou ho kyrios,
24.49: kai arxētai typtein tous syndoulous autou, esthiē de kai pinē meta tōn methyontōn,
24.50: hēxei ho kyrios tou doulou ekeinou en hēmera hē ou prosdoka kai en hōra hē ou ginōskei,
24.51: kai dichotomēsei auton kai to meros autou meta tōn hypokritōn thēsei; ekei estai ho klauthmos kai ho brygmos tōn odontōn.

25.1: Tote homoiōthēsetai hē basileia tōn ouranōn deka parthenois, haitines labousai tas lampadas heautōn exēlthon eis hypantēsin tou nymphiou.
25.2: pente de ex autōn ēsan mōrai kai pente phronimoi.
25.3: hai gar mōrai labousai tas lampadas ouk elabon meth’ heautōn elaion;
25.4: hai de phronimoi elabon elaion en tois angeiois meta tōn lampadōn heautōn.
25.5: chronizontos de tou nymphiou enystaxan pasai kai ekatheudon.
25.6: mesēs de nyktos kraugē gegonen Idou ho nymphios, exerchesthe eis apantēsin.
25.7: tote ēgerthēsan pasai hai parthenoi ekeinai kai ekosmēsan tas lampadas heautōn.
25.8: hai de mōrai tais phronimois eipan Dote hēmin ek tou elaiou hymōn, hoti hai lampades hēmōn sbennyntai.
25.9: apekrithēsan de hai phronimoi legousai Mē pote ou mē arkesē hēmin kai hymin; poreuesthe mallon pros tous pōlountas kai agorasate heautais.
25.10: aperchomenōn de autōn agorasai ēlthen ho nymphios, kai hai hetoimoi eisēlthon met’ autou eis tous gamous, kai ekleisthē hē thyra.
25.11: hysteron de erchontai kai hai loipai parthenoi legousai Kyrie kyrie, anoixon hēmin.
25.12: ho de apokritheis eipen Amēn legō hymin, ouk oida hymas.
25.13: Grēgoreite oun, hoti ouk oidate tēn hēmeran oude tēn hōran.
25.14: Hōsper gar anthrōpos apodēmōn ekalesen tous idious doulous kai paredōken autois ta hyparchonta autou,
25.15: kai hō men edōken pente talanta, hō de dyo, hō de hen, hekastō kata tēn idian dynamin, kai apedēmēsen. Eutheōs
25.16: poreutheis ho ta pente talanta labōn ērgasato en autois kai ekerdēsen alla pente;
25.17: hōsautōs ho ta dyo ekerdēsen alla dyo.
25.18: ho de to hen labōn apelthōn ōryxen gēn kai ekrypsen to argyrion tou kyriou autou.
25.19: meta de polyn chronon erchetai ho kyrios tōn doulōn ekeinōn kai synairei logon met’ autōn.
25.20: kai proselthōn ho ta pente talanta labōn prosēnenken alla pente talanta legōn Kyrie, pente talanta moi paredōkas; ide alla pente talanta ekerdēsa.
25.21: ephē autō ho kyrios autou Eu, doule agathe kai piste, epi oliga ēs pistos, epi pollōn se katastēsō; eiselthe eis tēn charan tou kyriou sou.
25.22: proselthōn kai ho ta dyo talanta eipen Kyrie, dyo talanta moi paredōkas; ide alla dyo talanta ekerdēsa.
25.23: ephē autō ho kyrios autou Eu, doule agathe kai piste, epi oliga ēs pistos, epi pollōn se katastēsō; eiselthe eis tēn charan tou kyriou sou.
25.24: proselthōn de kai ho to hen talanton eilēphōs eipen Kyrie, egnōn se hoti sklēros ei anthrōpos, therizōn hopou ouk espeiras, kai synagōn hothen ou dieskorpisas;
25.25: kai phobētheis apelthōn ekrypsa to talanton sou en tē gē; ide echeis to son.
25.26: apokritheis de ho kyrios autou eipen autō Ponēre doule kai oknēre, ēdeis hoti therizō hopou ouk espeira, kai synagō hothen ou dieskorpisa?
25.27: edei se oun balein ta argyria mou tois trapezeitais, kai elthōn egō ekomisamēn an to emon syn tokō.
25.28: arate oun ap’ autou to talanton kai dote tō echonti ta deka talanta;
25.29: tō gar echonti panti dothēsetai kai perisseuthēsetai; tou de mē echontos kai ho echei arthēsetai ap’ autou.
25.30: kai ton achreion doulon ekbalete eis to skotos to exōteron; ekei estai ho klauthmos kai ho brygmos tōn odontōn.
25.31: Hotan de elthē ho huios tou anthrōpou en tē doxē autou kai pantes hoi angeloi met’ autou, tote kathisei epi thronou doxēs autou;
25.32: kai synachthēsontai emprosthen autou panta ta ethnē, kai aphorisei autous ap’ allēlōn, hōsper ho poimēn aphorizei ta probata apo tōn eriphōn,
25.33: kai stēsei ta men probata ek dexiōn autou, ta de eriphia ex euōnymōn.
25.34: tote erei ho Basileus tois ek dexiōn autou Deute hoi eulogēmenoi tou Patros mou, klēronomēsate tēn hētoimasmenēn hymin basileian apo katabolēs kosmou.
25.35: epeinasa gar kai edōkate moi phagein, edipsēsa kai epotisate me, xenos ēmēn kai synēgagete me,
25.36: gymnos kai periebalete me, ēsthenēsa kai epeskepsasthe me, en phylakē ēmēn kai ēlthate pros me.
25.37: tote apokrithēsontai autō hoi dikaioi legontes Kyrie, pote se eidomen peinōnta kai ethrepsamen, ē dipsōnta kai epotisamen?
25.38: pote de se eidomen xenon kai synēgagomen, ē gymnon kai periebalomen?
25.39: pote de se eidomen asthenounta ē en phylakē kai ēlthomen pros se?
25.40: kai apokritheis ho Basileus erei autois Amēn legō hymin, eph’ hoson epoiēsate heni toutōn tōn adelphōn mou tōn elachistōn, emoi epoiēsate.
25.41: tote erei kai tois ex euōnymōn Poreuesthe ap’ emou katēramenoi eis to pyr to aiōnion to hētoimasmenon tō diabolō kai tois angelois autou.
25.42: epeinasa gar kai ouk edōkate moi phagein, edipsēsa kai ouk epotisate me,
25.43: xenos ēmēn kai ou synēgagete me, gymnos kai ou periebalete me, asthenēs kai en phylakē kai ouk epeskepsasthe me.
25.44: tote apokrithēsontai kai autoi legontes Kyrie, pote se eidomen peinōnta ē dipsōnta ē xenon ē gymnon ē asthenē ē en phylakē kai ou diēkonēsamen soi?
25.45: tote apokrithēsetai autois legōn Amēn legō hymin, eph’ hoson ouk epoiēsate heni toutōn tōn elachistōn, oude emoi epoiēsate.
25.46: kai apeleusontai houtoi eis kolasin aiōnion, hoi de dikaioi eis zōēn aiōnion.

26.1: Kai egeneto hote etelesen ho Iēsous pantas tous logous toutous, eipen tois mathētais autou
26.2: Oidate hoti meta dyo hēmeras to pascha ginetai, kai ho Huios tou anthrōpou paradidotai eis to staurōthēnai.
26.3: Tote synēchthēsan hoi archiereis kai hoi presbyteroi tou laou eis tēn aulēn tou archiereōs tou legomenou Kaiapha,
26.4: kai synebouleusanto hina ton Iēsoun dolō kratēsōsin kai apokteinōsin;
26.5: elegon de Mē en tē heortē, hina mē thorybos genētai en tō laō.
26.6: Tou de Iēsou genomenou en Bēthania en oikia Simōnos tou leprou,
26.7: prosēlthen autō gynē echousa alabastron myrou barytimou kai katecheen epi tēs kephalēs autou anakeimenou.
26.8: idontes de hoi mathētai ēganaktēsan legontes Eis ti hē apōleia hautē?
26.9: edynato gar touto prathēnai pollou kai dothēnai ptōchois.
26.10: gnous de ho Iēsous eipen autois Ti kopous parechete tē gynaiki? ergon gar kalon ērgasato eis eme;
26.11: pantote gar tous ptōchous echete meth’ heautōn, eme de ou pantote echete;
26.12: balousa gar hautē to myron touto epi tou sōmatos mou pros to entaphiasai me epoiēsen.
26.13: amēn legō hymin, hopou ean kērychthē to euangelion touto en holō tō kosmō, lalēthēsetai kai ho epoiēsen hautē eis mnēmosynon autēs.
26.14: Tote poreutheis heis tōn dōdeka, ho legomenos Ioudas Iskariōtēs, pros tous archiereis
26.15: eipen Ti thelete moi dounai, kagō hymin paradōsō auton? hoi de estēsan autō triakonta argyria.
26.16: kai apo tote ezētei eukairian hina auton paradō.
26.17: Tē de prōtē tōn azymōn prosēlthon hoi mathētai tō Iēsou legontes Pou theleis hetoimasōmen soi phagein to pascha?
26.18: ho de eipen Hypagete eis tēn polin pros ton deina kai eipate autō HO Didaskalos legei HO kairos mou engys estin; pros se poiō to pascha meta tōn mathētōn mou.
26.19: kai epoiēsan hoi mathētai hōs synetaxen autois ho Iēsous, kai hētoimasan to pascha.
26.20: Opsias de genomenēs anekeito meta tōn dōdeka mathētōn
26.21: kai esthiontōn autōn eipen Amēn legō hymin hoti heis ex hymōn paradōsei me.
26.22: kai lypoumenoi sphodra ērxanto legein autō heis hekastos Mēti egō eimi, Kyrie?
26.23: ho de apokritheis eipen HO embapsas met’ emou tēn cheira en tō trybliō, houtos me paradōsei.
26.24: ho men Huios tou anthrōpou hypagei kathōs gegraptai peri autou, ouai de tō anthrōpō ekeinō di’ hou ho Huios tou anthrōpou paradidotai; kalon ēn autō ei ouk egennēthē ho anthrōpos ekeinos.
26.25: apokritheis de Ioudas ho paradidous auton eipen Mēti egō eimi, Rhabbei? legei autō Sy eipas.
26.26: Esthiontōn de autōn labōn ho Iēsous arton kai eulogēsas eklasen kai dous tois mathētais eipen Labete phagete; touto estin to sōma mou.
26.27: kai labōn potērion kai eucharistēsas edōken autois legōn Piete ex autou pantes;
26.28: touto gar estin to haima mou tēs diathēkēs to peri pollōn ekchynnomenon eis aphesin hamartiōn.
26.29: legō de hymin, ou mē piō ap’ arti ek toutou tou genēmatos tēs ampelou heōs tēs hēmeras ekeinēs hotan auto pinō meth’ hymōn kainon en tē basileia tou Patros mou.
26.30: Kai hymnēsantes exēlthon eis to oros tōn Elaiōn.
26.31: Tote legei autois ho Iēsous Pantes hymeis skandalisthēsesthe en emoi en tē nykti tautē; gegraptai gar Pataxō ton poimena, kai diaskorpisthēsontai ta probata tēs poimnēs;
26.32: meta de to egerthēnai me proaxō hymas eis tēn Galilaian.
26.33: apokritheis de ho Petros eipen autō Ei pantes skandalisthēsontai en soi, egō oudepote skandalisthēsomai.
26.34: ephē autō ho Iēsous Amēn legō soi hoti en tautē tē nykti prin alektora phōnēsai tris aparnēsē me.
26.35: legei autō ho Petros Kan deē me syn soi apothanein, ou mē se aparnēsomai. homoiōs kai pantes hoi mathētai eipan.
26.36: Tote erchetai met’ autōn ho Iēsous eis chōrion legomenon Gethsēmanei, kai legei tois mathētais Kathisate autou heōs hou apelthōn ekei proseuxōmai.
26.37: kai paralabōn ton Petron kai tous dyo huious Zebedaiou ērxato lypeisthai kai adēmonein.
26.38: tote legei autois Perilypos estin hē psychē mou heōs thanatou; meinate hōde kai grēgoreite met’ emou.
26.39: kai proelthōn mikron epesen epi prosōpon autou proseuchomenos kai legōn Pater mou, ei dynaton estin, parelthatō ap’ emou to potērion touto; plēn ouch hōs egō thelō all’ hōs sy.
26.40: kai erchetai pros tous mathētas kai heuriskei autous katheudontas, kai legei tō Petrō Houtōs ouk ischysate mian hōran grēgorēsai met’ emou?
26.41: grēgoreite kai proseuchesthe, hina mē eiselthēte eis peirasmon; to men pneuma prothymon, hē de sarx asthenēs.
26.42: palin ek deuterou apelthōn prosēuxato legōn Pater mou, ei ou dynatai touto parelthein ean mē auto piō, genēthētō to thelēma sou.
26.43: kai elthōn palin heuren autous katheudontas, ēsan gar autōn hoi ophthalmoi bebarēmenoi.
26.44: kai apheis autous palin apelthōn prosēuxato ek tritou, ton auton logon eipōn palin.
26.45: tote erchetai pros tous mathētas kai legei autois Katheudete loipon kai anapauesthe; idou ēngiken hē hōra kai ho Huios tou anthrōpou paradidotai eis cheiras hamartōlōn.
26.46: egeiresthe, agōmen; idou ēngiken ho paradidous me.
26.47: Kai eti autou lalountos, idou Ioudas heis tōn dōdeka ēlthen, kai met’ autou ochlos polys meta machairōn kai xylōn apo tōn archiereōn kai presbyterōn tou laou.
26.48: ho de paradidous auton edōken autois sēmeion legōn Hon an philēsō autos estin; kratēsate auton.
26.49: kai eutheōs proselthōn tō Iēsou eipen Chaire, Rhabbei, kai katephilēsen auton.
26.50: ho de Iēsous eipen autō Hetaire, eph’ ho parei. tote proselthontes epebalon tas cheiras epi ton Iēsoun kai ekratēsan auton.
26.51: kai idou heis tōn meta Iēsou ekteinas tēn cheira apespasen tēn machairan autou, kai pataxas ton doulon tou archiereōs apheilen autou to ōtion.
26.52: tote legei autō ho Iēsous Apostrepson tēn machairan sou eis ton topon autēs; pantes gar hoi labontes machairan en machairē apolountai.
26.53: ē dokeis hoti ou dynamai parakalesai ton Patera mou, kai parastēsei moi arti pleiō dōdeka legiōnas angelōn?
26.54: pōs oun plērōthōsin hai graphai hoti houtōs dei genesthai?
26.55: En ekeinē tē hōra eipen ho Iēsous tois ochlois Hōs epi lēstēn exēlthate meta machairōn kai xylōn syllabein me? kath’ hēmeran en tō hierō ekathezomēn didaskōn, kai ouk ekratēsate me.
26.56: Touto de holon gegonen hina plērōthōsin hai graphai tōn prophētōn. Tote hoi mathētai pantes aphentes auton ephygon.
26.57: Hoi de kratēsantes ton Iēsoun apēgagon pros Kaiaphan ton archierea, hopou hoi grammateis kai hoi presbyteroi synēchthēsan.
26.58: ho de Petros ēkolouthei autō apo makrothen heōs tēs aulēs tou archiereōs, kai eiselthōn esō ekathēto meta tōn hypēretōn idein to telos.
26.59: Hoi de archiereis kai to synedrion holon ezētoun pseudomartyrian kata tou Iēsou hopōs auton thanatōsōsin,
26.60: kai ouch heuron pollōn proselthontōn pseudomartyrōn. hysteron de proselthontes dyo
26.61: eipan Houtos ephē Dynamai katalysai ton naon tou Theou kai dia triōn hēmerōn oikodomēsai.
26.62: kai anastas ho archiereus eipen autō Ouden apokrinē, ti houtoi sou katamartyrousin?
26.63: ho de Iēsous esiōpa. kai ho archiereus eipen autō Exorkizō se kata tou Theou tou zōntos hina hēmin eipēs ei sy ei ho Christos ho Huios tou Theou.
26.64: legei autō ho Iēsous Sy eipas; plēn legō hymin, ap’ arti opsesthe ton Huion tou anthrōpou kathēmenon ek dexiōn tēs dynameōs kai erchomenon epi tōn nephelōn tou ouranou.
26.65: tote ho archiereus dierrēxen ta himatia autou legōn Eblasphēmēsen; ti eti chreian echomen martyrōn? ide nyn ēkousate tēn blasphēmian;
26.66: ti hymin dokei? hoi de apokrithentes eipan Enochos thanatou estin.
26.67: Tote eneptysan eis to prosōpon autou kai ekolaphisan auton, hoi de erapisan
26.68: legontes Prophēteuson hēmin, Christe, tis estin ho paisas se?
26.69: HO de Petros ekathēto exō en tē aulē; kai prosēlthen autō mia paidiskē legousa Kai sy ēstha meta Iēsou tou Galilaiou.
26.70: ho de ērnēsato emprosthen pantōn legōn Ouk oida ti legeis.
26.71: exelthonta de eis ton pylōna eiden auton allē kai legei tois ekei Houtos ēn meta Iēsou tou Nazōraiou.
26.72: kai palin ērnēsato meta horkou hoti Ouk oida ton anthrōpon.
26.73: meta mikron de proselthontes hoi hestōtes eipon tō Petrō Alēthōs kai sy ex autōn ei, kai gar hē lalia sou dēlon se poiei.
26.74: tote ērxato katathematizein kai omnyein hoti Ouk oida ton anthrōpon. kai euthys alektōr ephōnēsen.
26.75: kai emnēsthē ho Petros tou rhēmatos Iēsou eirēkotos hoti Prin alektora phōnēsai tris aparnēsē me; kai exelthōn exō eklausen pikrōs.

27.1: Prōias de genomenēs symboulion elabon pantes hoi archiereis kai hoi presbyteroi tou laou kata tou Iēsou hōste thanatōsai auton;
27.2: kai dēsantes auton apēgagon kai paredōkan Peilatō tō hēgemoni.
27.3: Tote idōn Ioudas ho paradous auton hoti katekrithē, metamelētheis estrepsen ta triakonta argyria tois archiereusin kai presbyterois
27.4: legōn Hēmarton paradous haima athōon. hoi de eipan Ti pros hēmas? sy opsē.
27.5: kai rhipsas ta argyria eis ton naon anechōrēsen, kai apelthōn apēnxato.
27.6: hoi de archiereis labontes ta argyria eipan Ouk exestin balein auta eis ton korbanan, epei timē haimatos estin.
27.7: symboulion de labontes ēgorasan ex autōn ton agron tou kerameōs eis taphēn tois xenois.
27.8: dio eklēthē ho agros ekeinos Agros haimatos heōs tēs sēmeron.
27.9: tote eplērōthē to rhēthen dia Hieremiou tou prophētou legontos Kai elabon ta triakonta argyria, tēn timēn tou tetimēmenou hon etimēsanto apo huiōn Israēl,
27.10: kai edōkan auta eis ton agron tou kerameōs, katha synetaxen moi Kyrios.
27.11: HO de Iēsous estathē emprosthen tou hēgemonos; kai epērōtēsen auton ho hēgemōn legōn Sy ei ho Basileus tōn Ioudaiōn? ho de Iēsous ephē Sy legeis.
27.12: kai en tō katēgoreisthai auton hypo tōn archiereōn kai presbyterōn ouden apekrinato.
27.13: tote legei autō ho Peilatos Ouk akoueis posa sou katamartyrousin?
27.14: kai ouk apekrithē autō pros oude hen rhēma, hōste thaumazein ton hēgemona lian.
27.15: Kata de heortēn eiōthei ho hēgemōn apolyein hena tō ochlō desmion hon ēthelon.
27.16: eichon de tote desmion episēmon legomenon Barabban.
27.17: synēgmenōn oun autōn eipen autois ho Peilatos Tina thelete apolysō hymin, Barabban ē Iēsoun ton legomenon Christon?
27.18: ēdei gar hoti dia phthonon paredōkan auton.
27.19: Kathēmenou de autou epi tou bēmatos apesteilen pros auton hē gynē autou legousa Mēden soi kai tō dikaiō ekeinō; polla gar epathon sēmeron kat’ onar di’ auton.
27.20: Hoi de archiereis kai hoi presbyteroi epeisan tous ochlous hina aitēsōntai ton Barabban, ton de Iēsoun apolesōsin.
27.21: apokritheis de ho hēgemōn eipen autois Tina thelete apo tōn dyo apolysō hymin? hoi de eipan Ton Barabban.
27.22: legei autois ho Peilatos Ti oun poiēsō Iēsoun ton legomenon Christon? legousin pantes Staurōthētō.
27.23: ho de ephē Ti gar kakon epoiēsen? hoi de perissōs ekrazon legontes Staurōthētō.
27.24: idōn de ho Peilatos hoti ouden ōphelei alla mallon thorybos ginetai, labōn hydōr apenipsato tas cheiras katenanti tou ochlou legōn Athōos eimi apo tou haimatos toutou; hymeis opsesthe.
27.25: kai apokritheis pas ho laos eipen To haima autou eph’ hēmas kai epi ta tekna hēmōn.
27.26: tote apelysen autois ton Barabban, ton de Iēsoun phragellōsas paredōken hina staurōthē.
27.27: Tote hoi stratiōtai tou hēgemonos paralabontes ton Iēsoun eis to praitōrion synēgagon ep’ auton holēn tēn speiran.
27.28: kai ekdysantes auton chlamyda kokkinēn periethēkan autō,
27.29: kai plexantes stephanon ex akanthōn epethēkan epi tēs kephalēs autou kai kalamon en tē dexia autou, kai gonypetēsantes emprosthen autou enepaixan autō legontes Chaire, Basileu tōn Ioudaiōn,
27.30: kai emptysantes eis auton elabon ton kalamon kai etypton eis tēn kephalēn autou.
27.31: kai hote enepaixan autō, exedysan auton tēn chlamyda kai enedysan auton ta himatia autou, kai apēgagon auton eis to staurōsai.
27.32: Exerchomenoi de heuron anthrōpon Kyrēnaion, onomati Simōna; touton ēngareusan hina arē ton stauron autou.
27.33: Kai elthontes eis topon legomenon Golgotha, ho estin kraniou topos legomenos,
27.34: edōkan autō piein oinon meta cholēs memigmenon; kai geusamenos ouk ēthelēsen piein.
27.35: staurōsantes de auton diemerisanto ta himatia autou ballontes klēron,
27.37: kai epethēkan epanō tēs kephalēs autou tēn aitian autou gegrammenēn OUTOS ESTIN IĒSOUS O BASILEUS TŌN IOUDAIŌN.
27.38: Tote staurountai syn autō dyo lēstai, heis ek dexiōn kai heis ex euōnymōn.
27.39: Hoi de paraporeuomenoi eblasphēmoun auton kinountes tas kephalas autōn
27.40: kai legontes HO katalyōn ton naon kai en trisin hēmerais oikodomōn, sōson seauton, ei Huios ei tou Theou, kai katabēthi apo tou staurou.
27.41: homoiōs hoi archiereis empaizontes meta tōn grammateōn kai presbyterōn elegon
27.42: Allous esōsen, heauton ou dynatai sōsai; Basileus Israēl estin, katabatō nyn apo tou staurou kai pisteusomen ep’ auton.
27.43: pepoithen epi ton Theon, rhysasthō nyn ei thelei auton; eipen gar hoti Theou eimi Huios.
27.44: to d’ auto kai hoi lēstai hoi synstaurōthentes syn autō ōneidizon auton.
27.45: Apo de hektēs hōras skotos egeneto epi pasan tēn gēn heōs hōras enatēs.
27.46: peri de tēn enatēn hōran aneboēsen ho Iēsous phōnē megalē legōn Hēlei Hēlei lema sabachthanei? tout’ estin Thee mou thee mou, hina ti me enkatelipes?
27.47: tines de tōn ekei hestēkotōn akousantes elegon hoti Hēleian phōnei houtos.
27.48: kai eutheōs dramōn heis ex autōn kai labōn spongon plēsas te oxous kai peritheis kalamō epotizen auton.
27.49: hoi de loipoi eipan Aphes idōmen ei erchetai Hēleias sōsōn auton.
27.50: ho de Iēsous palin kraxas phōnē megalē aphēken to pneuma.
27.51: Kai idou to katapetasma tou naou eschisthē ap’ anōthen heōs katō eis dyo, kai hē gē eseisthē, kai hai petrai eschisthēsan,
27.52: kai ta mnēmeia aneōchthēsan kai polla sōmata tōn kekoimēmenōn hagiōn ēgerthēsan;
27.53: kai exelthontes ek tōn mnēmeiōn meta tēn egersin autou eisēlthon eis tēn hagian polin kai enephanisthēsan pollois.
27.54: HO de hekatontarchos kai hoi met’ autou tērountes ton Iēsoun idontes ton seismon kai ta ginomena ephobēthēsan sphodra, legontes Alēthōs Theou Huios ēn houtos.
27.55: Ēsan de ekei gynaikes pollai apo makrothen theōrousai, haitines ēkolouthēsan tō Iēsou apo tēs Galilaias diakonousai autō;
27.56: en hais ēn Maria hē Magdalēnē, kai Maria hē tou Iakōbou kai Iōsēph mētēr, kai hē mētēr tōn huiōn Zebedaiou.
27.57: Opsias de genomenēs ēlthen anthrōpos plousios apo Arimathaias, tounoma Iōsēph, hos kai autos emathēteuthē tō Iēsou;
27.58: houtos proselthōn tō Peilatō ētēsato to sōma tou Iēsou. tote ho Peilatos ekeleusen apodothēnai.
27.59: kai labōn to sōma ho Iōsēph enetylixen auto en sindoni kathara,
27.60: kai ethēken auto en tō kainō autou mnēmeiō ho elatomēsen en tē petra, kai proskylisas lithon megan tē thyra tou mnēmeiou apēlthen.
27.61: Ēn de ekei Mariam hē Magdalēnē kai hē allē Maria, kathēmenai apenanti tou taphou.
27.62: Tē de epaurion, hētis estin meta tēn Paraskeuēn, synēchthēsan hoi archiereis kai hoi Pharisaioi pros Peilaton
27.63: legontes Kyrie, emnēsthēmen hoti ekeinos ho planos eipen eti zōn Meta treis hēmeras egeiromai.
27.64: keleuson oun asphalisthēnai ton taphon heōs tēs tritēs hēmeras, mē pote elthontes hoi mathētai klepsōsin auton kai eipōsin tō laō Ēgerthē apo tōn nekrōn, kai estai hē eschatē planē cheirōn tēs prōtēs.
27.65: ephē autois ho Peilatos Echete koustōdian; hypagete asphalisasthe hōs oidate.
27.66: hoi de poreuthentes ēsphalisanto ton taphon sphragisantes ton lithon meta tēs koustōdias.

28.1: Opse de sabbatōn, tē epiphōskousē eis mian sabbatōn, ēlthen Mariam hē Magdalēnē kai hē allē Maria theōrēsai ton taphon.
28.2: kai idou seismos egeneto megas; angelos gar Kyriou katabas ex ouranou kai proselthōn apekylisen ton lithon kai ekathēto epanō autou.
28.3: ēn de hē eidea autou hōs astrapē, kai to endyma autou leukon hōs chiōn.
28.4: apo de tou phobou autou eseisthēsan hoi tērountes kai egenēthēsan hōs nekroi.
28.5: apokritheis de ho angelos eipen tais gynaixin Mē phobeisthe hymeis; oida gar hoti Iēsoun ton estaurōmenon zēteite;
28.6: ouk estin hōde; ēgerthē gar kathōs eipen; deute idete ton topon hopou ekeito.
28.7: kai tachy poreutheisai eipate tois mathētais autou hoti Ēgerthē apo tōn nekrōn, kai idou proagei hymas eis tēn Galilaian, ekei auton opsesthe. idou eipon hymin.
28.8: kai apelthousai tachy apo tou mnēmeiou meta phobou kai charas megalēs edramon apangeilai tois mathētais autou.
28.9: kai idou Iēsous hypēntēsen autais legōn Chairete. hai de proselthousai ekratēsan autou tous podas kai prosekynēsan autō.
28.10: tote legei autais ho Iēsous Mē phobeisthe; hypagete apangeilate tois adelphois mou hina apelthōsin eis tēn Galilaian, kakei me opsontai.
28.11: Poreuomenōn de autōn idou tines tēs koustōdias elthontes eis tēn polin apēngeilan tois archiereusin hapanta ta genomena.
28.12: kai synachthentes meta tōn presbyterōn symboulion te labontes argyria hikana edōkan tois stratiōtais
28.13: legontes Eipate hoti Hoi mathētai autou nyktos elthontes eklepsan auton hēmōn koimōmenōn.
28.14: kai ean akousthē touto epi tou hēgemonos, hēmeis peisomen kai hymas amerimnous poiēsomen.
28.15: hoi de labontes argyria epoiēsan hōs edidachthēsan. Kai diephēmisthē ho logos houtos para Ioudaiois mechri tēs sēmeron hēmeras.
28.16: Hoi de hendeka mathētai eporeuthēsan eis tēn Galilaian, eis to oros hou etaxato autois ho Iēsous,
28.17: kai idontes auton prosekynēsan, hoi de edistasan.
28.18: kai proselthōn ho Iēsous elalēsen autois legōn Edothē moi pasa exousia en ouranō kai epi tēs gēs.
28.19: poreuthentes oun mathēteusate panta ta ethnē, baptizontes autous eis to onoma tou Patros kai tou Huiou kai tou Hagiou Pneumatos,
28.20: didaskontes autous tērein panta hosa eneteilamēn hymin; kai idou egō meth’ hymōn eimi pasas tas hēmeras heōs tēs synteleias tou aiōnos.

1.1: Archē tou euangeliou Iēsou Christou Huiou Theou.
1.2: Kathōs gegraptai en tō Hēsaia tō prophētē Idou apostellō ton angelon mou pro prosōpou sou, hos kataskeuasei tēn hodon sou;
1.3: phōnē boōntos en tē erēmō Hetoimasate tēn hodon Kyriou, eutheias poieite tas tribous autou,
1.4: egeneto Iōanēs ho baptizōn en tē erēmō kēryssōn baptisma metanoias eis aphesin hamartiōn.
1.5: kai exeporeueto pros auton pasa hē Ioudaia chōra kai hoi Hierosolymeitai pantes, kai ebaptizonto hyp’ autou en tō Iordanē potamō exomologoumenoi tas hamartias autōn.
1.6: kai ēn ho Iōanēs endedymenos trichas kamēlou kai zōnēn dermatinēn peri tēn osphyn autou, kai esthōn akridas kai meli agrion.
1.7: kai ekēryssen legōn Erchetai ho ischyroteros mou opisō mou, hou ouk eimi hikanos kypsas lysai ton himanta tōn hypodēmatōn autou.
1.8: egō ebaptisa hymas hydati, autos de baptisei hymas Pneumati Hagiō.
1.9: Kai egeneto en ekeinais tais hēmerais ēlthen Iēsous apo Nazaret tēs Galilaias kai ebaptisthē eis ton Iordanēn hypo Iōanou.
1.10: kai euthys anabainōn ek tou hydatos eiden schizomenous tous ouranous kai to Pneuma hōs peristeran katabainon eis auton;
1.11: kai phōnē egeneto ek tōn ouranōn Sy ei ho Huios mou ho agapētos, en soi eudokēsa.
1.12: Kai euthys to Pneuma auton ekballei eis tēn erēmon.
1.13: kai ēn en tē erēmō tesserakonta hēmeras peirazomenos hypo tou Satana, kai ēn meta tōn thēriōn, kai hoi angeloi diēkonoun autō.
1.14: Kai meta to paradothēnai ton Iōanēn ēlthen ho Iēsous eis tēn Galilaian kēryssōn to euangelion tou Theou
1.15: kai legōn hoti Peplērōtai ho kairos kai ēngiken hē basileia tou Theou; metanoeite kai pisteuete en tō euangeliō.
1.16: Kai paragōn para tēn thalassan tēs Galilaias eiden Simōna kai Andrean ton adelphon Simōnos amphiballontas en tē thalassē; ēsan gar haleeis.
1.17: kai eipen autois ho Iēsous Deute opisō mou, kai poiēsō hymas genesthai haleeis anthrōpōn.
1.18: kai euthys aphentes ta diktya ēkolouthēsan autō.
1.19: Kai probas oligon eiden Iakōbon ton tou Zebedaiou kai Iōanēn ton adelphon autou, kai autous en tō ploiō katartizontas ta diktya,
1.20: kai euthys ekalesen autous; kai aphentes ton patera autōn Zebedaion en tō ploiō meta tōn misthōtōn apēlthon opisō autou.
1.21: Kai eisporeuontai eis Kapharnaoum; kai euthys tois sabbasin eiselthōn eis tēn synagōgēn edidasken.
1.22: kai exeplēssonto epi tē didachē autou; ēn gar didaskōn autous hōs exousian echōn, kai ouch hōs hoi grammateis.
1.23: Kai euthys ēn en tē synagōgē autōn anthrōpos en pneumati akathartō, kai anekraxen
1.24: legōn Ti hēmin kai soi, Iēsou Nazarēne? ēlthes apolesai hēmas. oida se tis ei, ho Hagios tou Theou.
1.25: kai epetimēsen autō ho Iēsous Phimōthēti kai exelthe ex autou.
1.26: kai sparaxan auton to pneuma to akatharton kai phōnēsan phōnē megalē exēlthen ex autou.
1.27: kai ethambēthēsan hapantes, hōste synzētein autous legontas Ti estin touto? didachē kainē kat’ exousian; kai tois pneumasi tois akathartois epitassei, kai hypakouousin autō.
1.28: kai exēlthen hē akoē autou euthys pantachou eis holēn tēn perichōron tēs Galilaias.
1.29: Kai euthys ek tēs synagōgēs exelthontes ēlthon eis tēn oikian Simōnos kai Andreou meta Iakōbou kai Iōanou.
1.30: hē de penthera Simōnos katekeito pyressousa, kai euthys legousin autō peri autēs.
1.31: kai proselthōn ēgeiren autēn kratēsas tēs cheiros; kai aphēken autēn ho pyretos, kai diēkonei autois.
1.32: Opsias de genomenēs, hote edysen ho hēlios, epheron pros auton pantas tous kakōs echontas kai tous daimonizomenous;
1.33: kai ēn holē hē polis episynēgmenē pros tēn thyran.
1.34: kai etherapeusen pollous kakōs echontas poikilais nosois, kai daimonia polla exebalen, kai ouk ēphien lalein ta daimonia, hoti ēdeisan auton.
1.35: Kai prōi ennycha lian anastas exēlthen kai apēlthen eis erēmon topon, kakei prosēucheto.
1.36: kai katediōxen auton Simōn kai hoi met’ autou,
1.37: kai heuron auton kai legousin autō hoti Pantes zētousin se.
1.38: kai legei autois; Agōmen allachou eis tas echomenas kōmopoleis, hina kai ekei kēryxō; eis touto gar exēlthon.
1.39: kai ēlthen kēryssōn eis tas synagōgas autōn eis holēn tēn Galilaian kai ta daimonia ekballōn.
1.40: Kai erchetai pros auton lepros parakalōn auton kai gonypetōn legōn autō hoti Ean thelēs dynasai me katharisai.
1.41: kai splanchnistheis ekteinas tēn cheira autou hēpsato kai legei autō Thelō, katharisthēti.
1.42: kai euthys apēlthen ap’ autou hē lepra, kai ekatheristhē.
1.43: kai embrimēsamenos autō euthys exebalen auton,
1.44: kai legei autō Hora mēdeni mēden eipēs, alla hypage seauton deixon tō hierei kai prosenenke peri tou katharismou sou ha prosetaxen Mōusēs eis martyrion autois.
1.45: ho de exelthōn ērxato kēryssein polla kai diaphēmizein ton logon, hōste mēketi auton dynasthai phanerōs eis polin eiselthein, all’ exō ep’ erēmois topois ēn; kai ērchonto pros auton pantothen.

2.1: Kai eiselthōn palin eis Kapharnaoum di’ hēmerōn ēkousthē hoti en oikō estin.
2.2: kai synēchthēsan polloi, hōste mēketi chōrein mēde ta pros tēn thyran, kai elalei autois ton logon.
2.3: kai erchontai pherontes pros auton paralytikon airomenon hypo tessarōn.
2.4: kai mē dynamenoi prosenenkai autō dia ton ochlon apestegasan tēn stegēn hopou ēn, kai exoryxantes chalōsi ton krabatton hopou ho paralytikos katekeito.
2.5: kai idōn ho Iēsous tēn pistin autōn legei tō paralytikō; Teknon, aphientai sou hai hamartiai.
2.6: ēsan de tines tōn grammateōn ekei kathēmenoi kai dialogizomenoi en tais kardiais autōn
2.7: Ti houtos houtōs lalei? blasphēmei; tis dynatai aphienai hamartias ei mē heis ho Theos?
2.8: kai euthys epignous ho Iēsous tō pneumati autou hoti houtōs dialogizontai en heautois, legei autois Ti tauta dialogizesthe en tais kardiais hymōn?
2.9: ti estin eukopōteron, eipein tō paralytikō Aphientai sou hai hamartiai, ē eipein Egeire kai aron ton krabatton sou kai peripatei?
2.10: hina de eidēte hoti exousian echei ho Huios tou anthrōpou aphienai hamartias epi tēs gēs, — legei tō paralytikō
2.11: Soi legō, egeire aron ton krabatton sou kai hypage eis ton oikon sou.
2.12: kai ēgerthē kai euthys aras ton krabatton exēlthen emprosthen pantōn, hōste existasthai pantas kai doxazein ton Theon legontas hoti Houtōs oudepote eidamen.
2.13: Kai exēlthen palin para tēn thalassan; kai pas ho ochlos ērcheto pros auton, kai edidasken autous.
2.14: kai paragōn eiden Leuein ton tou Alphaiou kathēmenon epi to telōnion, kai legei autō Akolouthei moi. kai anastas ēkolouthēsen autō.
2.15: Kai ginetai katakeisthai auton en tē oikia autou, kai polloi telōnai kai hamartōloi synanekeinto tō Iēsou kai tois mathētais autou, ēsan gar polloi kai ēkolouthoun autō.
2.16: kai hoi grammateis tōn Pharisaiōn idontes hoti esthiei meta tōn hamartōlōn kai telōnōn, elegon tois mathētais autou Hoti meta tōn telōnōn kai hamartōlōn esthiei?
2.17: kai akousas ho Iēsous legei autois Ou chreian echousin hoi ischyontes iatrou all’ hoi kakōs echontes; ouk ēlthon kalesai dikaious alla hamartōlous.
2.18: Kai ēsan hoi mathētai Iōanou kai hoi Pharisaioi nēsteuontes. kai erchontai kai legousin autō Dia ti hoi mathētai Iōanou kai hoi mathētai tōn Pharisaiōn nēsteuousin, hoi de soi mathētai ou nēsteuousin?
2.19: kai eipen autois ho Iēsous Mē dynantai hoi huioi tou nymphōnos en hō ho nymphios met’ autōn estin nēsteuein? hoson chronon echousin ton nymphion met’ autōn, ou dynantai nēsteuein.
2.20: eleusontai de hēmerai hotan aparthē ap’ autōn ho nymphios, kai tote nēsteusousin en ekeinē tē hēmera.
2.21: Oudeis epiblēma rhakous agnaphou epiraptei epi himation palaion; ei de mē, airei to plērōma ap’ autou to kainon tou palaiou, kai cheiron schisma ginetai.
2.22: kai oudeis ballei oinon neon eis askous palaious; ei de mē, rhēxei ho oinos tous askous, kai ho oinos apollytai kai hoi askoi. alla oinon neon eis askous kainous.
2.23: Kai egeneto auton en tois sabbasin paraporeuesthai dia tōn sporimōn, kai hoi mathētai autou ērxanto hodon poiein tillontes tous stachyas.
2.24: kai hoi Pharisaioi elegon autō Ide ti poiousin tois sabbasin ho ouk exestin?
2.25: kai legei autois; Oudepote anegnōte ti epoiēsen Daueid, hote chreian eschen kai epeinasen autos kai hoi met’ autou?
2.26: pōs eisēlthen eis ton oikon tou Theou epi Abiathar archiereōs kai tous artous tēs protheseōs ephagen, hous ouk exestin phagein ei mē tous hiereis, kai edōken kai tois syn autō ousin?
2.27: kai elegen autois To sabbaton dia ton anthrōpon egeneto, kai ouch ho anthrōpos dia to sabbaton;
2.28: hōste kyrios estin ho Huios tou anthrōpou kai tou sabbatou.

3.1: Kai eisēlthen palin eis synagōgēn, kai ēn ekei anthrōpos exērammenēn echōn tēn cheira;
3.2: kai paretēroun auton ei tois sabbasin therapeusei auton, hina katēgorēsōsin autou.
3.3: kai legei tō anthrōpō tō tēn cheira echonti xēran Egeire eis to meson.
3.4: kai legei autois Exestin tois sabbasin agathon poiēsai ē kakopoiēsai, psychēn sōsai ē apokteinai? hoi de esiōpōn.
3.5: kai periblepsamenos autous met’ orgēs, synlypoumenos epi tē pōrōsei tēs kardias autōn, legei tō anthrōpō Ekteinon tēn cheira. kai exeteinen, kai apekatestathē hē cheir autou.
3.6: kai exelthontes hoi Pharisaioi euthys meta tōn Hērōdianōn symboulion edidoun kat’ autou, hopōs auton apolesōsin.
3.7: Kai ho Iēsous meta tōn mathētōn autou anechōrēsen pros tēn thalassan; kai poly plēthos apo tēs Galilaias ēkolouthēsen; kai apo tēs Ioudaias
3.8: kai apo Hierosolymōn kai apo tēs Idoumaias kai peran tou Iordanou kai peri Tyron kai Sidōna, plēthos poly, akouontes hosa poiei, ēlthon pros auton.
3.9: kai eipen tois mathētais autou hina ploiarion proskarterē autō dia ton ochlon, hina mē thlibōsin auton;
3.10: pollous gar etherapeusen, hōste epipiptein autō hina autou hapsōntai hosoi eichon mastigas.
3.11: kai ta pneumata ta akatharta, hotan auton etheōroun, prosepipton autō kai ekrazon legonta hoti Sy ei ho Huios tou Theou.
3.12: kai polla epetima autois hina mē auton phaneron poiēsōsin.
3.13: Kai anabainei eis to oros, kai proskaleitai hous ēthelen autos, kai apēlthon pros auton.
3.14: kai epoiēsen dōdeka hina ōsin met’ autou, kai hina apostellē autous kēryssein
3.15: kai echein exousian ekballein ta daimonia;
3.16: kai epoiēsen tous dōdeka, kai epethēken onoma tō Simōni Petron;
3.17: kai Iakōbon ton tou Zebedaiou kai Iōanēn ton adelphon tou Iakōbou, kai epethēken autois onoma Boanērges, ho estin Huioi Brontēs;
3.18: kai Andrean kai Philippon kai Bartholomaion kai Maththaion kai Thōman kai Iakōbon ton tou Halphaiou kai Thaddaion kai Simōna ton Kananaion
3.19: kai Ioudan Iskariōth, hos kai paredōken auton.
3.20: Kai erchetai eis oikon; kai synerchetai palin ho ochlos, hōste mē dynasthai autous mēde arton phagein.
3.21: kai akousantes hoi par’ autou exēlthon kratēsai auton; elegon gar hoti exestē.
3.22: kai hoi grammateis hoi apo Hierosolymōn katabantes elegon hoti Beelzeboul echei, kai hoti en tō archonti tōn daimoniōn ekballei ta daimonia.
3.23: kai proskalesamenos autous en parabolais elegen autois Pōs dynatai Satanas Satanan ekballein?
3.24: kai ean basileia eph’ heautēn meristhē, ou dynatai stathēnai hē basileia ekeinē;
3.25: kai ean oikia eph’ heautēn meristhē, ou dynēsetai hē oikia ekeinē stēnai.
3.26: kai ei ho Satanas anestē eph’ heauton kai emeristhē, ou dynatai stēnai alla telos echei.
3.27: all’ ou dynatai oudeis eis tēn oikian tou ischyrou eiselthōn ta skeuē autou diarpasai, ean mē prōton ton ischyron dēsē, kai tote tēn oikian autou diarpasei.
3.28: Amēn legō hymin hoti panta aphethēsetai tois huiois tōn anthrōpōn, ta hamartēmata kai hai blasphēmiai, hosa ean blasphēmēsōsin;
3.29: hos d’ an blasphēmēsē eis to Pneuma to Hagion, ouk echei aphesin eis ton aiōna, alla enochos estin aiōniou hamartēmatos.
3.31: Kai erchontai hē mētēr autou kai hoi adelphoi autou, kai exō stēkontes apesteilan pros auton kalountes auton.
3.32: kai ekathēto peri auton ochlos, kai legousin autō Idou hē mētēr sou kai hoi adelphoi sou kai hai adelphai sou exō zētousin se.
3.33: kai apokritheis autois legei Tis estin hē mētēr mou kai hoi adelphoi?
3.34: kai periblepsamenos tous peri auton kyklō kathēmenous legei Ide hē mētēr mou kai hoi adelphoi mou.
3.35: hos an poiēsē to thelēma tou Theou, houtos adelphos mou kai adelphē kai mētēr estin.

4.1: Kai palin ērxato didaskein para tēn thalassan. kai synagetai pros auton ochlos pleistos, hōste auton eis ploion embanta kathēsthai en tē thalassē, kai pas ho ochlos pros tēn thalassan epi tēs gēs ēsan.
4.2: kai edidasken autous en parabolais polla, kai elegen autois en tē didachē autou
4.3: Akouete. idou exēlthen ho speirōn speirai.
4.4: kai egeneto en tō speirein ho men epesen para tēn hodon, kai ēlthen ta peteina kai katephagen auto.
4.5: kai allo epesen epi to petrōdes hopou ouk eichen gēn pollēn, kai euthys exaneteilen dia to mē echein bathos gēs;
4.6: kai hote aneteilen ho hēlios ekaumatisthē, kai dia to mē echein rhizan exēranthē.
4.7: kai allo epesen eis tas akanthas, kai anebēsan hai akanthai kai synepnixan auto, kai karpon ouk edōken.
4.8: kai alla epesen eis tēn gēn tēn kalēn, kai edidou karpon anabainonta kai auxanomena, kai epheren eis triakonta kai hen hexēkonta kai hen hekaton.
4.9: kai elegen Hos echei ōta akouein akouetō.
4.10: Kai hote egeneto kata monas, ērōtōn auton hoi peri auton syn tois dōdeka tas parabolas.
4.11: kai elegen autois Hymin to mystērion dedotai tēs basileias tou Theou; ekeinois de tois exō en parabolais ta panta ginetai,
4.12: hina blepontes blepōsin kai mē idōsin, kai akouontes akouōsin kai mē syniōsin, mē pote epistrepsōsin kai aphethē autois.
4.13: kai legei autois Ouk oidate tēn parabolēn tautēn, kai pōs pasas tas parabolas gnōsesthe?
4.15: houtoi de eisin hoi para tēn hodon hopou speiretai ho logos, kai hotan akousōsin euthys erchetai ho Satanas kai airei ton logon ton esparmenon eis autous.
4.16: kai houtoi eisin homoiōs hoi epi ta petrōdē speiromenoi, hoi hotan akousōsin ton logon euthys meta charas lambanousin auton,
4.17: kai ouk echousin rhizan en heautois alla proskairoi eisin, eita genomenēs thlipseōs ē diōgmou dia ton logon euthys skandalizontai.
4.18: kai alloi eisin hoi eis tas akanthas speiromenoi; houtoi eisin hoi ton logon akousantes,
4.19: kai hai merimnai tou aiōnos kai hē apatē tou ploutou kai hai peri ta loipa epithymiai eisporeuomenai synpnigousin ton logon, kai akarpos ginetai.
4.20: kai ekeinoi eisin hoi epi tēn gēn tēn kalēn sparentes, hoitines akouousin ton logon kai paradechontai kai karpophorousin hen triakonta kai hen hexēkonta kai hen hekaton.
4.21: Kai elegen autois hoti Mēti erchetai ho lychnos hina hypo ton modion tethē ē hypo tēn klinēn? ouch hina epi tēn lychnian tethē?
4.22: ou gar estin ti krypton, ean mē hina phanerōthē; oude egeneto apokryphon, all’ hina elthē eis phaneron.
4.23: ei tis echei ōta akouein, akouetō.
4.24: Kai elegen autois Blepete ti akouete. en hō metrō metreite metrēthēsetai hymin, kai prostethēsetai hymin.
4.25: hos gar echei, dothēsetai autō; kai hos ouk echei, kai ho echei arthēsetai ap’ autou.
4.26: Kai elegen Houtōs estin hē basileia tou Theou, hōs anthrōpos balē ton sporon epi tēs gēs,
4.27: kai katheudē kai egeirētai nykta kai hēmeran, kai ho sporos blasta kai mēkynētai hōs ouk oiden autos.
4.28: automatē hē gē karpophorei, prōton chorton, eiten stachyn, eiten plērēs sitos en tō stachui.
4.29: hotan de paradoi ho karpos, euthys apostellei to drepanon, hoti parestēken ho therismos.
4.30: Kai elegen Pōs homoiōsōmen tēn basileian tou Theou, ē en tini autēn parabolē thōmen?
4.31: hōs kokkō sinapeōs, hos hotan sparē epi tēs gēs, mikroteron on pantōn tōn spermatōn tōn epi tēs gēs,
4.32: kai hotan sparē, anabainei kai ginetai meizon pantōn tōn lachanōn, kai poiei kladous megalous, hōste dynasthai hypo tēn skian autou ta peteina tou ouranou kataskēnoin.
4.33: Kai toiautais parabolais pollais elalei autois ton logon, kathōs ēdynanto akouein;
4.34: chōris de parabolēs ouk elalei autois, kat’ idian de tois idiois mathētais epelyen panta.
4.35: Kai legei autois en ekeinē tē hēmera opsias genomenēs Dielthōmen eis to peran.
4.36: kai aphentes ton ochlon paralambanousin auton hōs ēn en tō ploiō, kai alla ploia ēn met’ autou.
4.37: kai ginetai lailaps megalē anemou, kai ta kymata epeballen eis to ploion, hōste ēdē gemizesthai to ploion.
4.38: kai autos ēn en tē prymnē epi to proskephalaion katheudōn; kai egeirousin auton kai legousin autō Didaskale, ou melei soi hoti apollymetha?
4.39: kai diegertheis epetimēsen tō anemō kai eipen tē thalassē Siōpa, pephimōso. kai ekopasen ho anemos, kai egeneto galēnē megalē.
4.40: kai eipen autois Ti deiloi este houtōs? pōs ouk echete pistin?
4.41: kai ephobēthēsan phobon megan, kai elegon pros allēlous Tis ara houtos estin, hoti kai ho anemos kai hē thalassa hypakouei autō?

5.1: Kai ēlthon eis to peran tēs thalassēs eis tēn chōran tōn Gerasēnōn.
5.2: kai exelthontos autou ek tou ploiou, euthys hypēntēsen autō ek tōn mnēmeiōn anthrōpos en pneumati akathartō,
5.3: hos tēn katoikēsin eichen en tois mnēmasin, kai oude halysei ouketi oudeis edynato auton dēsai
5.4: dia to auton pollakis pedais kai halysesin dedesthai, kai diespasthai hyp’ autou tas halyseis kai tas pedas syntetriphthai, kai oudeis ischyen auton damasai;
5.5: kai dia pantos nyktos kai hēmeras en tois mnēmasin kai en tois oresin ēn krazōn kai katakoptōn heauton lithois.
5.6: kai idōn ton Iēsoun apo makrothen edramen kai prosekynēsen auton,
5.7: kai kraxas phōnē megalē legei Ti emoi kai soi, Iēsou Huie tou Theou tou Hypsistou? horkizō se ton Theon, mē me basanisēs.
5.8: elegen gar autō Exelthe to pneuma to akatharton ek tou anthrōpou.
5.9: kai epērōta auton Ti onoma soi? kai legei autō Legiōn onoma moi, hoti polloi esmen.
5.10: kai parekalei auton polla hina mē auta aposteilē exō tēs chōras.
5.11: ēn de ekei pros tō orei agelē choirōn megalē boskomenē;
5.12: kai parekalesan auton legontes Pempson hēmas eis tous choirous, hina eis autous eiselthōmen.
5.13: kai epetrepsen autois. kai exelthonta ta pneumata ta akatharta eisēlthon eis tous choirous, kai hōrmēsen hē agelē kata tou krēmnou eis tēn thalassan, hōs dischilioi, kai epnigonto en tē thalassē.
5.14: Kai hoi boskontes autous ephygon kai apēngeilan eis tēn polin kai eis tous agrous; kai ēlthon idein ti estin to gegonos.
5.15: kai erchontai pros ton Iēsoun, kai theōrousin ton daimonizomenon kathēmenon himatismenon kai sōphronounta, ton eschēkota ton legiōna, kai ephobēthēsan.
5.16: kai diēgēsanto autois hoi idontes pōs egeneto tō daimonizomenō kai peri tōn choirōn.
5.17: kai ērxanto parakalein auton apelthein apo tōn horiōn autōn.
5.18: kai embainontos autou eis to ploion parekalei auton ho daimonistheis hina met’ autou ē.
5.19: kai ouk aphēken auton, alla legei autō Hypage eis ton oikon sou pros tous sous, kai apangeilon autois hosa ho Kyrios soi pepoiēken kai ēleēsen se.
5.20: kai apēlthen kai ērxato kēryssein en tē Dekapolei hosa epoiēsen autō ho Iēsous, kai pantes ethaumazon.
5.21: Kai diaperasantos tou Iēsou en tō ploiō palin eis to peran synēchthē ochlos polys ep’ auton, kai ēn para tēn thalassan.
5.22: kai erchetai heis tōn archisynagōgōn, onomati Iaeiros, kai idōn auton piptei pros tous podas autou,
5.23: kai parakalei auton polla legōn hoti To thygatrion mou eschatōs echei, hina elthōn epithēs tas cheiras autē, hina sōthē kai zēsē.
5.24: kai apēlthen met’ autou. kai ēkolouthei autō ochlos polys, kai synethlibon auton.
5.25: Kai gynē ousa en rhysei haimatos dōdeka etē,
5.26: kai polla pathousa hypo pollōn iatrōn kai dapanēsasa ta par’ autēs panta, kai mēden ōphelētheisa alla mallon eis to cheiron elthousa,
5.27: akousasa ta peri tou Iēsou, elthousa en tō ochlō opisthen hēpsato tou himatiou autou;
5.28: elegen gar hoti Ean hapsōmai kan tōn himatiōn autou sōthēsomai.
5.29: kai euthys exēranthē hē pēgē tou haimatos autēs, kai egnō tō sōmati hoti iatai apo tēs mastigos.
5.30: kai euthys ho Iēsous epignous en heautō tēn ex autou dynamin exelthousan, epistrapheis en tō ochlō elegen Tis mou hēpsato tōn himatiōn?
5.31: kai elegon autō hoi mathētai autou Blepeis ton ochlon synthlibonta se, kai legeis Tis mou hēpsato?
5.32: kai perieblepeto idein tēn touto poiēsasan.
5.33: hē de gynē phobētheisa kai tremousa, eiduia ho gegonen autē, ēlthen kai prosepesen autō kai eipen autō pasan tēn alētheian.
5.34: ho de eipen autē Thygatēr, hē pistis sou sesōken se; hypage eis eirēnēn, kai isthi hygiēs apo tēs mastigos sou.
5.35: Eti autou lalountos erchontai apo tou archisynagōgou legontes hoti HĒ thygatēr sou apethanen; ti eti skylleis ton didaskalon?
5.36: ho de Iēsous parakousas ton logon laloumenon legei tō archisynagōgō Mē phobou, monon pisteue.
5.37: kai ouk aphēken oudena met’ autou synakolouthēsai ei mē ton Petron kai Iakōbon kai Iōanēn ton adelphon Iakōbou.
5.38: kai erchontai eis ton oikon tou archisynagōgou, kai theōrei thorybon, kai klaiontas kai alalazontas polla,
5.39: kai eiselthōn legei autois Ti thorybeisthe kai klaiete? to paidion ouk apethanen alla katheudei.
5.40: kai kategelōn autou. autos de ekbalōn pantas paralambanei ton patera tou paidiou kai tēn mētera kai tous met’ autou, kai eisporeuetai hopou ēn to paidion.
5.41: kai kratēsas tēs cheiros tou paidiou legei autē Talitha koum, ho estin methermēneuomenon To korasion, soi legō, egeire.
5.42: kai euthys anestē to korasion kai periepatei; ēn gar etōn dōdeka. kai exestēsan euthys ekstasei megalē.
5.43: kai diesteilato autois polla hina mēdeis gnoi touto, kai eipen dothēnai autē phagein.

6.1: Kai exēlthen ekeithen, kai erchetai eis tēn patrida autou, kai akolouthousin autō hoi mathētai autou.
6.2: kai genomenou sabbatou ērxato didaskein en tē synagōgē; kai hoi polloi akouontes exeplēssonto legontes Pothen toutō tauta, kai tis hē sophia hē dotheisa toutō? kai hai dynameis toiautai dia tōn cheirōn autou ginomenai?
6.3: ouch houtos estin ho tektōn, ho huios tēs Marias kai adelphos Iakōbou kai Iōsētos kai Iouda kai Simōnos? kai ouk eisin hai adelphai autou hōde pros hēmas? kai eskandalizonto en autō.
6.4: kai elegen autois ho Iēsous hoti Ouk estin prophētēs atimos ei mē en tē patridi autou kai en tois syngeneusin autou kai en tē oikia autou.
6.5: kai ouk edynato ekei poiēsai oudemian dynamin, ei mē oligois arrōstois epitheis tas cheiras etherapeusen.
6.6: kai ethaumasen dia tēn apistian autōn. Kai periēgen tas kōmas kyklō didaskōn.
6.7: Kai proskaleitai tous dōdeka, kai ērxato autous apostellein dyo dyo, kai edidou autois exousian tōn pneumatōn tōn akathartōn,
6.8: kai parēngeilen autois hina mēden airōsin eis hodon ei mē rhabdon monon, mē arton, mē pēran, mē eis tēn zōnēn chalkon,
6.9: alla hypodedemenous sandalia, kai mē endysēsthe dyo chitōnas.
6.10: kai elegen autois Hopou ean eiselthēte eis oikian, ekei menete heōs an exelthēte ekeithen.
6.11: kai hos an topos mē dexētai hymas mēde akousōsin hymōn, ekporeuomenoi ekeithen ektinaxate ton choun ton hypokatō tōn podōn hymōn eis martyrion autois.
6.13: kai daimonia polla exeballon, kai ēleiphon elaiō pollous arrōstous kai etherapeuon.
6.14: Kai ēkousen ho basileus Hērōdēs, phaneron gar egeneto to onoma autou, kai elegon hoti Iōanēs ho Baptizōn egēgertai ek nekrōn, kai dia touto energousin hai dynameis en autō.
6.15: alloi de elegon hoti Hēleias estin; alloi de elegon hoti prophētēs hōs heis tōn prophētōn.
6.16: akousas de ho Hērōdēs elegen Hon egō apekephalisa Iōanēn, houtos ēgerthē.
6.17: Autos gar ho Hērōdēs aposteilas ekratēsen ton Iōanēn kai edēsen auton en phylakē dia Hērōdiada tēn gynaika Philippou tou adelphou autou, hoti autēn egamēsen;
6.18: elegen gar ho Iōanēs tō Hērōdē hoti Ouk exestin soi echein tēn gynaika tou adelphou sou.
6.19: hē de Hērōdias eneichen autō kai ēthelen auton apokteinai, kai ouk ēdynato;
6.20: ho gar Hērōdēs ephobeito ton Iōanēn, eidōs auton andra dikaion kai hagion, kai synetērei auton, kai akousas autou polla ēporei, kai hēdeōs autou ēkouen.
6.21: Kai genomenēs hēmeras eukairou hote Hērōdēs tois genesiois autou deipnon epoiēsen tois megistasin autou kai tois chiliarchois kai tois prōtois tēs Galilaias,
6.22: kai eiselthousēs tēs thygatros autēs tēs Hērōdiados kai orchēsamenēs, ēresen tō Hērōdē kai tois synanakeimenois. ho de basileus eipen tō korasiō Aitēson me ho ean thelēs, kai dōsō soi;
6.23: kai ōmosen autē Hoti ean me aitēsēs dōsō soi heōs hēmisous tēs basileias mou.
6.24: kai exelthousa eipen tē mētri autēs Ti aitēsōmai? hē de eipen Tēn kephalēn Iōanou tou Baptizontos.
6.25: kai eiselthousa euthys meta spoudēs pros ton basilea ētēsato legousa Thelō hina exautēs dōs moi epi pinaki tēn kephalēn Iōanou tou Baptistou.
6.26: kai perilypos genomenos ho basileus dia tous horkous kai tous anakeimenous ouk ēthelēsen athetēsai autēn.
6.27: kai euthys aposteilas ho basileus spekoulatora epetaxen enenkai tēn kephalēn autou.
6.28: kai apelthōn apekephalisen auton en tē phylakē, kai ēnenken tēn kephalēn autou epi pinaki kai edōken autēn tō korasiō, kai to korasion edōken autēn tē mētri autēs.
6.29: kai akousantes hoi mathētai autou ēlthan kai ēran to ptōma autou kai ethēkan auto en mnēmeiō.
6.30: Kai synagontai hoi apostoloi pros ton Iēsoun, kai apēngeilan autō panta hosa epoiēsan kai hosa edidaxan.
6.31: kai legei autois Deute hymeis autoi kat’ idian eis erēmon topon kai anapausasthe oligon. ēsan gar hoi erchomenoi kai hoi hypagontes polloi, kai oude phagein eukairoun.
6.32: kai apēlthon en tō ploiō eis erēmon topon kat’ idian.
6.33: kai eidon autous hypagontas kai epegnōsan polloi, kai pezē apo pasōn tōn poleōn synedramon ekei kai proēlthon autous.
6.34: Kai exelthōn eiden polyn ochlon, kai esplanchnisthē ep’ autous hoti ēsan hōs probata mē echonta poimena, kai ērxato didaskein autous polla.
6.35: Kai ēdē hōras pollēs genomenēs proselthontes autō hoi mathētai autou elegon hoti Erēmos estin ho topos, kai ēdē hōra pollē;
6.36: apolyson autous, hina apelthontes eis tous kyklō agrous kai kōmas agorasōsin heautois ti phagōsin.
6.37: ho de apokritheis eipen autois Dote autois hymeis phagein. kai legousin autō Apelthontes agorasōmen dēnariōn diakosiōn artous, kai dōsomen autois phagein?
6.38: ho de legei autois Posous echete artous? hypagete idete. kai gnontes legousin Pente, kai dyo ichthyas.
6.39: kai epetaxen autois anaklithēnai pantas symposia symposia epi tō chlōrō chortō.
6.40: kai anepesan prasiai prasiai kata hekaton kai kata pentēkonta.
6.41: kai labōn tous pente artous kai tous dyo ichthyas anablepsas eis ton ouranon eulogēsen kai kateklasen tous artous kai edidou tois mathētais hina paratithōsin autois, kai tous dyo ichthyas emerisen pasin.
6.43: kai ēran klasmata dōdeka kophinōn plērōmata kai apo tōn ichthyōn.
6.44: kai ēsan hoi phagontes tous artous pentakischilioi andres.
6.45: Kai euthys ēnankasen tous mathētas autou embēnai eis to ploion kai proagein eis to peran pros Bēthsaidan, heōs autos apolyei ton ochlon.
6.46: kai apotaxamenos autois apēlthen eis to oros proseuxasthai.
6.47: kai opsias genomenēs ēn to ploion en mesō tēs thalassēs, kai autos monos epi tēs gēs.
6.48: kai idōn autous basanizomenous en tō elaunein, ēn gar ho anemos enantios autois, peri tetartēn phylakēn tēs nyktos erchetai pros autous peripatōn epi tēs thalassēs; kai ēthelen parelthein autous.
6.49: hoi de idontes auton epi tēs thalassēs peripatounta edoxan hoti phantasma estin, kai anekraxan;
6.50: pantes gar auton eidan kai etarachthēsan. ho de euthys elalēsen met’ autōn, kai legei autois Tharseite, egō eimi, mē phobeisthe.
6.51: kai anebē pros autous eis to ploion, kai ekopasen ho anemos; kai lian ek perissou en heautois existanto;
6.52: ou gar synēkan epi tois artois, all’ ēn autōn hē kardia pepōrōmenē.
6.53: Kai diaperasantes epi tēn gēn ēlthon eis Gennēsaret kai prosōrmisthēsan.
6.54: kai exelthontōn autōn ek tou ploiou euthys epignontes auton
6.55: periedramon holēn tēn chōran ekeinēn kai ērxanto epi tois krabattois tous kakōs echontas peripherein, hopou ēkouon hoti estin.
6.56: kai hopou an eiseporeueto eis kōmas ē eis poleis ē eis agrous, en tais agorais etithesan tous asthenountas, kai parekaloun auton hina kan tou kraspedou tou himatiou autou hapsōntai; kai hosoi an hēpsanto autou esōzonto.

7.1: Kai synagontai pros auton hoi Pharisaioi kai tines tōn grammateōn elthontes apo Hierosolymōn.
7.2: kai idontes tinas tōn mathētōn autou hoti koinais chersin, tout’ estin aniptois, esthiousin tous artous, —
7.3: hoi gar Pharisaioi kai pantes hoi Ioudaioi ean mē pygmē nipsōntai tas cheiras ouk esthiousin, kratountes tēn paradosin tōn presbyterōn,
7.4: kai ap’ agoras ean mē rhantisōntai ouk esthiousin, kai alla polla estin ha parelabon kratein, baptismous potēriōn kai xestōn kai chalkiōn,—
7.5: kai eperōtōsin auton hoi Pharisaioi kai hoi grammateis Dia ti ou peripatousin hoi mathētai sou kata tēn paradosin tōn presbyterōn, alla koinais chersin esthiousin ton arton?
7.6: ho de eipen autois Kalōs eprophēteusen Hēsaias peri hymōn tōn hypokritōn, hōs gegraptai hoti Houtos ho laos tois cheilesin me tima, hē de kardia autōn porrō apechei ap’ emou;
7.7: matēn de sebontai me, didaskontes didaskalias entalmata anthrōpōn;
7.8: aphentes tēn entolēn tou Theou krateite tēn paradosin tōn anthrōpōn.
7.9: kai elegen autois Kalōs atheteite tēn entolēn tou Theou, hina tēn paradosin hymōn tērēsēte.
7.10: Mōusēs gar eipen Tima ton patera sou kai tēn mētera sou, kai HO kakologōn patera ē mētera thanatō teleutatō.
7.11: hymeis de legete Ean eipē anthrōpos tō patri ē tē mētri Korban, ho estin Dōron, ho ean ex emou ōphelēthēs,
7.12: ouketi aphiete auton ouden poiēsai tō patri ē tē mētri,
7.13: akyrountes ton logon tou Theou tē paradosei hymōn hē paredōkate; kai paromoia toiauta polla poieite.
7.14: Kai proskalesamenos palin ton ochlon elegen autois Akousate mou pantes kai synete.
7.15: ouden estin exōthen tou anthrōpou eisporeuomenon eis auton ho dynatai koinōsai auton; alla ta ek tou anthrōpou ekporeuomena estin ta koinounta ton anthrōpon.
7.17: Kai hote eisēlthen eis oikon apo tou ochlou, epērōtōn auton hoi mathētai autou tēn parabolēn.
7.18: kai legei autois Houtōs kai hymeis asynetoi este? ou noeite hoti pan to exōthen eisporeuomenon eis ton anthrōpon ou dynatai auton koinōsai,
7.19: hoti ouk eisporeuetai autou eis tēn kardian all’ eis tēn koilian, kai eis ton aphedrōna ekporeuetai, katharizōn panta ta brōmata?
7.20: elegen de hoti To ek tou anthrōpou ekporeuomenon, ekeino koinoi ton anthrōpon.
7.21: esōthen gar ek tēs kardias tōn anthrōpōn hoi dialogismoi hoi kakoi ekporeuontai, porneiai, klopai, phonoi,
7.22: moicheiai, pleonexiai, ponēriai, dolos, aselgeia, ophthalmos ponēros, blasphēmia, hyperēphania, aphrosynē;
7.23: panta tauta ta ponēra esōthen ekporeuetai kai koinoi ton anthrōpon.
7.24: Ekeithen de anastas apēlthen eis ta horia Tyrou. Kai eiselthōn eis oikian oudena ēthelen gnōnai, kai ouk ēdynasthē lathein;
7.25: all’ euthys akousasa gynē peri autou, hēs eichen to thygatrion autēs pneuma akatharton, elthousa prosepesen pros tous podas autou;
7.26: hē de gynē ēn Hellēnis, Syrophoinikissa tō genei; kai ērōta auton hina to daimonion ekbalē ek tēs thygatros autēs.
7.27: kai elegen autē Aphes prōton chortasthēnai ta tekna; ou gar estin kalon labein ton arton tōn teknōn kai tois kynariois balein.
7.28: hē de apekrithē kai legei autō Nai, Kyrie; kai ta kynaria hypokatō tēs trapezēs esthiousin apo tōn psichiōn tōn paidiōn.
7.29: kai eipen autē Dia touton ton logon hypage, exelēlythen ek tēs thygatros sou to daimonion.
7.30: kai apelthousa eis ton oikon autēs heuren to paidion beblēmenon epi tēn klinēn kai to daimonion exelēlythos.
7.31: Kai palin exelthōn ek tōn horiōn Tyrou ēlthen dia Sidōnos eis tēn thalassan tēs Galilaias ana meson tōn horiōn Dekapoleōs.
7.32: Kai pherousin autō kōphon kai mogilalon, kai parakalousin auton hina epithē autō tēn cheira.
7.33: kai apolabomenos auton apo tou ochlou kat’ idian ebalen tous daktylous autou eis ta ōta autou kai ptysas hēpsato tēs glōssēs autou,
7.34: kai anablepsas eis ton ouranon estenaxen, kai legei autō Ephphatha, ho estin Dianoichthēti.
7.35: kai ēnoigēsan autou hai akoai, kai euthys elythē ho desmos tēs glōssēs autou, kai elalei orthōs.
7.36: kai diesteilato autois hina mēdeni legōsin; hoson de autois diestelleto, autoi mallon perissoteron ekērysson.
7.37: kai hyperperissōs exeplēssonto legontes Kalōs panta pepoiēken, kai tous kōphous poiei akouein kai alalous lalein.

8.1: En ekeinais tais hēmerais palin pollou ochlou ontos kai mē echontōn ti phagōsin, proskalesamenos tous mathētas legei autois
8.2: Splanchnizomai epi ton ochlon, hoti ēdē hēmerai treis prosmenousin moi kai ouk echousin ti phagōsin;
8.3: kai ean apolysō autous nēsteis eis oikon autōn, eklythēsontai en tē hodō; kai tines autōn apo makrothen eisin.
8.4: kai apekrithēsan autō hoi mathētai autou hoti Pothen toutous dynēsetai tis hōde chortasai artōn ep’ erēmias?
8.5: kai ērōta autous Posous echete artous? hoi de eipan Hepta.
8.6: kai parangellei tō ochlō anapesein epi tēs gēs; kai labōn tous hepta artous eucharistēsas eklasen kai edidou tois mathētais autou hina paratithōsin, kai parethēkan tō ochlō.
8.7: kai eichan ichthydia oliga; kai eulogēsas auta eipen kai tauta paratithenai.
8.8: kai ephagon kai echortasthēsan, kai ēran perisseumata klasmatōn hepta spyridas.
8.9: ēsan de hōs tetrakischilioi. kai apelysen autous.
8.10: Kai euthys embas eis to ploion meta tōn mathētōn autou ēlthen eis ta merē Dalmanoutha.
8.11: Kai exēlthon hoi Pharisaioi kai ērxanto synzētein autō, zētountes par’ autou sēmeion apo tou ouranou, peirazontes auton.
8.12: kai anastenaxas tō pneumati autou legei Ti hē genea hautē zētei sēmeion? amēn legō hymin, ei dothēsetai tē genea tautē sēmeion.
8.13: kai apheis autous palin embas apēlthen eis to peran.
8.14: Kai epelathonto labein artous, kai ei mē hena arton ouk eichon meth’ heautōn en tō ploiō.
8.15: kai diestelleto autois legōn Horate, blepete apo tēs zymēs tōn Pharisaiōn kai tēs zymēs Hērōdou.
8.16: kai dielogizonto pros allēlous hoti artous ouk echousin.
8.17: kai gnous legei autois Ti dialogizesthe hoti artous ouk echete? oupō noeite oude syniete? pepōrōmenēn echete tēn kardian hymōn?
8.18: ophthalmous echontes ou blepete, kai ōta echontes ouk akouete? kai ou mnēmoneuete,
8.19: hote tous pente artous eklasa eis tous pentakischilious, posous kophinous klasmatōn plēreis ērate? legousin autō Dōdeka.
8.20: hote tous hepta eis tous tetrakischilious, posōn spyridōn plērōmata klasmatōn ērate? kai legousin Hepta.
8.22: Kai erchontai eis Bēthsaidan. Kai pherousin autō typhlon, kai parakalousin auton hina autou hapsētai.
8.23: kai epilabomenos tēs cheiros tou typhlou exēnenken auton exō tēs kōmēs, kai ptysas eis ta ommata autou, epitheis tas cheiras autō, epērōta auton Ei ti blepeis?
8.24: kai anablepsas elegen Blepō tous anthrōpous, hoti hōs dendra horō peripatountas.
8.25: eita palin epethēken tas cheiras epi tous ophthalmous autou, kai dieblepsen kai apekatestē, kai eneblepen tēlaugōs hapanta.
8.26: kai apesteilen auton eis oikon autou legōn Mēde eis tēn kōmēn eiselthēs.
8.27: Kai exēlthen ho Iēsous kai hoi mathētai autou eis tas kōmas Kaisarias tēs Philippou; kai en tē hodō epērōta tous mathētas autou legōn autois Tina me legousin hoi anthrōpoi einai?
8.28: hoi de eipan autō legontes hoti Iōanēn ton Baptistēn, kai alloi Hēleian, alloi de hoti heis tōn prophētōn.
8.29: kai autos epērōta autous Hymeis de tina me legete einai? apokritheis ho Petros legei autō Sy ei ho Christos.
8.30: kai epetimēsen autois hina mēdeni legōsin peri autou.
8.31: Kai ērxato didaskein autous hoti dei ton Huion tou anthrōpou polla pathein, kai apodokimasthēnai hypo tōn presbyterōn kai tōn archiereōn kai tōn grammateōn kai apoktanthēnai kai meta treis hēmeras anastēnai;
8.32: kai parrēsia ton logon elalei. kai proslabomenos ho Petros auton ērxato epitiman autō.
8.33: ho de epistrapheis kai idōn tous mathētas autou epetimēsen Petrō kai legei Hypage opisō mou, Satana, hoti ou phroneis ta tou Theou alla ta tōn anthrōpōn.
8.34: Kai proskalesamenos ton ochlon syn tois mathētais autou eipen autois Ei tis thelei opisō mou elthein, aparnēsasthō heauton kai aratō ton stauron autou, kai akoloutheitō moi.
8.35: hos gar ean thelē tēn psychēn autou sōsai, apolesei autēn; hos d’ an apolesei tēn psychēn autou heneken emou kai tou euangeliou, sōsei autēn.
8.36: ti gar ōphelei anthrōpon kerdēsai ton kosmon holon kai zēmiōthēnai tēn psychēn autou?
8.37: ti gar doi anthrōpos antallagma tēs psychēs autou?
8.38: hos gar ean epaischynthē me kai tous emous logous en tē genea tautē tē moichalidi kai hamartōlō, kai ho Huios tou anthrōpou epaischynthēsetai auton, hotan elthē en tē doxē tou Patros autou meta tōn angelōn tōn hagiōn.

9.1: kai elegen autois Amēn legō hymin hoti eisin tines hōde tōn hestēkotōn hoitines ou mē geusōntai thanatou heōs an idōsin tēn basileian tou Theou elēlythuian en dynamei.
9.2: Kai meta hēmeras hex paralambanei ho Iēsous ton Petron kai ton Iakōbon kai Iōanēn, kai anapherei autous eis oros hypsēlon kat’ idian monous. kai metemorphōthē emprosthen autōn,
9.3: kai ta himatia autou egeneto stilbonta leuka lian, hoia gnapheus epi tēs gēs ou dynatai houtōs leukanai.
9.4: kai ōphthē autois Hēleias syn Mōusei, kai ēsan synlalountes tō Iēsou.
9.5: kai apokritheis ho Petros legei tō Iēsou Rhabbei, kalon estin hēmas hōde einai, kai poiēsōmen treis skēnas, soi mian kai Mōusei mian kai Hēleia mian.
9.6: ou gar ēdei ti apokrithē; ekphoboi gar egenonto.
9.7: kai egeneto nephelē episkiazousa autois, kai egeneto phōnē ek tēs nephelēs Houtos estin ho Huios mou ho agapētos, akouete autou.
9.8: kai exapina periblepsamenoi ouketi oudena eidon alla ton Iēsoun monon meth’ heautōn.
