9.9: Kai katabainontōn autōn ek tou orous diesteilato autois hina mēdeni ha eidon diēgēsōntai, ei mē hotan ho Huios tou anthrōpou ek nekrōn anastē.
9.10: kai ton logon ekratēsan pros heautous synzētountes ti estin to ek nekrōn anastēnai.
9.11: kai epērōtōn auton legontes Hoti legousin hoi grammateis hoti Hēleian dei elthein prōton?
9.12: ho de ephē autois Hēleias men elthōn prōton apokathistanei panta; kai pōs gegraptai epi ton Huion tou anthrōpou, hina polla pathē kai exoudenēthē?
9.13: alla legō hymin hoti kai Hēleias elēlythen, kai epoiēsan autō hosa ēthelon, kathōs gegraptai ep’ auton.
9.14: Kai elthontes pros tous mathētas eidon ochlon polyn peri autous kai grammateis synzētountas pros autous.
9.15: kai euthys pas ho ochlos idontes auton exethambēthēsan, kai prostrechontes ēspazonto auton.
9.16: kai epērōtēsen autous Ti synzēteite pros hautous?
9.17: kai apekrithē autō heis ek tou ochlou Didaskale, ēnenka ton huion mou pros se, echonta pneuma alalon;
9.18: kai hopou ean auton katalabē, rhēssei auton, kai aphrizei kai trizei tous odontas kai xērainetai; kai eipa tois mathētais sou hina auto ekbalōsin, kai ouk ischysan.
9.19: ho de apokritheis autois legei Ō genea apistos, heōs pote pros hymas esomai? heōs pote anexomai hymōn? pherete auton pros me.
9.20: kai ēnenkan auton pros auton. kai idōn auton to pneuma euthys synesparaxen auton, kai pesōn epi tēs gēs ekylieto aphrizōn.
9.21: kai epērōtēsen ton patera autou Posos chronos estin hōs touto gegonen autō? ho de eipen Ek paidiothen;
9.22: kai pollakis kai eis pyr auton ebalen kai eis hydata hina apolesē auton; all’ ei ti dynē, boēthēson hēmin splanchnistheis eph’ hēmas.
9.23: ho de Iēsous eipen autō To Ei dynē, panta dynata tō pisteuonti.
9.24: euthys kraxas ho patēr tou paidiou elegen Pisteuō; boēthei mou tē apistia.
9.25: idōn de ho Iēsous hoti episyntrechei ochlos, epetimēsen tō pneumati tō akathartō legōn autō To alalon kai kōphon pneuma, egō epitassō soi, exelthe ex autou kai mēketi eiselthēs eis auton.
9.26: kai kraxas kai polla sparaxas exēlthen; kai egeneto hōsei nekros, hōste tous pollous legein hoti apethanen.
9.27: ho de Iēsous kratēsas tēs cheiros autou ēgeiren auton, kai anestē.
9.28: kai eiselthontos autou eis oikon hoi mathētai autou kat’ idian epērōtōn auton Hoti hēmeis ouk ēdynēthēmen ekbalein auto?
9.29: kai eipen autois Touto to genos en oudeni dynatai exelthein ei mē en proseuchē.
9.30: Kakeithen exelthontes pareporeuonto dia tēs Galilaias, kai ouk ēthelen hina tis gnoi;
9.31: edidasken gar tous mathētas autou, kai elegen autois hoti HO Huios tou anthrōpou paradidotai eis cheiras anthrōpōn, kai apoktenousin auton, kai apoktantheis meta treis hēmeras anastēsetai.
9.32: hoi de ēgnooun to rhēma, kai ephobounto auton eperōtēsai.
9.33: Kai ēlthon eis Kapharnaoum. Kai en tē oikia genomenos epērōta autous Ti en tē hodō dielogizesthe?
9.34: hoi de esiōpōn; pros allēlous gar dielechthēsan en tē hodō tis meizōn.
9.35: kai kathisas ephōnēsen tous dōdeka kai legei autois Ei tis thelei prōtos einai, estai pantōn eschatos kai pantōn diakonos.
9.36: kai labōn paidion estēsen auto en mesō autōn, kai enankalisamenos auto eipen autois
9.37: Hos an hen tōn toioutōn paidiōn dexētai epi tō onomati mou, eme dechetai; kai hos an eme dechētai, ouk eme dechetai alla ton aposteilanta me.
9.38: Ephē autō ho Iōanēs Didaskale, eidomen tina en tō onomati sou ekballonta daimonia, hos ouk akolouthei hēmin, kai ekōlyomen auton, hoti ouk ēkolouthei hēmin.
9.39: ho de Iēsous eipen Mē kōlyete auton; oudeis gar estin hos poiēsei dynamin epi tō onomati mou kai dynēsetai tachy kakologēsai me;
9.40: hos gar ouk estin kath’ hēmōn, hyper hēmōn estin.
9.41: Hos gar an potisē hymas potērion hydatos en onomati, hoti Christou este, amēn legō hymin hoti ou mē apolesē ton misthon autou.
9.42: Kai hos an skandalisē hena tōn mikrōn toutōn tōn pisteuontōn, kalon estin autō mallon ei perikeitai mylos onikos peri ton trachēlon autou kai beblētai eis tēn thalassan.
9.43: Kai ean skandalisē se hē cheir sou, apokopson autēn; kalon estin se kyllon eiselthein eis tēn zōēn, ē tas dyo cheiras echonta apelthein eis tēn geennan, eis to pyr to asbeston.
9.45: kai ean ho pous sou skandalizē se, apokopson auton; kalon estin se eiselthein eis tēn zōēn chōlon, ē tous dyo podas echonta blēthēnai eis tēn geennan.
9.47: kai ean ho ophthalmos sou skandalizē se, ekbale auton; kalon se estin monophthalmon eiselthein eis tēn basileian tou Theou, ē dyo ophthalmous echonta blēthēnai eis tēn geennan,
9.48: hopou ho skōlēx autōn ou teleuta kai to pyr ou sbennytai.
9.50: kalon to halas; ean de to halas analon genētai, en tini auto artysete? echete en heautois hala kai eirēneuete en allēlois.

10.1: Kai ekeithen anastas erchetai eis ta horia tēs Ioudaias kai peran tou Iordanou, kai synporeuontai palin ochloi pros auton, kai hōs eiōthei palin edidasken autous.
10.2: Kai proselthontes Pharisaioi epērōtōn auton ei exestin andri gynaika apolysai, peirazontes auton.
10.3: ho de apokritheis eipen autois Ti hymin eneteilato Mōusēs?
10.4: hoi de eipan; Epetrepsen Mōusēs biblion apostasiou grapsai kai apolysai.
10.5: ho de Iēsous eipen autois Pros tēn sklērokardian hymōn egrapsen hymin tēn entolēn tautēn.
10.6: apo de archēs ktiseōs arsen kai thēly epoiēsen autous;
10.7: heneken toutou kataleipsei anthrōpos ton patera autou kai tēn mētera,
10.8: kai esontai hoi dyo eis sarka mian; hōste ouketi eisin dyo alla mia sarx.
10.9: ho oun ho Theos synezeuxen, anthrōpos mē chōrizetō.
10.10: kai eis tēn oikian palin hoi mathētai peri toutou epērōtōn auton.
10.11: kai legei autois Hos an apolysē tēn gynaika autou kai gamēsē allēn, moichatai ep’ autēn;
10.12: kai ean autē apolysasa ton andra autēs gamēsē allon, moichatai.
10.13: Kai prosepheron autō paidia hina autōn hapsētai; hoi de mathētai epetimēsan autois.
10.14: idōn de ho Iēsous ēganaktēsen kai eipen autois Aphete ta paidia erchesthai pros me, mē kōlyete auta; tōn gar toioutōn estin hē basileia tou Theou.
10.15: amēn legō hymin, hos an mē dexētai tēn basileian tou Theou hōs paidion, ou mē eiselthē eis autēn.
10.16: kai enankalisamenos auta kateulogei titheis tas cheiras ep’ auta.
10.17: Kai ekporeuomenou autou eis hodon prosdramōn heis kai gonypetēsas auton epērōta auton Didaskale agathe, ti poiēsō hina zōēn aiōnion klēronomēsō?
10.18: ho de Iēsous eipen autō Ti me legeis agathon? oudeis agathos ei mē heis ho Theos.
10.19: tas entolas oidas Mē phoneusēs, Mē moicheusēs, Mē klepsēs, Mē pseudomartyrēsēs, Mē aposterēsēs, Tima ton patera sou kai tēn mētera.
10.20: ho de ephē autō Didaskale, tauta panta ephylaxamēn ek neotētos mou.
10.21: ho de Iēsous emblepsas autō ēgapēsen auton kai eipen autō Hen se hysterei; hypage, hosa echeis pōlēson kai dos tois ptōchois, kai hexeis thēsauron en ouranō, kai deuro akolouthei moi.
10.22: ho de stygnasas epi tō logō apēlthen lypoumenos, ēn gar echōn ktēmata polla.
10.23: Kai periblepsamenos ho Iēsous legei tois mathētais autou Pōs dyskolōs hoi ta chrēmata echontes eis tēn basileian tou Theou eiseleusontai.
10.24: hoi de mathētai ethambounto epi tois logois autou. ho de Iēsous palin apokritheis legei autois Tekna, pōs dyskolon estin eis tēn basileian tou Theou eiselthein;
10.25: eukopōteron estin kamēlon dia tēs trymalias tēs rhaphidos dielthein ē plousion eis tēn basileian tou Theou eiselthein.
10.26: hoi de perissōs exeplēssonto legontes pros heautous Kai tis dynatai sōthēnai?
10.27: emblepsas autois ho Iēsous legei Para anthrōpois adynaton, all’ ou para theō; panta gar dynata para tō theō.
10.28: Ērxato legein ho Petros autō Idou hēmeis aphēkamen panta kai ēkolouthēkamen soi.
10.29: ephē ho Iēsous Amēn legō hymin, oudeis estin hos aphēken oikian ē adelphous ē adelphas ē mētera ē patera ē tekna ē agrous heneken emou kai heneken tou euangeliou,
10.30: ean mē labē hekatontaplasiona nyn en tō kairō toutō oikias kai adelphous kai adelphas kai mēteras kai tekna kai agrous meta diōgmōn, kai en tō aiōni tō erchomenō zōēn aiōnion.
10.31: polloi de esontai prōtoi eschatoi kai hoi eschatoi prōtoi.
10.32: Ēsan de en tē hodō anabainontes eis Hierosolyma, kai ēn proagōn autous ho Iēsous, kai ethambounto, hoi de akolouthountes ephobounto. kai paralabōn palin tous dōdeka ērxato autois legein ta mellonta autō symbainein,
10.33: hoti Idou anabainomen eis Hierosolyma, kai ho Huios tou anthrōpou paradothēsetai tois archiereusin kai tois grammateusin, kai katakrinousin auton thanatō kai paradōsousin auton tois ethnesin
10.34: kai empaixousin autō kai emptysousin autō kai mastigōsousin auton kai apoktenousin, kai meta treis hēmeras anastēsetai.
10.35: Kai prosporeuontai autō Iakōbos kai Iōanēs hoi huioi Zebedaiou legontes autō Didaskale, thelomen hina ho ean aitēsōmen se poiēsēs hēmin.
10.36: ho de eipen autois Ti thelete me poiēsō hymin?
10.37: hoi de eipan autō Dos hēmin hina heis sou ek dexiōn kai heis ex aristerōn kathisōmen en tē doxē sou.
10.38: ho de Iēsous eipen autois Ouk oidate ti aiteisthe. dynasthe piein to potērion ho egō pinō, ē to baptisma ho egō baptizomai baptisthēnai?
10.39: hoi de eipan autō Dynametha. ho de Iēsous eipen autois To potērion ho egō pinō piesthe, kai to baptisma ho egō baptizomai baptisthēsesthe;
10.40: to de kathisai ek dexiōn mou ē ex euōnymōn ouk estin emon dounai, all’ hois hētoimastai.
10.41: Kai akousantes hoi deka ērxanto aganaktein peri Iakōbou kai Iōanou.
10.42: kai proskalesamenos autous ho Iēsous legei autois Oidate hoti hoi dokountes archein tōn ethnōn katakyrieuousin autōn kai hoi megaloi autōn katexousiazousin autōn.
10.43: ouch houtōs de estin en hymin; all’ hos an thelē megas genesthai en hymin, estai hymōn diakonos,
10.44: kai hos an thelē en hymin einai prōtos, estai pantōn doulos;
10.45: kai gar ho Huios tou anthrōpou ouk ēlthen diakonēthēnai alla diakonēsai kai dounai tēn psychēn autou lytron anti pollōn.
10.46: Kai erchontai eis Iereichō. Kai ekporeuomenou autou apo Iereichō kai tōn mathētōn autou kai ochlou hikanou ho huios Timaiou Bartimaios, typhlos prosaitēs, ekathēto para tēn hodon.
10.47: kai akousas hoti Iēsous ho Nazarēnos estin ērxato krazein kai legein Huie Daueid Iēsou, eleēson me.
10.48: kai epetimōn autō polloi hina siōpēsē; ho de pollō mallon ekrazen Huie Daueid, eleēson me.
10.49: kai stas ho Iēsous eipen Phōnēsate auton. kai phōnousin ton typhlon legontes autō Tharsei, egeire, phōnei se.
10.50: ho de apobalōn to himation autou anapēdēsas ēlthen pros ton Iēsoun.
10.51: kai apokritheis autō ho Iēsous eipen Ti soi theleis poiēsō? ho de typhlos eipen autō Rhabbounei, hina anablepsō.
10.52: kai ho Iēsous eipen autō Hypage, hē pistis sou sesōken se. kai euthys aneblepsen, kai ēkolouthei autō en tē hodō.

11.1: Kai hote engizousin eis Hierosolyma eis Bēthphagē kai Bēthanian pros to oros tōn Elaiōn, apostellei dyo tōn mathētōn autou
11.2: kai legei autois Hypagete eis tēn kōmēn tēn katenanti hymōn, kai euthys eisporeuomenoi eis autēn heurēsete pōlon dedemenon eph’ hon oudeis oupō anthrōpōn ekathisen; lysate auton kai pherete.
11.3: kai ean tis hymin eipē Ti poieite touto? eipate HO Kyrios autou chreian echei, kai euthys auton apostellei palin hōde.
11.4: kai apēlthon kai heuron pōlon dedemenon pros thyran exō epi tou amphodou, kai lyousin auton.
11.5: kai tines tōn ekei hestēkotōn elegon autois Ti poieite lyontes ton pōlon?
11.6: hoi de eipan autois kathōs eipen ho Iēsous; kai aphēkan autous.
11.7: kai pherousin ton pōlon pros ton Iēsoun, kai epiballousin autō ta himatia autōn, kai ekathisen ep’ auton.
11.8: kai polloi ta himatia autōn estrōsan eis tēn hodon, alloi de stibadas, kopsantes ek tōn agrōn.
11.9: kai hoi proagontes kai hoi akolouthountes ekrazon Hōsanna; Eulogēmenos ho erchomenos en onomati Kyriou;
11.10: Eulogēmenē hē erchomenē basileia tou patros hēmōn Daueid; Hōsanna en tois hypsistois.
11.11: Kai eisēlthen eis Hierosolyma eis to hieron; kai periblepsamenos panta, opse ēdē ousēs tēs hōras, exēlthen eis Bēthanian meta tōn dōdeka.
11.12: Kai tē epaurion exelthontōn autōn apo Bēthanias epeinasen.
11.13: kai idōn sykēn apo makrothen echousan phylla ēlthen ei ara ti heurēsei en autē, kai elthōn ep’ autēn ouden heuren ei mē phylla; ho gar kairos ouk ēn sykōn.
11.14: kai apokritheis eipen autē Mēketi eis ton aiōna ek sou mēdeis karpon phagoi. kai ēkouon hoi mathētai autou.
11.15: Kai erchontai eis Hierosolyma. Kai eiselthōn eis to hieron ērxato ekballein tous pōlountas kai tous agorazontas en tō hierō, kai tas trapezas tōn kollybistōn kai tas kathedras tōn pōlountōn tas peristeras katestrepsen,
11.16: kai ouk ēphien hina tis dienenkē skeuos dia tou hierou,
11.17: kai edidasken kai elegen autois Ou gegraptai hoti HO oikos mou oikos proseuchēs klēthēsetai pasin tois ethnesin? hymeis de pepoiēkate auton spēlaion lēstōn.
11.18: kai ēkousan hoi archiereis kai hoi grammateis, kai ezētoun pōs auton apolesōsin; ephobounto gar auton, pas gar ho ochlos exeplēsseto epi tē didachē autou.
11.19: Kai hotan opse egeneto, exeporeuonto exō tēs poleōs.
11.20: Kai paraporeuomenoi prōi eidon tēn sykēn exērammenēn ek rhizōn.
11.21: kai anamnēstheis ho Petros legei autō Rhabbei, ide hē sykē hēn katērasō exērantai.
11.22: kai apokritheis ho Iēsous legei autois Echete pistin theou.
11.23: amēn legō hymin hoti hos an eipē tō orei toutō Arthēti kai blēthēti eis tēn thalassan, kai mē diakrithē en tē kardia autou alla pisteuē hoti ho lalei ginetai, estai autō.
11.24: dia touto legō hymin, panta hosa proseuchesthe kai aiteisthe, pisteuete hoti elabete, kai estai hymin.
11.25: kai hotan stēkete proseuchomenoi, aphiete ei ti echete kata tinos, hina kai ho Patēr hymōn ho en tois ouranois aphē hymin ta paraptōmata hymōn.
11.27: Kai erchontai palin eis Hierosolyma. kai en tō hierō peripatountos autou erchontai pros auton hoi archiereis kai hoi grammateis kai hoi presbyteroi,
11.28: kai elegon autō En poia exousia tauta poieis? ē tis soi edōken tēn exousian tautēn hina tauta poiēs?
11.29: ho de Iēsous eipen autois Eperōtēsō hymas hena logon, kai apokrithēte moi, kai erō hymin en poia exousia tauta poiō.
11.30: to baptisma to Iōanou ex ouranou ēn ē ex anthrōpōn? apokrithēte moi.
11.31: kai dielogizonto pros heautous legontes Ean eipōmen Ex ouranou, erei Dia ti oun ouk episteusate autō?
11.32: alla eipōmen Ex anthrōpōn?— ephobounto ton ochlon; hapantes gar eichon ton Iōanēn ontōs hoti prophētēs ēn.
11.33: kai apokrithentes tō Iēsou legousin Ouk oidamen. kai ho Iēsous legei autois Oude egō legō hymin en poia exousia tauta poiō.

12.1: Kai ērxato autois en parabolais lalein. ampelōna anthrōpos ephyteusen, kai periethēken phragmon kai ōryxen hypolēnion kai ōkodomēsen pyrgon, kai exedeto auton geōrgois, kai apedēmēsen.
12.2: kai apesteilen pros tous geōrgous tō kairō doulon, hina para tōn geōrgōn labē apo tōn karpōn tou ampelōnos;
12.3: kai labontes auton edeiran kai apesteilan kenon.
12.4: kai palin apesteilen pros autous allon doulon; kakeinon ekephaliōsan kai ētimasan.
12.5: kai allon apesteilen; kakeinon apekteinan, kai pollous allous, hous men derontes, hous de apoktennontes.
12.6: eti hena eichen, huion agapēton; apesteilen auton eschaton pros autous legōn hoti Entrapēsontai ton huion mou.
12.7: ekeinoi de hoi geōrgoi pros heautous eipan hoti Houtos estin ho klēronomos; deute apokteinōmen auton, kai hēmōn estai hē klēronomia.
12.8: kai labontes apekteinan auton, kai exebalon auton exō tou ampelōnos.
12.9: ti poiēsei ho kyrios tou ampelōnos? eleusetai kai apolesei tous geōrgous, kai dōsei ton ampelōna allois.
12.10: oude tēn graphēn tautēn anegnōte Lithon hon apedokimasan hoi oikodomountes, houtos egenēthē eis kephalēn gōnias;
12.11: para Kyriou egeneto hautē, kai estin thaumastē en ophthalmois hēmōn?
12.12: Kai ezētoun auton kratēsai, kai ephobēthēsan ton ochlon; egnōsan gar hoti pros autous tēn parabolēn eipen. kai aphentes auton apēlthon.
12.13: Kai apostellousin pros auton tinas tōn Pharisaiōn kai tōn Hērōdianōn hina auton agreusōsin logō.
12.14: kai elthontes legousin autō Didaskale, oidamen hoti alēthēs ei kai ou melei soi peri oudenos; ou gar blepeis eis prosōpon anthrōpōn, all’ ep’ alētheias tēn hodon tou Theou didaskeis; exestin dounai kēnson Kaisari ē ou? dōmen ē mē dōmen?
12.15: ho de eidōs autōn tēn hypokrisin eipen autois Ti me peirazete? pherete moi dēnarion hina idō.
12.16: hoi de ēnenkan. kai legei autois Tinos hē eikōn hautē kai hē epigraphē? hoi de eipan autō Kaisaros.
12.17: ho de Iēsous eipen autois Ta Kaisaros apodote Kaisari kai ta tou Theou tō Theō. kai exethaumazon ep’ autō.
12.18: Kai erchontai Saddoukaioi pros auton, hoitines legousin anastasin mē einai, kai epērōtōn auton legontes
12.19: Didaskale, Mōusēs egrapsen hēmin hoti ean tinos adelphos apothanē kai katalipē gynaika kai mē aphē teknon, hina labē ho adelphos autou tēn gynaika kai exanastēsē sperma tō adelphō autou.
12.20: hepta adelphoi ēsan; kai ho prōtos elaben gynaika, kai apothnēskōn ouk aphēken sperma;
12.21: kai ho deuteros elaben autēn, kai apethanen mē katalipōn sperma; kai ho tritos hōsautōs;
12.22: kai hoi hepta ouk aphēkan sperma. eschaton pantōn kai hē gynē apethanen.
12.23: en tē anastasei, hotan anastōsin, tinos autōn estai gynē? hoi gar hepta eschon autēn gynaika.
12.24: ephē autois ho Iēsous Ou dia touto planasthe mē eidotes tas graphas mēde tēn dynamin tou Theou?
12.25: hotan gar ek nekrōn anastōsin, oute gamousin oute gamizontai, all’ eisin hōs angeloi en tois ouranois.
12.26: peri de tōn nekrōn hoti egeirontai, ouk anegnōte en tē biblō Mōuseōs epi tou Batou pōs eipen autō ho Theos legōn Egō ho Theos Abraam kai Theos Isaak kai Theos Iakōb?
12.27: ouk estin Theos nekrōn alla zōntōn. poly planasthe.
12.28: Kai proselthōn heis tōn grammateōn, akousas autōn synzētountōn, eidōs hoti kalōs apekrithē autois, epērōtēsen auton Poia estin entolē prōtē pantōn?
12.29: apekrithē ho Iēsous hoti Prōtē estin Akoue, Israēl, Kyrios ho Theos hēmōn Kyrios heis estin,
12.30: kai agapēseis Kyrion ton Theon sou ex holēs tēs kardias sou kai ex holēs tēs psychēs sou kai ex holēs tēs dianoias sou kai ex holēs tēs ischyos sou.
12.31: deutera hautē Agapēseis ton plēsion sou hōs seauton. meizōn toutōn allē entolē ouk estin.
12.32: kai eipen autō ho grammateus Kalōs, Didaskale, ep’ alētheias eipes hoti heis estin kai ouk estin allos plēn autou;
12.33: kai to agapan auton ex holēs tēs kardias kai ex holēs tēs syneseōs kai ex holēs tēs ischyos, kai to agapan ton plēsion hōs heauton perissoteron estin pantōn tōn holokautōmatōn kai thysiōn.
12.34: kai ho Iēsous, idōn auton hoti nounechōs apekrithē, eipen autō Ou makran ei apo tēs basileias tou Theou. kai oudeis ouketi etolma auton eperōtēsai.
12.35: Kai apokritheis ho Iēsous elegen didaskōn en tō hierō Pōs legousin hoi grammateis hoti ho Christos huios Daueid estin?
12.36: autos Daueid eipen en tō Pneumati tō Hagiō Eipen Kyrios tō Kyriō mou Kathou ek dexiōn mou heōs an thō tous echthrous sou hypokatō tōn podōn sou.
12.37: autos Daueid legei auton Kyrion, kai pothen autou estin huios? Kai ho polys ochlos ēkouen autou hēdeōs.
12.38: Kai en tē didachē autou elegen Blepete apo tōn grammateōn tōn thelontōn en stolais peripatein kai aspasmous en tais agorais
12.39: kai prōtokathedrias en tais synagōgais kai prōtoklisias en tois deipnois;
12.40: hoi katesthiontes tas oikias tōn chērōn kai prophasei makra proseuchomenoi, houtoi lēmpsontai perissoteron krima.
12.41: Kai kathisas katenanti tou gazophylakiou etheōrei pōs ho ochlos ballei chalkon eis to gazophylakion; kai polloi plousioi eballon polla;
12.42: kai elthousa mia chēra ptōchē ebalen lepta dyo, ho estin kodrantēs.
12.43: kai proskalesamenos tous mathētas autou eipen autois Amēn legō hymin hoti hē chēra hautē hē ptōchē pleion pantōn ebalen tōn ballontōn eis to gazophylakion;
12.44: pantes gar ek tou perisseuontos autois ebalon, hautē de ek tēs hysterēseōs autēs panta hosa eichen ebalen, holon ton bion autēs.

13.1: Kai ekporeuomenou autou ek tou hierou legei autō heis tōn mathētōn autou Didaskale, ide potapoi lithoi kai potapai oikodomai.
13.2: kai ho Iēsous eipen autō Blepeis tautas tas megalas oikodomas? ou mē aphethē lithos epi lithon hos ou mē katalythē.
13.3: Kai kathēmenou autou eis to oros tōn Elaiōn katenanti tou hierou, epērōta auton kat’ idian Petros kai Iakōbos kai Iōanēs kai Andreas
13.4: Eipon hēmin, pote tauta estai, kai ti to sēmeion hotan mellē tauta synteleisthai panta?
13.5: ho de Iēsous ērxato legein autois Blepete mē tis hymas planēsē.
13.6: polloi eleusontai epi tō onomati mou legontes hoti Egō eimi, kai pollous planēsousin.
13.7: hotan de akousēte polemous kai akoas polemōn, mē throeisthe; dei genesthai, all’ oupō to telos.
13.8: egerthēsetai gar ethnos ep’ ethnos kai basileia epi basileian. esontai seismoi kata topous, esontai limoi; archē ōdinōn tauta.
13.9: Blepete de hymeis heautous; paradōsousin hymas eis synedria kai eis synagōgas darēsesthe kai epi hēgemonōn kai basileōn stathēsesthe heneken emou, eis martyrion autois.
13.10: kai eis panta ta ethnē prōton dei kērychthēnai to euangelion.
13.11: kai hotan agōsin hymas paradidontes, mē promerimnate ti lalēsēte, all’ ho ean dothē hymin en ekeinē tē hōra, touto laleite; ou gar este hymeis hoi lalountes alla to Pneuma to Hagion.
13.12: kai paradōsei adelphos adelphon eis thanaton kai patēr teknon, kai epanastēsontai tekna epi goneis kai thanatōsousin autous;
13.13: kai esesthe misoumenoi hypo pantōn dia to onoma mou; ho de hypomeinas eis telos, houtos sōthēsetai.
13.14: Hotan de idēte to bdelygma tēs erēmōseōs hestēkota hopou ou dei, ho anaginōskōn noeitō, tote hoi en tē Ioudaia pheugetōsan eis ta orē,
13.15: ho epi tou dōmatos mē katabatō mēde eiselthatō ti arai ek tēs oikias autou,
13.16: kai ho eis ton agron mē epistrepsatō eis ta opisō arai to himation autou.
13.17: ouai de tais en gastri echousais kai tais thēlazousais en ekeinais tais hēmerais.
13.18: proseuchesthe de hina mē genētai cheimōnos;
13.19: esontai gar hai hēmerai ekeinai thlipsis, hoia ou gegonen toiautē ap’ archēs ktiseōs hēn ektisen ho Theos heōs tou nyn kai ou mē genētai.
13.20: kai ei mē ekolobōsen Kyrios tas hēmeras, ouk an esōthē pasa sarx; alla dia tous eklektous hous exelexato ekolobōsen tas hēmeras.
13.21: kai tote ean tis hymin eipē Ide hōde ho Christos, Ide ekei, mē pisteuete;
13.22: egerthēsontai de pseudochristoi kai pseudoprophētai kai poiēsousin sēmeia kai terata pros to apoplanan ei dynaton tous eklektous;
13.23: hymeis de blepete; proeirēka hymin panta.
13.24: Alla en ekeinais tais hēmerais meta tēn thlipsin ekeinēn ho hēlios skotisthēsetai, kai hē selēnē ou dōsei to phengos autēs,
13.25: kai hoi asteres esontai ek tou ouranou piptontes, kai hai dynameis hai en tois ouranois saleuthēsontai.
13.26: kai tote opsontai ton Huion tou anthrōpou erchomenon en nephelais meta dynameōs pollēs kai doxēs.
13.27: kai tote apostelei tous angelous kai episynaxei tous eklektous autou ek tōn tessarōn anemōn ap’ akrou gēs heōs akrou ouranou.
13.28: Apo de tēs sykēs mathete tēn parabolēn; hotan ēdē ho klados autēs hapalos genētai kai ekphyē ta phylla, ginōskete hoti engys to theros estin;
13.29: houtōs kai hymeis, hotan idēte tauta ginomena, ginōskete hoti engys estin epi thyrais.
13.30: amēn legō hymin hoti ou mē parelthē hē genea hautē mechris hou tauta panta genētai.
13.31: ho ouranos kai hē gē pareleusontai, hoi de logoi mou ou pareleusontai.
13.32: Peri de tēs hēmeras ekeinēs ē tēs hōras oudeis oiden, oude hoi angeloi en ouranō oude ho Huios, ei mē ho Patēr.
13.33: Blepete, agrypneite; ouk oidate gar pote ho kairos estin.
13.34: hōs anthrōpos apodēmos apheis tēn oikian autou kai dous tois doulois autou tēn exousian, hekastō to ergon autou, kai tō thyrōrō eneteilato hina grēgorē.
13.35: grēgoreite oun; ouk oidate gar pote ho kyrios tēs oikias erchetai, ē opse ē mesonyktion ē alektorophōnias ē prōi;
13.36: mē elthōn exaiphnēs heurē hymas katheudontas.
13.37: ho de hymin legō, pasin legō, grēgoreite.

14.1: Ēn de to pascha kai ta azyma meta dyo hēmeras. kai ezētoun hoi archiereis kai hoi grammateis pōs auton en dolō kratēsantes apokteinōsin.
14.2: elegon gar Mē en tē heortē, mē pote estai thorybos tou laou.
14.3: Kai ontos autou en Bēthania en tē oikia Simōnos tou leprou, katakeimenou autou ēlthen gynē echousa alabastron myrou nardou pistikēs polytelous; syntripsasa tēn alabastron katecheen autou tēs kephalēs.
14.4: ēsan de tines aganaktountes pros heautous Eis ti hē apōleia hautē tou myrou gegonen?
14.5: ēdynato gar touto to myron prathēnai epanō dēnariōn triakosiōn kai dothēnai tois ptōchois; kai enebrimōnto autē.
14.6: ho de Iēsous eipen Aphete autēn; ti autē kopous parechete? kalon ergon ērgasato en emoi.
14.7: pantote gar tous ptōchous echete meth’ heautōn, kai hotan thelēte dynasthe autois eu poiēsai, eme de ou pantote echete.
14.8: ho eschen epoiēsen; proelaben myrisai to sōma mou eis ton entaphiasmon.
14.9: amēn de legō hymin, hopou ean kērychthē to euangelion eis holon ton kosmon, kai ho epoiēsen hautē lalēthēsetai eis mnēmosynon autēs.
14.10: Kai Ioudas Iskariōth, ho heis tōn dōdeka, apēlthen pros tous archiereis hina auton paradoi autois.
14.11: hoi de akousantes echarēsan kai epēngeilanto autō argyrion dounai. kai ezētei pōs auton eukairōs paradoi.
14.12: Kai tē prōtē hēmera tōn azymōn, hote to pascha ethyon, legousin autō hoi mathētai autou Pou theleis apelthontes hetoimasōmen hina phagēs to pascha?
14.13: kai apostellei dyo tōn mathētōn autou kai legei autois Hypagete eis tēn polin, kai apantēsei hymin anthrōpos keramion hydatos bastazōn; akolouthēsate autō,
14.14: kai hopou ean eiselthē eipate tō oikodespotē hoti HO Didaskalos legei Pou estin to katalyma mou, hopou to pascha meta tōn mathētōn mou phagō?
14.15: kai autos hymin deixei anagaion mega estrōmenon hetoimon; kai ekei hetoimasate hēmin.
14.16: kai exēlthon hoi mathētai kai ēlthon eis tēn polin kai heuron kathōs eipen autois, kai hētoimasan to pascha.
14.17: Kai opsias genomenēs erchetai meta tōn dōdeka.
14.18: kai anakeimenōn autōn kai esthiontōn ho Iēsous eipen Amēn legō hymin hoti heis ex hymōn paradōsei me, ho esthiōn met’ emou.
14.19: ērxanto lypeisthai kai legein autō heis kata heis Mēti egō?
14.20: ho de eipen autois Heis tōn dōdeka, ho embaptomenos met’ emou eis to tryblion.
14.21: hoti ho men Huios tou anthrōpou hypagei kathōs gegraptai peri autou; ouai de tō anthrōpō ekeinō di’ hou ho Huios tou anthrōpou paradidotai; kalon autō ei ouk egennēthē ho anthrōpos ekeinos.
14.22: Kai esthiontōn autōn labōn arton eulogēsas eklasen kai edōken autois kai eipen Labete; touto estin to sōma mou.
14.23: kai labōn potērion eucharistēsas edōken autois, kai epion ex autou pantes.
14.24: kai eipen autois Touto estin to haima mou tēs diathēkēs to ekchynnomenon hyper pollōn.
14.25: amēn legō hymin hoti ouketi ou mē piō ek tou genēmatos tēs ampelou heōs tēs hēmeras ekeinēs hotan auto pinō kainon en tē basileia tou Theou.
14.26: Kai hymnēsantes exēlthon eis to oros tōn Elaiōn.
14.27: Kai legei autois ho Iēsous hoti Pantes skandalisthēsesthe, hoti gegraptai Pataxō ton poimena, kai ta probata diaskorpisthēsontai.
14.28: alla meta to egerthēnai me proaxō hymas eis tēn Galilaian.
14.29: ho de Petros ephē autō Ei kai pantes skandalisthēsontai, all’ ouk egō.
14.30: kai legei autō ho Iēsous Amēn legō soi hoti sy sēmeron tautē tē nykti prin ē dis alektora phōnēsai tris me aparnēsē.
14.31: ho de ekperissōs elalei Ean deē me synapothanein soi, ou mē se aparnēsomai. hōsautōs de kai pantes elegon.
14.32: Kai erchontai eis chōrion hou to onoma Gethsēmanei, kai legei tois mathētais autou Kathisate hōde heōs proseuxōmai.
14.33: kai paralambanei ton Petron kai ton Iakōbon kai ton Iōanēn met’ autou, kai ērxato ekthambeisthai kai adēmonein,
14.34: kai legei autois Perilypos estin hē psychē mou heōs thanatou; meinate hōde kai grēgoreite.
14.35: kai proelthōn mikron epipten epi tēs gēs, kai prosēucheto hina ei dynaton estin parelthē ap’ autou hē hōra,
14.36: kai elegen Abba ho Patēr, panta dynata soi; parenenke to potērion touto ap’ emou; all’ ou ti egō thelō alla ti sy.
14.37: kai erchetai kai heuriskei autous katheudontas, kai legei tō Petrō Simōn, katheudeis? ouk ischysas mian hōran grēgorēsai?
14.38: grēgoreite kai proseuchesthe, hina mē elthēte eis peirasmon; to men pneuma prothymon, hē de sarx asthenēs.
14.39: kai palin apelthōn prosēuxato ton auton logon eipōn.
14.40: kai palin elthōn heuren autous katheudontas, ēsan gar autōn hoi ophthalmoi katabarynomenoi, kai ouk ēdeisan ti apokrithōsin autō.
14.41: kai erchetai to triton kai legei autois Katheudete to loipon kai anapauesthe; apechei; ēlthen hē hōra, idou paradidotai ho Huios tou anthrōpou eis tas cheiras tōn hamartōlōn.
14.42: egeiresthe agōmen; idou ho paradidous me ēngiken.
14.43: Kai euthys eti autou lalountos paraginetai ho Ioudas heis tōn dōdeka, kai met’ autou ochlos meta machairōn kai xylōn para tōn archiereōn kai tōn grammateōn kai tōn presbyterōn.
14.44: dedōkei de ho paradidous auton syssēmon autois legōn Hon an philēsō autos estin; kratēsate auton kai apagete asphalōs.
14.45: kai elthōn euthys proselthōn autō legei Rhabbei, kai katephilēsen auton;
14.46: hoi de epebalan tas cheiras autō kai ekratēsan auton.
14.47: heis de tis tōn parestēkotōn spasamenos tēn machairan epaisen ton doulon tou archiereōs kai apheilen autou to ōtarion.
14.48: kai apokritheis ho Iēsous eipen autois Hōs epi lēstēn exēlthate meta machairōn kai xylōn syllabein me;
14.49: kath’ hēmeran ēmēn pros hymas en tō hierō didaskōn, kai ouk ekratēsate me; all’ hina plērōthōsin hai graphai.
14.51: Kai neaniskos tis synēkolouthei autō peribeblēmenos sindona epi gymnou, kai kratousin auton;
14.52: ho de katalipōn tēn sindona gymnos ephygen.
14.53: Kai apēgagon ton Iēsoun pros ton archierea, kai synerchontai pantes hoi archiereis kai hoi presbyteroi kai hoi grammateis.
14.54: kai ho Petros apo makrothen ēkolouthēsen autō heōs esō eis tēn aulēn tou archiereōs, kai ēn synkathēmenos meta tōn hypēretōn kai thermainomenos pros to phōs.
14.55: Hoi de archiereis kai holon to synedrion ezētoun kata tou Iēsou martyrian eis to thanatōsai auton, kai ouch hēuriskon;
14.56: polloi gar epseudomartyroun kat’ autou, kai isai hai martyriai ouk ēsan.
14.57: kai tines anastantes epseudomartyroun kat’ autou legontes
14.58: hoti Hēmeis ēkousamen autou legontos hoti Egō katalysō ton naon touton ton cheiropoiēton kai dia triōn hēmerōn allon acheiropoiēton oikodomēsō.
14.59: kai oude houtōs isē ēn hē martyria autōn.
14.60: kai anastas ho archiereus eis meson epērōtēsen ton Iēsoun legōn Ouk apokrinē ouden? ti houtoi sou katamartyrousin?
14.61: ho de esiōpa kai ouk apekrinato ouden. palin ho archiereus epērōta auton kai legei autō Sy ei ho Christos ho Huios tou Eulogētou?
14.62: ho de Iēsous eipen Egō eimi, kai opsesthe ton Huion tou anthrōpou ek dexiōn kathēmenon tēs dynameōs kai erchomenon meta tōn nephelōn tou ouranou.
14.63: ho de archiereus diarrēxas tous chitōnas autou legei Ti eti chreian echomen martyrōn?
14.64: ēkousate tēs blasphēmias; ti hymin phainetai? hoi de pantes katekrinan auton enochon einai thanatou.
14.65: Kai ērxanto tines emptyein autō kai perikalyptein autou to prosōpon kai kolaphizein auton kai legein autō Prophēteuson, kai hoi hypēretai rhapismasin auton elabon.
14.66: Kai ontos tou Petrou katō en tē aulē erchetai mia tōn paidiskōn tou archiereōs,
14.67: kai idousa ton Petron thermainomenon emblepsasa autō legei Kai sy meta tou Nazarēnou ēstha tou Iēsou.
14.68: ho de ērnēsato legōn Oute oida oute epistamai sy ti legeis. kai exēlthen exō eis to proaulion;
14.69: kai hē paidiskē idousa auton ērxato palin legein tois parestōsin hoti Houtos ex autōn estin.
14.70: ho de palin ērneito. kai meta mikron palin hoi parestōtes elegon tō Petrō Alēthōs ex autōn ei; kai gar Galilaios ei.
14.71: ho de ērxato anathematizein kai omnynai hoti Ouk oida ton anthrōpon touton hon legete.
14.72: kai euthys ek deuterou alektōr ephōnēsen. kai anemnēsthē ho Petros to rhēma hōs eipen autō ho Iēsous hoti Prin alektora dis phōnēsai tris me aparnēsē; kai epibalōn eklaien.

15.1: Kai euthys prōi symboulion hetoimasantes hoi archiereis meta tōn presbyterōn kai grammateōn kai holon to synedrion, dēsantes ton Iēsoun apēnenkan kai paredōkan Peilatō.
15.2: kai epērōtēsen auton ho Peilatos Sy ei ho Basileus tōn Ioudaiōn? ho de apokritheis autō legei Sy legeis.
15.3: kai katēgoroun autou hoi archiereis polla.
15.4: ho de Peilatos palin epērōta auton legōn Ouk apokrinē ouden? ide posa sou katēgorousin.
15.5: ho de Iēsous ouketi ouden apekrithē, hōste thaumazein ton Peilaton.
15.6: Kata de heortēn apelyen autois hena desmion hon parētounto.
15.7: ēn de ho legomenos Barabbas meta tōn stasiastōn dedemenos, hoitines en tē stasei phonon pepoiēkeisan.
15.8: kai anabas ho ochlos ērxato aiteisthai kathōs epoiei autois.
15.9: ho de Peilatos apekrithē autois legōn Thelete apolysō hymin ton Basilea tōn Ioudaiōn?
15.10: eginōsken gar hoti dia phthonon paradedōkeisan auton hoi archiereis.
15.11: hoi de archiereis aneseisan ton ochlon hina mallon ton Barabban apolysē autois.
15.12: ho de Peilatos palin apokritheis elegen autois Ti oun poiēsō hon legete ton Basilea tōn Ioudaiōn?
15.13: hoi de palin ekraxan Staurōson auton.
15.14: ho de Peilatos elegen autois Ti gar epoiēsen kakon? hoi de perissōs ekraxan Staurōson auton.
15.15: ho de Peilatos boulomenos tō ochlō to hikanon poiēsai apelysen autois ton Barabban, kai paredōken ton Iēsoun phragellōsas hina staurōthē.
15.16: Hoi de stratiōtai apēgagon auton esō tēs aulēs, ho estin Praitōrion, kai synkalousin holēn tēn speiran.
15.17: kai endidyskousin auton porphyran kai perititheasin autō plexantes akanthinon stephanon;
15.18: kai ērxanto aspazesthai auton Chaire, Basileu tōn Ioudaiōn;
15.19: kai etypton autou tēn kephalēn kalamō kai eneptyon autō, kai tithentes ta gonata prosekynoun autō.
15.20: kai hote enepaixan autō, exedysan auton tēn porphyran kai enedysan auton ta himatia autou. Kai exagousin auton hina staurōsōsin auton.
15.21: kai angareuousin paragonta tina Simōna Kyrēnaion erchomenon ap’ agrou, ton patera Alexandrou kai Rhouphou, hina arē ton stauron autou.
15.22: kai pherousin auton epi ton Golgothan topon, ho estin methermēneuomenos Kraniou topos.
15.23: kai edidoun autō esmyrnismenon oinon; hos de ouk elaben.
15.24: kai staurousin auton, kai diamerizontai ta himatia autou, ballontes klēron ep’ auta tis ti arē.
15.25: ēn de hōra tritē kai estaurōsan auton.
15.26: kai ēn hē epigraphē tēs aitias autou epigegrammenē O BASILEUS TŌN IOUDAIŌN.
15.27: Kai syn autō staurousin dyo lēstas, hena ek dexiōn kai hena ex euōnymōn autou.
15.29: Kai hoi paraporeuomenoi eblasphēmoun auton kinountes tas kephalas autōn kai legontes Oua ho katalyōn ton naon kai oikodomōn en trisin hēmerais,
15.30: sōson seauton katabas apo tou staurou.
15.31: homoiōs kai hoi archiereis empaizontes pros allēlous meta tōn grammateōn elegon Allous esōsen, heauton ou dynatai sōsai;
15.32: ho Christos ho Basileus Israēl katabatō nyn apo tou staurou, hina idōmen kai pisteusōmen. kai hoi synestaurōmenoi syn autō ōneidizon auton.
15.33: Kai genomenēs hōras hektēs skotos egeneto eph’ holēn tēn gēn heōs hōras enatēs.
15.34: kai tē enatē hōra eboēsen ho Iēsous phōnē megalē Elōi Elōi lama sabachthanei? ho estin methermēneuomenon HO Theos mou ho Theos mou, eis ti enkatelipes me?
15.35: kai tines tōn parestēkotōn akousantes elegon Ide Hēleian phōnei.
15.36: dramōn de tis kai gemisas spongon oxous peritheis kalamō epotizen auton, legōn Aphete idōmen ei erchetai Hēleias kathelein auton.
15.37: ho de Iēsous apheis phōnēn megalēn exepneusen.
15.38: Kai to katapetasma tou naou eschisthē eis dyo ap’ anōthen heōs katō.
15.39: Idōn de ho kentyriōn ho parestēkōs ex enantias autou hoti houtōs exepneusen, eipen Alēthōs houtos ho anthrōpos Huios Theou ēn.
15.40: Ēsan de kai gynaikes apo makrothen theōrousai, en hais kai Maria hē Magdalēnē kai Maria hē Iakōbou tou mikrou kai Iōsētos mētēr kai Salōmē,
15.41: hai hote ēn en tē Galilaia ēkolouthoun autō kai diēkonoun autō, kai allai pollai hai synanabasai autō eis Hierosolyma.
15.42: Kai ēdē opsias genomenēs, epei ēn Paraskeuē, ho estin prosabbaton,
15.43: elthōn Iōsēph ho apo Arimathaias, euschēmōn bouleutēs, hos kai autos ēn prosdechomenos tēn basileian tou Theou, tolmēsas eisēlthen pros ton Peilaton kai ētēsato to sōma tou Iēsou.
15.44: ho de Peilatos ethaumasen ei ēdē tethnēken, kai proskalesamenos ton kentyriōna epērōtēsen auton ei palai apethanen;
15.45: kai gnous apo tou kentyriōnos edōrēsato to ptōma tō Iōsēph.
15.46: kai agorasas sindona kathelōn auton eneilēsen tē sindoni kai katethēken auton en mnēmati ho ēn lelatomēmenon ek petras, kai prosekylisen lithon epi tēn thyran tou mnēmeiou.
15.47: hē de Maria hē Magdalēnē kai Maria hē Iōsētos etheōroun pou tetheitai.

16.1: Kai diagenomenou tou sabbatou Maria hē Magdalēnē kai Maria hē tou Iakōbou kai Salōmē ēgorasan arōmata hina elthousai aleipsōsin auton.
16.2: kai lian prōi tē mia tōn sabbatōn erchontai epi to mnēma, anateilantos tou hēliou.
16.3: kai elegon pros heautas Tis apokylisei hēmin ton lithon ek tēs thyras tou mnēmeiou?
16.4: kai anablepsasai theōrousin hoti anakekylistai ho lithos; ēn gar megas sphodra.
16.5: kai eiselthousai eis to mnēmeion eidon neaniskon kathēmenon en tois dexiois peribeblēmenon stolēn leukēn, kai exethambēthēsan.
16.6: ho de legei autais Mē ekthambeisthe; Iēsoun zēteite ton Nazarēnon ton estaurōmenon; ēgerthē, ouk estin hōde; ide ho topos hopou ethēkan auton.
16.7: alla hypagete eipate tois mathētais autou kai tō Petrō hoti Proagei hymas eis tēn Galilaian; ekei auton opsesthe, kathōs eipen hymin.
16.8: kai exelthousai ephygon apo tou mnēmeiou, eichen gar autas tromos kai ekstasis; kai oudeni ouden eipan; ephobounto gar.
16.9: [[Anastas de prōi prōtē sabbatou ephanē prōton Maria tē Magdalēnē, par’ hēs ekbeblēkei hepta daimonia.
16.10: ekeinē poreutheisa apēngeilen tois met’ autou genomenois penthousi kai klaiousin;
16.11: kakeinoi akousantes hoti zē kai etheathē hyp’ autēs ēpistēsan.
16.12: Meta de tauta dysin ex autōn peripatousin ephanerōthē en hetera morphē poreuomenois eis agron;
16.13: kakeinoi apelthontes apēngeilan tois loipois; oude ekeinois episteusan.
16.14: Hysteron de anakeimenois autois tois hendeka ephanerōthē, kai ōneidisen tēn apistian autōn kai sklērokardian hoti tois theasamenois auton egēgermenon ouk episteusan.
16.15: kai eipen autois Poreuthentes eis ton kosmon hapanta kēryxate to euangelion pasē tē ktisei.
16.16: ho pisteusas kai baptistheis sōthēsetai, ho de apistēsas katakrithēsetai.
16.17: sēmeia de tois pisteusasin tauta parakolouthēsei, en tō onomati mou daimonia ekbalousin, glōssais lalēsousin kainais,
16.18: opheis arousin kan thanasimon ti piōsin ou mē autous blapsē, epi arrōstous cheiras epithēsousin kai kalōs hexousin.
16.19: HO men oun Kyrios Iēsous meta to lalēsai autois anelēmphthē eis ton ouranon kai ekathisen ek dexiōn tou Theou.
16.20: ekeinoi de exelthontes ekēryxan pantachou, tou Kyriou synergountos kai ton logon bebaiountos dia tōn epakolouthountōn sēmeiōn.]]

1.1: Epeidēper polloi epecheirēsan anataxasthai diēgēsin peri tōn peplērophorēmenōn en hēmin pragmatōn,
1.2: kathōs paredosan hēmin hoi ap’ archēs autoptai kai hypēretai genomenoi tou logou,
1.3: edoxe kamoi parēkolouthēkoti anōthen pasin akribōs kathexēs soi grapsai, kratiste Theophile,
1.4: hina epignōs peri hōn katēchēthēs logōn tēn asphaleian.
1.5: Egeneto en tais hēmerais Hērōdou basileōs tēs Ioudaias hiereus tis onomati Zacharias ex ephēmerias Abia, kai gynē autō ek tōn thygaterōn Aarōn, kai to onoma autēs Eleisabet.
1.6: ēsan de dikaioi amphoteroi enantion tou Theou, poreuomenoi en pasais tais entolais kai dikaiōmasin tou Kyriou amemptoi.
1.7: kai ouk ēn autois teknon, kathoti ēn hē Eleisabet steira, kai amphoteroi probebēkotes en tais hēmerais autōn ēsan.
1.8: Egeneto de en tō hierateuein auton en tē taxei tēs ephēmerias autou enanti tou Theou,
1.9: kata to ethos tēs hierateias elache tou thymiasai eiselthōn eis ton naon tou Kyriou,
1.10: kai pan to plēthos ēn tou laou proseuchomenon exō tē hōra tou thymiamatos.
1.11: ōphthē de autō angelos Kyriou hestōs ek dexiōn tou thysiastēriou tou thymiamatos.
1.12: kai etarachthē Zacharias idōn, kai phobos epepesen ep’ auton.
1.13: eipen de pros auton ho angelos Mē phobou, Zacharia, dioti eisēkousthē hē deēsis sou, kai hē gynē sou Eleisabet gennēsei huion soi, kai kaleseis to onoma autou Iōanēn;
1.14: kai estai chara soi kai agalliasis, kai polloi epi tē genesei autou charēsontai.
1.15: estai gar megas enōpion Kyriou, kai oinon kai sikera ou mē piē, kai Pneumatos Hagiou plēsthēsetai eti ek koilias mētros autou,
1.16: kai pollous tōn huiōn Israēl epistrepsei epi Kyrion ton Theon autōn;
1.17: kai autos proeleusetai enōpion autou en pneumati kai dynamei Hēleia, epistrepsai kardias paterōn epi tekna kai apeitheis en phronēsei dikaiōn, hetoimasai Kyriō laon kateskeuasmenon.
1.18: kai eipen Zacharias pros ton angelon Kata ti gnōsomai touto? egō gar eimi presbytēs kai hē gynē mou probebēkuia en tais hēmerais autēs.
1.19: kai apokritheis ho angelos eipen autō Egō eimi Gabriēl ho parestēkōs enōpion tou Theou, kai apestalēn lalēsai pros se kai euangelisasthai soi tauta;
1.20: kai idou esē siōpōn kai mē dynamenos lalēsai achri hēs hēmeras genētai tauta, anth’ hōn ouk episteusas tois logois mou, hoitines plērōthēsontai eis ton kairon autōn.
1.21: kai ēn ho laos prosdokōn ton Zacharian, kai ethaumazon en tō chronizein en tō naō auton.
1.22: exelthōn de ouk edynato lalēsai autois, kai epegnōsan hoti optasian heōraken en tō naō; kai autos ēn dianeuōn autois, kai diemenen kōphos.
1.23: kai egeneto hōs eplēsthēsan hai hēmerai tēs leitourgias autou, apēlthen eis ton oikon autou.
1.24: Meta de tautas tas hēmeras synelaben Eleisabet hē gynē autou, kai periekryben heautēn mēnas pente, legousa
1.25: hoti Houtōs moi pepoiēken Kyrios en hēmerais hais epeiden aphelein oneidos mou en anthrōpois.
1.26: En de tō mēni tō hektō apestalē ho angelos Gabriēl apo tou Theou eis polin tēs Galilaias hē onoma Nazareth,
1.27: pros parthenon emnēsteumenēn andri hō onoma Iōsēph, ex oikou Daueid, kai to onoma tēs parthenou Mariam.
1.28: kai eiselthōn pros autēn eipen Chaire, kecharitōmenē, ho Kyrios meta sou.
1.29: hē de epi tō logō dietarachthē, kai dielogizeto potapos eiē ho aspasmos houtos.
1.30: kai eipen ho angelos autē Mē phobou, Mariam; heures gar charin para tō Theō;
1.31: kai idou syllēmpsē en gastri kai texē huion, kai kaleseis to onoma autou Iēsoun.
1.32: houtos estai megas kai Huios Hypsistou klēthēsetai, kai dōsei autō Kyrios ho Theos ton thronon Daueid tou patros autou,
1.33: kai basileusei epi ton oikon Iakōb eis tous aiōnas, kai tēs basileias autou ouk estai telos.
1.34: eipen de Mariam pros ton angelon Pōs estai touto, epei andra ou ginōskō?
1.35: kai apokritheis ho angelos eipen autē Pneuma Hagion epeleusetai epi se, kai dynamis Hypsistou episkiasei soi; dio kai to gennōmenon hagion klēthēsetai Huios Theou.
1.36: kai idou Eleisabet hē syngenis sou kai autē syneilēphen huion en gērei autēs, kai houtos mēn hektos estin autē tē kaloumenē steira;
1.37: hoti ouk adynatēsei para tou Theou pan rhēma.
1.38: eipen de Mariam Idou hē doulē Kyriou; genoito moi kata to rhēma sou. kai apēlthen ap’ autēs ho angelos.
1.39: Anastasa de Mariam en tais hēmerais tautais eporeuthē eis tēn oreinēn meta spoudēs eis polin Iouda,
1.40: kai eisēlthen eis ton oikon Zachariou kai ēspasato tēn Eleisabet.
1.41: kai egeneto hōs ēkousen ton aspasmon tēs Marias hē Eleisabet, eskirtēsen to brephos en tē koilia autēs, kai eplēsthē Pneumatos Hagiou hē Eleisabet,
1.42: kai anephōnēsen kraugē megalē kai eipen Eulogēmenē sy en gynaixin, kai eulogēmenos ho karpos tēs koilias sou.
1.43: kai pothen moi touto hina elthē hē mētēr tou Kyriou mou pros eme?
1.44: idou gar hōs egeneto hē phōnē tou aspasmou sou eis ta ōta mou, eskirtēsen en agalliasei to brephos en tē koilia mou.
1.45: kai makaria hē pisteusasa hoti estai teleiōsis tois lelalēmenois autē para Kyriou.
1.46: Kai eipen Mariam Megalynei hē psychē mou ton Kyrion,
1.47: kai ēgalliasen to pneuma mou epi tō Theō tō Sōtēri mou;
1.48: hoti epeblepsen epi tēn tapeinōsin tēs doulēs autou. idou gar apo tou nyn makariousin me pasai hai geneai;
1.49: hoti epoiēsen moi megala ho dynatos. kai hagion to onoma autou,
1.50: kai to eleos autou eis geneas kai geneas tois phoboumenois auton.
1.51: Epoiēsen kratos en brachioni autou, dieskorpisen hyperēphanous dianoia kardias autōn;
1.52: katheilen dynastas apo thronōn kai hypsōsen tapeinous,
1.53: peinōntas eneplēsen agathōn kai ploutountas exapesteilen kenous.
1.54: antelabeto Israēl paidos autou, mnēsthēnai eleous,
1.55: kathōs elalēsen pros tous pateras hēmōn, tō Abraam kai tō spermati autou eis ton aiōna.
1.56: Emeinen de Mariam syn autē hōs mēnas treis, kai hypestrepsen eis ton oikon autēs.
1.57: Tē de Eleisabet eplēsthē ho chronos tou tekein autēn, kai egennēsen huion.
1.58: kai ēkousan hoi perioikoi kai hoi syngeneis autēs hoti emegalynen Kyrios to eleos autou met’ autēs, kai synechairon autē.
1.59: Kai egeneto en tē hēmera tē ogdoē ēlthon peritemein to paidion, kai ekaloun auto epi tō onomati tou patros autou Zacharian.
1.60: kai apokritheisa hē mētēr autou eipen Ouchi, alla klēthēsetai Iōanēs.
1.61: kai eipan pros autēn hoti Oudeis estin ek tēs syngeneias sou hos kaleitai tō onomati toutō.
1.62: eneneuon de tō patri autou to ti an theloi kaleisthai auto.
1.63: kai aitēsas pinakidion egrapsen legōn Iōanēs estin onoma autou. kai ethaumasan pantes.
1.64: aneōchthē de to stoma autou parachrēma kai hē glōssa autou, kai elalei eulogōn ton Theon.
1.65: Kai egeneto epi pantas phobos tous perioikountas autous, kai en holē tē oreinē tēs Ioudaias dielaleito panta ta rhēmata tauta,
1.66: kai ethento pantes hoi akousantes en tē kardia autōn, legontes Ti ara to paidion touto estai? kai gar cheir Kyriou ēn met’ autou.
1.67: Kai Zacharias ho patēr autou eplēsthē Pneumatos Hagiou kai eprophēteusen legōn
1.68: Eulogētos Kyrios ho Theos tou Israēl, hoti epeskepsato kai epoiēsen lytrōsin tō laō autou,
1.69: kai ēgeiren keras sōtērias hēmin en oikō Daueid paidos autou,
1.70: kathōs elalēsen dia stomatos tōn hagiōn ap’ aiōnos prophētōn autou,
1.71: sōtērian ex echthrōn hēmōn kai ek cheiros pantōn tōn misountōn hēmas,
1.72: poiēsai eleos meta tōn paterōn hēmōn kai mnēsthēnai diathēkēs hagias autou,
1.73: horkon hon ōmosen pros Abraam ton patera hēmōn, tou dounai hēmin
1.74: aphobōs ek cheiros echthrōn rhysthentas latreuein autō
1.75: en hosiotēti kai dikaiosynē enōpion autou pasais tais hēmerais hēmōn.
1.76: Kai sy de, paidion, prophētēs Hypsistou klēthēsē; proporeusē gar enōpion Kyriou hetoimasai hodous autou,
1.77: tou dounai gnōsin sōtērias tō laō autou en aphesei hamartiōn autōn,
1.78: dia splanchna eleous Theou hēmōn, en hois episkepsetai hēmas anatolē ex hypsous,
1.79: epiphanai tois en skotei kai skia thanatou kathēmenois, tou kateuthynai tous podas hēmōn eis hodon eirēnēs.
1.80: To de paidion ēuxanen kai ekrataiouto pneumati, kai ēn en tais erēmois heōs hēmeras anadeixeōs autou pros ton Israēl.

2.1: Egeneto de en tais hēmerais ekeinais exēlthen dogma para Kaisaros Augoustou apographesthai pasan tēn oikoumenēn.
2.2: hautē apographē prōtē egeneto hēgemoneuontos tēs Syrias Kyrēniou.
2.3: kai eporeuonto pantes apographesthai, hekastos eis tēn heautou polin.
2.4: Anebē de kai Iōsēph apo tēs Galilaias ek poleōs Nazareth eis tēn Ioudaian eis polin Daueid hētis kaleitai Bēthleem, dia to einai auton ex oikou kai patrias Daueid,
2.5: apograpsasthai syn Mariam tē emnēsteumenē autō, ousē enkyō.
2.6: Egeneto de en tō einai autous ekei eplēsthēsan hai hēmerai tou tekein autēn,
2.7: kai eteken ton huion autēs ton prōtotokon, kai esparganōsen auton kai aneklinen auton en phatnē, dioti ouk ēn autois topos en tō katalymati.
2.8: Kai poimenes ēsan en tē chōra tē autē agraulountes kai phylassontes phylakas tēs nyktos epi tēn poimnēn autōn.
2.9: kai angelos Kyriou epestē autois kai doxa Kyriou perielampsen autous, kai ephobēthēsan phobon megan.
2.10: kai eipen autois ho angelos Mē phobeisthe; idou gar euangelizomai hymin charan megalēn, hētis estai panti tō laō,
2.11: hoti etechthē hymin sēmeron Sōtēr, hos estin Christos Kyrios, en polei Daueid.
2.12: kai touto hymin sēmeion, heurēsete brephos esparganōmenon kai keimenon en phatnē.
2.13: kai exaiphnēs egeneto syn tō angelō plēthos stratias ouraniou ainountōn ton Theon kai legontōn
2.14: Doxa en hypsistois Theō kai epi gēs eirēnē en anthrōpois eudokias.
2.15: Kai egeneto hōs apēlthon ap’ autōn eis ton ouranon hoi angeloi, hoi poimenes elaloun pros allēlous Dielthōmen dē heōs Bēthleem kai idōmen to rhēma touto to gegonos ho ho Kyrios egnōrisen hēmin.
2.16: kai ēlthan speusantes, kai aneuran tēn te Mariam kai ton Iōsēph kai to brephos keimenon en tē phatnē;
2.17: idontes de egnōrisan peri tou rhēmatos tou lalēthentos autois peri tou paidiou toutou.
2.18: kai pantes hoi akousantes ethaumasan peri tōn lalēthentōn hypo tōn poimenōn pros autous;
2.19: hē de Maria panta synetērei ta rhēmata tauta synballousa en tē kardia autēs.
2.20: kai hypestrepsan hoi poimenes doxazontes kai ainountes ton Theon epi pasin hois ēkousan kai eidon kathōs elalēthē pros autous.
2.21: Kai hote eplēsthēsan hēmerai oktō tou peritemein auton, kai eklēthē to onoma autou Iēsous, to klēthen hypo tou angelou pro tou syllēmphthēnai auton en tē koilia.
2.22: Kai hote eplēsthēsan hai hēmerai tou katharismou autōn kata ton nomon Mōuseōs, anēgagon auton eis Hierosolyma parastēsai tō Kyriō,
2.23: kathōs gegraptai en nomō Kyriou hoti Pan arsen dianoigon mētran hagion tō Kyriō klēthēsetai,
2.24: kai tou dounai thysian kata to eirēmenon en tō nomō Kyriou, zeugos trygonōn ē dyo nossous peristerōn.
2.25: Kai idou anthrōpos ēn en Ierousalēm hō onoma Symeōn, kai ho anthrōpos houtos dikaios kai eulabēs, prosdechomenos paraklēsin tou Israēl, kai Pneuma ēn Hagion ep’ auton;
2.26: kai ēn autō kechrēmatismenon hypo tou Pneumatos tou Hagiou mē idein thanaton prin ē an idē ton Christon Kyriou.
2.27: kai ēlthen en tō Pneumati eis to hieron; kai en tō eisagagein tous goneis to paidion Iēsoun tou poiēsai autous kata to eithismenon tou nomou peri autou,
2.28: kai autos edexato auto eis tas ankalas kai eulogēsen ton Theon kai eipen
2.29: Nyn apolyeis ton doulon sou, Despota, kata to rhēma sou en eirēnē;
2.30: hoti eidon hoi ophthalmoi mou to sōtērion sou,
2.31: ho hētoimasas kata prosōpon pantōn tōn laōn,
2.32: phōs eis apokalypsin ethnōn kai doxan laou sou Israēl.
2.33: kai ēn ho patēr autou kai hē mētēr thaumazontes epi tois laloumenois peri autou.
2.34: kai eulogēsen autous Symeōn kai eipen pros Mariam tēn mētera autou Idou houtos keitai eis ptōsin kai anastasin pollōn en tō Israēl kai eis sēmeion antilegomenon
2.35: — kai sou de autēs tēn psychēn dieleusetai rhomphaia—, hopōs an apokalyphthōsin ek pollōn kardiōn dialogismoi.
2.36: Kai ēn Anna prophētis, thygatēr Phanouēl, ek phylēs Asēr; hautē probebēkuia en hēmerais pollais, zēsasa meta andros etē hepta apo tēs parthenias autēs,
2.37: kai autē chēra heōs etōn ogdoēkonta tessarōn, hē ouk aphistato tou hierou nēsteiais kai deēsesin latreuousa nykta kai hēmeran.
2.38: kai autē tē hōra epistasa anthōmologeito tō Theō kai elalei peri autou pasin tois prosdechomenois lytrōsin Ierousalēm.
2.39: Kai hōs etelesan panta ta kata ton nomon Kyriou, epestrepsan eis tēn Galilaian eis polin heautōn Nazareth.
2.40: To de paidion ēuxanen kai ekrataiouto plēroumenon sophia, kai charis Theou ēn ep’ auto.
2.41: Kai eporeuonto hoi goneis autou kat’ etos eis Hierousalēm tē heortē tou pascha.
2.42: Kai hote egeneto etōn dōdeka, anabainontōn autōn kata to ethos tēs heortēs,
2.43: kai teleiōsantōn tas hēmeras, en tō hypostrephein autous hypemeinen Iēsous ho pais en Hierousalēm, kai ouk egnōsan hoi goneis autou.
2.44: nomisantes de auton einai en tē synodia ēlthon hēmeras hodon kai anezētoun auton en tois syngeneusin kai tois gnōstois,
2.45: kai mē heurontes hypestrepsan eis Hierousalēm anazētountes auton.
2.46: kai egeneto meta hēmeras treis heuron auton en tō hierō kathezomenon en mesō tōn didaskalōn kai akouonta autōn kai eperōtōnta autous;
2.47: existanto de pantes hoi akouontes autou epi tē synesei kai tais apokrisesin autou.
2.48: kai idontes auton exeplagēsan, kai eipen pros auton hē mētēr autou Teknon, ti epoiēsas hēmin houtōs? idou ho patēr sou kagō odynōmenoi zētoumen se.
2.49: kai eipen pros autous Ti hoti ezēteite me? ouk ēdeite hoti en tois tou Patros mou dei einai me?
2.50: kai autoi ou synēkan to rhēma ho elalēsen autois.
2.51: kai katebē met’ autōn kai ēlthen eis Nazareth, kai ēn hypotassomenos autois. kai hē mētēr autou dietērei panta ta rhēmata en tē kardia autēs.
2.52: Kai Iēsous proekopten en tē sophia kai hēlikia kai chariti para Theō kai anthrōpois.

3.1: En etei de pentekaidekatō tēs hēgemonias Tiberiou Kaisaros, hēgemoneuontos Pontiou Peilatou tēs Ioudaias, kai tetraarchountos tēs Galilaias Hērōdou, Philippou de tou adelphou autou tetraarchountos tēs Itouraias kai Trachōnitidos chōras, kai Lysaniou tēs Abilēnēs tetraarchountos,
3.2: epi archiereōs Anna kai Kaiapha, egeneto rhēma Theou epi Iōanēn ton Zachariou huion en tē erēmō.
3.3: kai ēlthen eis pasan tēn perichōron tou Iordanou kēryssōn baptisma metanoias eis aphesin hamartiōn,
3.4: hōs gegraptai en biblō logōn Hēsaiou tou prophētou Phōnē boōntos en tē erēmō Hetoimasate tēn hodon Kyriou, eutheias poieite tas tribous autou;
3.5: pasa pharanx plērōthēsetai kai pan oros kai bounos tapeinōthēsetai, kai estai ta skolia eis eutheias kai hai tracheiai eis hodous leias;
3.6: kai opsetai pasa sarx to sōtērion tou Theou.
3.7: Elegen oun tois ekporeuomenois ochlois baptisthēnai hyp’ autou Gennēmata echidnōn, tis hypedeixen hymin phygein apo tēs mellousēs orgēs?
3.8: poiēsate oun karpous axious tēs metanoias; kai mē arxēsthe legein en heautois Patera echomen ton Abraam; legō gar hymin hoti dynatai ho Theos ek tōn lithōn toutōn egeirai tekna tō Abraam.
3.9: ēdē de kai hē axinē pros tēn rhizan tōn dendrōn keitai; pan oun dendron mē poioun karpon kalon ekkoptetai kai eis pyr balletai.
3.10: Kai epērōtōn auton hoi ochloi legontes Ti oun poiēsōmen?
3.11: apokritheis de elegen autois HO echōn dyo chitōnas metadotō tō mē echonti, kai ho echōn brōmata homoiōs poieitō.
3.12: ēlthon de kai telōnai baptisthēnai kai eipan pros auton Didaskale, ti poiēsōmen?
3.13: ho de eipen pros autous Mēden pleon para to diatetagmenon hymin prassete.
3.14: epērōtōn de auton kai strateuomenoi legontes Ti poiēsōmen kai hēmeis? kai eipen autois Mēdena diaseisēte mēde sykophantēsēte, kai arkeisthe tois opsōniois hymōn.
3.15: Prosdokōntos de tou laou kai dialogizomenōn pantōn en tais kardiais autōn peri tou Iōanou, mē pote autos eiē ho Christos,
3.16: apekrinato legōn pasin ho Iōanēs Egō men hydati baptizō hymas; erchetai de ho ischyroteros mou, hou ouk eimi hikanos lysai ton himanta tōn hypodēmatōn autou; autos hymas baptisei en Pneumati Hagiō kai pyri;
3.17: hou to ptyon en tē cheiri autou diakatharai tēn halōna autou kai synagagein ton siton eis tēn apothēkēn autou, to de achyron katakausei pyri asbestō.
3.18: Polla men oun kai hetera parakalōn euēngelizeto ton laon;
3.19: ho de Hērōdēs ho tetraarchēs, elenchomenos hyp’ autou peri Hērōdiados tēs gynaikos tou adelphou autou kai peri pantōn hōn epoiēsen ponērōn ho Hērōdēs,
3.20: prosethēken kai touto epi pasin, katekleisen ton Iōanēn en phylakē.
3.21: Egeneto de en tō baptisthēnai hapanta ton laon kai Iēsou baptisthentos kai proseuchomenou aneōchthēnai ton ouranon,
3.22: kai katabēnai to Pneuma to Hagion sōmatikō eidei hōs peristeran ep’ auton, kai phōnēn ex ouranou genesthai Sy ei ho Huios mou ho agapētos, en soi eudokēsa.
3.23: Kai autos ēn Iēsous archomenos hōsei etōn triakonta, ōn huios, hōs enomizeto, Iōsēph, tou Hēlei
3.24: tou Matthat tou Leuei tou Melchei tou Iannai tou Iōsēph
3.25: tou Mattathiou tou Amōs tou Naoum tou Eslei tou Nangai
3.26: tou Maath tou Mattathiou tou Semeein tou Iōsēch tou Iōda
3.27: tou Iōanan tou Rhēsa tou Zorobabel tou Salathiēl tou Nērei
3.28: tou Melchei tou Addei tou Kōsam tou Elmadam tou Ēr
3.29: tou Iēsou tou Eliezer tou Iōreim tou Maththat tou Leuei
3.30: tou Symeōn tou Iouda tou Iōsēph tou Iōnam tou Eliakeim
3.31: tou Melea tou Menna tou Mattatha tou Natham tou Daueid
3.32: tou Iessai tou Iōbēd tou Boos tou Sala tou Naassōn
3.33: tou Aminadab tou Admein tou Arnei tou Esrōm tou Phares tou Iouda
3.34: tou Iakōb tou Isaak tou Abraam tou Thara tou Nachōr
3.35: tou Serouch tou Rhagau tou Phalek tou Eber tou Sala
3.36: tou Kainam tou Arphaxad tou Sēm tou Nōe tou Lamech
3.37: tou Mathousala tou Enōch tou Iaret tou Maleleēl tou Kainam
3.38: tou Enōs tou Sēth tou Adam tou Theou.

4.1: Iēsous de plērēs Pneumatos Hagiou hypestrepsen apo tou Iordanou, kai ēgeto en tō Pneumati en tē erēmō
4.2: hēmeras tesserakonta peirazomenos hypo tou diabolou. Kai ouk ephagen ouden en tais hēmerais ekeinais, kai syntelestheisōn autōn epeinasen.
4.3: eipen de autō ho diabolos Ei Huios ei tou Theou, eipe tō lithō toutō hina genētai artos.
4.4: kai apekrithē pros auton ho Iēsous Gegraptai hoti Ouk ep’ artō monō zēsetai ho anthrōpos.
4.5: Kai anagagōn auton edeixen autō pasas tas basileias tēs oikoumenēs en stigmē chronou.
4.6: kai eipen autō ho diabolos Soi dōsō tēn exousian tautēn hapasan kai tēn doxan autōn, hoti emoi paradedotai kai hō ean thelō didōmi autēn;
4.7: sy oun ean proskynēsēs enōpion emou, estai sou pasa.
4.8: kai apokritheis ho Iēsous eipen autō Gegraptai Proskynēseis Kyrion ton Theon sou kai autō monō latreuseis.
4.9: Ēgagen de auton eis Hierousalēm kai estēsen epi to pterygion tou hierou, kai eipen autō Ei Huios ei tou Theou, bale seauton enteuthen katō;
4.10: gegraptai gar hoti tois angelois autou enteleitai peri sou tou diaphylaxai se,
4.11: kai hoti epi cheirōn arousin se mē pote proskopsēs pros lithon ton poda sou.
4.12: kai apokritheis eipen autō ho Iēsous hoti Eirētai Ouk ekpeiraseis Kyrion ton Theon sou.
4.13: Kai syntelesas panta peirasmon ho diabolos apestē ap’ autou achri kairou.
4.14: Kai hypestrepsen ho Iēsous en tē dynamei tou Pneumatos eis tēn Galilaian; kai phēmē exēlthen kath’ holēs tēs perichōrou peri autou.
4.15: kai autos edidasken en tais synagōgais autōn, doxazomenos hypo pantōn.
4.16: Kai ēlthen eis Nazara, hou ēn tethrammenos, kai eisēlthen kata to eiōthos autō en tē hēmera tōn sabbatōn eis tēn synagōgēn, kai anestē anagnōnai.
4.17: kai epedothē autō biblion tou prophētou Hēsaiou, kai anoixas to biblion heuren ton topon hou ēn gegrammenon
4.18: Pneuma Kyriou ep’ eme, hou heineken echrisen me euangelisasthai ptōchois, apestalken me kēryxai aichmalōtois aphesin kai typhlois anablepsin, aposteilai tethrausmenous en aphesei,
4.20: kai ptyxas to biblion apodous tō hypēretē ekathisen; kai pantōn hoi ophthalmoi en tē synagōgē ēsan atenizontes autō.
4.21: ērxato de legein pros autous hoti Sēmeron peplērōtai hē graphē hautē en tois ōsin hymōn.
4.22: kai pantes emartyroun autō kai ethaumazon epi tois logois tēs charitos tois ekporeuomenois ek tou stomatos autou, kai elegon Ouchi huios estin Iōsēph houtos?
4.23: kai eipen pros autous Pantōs ereite moi tēn parabolēn tautēn Iatre, therapeuson seauton; hosa ēkousamen genomena eis tēn Kapharnaoum, poiēson kai hōde en tē patridi sou.
4.24: eipen de Amēn legō hymin hoti oudeis prophētēs dektos estin en tē patridi autou.
4.25: ep’ alētheias de legō hymin, pollai chērai ēsan en tais hēmerais Hēleiou en tō Israēl, hote ekleisthē ho ouranos epi etē tria kai mēnas hex, hōs egeneto limos megas epi pasan tēn gēn,
4.26: kai pros oudemian autōn epemphthē Hēleias ei mē eis Sarepta tēs Sidōnias pros gynaika chēran.
4.27: kai polloi leproi ēsan en tō Israēl epi Helisaiou tou prophētou, kai oudeis autōn ekatharisthē ei mē Naiman ho Syros.
4.28: kai eplēsthēsan pantes thymou en tē synagōgē akouontes tauta,
4.29: kai anastantes exebalon auton exō tēs poleōs, kai ēgagon auton heōs ophryos tou orous eph’ hou hē polis ōkodomēto autōn, hōste katakrēmnisai auton;
4.30: autos de dielthōn dia mesou autōn eporeueto.
4.31: Kai katēlthen eis Kapharnaoum polin tēs Galilaias. kai ēn didaskōn autous en tois sabbasin;
4.32: kai exeplēssonto epi tē didachē autou, hoti en exousia ēn ho logos autou.
4.33: kai en tē synagōgē ēn anthrōpos echōn pneuma daimoniou akathartou, kai anekraxen phōnē megalē
4.34: Ea, ti hēmin kai soi, Iēsou Nazarēne? ēlthes apolesai hēmas? oida se tis ei, ho Hagios tou Theou.
4.35: kai epetimēsen autō ho Iēsous legōn Phimōthēti kai exelthe ap’ autou. kai rhipsan auton to daimonion eis to meson exēlthen ap’ autou mēden blapsan auton.
4.36: kai egeneto thambos epi pantas, kai synelaloun pros allēlous legontes Tis ho logos houtos, hoti en exousia kai dynamei epitassei tois akathartois pneumasin kai exerchontai?
4.37: kai exeporeueto ēchos peri autou eis panta topon tēs perichōrou.
4.38: Anastas de apo tēs synagōgēs eisēlthen eis tēn oikian Simōnos. penthera de tou Simōnos ēn synechomenē pyretō megalō, kai ērōtēsan auton peri autēs.
4.39: kai epistas epanō autēs epetimēsen tō pyretō, kai aphēken autēn; parachrēma de anastasa diēkonei autois.
4.40: Dynontos de tou hēliou hapantes hosoi eichon asthenountas nosois poikilais ēgagon autous pros auton; ho de heni hekastō autōn tas cheiras epititheis etherapeuen autous.
4.41: exērcheto de kai daimonia apo pollōn, kraugazonta kai legonta hoti Sy ei ho Huios tou Theou. kai epitimōn ouk eia auta lalein, hoti ēdeisan ton Christon auton einai.
4.42: Genomenēs de hēmeras exelthōn eporeuthē eis erēmon topon; kai hoi ochloi epezētoun auton, kai ēlthon heōs autou, kai kateichon auton tou mē poreuesthai ap’ autōn.
4.43: ho de eipen pros autous hoti Kai tais heterais polesin euangelisasthai me dei tēn basileian tou Theou, hoti epi touto apestalēn.
4.44: kai ēn kēryssōn eis tas synagōgas tēs Ioudaias.

5.1: Egeneto de en tō ton ochlon epikeisthai autō kai akouein ton logon tou Theou, kai autos ēn hestōs para tēn limnēn Gennēsaret,
5.2: kai eiden ploia dyo hestōta para tēn limnēn; hoi de haleeis ap’ autōn apobantes eplynon ta diktya.
5.3: embas de eis hen tōn ploiōn, ho ēn Simōnos, ērōtēsen auton apo tēs gēs epanagagein oligon; kathisas de ek tou ploiou edidasken tous ochlous.
5.4: hōs de epausato lalōn, eipen pros ton Simōna Epanagage eis to bathos, kai chalasate ta diktya hymōn eis agran.
5.5: kai apokritheis Simōn eipen Epistata, di’ holēs nyktos kopiasantes ouden elabomen; epi de tō rhēmati sou chalasō ta diktya.
5.6: kai touto poiēsantes synekleisan plēthos ichthyōn poly; dierēsseto de ta diktya autōn.
5.7: kai kateneusan tois metochois en tō heterō ploiō tou elthontas syllabesthai autois; kai ēlthan, kai eplēsan amphotera ta ploia hōste bythizesthai auta.
5.8: idōn de Simōn Petros prosepesen tois gonasin Iēsou legōn Exelthe ap’ emou, hoti anēr hamartōlos eimi, Kyrie.
5.9: thambos gar perieschen auton kai pantas tous syn autō epi tē agra tōn ichthyōn hē synelabon,
5.10: homoiōs de kai Iakōbon kai Iōanēn huious Zebedaiou, hoi ēsan koinōnoi tō Simōni. kai eipen pros ton Simōna ho Iēsous Mē phobou; apo tou nyn anthrōpous esē zōgrōn.
5.11: kai katagagontes ta ploia epi tēn gēn, aphentes panta ēkolouthēsan autō.
5.12: Kai egeneto en tō einai auton en mia tōn poleōn kai idou anēr plērēs lepras; idōn de ton Iēsoun, pesōn epi prosōpon edeēthē autou legōn Kyrie, ean thelēs, dynasai me katharisai.
5.13: kai ekteinas tēn cheira hēpsato autou legōn Thelō, katharisthēti; kai eutheōs hē lepra apēlthen ap’ autou.
5.14: kai autos parēngeilen autō mēdeni eipein, alla apelthōn deixon seauton tō hierei, kai prosenenke peri tou katharismou sou kathōs prosetaxen Mōusēs, eis martyrion autois.
5.15: diērcheto de mallon ho logos peri autou, kai synērchonto ochloi polloi akouein kai therapeuesthai apo tōn astheneiōn autōn;
5.16: autos de ēn hypochōrōn en tais erēmois kai proseuchomenos.
5.17: Kai egeneto en mia tōn hēmerōn kai autos ēn didaskōn, kai ēsan kathēmenoi Pharisaioi kai nomodidaskaloi hoi ēsan elēlythotes ek pasēs kōmēs tēs Galilaias kai Ioudaias kai Hierousalēm; kai dynamis Kyriou ēn eis to iasthai auton.
5.18: kai idou andres pherontes epi klinēs anthrōpon hos ēn paralelymenos, kai ezētoun auton eisenenkein kai theinai enōpion autou.
5.19: kai mē heurontes poias eisenenkōsin auton dia ton ochlon, anabantes epi to dōma dia tōn keramōn kathēkan auton syn tō klinidiō eis to meson emprosthen tou Iēsou.
5.20: kai idōn tēn pistin autōn eipen Anthrōpe, apheōntai soi hai hamartiai sou.
5.21: kai ērxanto dialogizesthai hoi grammateis kai hoi Pharisaioi legontes Tis estin houtos hos lalei blasphēmias? tis dynatai hamartias apheinai ei mē monos ho Theos?
5.22: epignous de ho Iēsous tous dialogismous autōn apokritheis eipen pros autous Ti dialogizesthe en tais kardiais hymōn?
5.23: ti estin eukopōteron, eipein Apheōntai soi hai hamartiai sou, ē eipein Egeire kai peripatei?
5.24: hina de eidēte hoti ho Huios tou anthrōpou exousian echei epi tēs gēs aphienai hamartias, eipen tō paralelymenō Soi legō, egeire kai aras to klinidion sou poreuou eis ton oikon sou.
5.25: kai parachrēma anastas enōpion autōn, aras eph’ ho katekeito, apēlthen eis ton oikon autou doxazōn ton Theon.
5.26: kai ekstasis elaben hapantas, kai edoxazon ton Theon, kai eplēsthēsan phobou legontes hoti Eidomen paradoxa sēmeron.
5.27: Kai meta tauta exēlthen, kai etheasato telōnēn onomati Leuein kathēmenon epi to telōnion, kai eipen autō Akolouthei moi.
5.28: kai katalipōn panta anastas ēkolouthei autō.
5.29: Kai epoiēsen dochēn megalēn Leueis autō en tē oikia autou; kai ēn ochlos polys telōnōn kai allōn hoi ēsan met’ autōn katakeimenoi.
5.30: kai egongyzon hoi Pharisaioi kai hoi grammateis autōn pros tous mathētas autou legontes Dia ti meta tōn telōnōn kai hamartōlōn esthiete kai pinete?
5.31: kai apokritheis ho Iēsous eipen pros autous Ou chreian echousin hoi hygiainontes iatrou alla hoi kakōs echontes;
5.32: ouk elēlytha kalesai dikaious alla hamartōlous eis metanoian.
5.33: Hoi de eipan pros auton Hoi mathētai Iōanou nēsteuousin pykna kai deēseis poiountai, homoiōs kai hoi tōn Pharisaiōn, hoi de soi esthiousin kai pinousin.
5.34: ho de Iēsous eipen pros autous Mē dynasthe tous huious tou nymphōnos, en hō ho nymphios met’ autōn estin, poiēsai nēsteusai?
5.35: eleusontai de hēmerai, kai hotan aparthē ap’ autōn ho nymphios, tote nēsteusousin en ekeinais tais hēmerais.
5.36: Elegen de kai parabolēn pros autous hoti Oudeis epiblēma apo himatiou kainou schisas epiballei epi himation palaion; ei de mēge, kai to kainon schisei kai tō palaiō ou symphōnēsei to epiblēma to apo tou kainou.
5.37: kai oudeis ballei oinon neon eis askous palaious; ei de mēge, rhēxei ho oinos ho neos tous askous, kai autos ekchythēsetai kai hoi askoi apolountai;
5.38: alla oinon neon eis askous kainous blēteon.
5.39: kai oudeis piōn palaion thelei neon; legei gar HO palaios chrēstos estin.

6.1: Egeneto de en sabbatō diaporeuesthai auton dia sporimōn, kai etillon hoi mathētai autou kai ēsthion tous stachyas psōchontes tais chersin.
6.2: tines de tōn Pharisaiōn eipan Ti poieite ho ouk exestin tois sabbasin?
6.3: kai apokritheis pros autous eipen ho Iēsous Oude touto anegnōte ho epoiēsen Daueid hopote epeinasen autos kai hoi met’ autou ontes?
6.4: hōs eisēlthen eis ton oikon tou Theou kai tous artous tēs protheseōs labōn ephagen kai edōken tois met’ autou, hous ouk exestin phagein ei mē monous tous hiereis?
6.5: kai elegen autois Kyrios estin tou sabbatou ho Huios tou anthrōpou.
6.6: Egeneto de en heterō sabbatō eiselthein auton eis tēn synagōgēn kai didaskein; kai ēn anthrōpos ekei kai hē cheir autou hē dexia ēn xēra;
6.7: paretērounto de auton hoi grammateis kai hoi Pharisaioi ei en tō sabbatō therapeuei, hina heurōsin katēgorein autou.
6.8: autos de ēdei tous dialogismous autōn, eipen de tō andri tō xēran echonti tēn cheira Egeire kai stēthi eis to meson; kai anastas estē.
6.9: eipen de ho Iēsous pros autous Eperōtō hymas ei exestin tō sabbatō agathopoiēsai ē kakopoiēsai, psychēn sōsai ē apolesai?
6.10: kai periblepsamenos pantas autous eipen autō Ekteinon tēn cheira sou. ho de epoiēsen, kai apekatestathē hē cheir autou.
6.11: autoi de eplēsthēsan anoias, kai dielaloun pros allēlous ti an poiēsaien tō Iēsou.
6.12: Egeneto de en tais hēmerais tautais exelthein auton eis to oros proseuxasthai, kai ēn dianyktereuōn en tē proseuchē tou Theou.
6.13: kai hote egeneto hēmera, prosephōnēsen tous mathētas autou, kai eklexamenos ap’ autōn dōdeka, hous kai apostolous ōnomasen,
6.14: Simōna, hon kai ōnomasen, Petron kai Andrean ton adelphon autou, kai Iakōbon kai Iōanēn, kai Philippon kai Bartholomaion,
6.15: kai Maththaion kai Thōman, kai Iakōbon Alphaiou kai Simōna ton kaloumenon Zēlōtēn,
6.16: kai Ioudan Iakōbou, kai Ioudan Iskariōth, hos egeneto prodotēs,
6.17: kai katabas met’ autōn estē epi topou pedinou, kai ochlos polys mathētōn autou, kai plēthos poly tou laou apo pasēs tēs Ioudaias kai Hierousalēm kai tēs paraliou Tyrou kai Sidōnos,
6.18: hoi ēlthon akousai autou kai iathēnai apo tōn nosōn autōn, kai hoi enochloumenoi apo pneumatōn akathartōn etherapeuonto;
6.19: kai pas ho ochlos ezētoun haptesthai autou, hoti dynamis par’ autou exērcheto kai iato pantas.
6.20: Kai autos eparas tous ophthalmous autou eis tous mathētas autou elegen Makarioi hoi ptōchoi, hoti hymetera estin hē basileia tou Theou.
6.21: makarioi hoi peinōntes nyn, hoti chortasthēsesthe. makarioi hoi klaiontes nyn, hoti gelasete.
6.22: makarioi este hotan misēsōsin hymas hoi anthrōpoi, kai hotan aphorisōsin hymas kai oneidisōsin kai ekbalōsin to onoma hymōn hōs ponēron heneka tou Huiou tou anthrōpou.
6.23: charēte en ekeinē tē hēmera kai skirtēsate; idou gar ho misthos hymōn polys en tō ouranō; kata ta auta gar epoioun tois prophētais hoi pateres autōn.
6.24: Plēn ouai hymin tois plousiois, hoti apechete tēn paraklēsin hymōn.
6.25: ouai hymin, hoi empeplēsmenoi nyn, hoti peinasete. ouai, hoi gelōntes nyn, hoti penthēsete kai klausete.
6.26: ouai hotan kalōs hymas eipōsin pantes hoi anthrōpoi; kata ta auta gar epoioun tois pseudoprophētais hoi pateres autōn.
6.27: Alla hymin legō tois akouousin Agapate tous echthrous hymōn, kalōs poieite tois misousin hymas,
6.28: eulogeite tous katarōmenous hymas, proseuchesthe peri tōn epēreazontōn hymas.
6.29: tō typtonti se epi tēn siagona pareche kai tēn allēn, kai apo tou airontos sou to himation kai ton chitōna mē kōlysēs.
6.30: panti aitounti se didou, kai apo tou airontos ta sa mē apaitei.
6.31: kai kathōs thelete hina poiōsin hymin hoi anthrōpoi, poieite autois homoiōs.
6.32: kai ei agapate tous agapōntas hymas, poia hymin charis estin? kai gar hoi hamartōloi tous agapōntas autous agapōsin.
6.33: kai gar ean agathopoiēte tous agathopoiountas hymas, poia hymin charis estin? kai hoi hamartōloi to auto poiousin.
6.34: kai ean danisēte par’ hōn elpizete labein, poia hymin charis estin? kai hamartōloi hamartōlois danizousin hina apolabōsin ta isa.
6.35: plēn agapate tous echthrous hymōn kai agathopoieite kai danizete mēden apelpizontes; kai estai ho misthos hymōn polys, kai esesthe huioi Hypsistou, hoti autos chrēstos estin epi tous acharistous kai ponērous.
6.36: Ginesthe oiktirmones, kathōs ho Patēr hymōn oiktirmōn estin.
6.37: kai mē krinete, kai ou mē krithēte; kai mē katadikazete, kai ou mē katadikasthēte. apolyete, kai apolythēsesthe;
6.38: didote, kai dothēsetai hymin; metron kalon pepiesmenon sesaleumenon hyperekchynnomenon dōsousin eis ton kolpon hymōn; hō gar metrō metreite antimetrēthēsetai hymin.
6.39: Eipen de kai parabolēn autois Mēti dynatai typhlos typhlon hodēgein? ouchi amphoteroi eis bothynon empesountai?
6.40: ouk estin mathētēs hyper ton didaskalon; katērtismenos de pas estai hōs ho didaskalos autou.
6.41: Ti de blepeis to karphos to en tō ophthalmō tou adelphou sou, tēn de dokon tēn en tō idiō ophthalmō ou katanoeis?
6.42: pōs dynasai legein tō adelphō sou Adelphe, aphes ekbalō to karphos to en tō ophthalmō sou, autos tēn en tō ophthalmō sou dokon ou blepōn? hypokrita, ekbale prōton tēn dokon ek tou ophthalmou sou, kai tote diablepseis to karphos to en tō ophthalmō tou adelphou sou ekbalein.
6.43: Ou gar estin dendron kalon poioun karpon sapron, oude palin dendron sapron poioun karpon kalon.
6.44: hekaston gar dendron ek tou idiou karpou ginōsketai; ou gar ex akanthōn syllegousin syka, oude ek batou staphylēn trygōsin.
6.45: ho agathos anthrōpos ek tou agathou thēsaurou tēs kardias propherei to agathon, kai ho ponēros ek tou ponērou propherei to ponēron; ek gar perisseumatos kardias lalei to stoma autou.
6.46: Ti de me kaleite Kyrie kyrie, kai ou poieite ha legō?
6.47: Pas ho erchomenos pros me kai akouōn mou tōn logōn kai poiōn autous, hypodeixō hymin tini estin homoios.
6.48: homoios estin anthrōpō oikodomounti oikian, hos eskapsen kai ebathynen kai ethēken themelion epi tēn petran; plēmmyrēs de genomenēs proserēxen ho potamos tē oikia ekeinē, kai ouk ischysen saleusai autēn dia to kalōs oikodomēsthai autēn.
6.49: ho de akousas kai mē poiēsas homoios estin anthrōpō oikodomēsanti oikian epi tēn gēn chōris themeliou, hē proserēxen ho potamos, kai euthys synepesen, kai egeneto to rhēgma tēs oikias ekeinēs mega.

7.1: Epeidē eplērōsen panta ta rhēmata autou eis tas akoas tou laou, eisēlthen eis Kapharnaoum.
7.2: Hekatontarchou de tinos doulos kakōs echōn ēmellen teleutan, hos ēn autō entimos.
7.3: akousas de peri tou Iēsou apesteilen pros auton presbyterous tōn Ioudaiōn, erōtōn auton hopōs elthōn diasōsē ton doulon autou.
7.4: hoi de paragenomenoi pros ton Iēsoun parekaloun auton spoudaiōs, legontes hoti axios estin hō parexē touto;
7.5: agapa gar to ethnos hēmōn kai tēn synagōgēn autos ōkodomēsen hēmin.
7.6: ho de Iēsous eporeueto syn autois. ēdē de autou ou makran apechontos apo tēs oikias, epempsen philous ho hekatontarchēs legōn autō Kyrie, mē skyllou; ou gar hikanos eimi hina hypo tēn stegēn mou eiselthēs;
7.7: dio oude emauton ēxiōsa pros se elthein; alla eipe logō, kai iathētō ho pais mou.
7.8: kai gar egō anthrōpos eimi hypo exousian tassomenos, echōn hyp’ emauton stratiōtas, kai legō toutō Poreuthēti, kai poreuetai, kai allō Erchou, kai erchetai, kai tō doulō mou Poiēson touto, kai poiei.
7.9: akousas de tauta ho Iēsous ethaumasen auton, kai strapheis tō akolouthounti autō ochlō eipen Legō hymin, oude en tō Israēl tosautēn pistin heuron.
7.10: kai hypostrepsantes eis ton oikon hoi pemphthentes heuron ton doulon hygiainonta.
7.11: Kai egeneto en tō hexēs eporeuthē eis polin kaloumenēn Nain, kai syneporeuonto autō hoi mathētai autou kai ochlos polys.
7.12: hōs de ēngisen tē pylē tēs poleōs, kai idou exekomizeto tethnēkōs monogenēs huios tē mētri autou, kai autē ēn chēra, kai ochlos tēs poleōs hikanos ēn syn autē.
7.13: kai idōn autēn ho Kyrios esplanchnisthē ep’ autē kai eipen autē Mē klaie.
7.14: kai proselthōn hēpsato tēs sorou, hoi de bastazontes estēsan, kai eipen Neaniske, soi legō, egerthēti.
7.15: kai anekathisen ho nekros kai ērxato lalein, kai edōken auton tē mētri autou.
7.16: elaben de phobos pantas, kai edoxazon ton Theon legontes hoti Prophētēs megas ēgerthē en hēmin, kai hoti Epeskepsato ho Theos ton laon autou.
7.17: kai exēlthen ho logos houtos en holē tē Ioudaia peri autou kai pasē tē perichōrō.
7.18: Kai apēngeilan Iōanei hoi mathētai autou peri pantōn toutōn. kai proskalesamenos dyo tinas tōn mathētōn autou ho Iōanēs
7.19: epempsen pros ton Kyrion legōn Sy ei ho erchomenos, ē allon prosdokōmen?
7.20: paragenomenoi de pros auton hoi andres eipan Iōanēs ho Baptistēs apesteilen hēmas pros se legōn Sy ei ho erchomenos, ē allon prosdokōmen?
7.21: en ekeinē tē hōra etherapeusen pollous apo nosōn kai mastigōn kai pneumatōn ponērōn, kai typhlois pollois echarisato blepein.
7.22: kai apokritheis eipen autois Poreuthentes apangeilate Iōanei ha eidete kai ēkousate; typhloi anablepousin, chōloi peripatousin, leproi katharizontai, kai kōphoi akouousin, nekroi egeirontai, ptōchoi euangelizontai;
7.23: kai makarios estin hos ean mē skandalisthē en emoi.
7.24: Apelthontōn de tōn angelōn Iōanou ērxato legein pros tous ochlous peri Iōanou Ti exēlthate eis tēn erēmon theasasthai? kalamon hypo anemou saleuomenon?
7.25: alla ti exēlthate idein? anthrōpon en malakois himatiois ēmphiesmenon? idou hoi en himatismō endoxō kai tryphē hyparchontes en tois basileiois eisin.
7.26: alla ti exēlthate idein? prophētēn? nai, legō hymin, kai perissoteron prophētou.
7.27: houtos estin peri hou gegraptai Idou apostellō ton angelon mou pro prosōpou sou, hos kataskeuasei tēn hodon sou emprosthen sou.
7.28: legō hymin, meizōn en gennētois gynaikōn Iōanou oudeis estin; ho de mikroteros en tē basileia tou Theou meizōn autou estin.
7.29: kai pas ho laos akousas kai hoi telōnai edikaiōsan ton Theon, baptisthentes to baptisma Iōanou;
7.30: hoi de Pharisaioi kai hoi nomikoi tēn boulēn tou Theou ēthetēsan eis heautous, mē baptisthentes hyp’ autou.
7.31: Tini oun homoiōsō tous anthrōpous tēs geneas tautēs, kai tini eisin homoioi?
7.32: homoioi eisin paidiois tois en agora kathēmenois kai prosphōnousin allēlois ha legei Ēulēsamen hymin kai ouk ōrchēsasthe; ethrēnēsamen kai ouk eklausate.
7.33: elēlythen gar Iōanēs ho Baptistēs mē esthiōn arton mēte pinōn oinon, kai legete Daimonion echei.
7.34: elēlythen ho Huios tou anthrōpou esthiōn kai pinōn, kai legete Idou anthrōpos phagos kai oinopotēs, philos telōnōn kai hamartōlōn.
7.35: kai edikaiōthē hē sophia apo pantōn tōn teknōn autēs.
7.36: Ērōta de tis auton tōn Pharisaiōn hina phagē met’ autou; kai eiselthōn eis ton oikon tou Pharisaiou kateklithē.
7.37: kai idou gynē hētis ēn en tē polei hamartōlos, kai epignousa hoti katakeitai en tē oikia tou Pharisaiou, komisasa alabastron myrou
7.38: kai stasa opisō para tous podas autou klaiousa, tois dakrysin ērxato brechein tous podas autou, kai tais thrixin tēs kephalēs autēs exemassen, kai katephilei tous podas autou kai ēleiphen tō myrō.
7.39: idōn de ho Pharisaios ho kalesas auton eipen en heautō legōn Houtos ei ēn prophētēs, eginōsken an tis kai potapē hē gynē hētis haptetai autou, hoti hamartōlos estin.
7.40: kai apokritheis ho Iēsous eipen pros auton Simōn, echō soi ti eipein. ho de Didaskale, eipe, phēsin.
7.41: dyo chreopheiletai ēsan danistē tini; ho heis ōpheilen dēnaria pentakosia, ho de heteros pentēkonta.
7.42: mē echontōn autōn apodounai amphoterois echarisato. tis oun autōn pleion agapēsei auton?
7.43: apokritheis Simōn eipen Hypolambanō hoti hō to pleion echarisato. ho de eipen autō Orthōs ekrinas.
7.44: kai strapheis pros tēn gynaika tō Simōni ephē Blepeis tautēn tēn gynaika? eisēlthon sou eis tēn oikian, hydōr moi epi podas ouk edōkas; hautē de tois dakrysin ebrexen mou tous podas kai tais thrixin autēs exemaxen.
7.45: philēma moi ouk edōkas; hautē de aph’ hēs eisēlthon ou dieleipen kataphilousa mou tous podas.
7.46: elaiō tēn kephalēn mou ouk ēleipsas; hautē de myrō ēleipsen tous podas mou.
7.47: hou charin legō soi, apheōntai hai hamartiai autēs hai pollai, hoti ēgapēsen poly; hō de oligon aphietai, oligon agapa.
7.48: eipen de autē Apheōntai sou hai hamartiai.
7.49: kai ērxanto hoi synanakeimenoi legein en heautois Tis houtos estin, hos kai hamartias aphiēsin?
7.50: eipen de pros tēn gynaika HĒ pistis sou sesōken se; poreuou eis eirēnēn.

8.1: Kai egeneto en tō kathexēs kai autos diōdeuen kata polin kai kōmēn kēryssōn kai euangelizomenos tēn basileian tou Theou, kai hoi dōdeka syn autō,
8.2: kai gynaikes tines hai ēsan tetherapeumenai apo pneumatōn ponērōn kai astheneiōn, Maria hē kaloumenē Magdalēnē, aph’ hēs daimonia hepta exelēlythei,
8.3: kai Iōana gynē Chouza epitropou Hērōdou kai Sousanna kai heterai pollai, haitines diēkonoun autois ek tōn hyparchontōn autais.
8.4: Syniontos de ochlou pollou kai tōn kata polin epiporeuomenōn pros auton eipen dia parabolēs
8.5: Exēlthen ho speirōn tou speirai ton sporon autou. kai en tō speirein auton ho men epesen para tēn hodon, kai katepatēthē, kai ta peteina tou ouranou katephagen auto.
8.6: kai heteron katepesen epi tēn petran, kai phyen exēranthē dia to mē echein ikmada.
8.7: kai heteron epesen en mesō tōn akanthōn, kai synphyeisai hai akanthai apepnixan auto.
8.8: kai heteron epesen eis tēn gēn tēn agathēn, kai phyen epoiēsen karpon hekatontaplasiona. tauta legōn ephōnei HO echōn ōta akouein akouetō.
8.9: Epērōtōn de auton hoi mathētai autou tis hautē eiē hē parabolē.
