2.1: Dio anapologētos ei, ō anthrōpe pas ho krinōn; en hō gar krineis ton heteron, seauton katakrineis; ta gar auta prasseis ho krinōn.
2.2: oidamen de hoti to krima tou Theou estin kata alētheian epi tous ta toiauta prassontas.
2.3: logizē de touto, ō anthrōpe ho krinōn tous ta toiauta prassontas kai poiōn auta, hoti sy ekpheuxē to krima tou Theou?
2.4: ē tou ploutou tēs chrēstotētos autou kai tēs anochēs kai tēs makrothymias kataphroneis, agnoōn hoti to chrēston tou Theou eis metanoian se agei?
2.5: kata de tēn sklērotēta sou kai ametanoēton kardian thēsaurizeis seautō orgēn en hēmera orgēs kai apokalypseōs dikaiokrisias tou Theou,
2.6: hos apodōsei hekastō kata ta erga autou;
2.7: tois men kath’ hypomonēn ergou agathou doxan kai timēn kai aphtharsian zētousin zōēn aiōnion;
2.8: tois de ex eritheias kai apeithousi tē alētheia peithomenois de tē adikia, orgē kai thymos.
2.9: thlipsis kai stenochōria, epi pasan psychēn anthrōpou tou katergazomenou to kakon, Ioudaiou te prōton kai Hellēnos;
2.10: doxa de kai timē kai eirēnē panti tō ergazomenō to agathon, Ioudaiō te prōton kai Hellēni.
2.11: ou gar estin prosōpolēmpsia para tō Theō.
2.12: Hosoi gar anomōs hēmarton, anomōs kai apolountai; kai hosoi en nomō hēmarton, dia nomou krithēsontai;
2.13: ou gar hoi akroatai nomou dikaioi para tō Theō, all’ hoi poiētai nomou dikaiōthēsontai.
2.14: hotan gar ethnē ta mē nomon echonta physei ta tou nomou poiōsin, houtoi nomon mē echontes heautois eisin nomos;
2.15: hoitines endeiknyntai to ergon tou nomou grapton en tais kardiais autōn, synmartyrousēs autōn tēs syneidēseōs kai metaxy allēlōn tōn logismōn katēgorountōn ē kai apologoumenōn,
2.16: en hē hēmera krinei ho Theos ta krypta tōn anthrōpōn kata to euangelion mou dia Christou Iēsou.
2.17: Ei de sy Ioudaios eponomazē kai epanapauē nomō kai kauchasai en Theō
2.18: kai ginōskeis to thelēma kai dokimazeis ta diapheronta katēchoumenos ek tou nomou,
2.19: pepoithas te seauton hodēgon einai typhlōn, phōs tōn en skotei,
2.20: paideutēn aphronōn, didaskalon nēpiōn, echonta tēn morphōsin tēs gnōseōs kai tēs alētheias en tō nomō;
2.21: ho oun didaskōn heteron seauton ou didaskeis? ho kēryssōn mē kleptein klepteis?
2.22: ho legōn mē moicheuein moicheueis? ho bdelyssomenos ta eidōla hierosyleis?
2.23: hos en nomō kauchasai, dia tēs parabaseōs tou nomou ton Theon atimazeis?
2.24: to gar onoma tou Theou di’ hymas blasphēmeitai en tois ethnesin, kathōs gegraptai.
2.25: peritomē men gar ōphelei ean nomon prassēs; ean de parabatēs nomou ēs, hē peritomē sou akrobystia gegonen.
2.26: ean oun hē akrobystia ta dikaiōmata tou nomou phylassē, ouch hē akrobystia autou eis peritomēn logisthēsetai?
2.27: kai krinei hē ek physeōs akrobystia ton nomon telousa se ton dia grammatos kai peritomēs parabatēn nomou.
2.28: ou gar ho en tō phanerō Ioudaios estin, oude hē en tō phanerō en sarki peritomē;
2.29: all’ ho en tō kryptō Ioudaios, kai peritomē kardias en pneumati ou grammati, hou ho epainos ouk ex anthrōpōn all’ ek tou Theou.

3.1: Ti oun to perisson tou Ioudaiou, ē tis hē ōpheleia tēs peritomēs?
3.2: poly kata panta tropon. prōton men gar hoti episteuthēsan ta logia tou Theou.
3.3: ti gar? ei ēpistēsan tines, mē hē apistia autōn tēn pistin tou Theou katargēsei?
3.4: mē genoito; ginesthō de ho Theos alēthēs, pas de anthrōpos pseustēs, kathaper gegraptai Hopōs an dikaiōthēs en tois logois sou kai nikēseis en tō krinesthai se.
3.5: ei de hē adikia hēmōn Theou dikaiosynēn synistēsin, ti eroumen? mē adikos ho Theos ho epipherōn tēn orgēn? kata anthrōpon legō.
3.6: mē genoito; epei pōs krinei ho Theos ton kosmon?
3.7: ei de hē alētheia tou Theou en tō emō pseusmati eperisseusen eis tēn doxan autou, ti eti kagō hōs hamartōlos krinomai?
3.8: kai mē kathōs blasphēmoumetha kai kathōs phasin tines hēmas legein hoti Poiēsōmen ta kaka hina elthē ta agatha? hōn to krima endikon estin.
3.9: Ti oun? proechometha? ou pantōs; proētiasametha gar Ioudaious te kai Hellēnas pantas hyph’ hamartian einai,
3.10: kathōs gegraptai hoti Ouk estin dikaios oude heis,
3.11: ouk estin ho syniōn, ouk estin ho ekzētōn ton Theon;
3.12: pantes exeklinan, hama ēchreōthēsan; ouk estin ho poiōn chrēstotēta, ouk estin heōs henos.
3.13: taphos aneōgmenos ho larynx autōn, tais glōssais autōn edoliousan, ios aspidōn hypo ta cheilē autōn;
3.14: hōn to stoma aras kai pikrias gemei;
3.15: oxeis hoi podes autōn ekcheai haima,
3.16: syntrimma kai talaipōria en tais hodois autōn,
3.17: kai hodon eirēnēs ouk egnōsan.
3.18: ouk estin phobos Theou apenanti tōn ophthalmōn autōn.
3.19: Oidamen de hoti hosa ho nomos legei tois en tō nomō lalei, hina pan stoma phragē kai hypodikos genētai pas ho kosmos tō Theō;
3.20: dioti ex ergōn nomou ou dikaiōthēsetai pasa sarx enōpion autou; dia gar nomou epignōsis hamartias.
3.21: Nyni de chōris nomou dikaiosynē Theou pephanerōtai, martyroumenē hypo tou nomou kai tōn prophētōn,
3.22: dikaiosynē de Theou dia pisteōs Iēsou Christou, eis pantas tous pisteuontas; ou gar estin diastolē;
3.23: pantes gar hēmarton kai hysterountai tēs doxēs tou Theou,
3.24: dikaioumenoi dōrean tē autou chariti dia tēs apolytrōseōs tēs en Christō Iēsou;
3.25: hon proetheto ho Theos hilastērion dia pisteōs en tō autou haimati, eis endeixin tēs dikaiosynēs autou dia tēn paresin tōn progegonotōn hamartēmatōn
3.26: en tē anochē tou Theou, pros tēn endeixin tēs dikaiosynēs autou en tō nyn kairō, eis to einai auton dikaion kai dikaiounta ton ek pisteōs Iēsou.
3.27: Pou oun hē kauchēsis? exekleisthē. dia poiou nomou? tōn ergōn? ouchi, alla dia nomou pisteōs.
3.28: logizometha gar dikaiousthai pistei anthrōpon chōris ergōn nomou.
3.29: ē Ioudaiōn ho Theos monon? ouchi kai ethnōn? nai kai ethnōn,
3.30: eiper heis ho Theos, hos dikaiōsei peritomēn ek pisteōs kai akrobystian dia tēs pisteōs.
3.31: nomon oun katargoumen dia tēs pisteōs? mē genoito, alla nomon histanomen.

4.1: Ti oun eroumen heurēkenai Abraam ton propatora hēmōn kata sarka?
4.2: ei gar Abraam ex ergōn edikaiōthē, echei kauchēma; all’ ou pros Theon,
4.3: ti gar hē graphē legei? Episteusen de Abraam tō Theō, kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosynēn.
4.4: tō de ergazomenō ho misthos ou logizetai kata charin alla kata opheilēma;
4.5: tō de mē ergazomenō, pisteuonti de epi ton dikaiounta ton asebē, logizetai hē pistis autou eis dikaiosynēn,
4.6: kathaper kai Daueid legei ton makarismon tou anthrōpou hō ho Theos logizetai dikaiosynēn chōris ergōn
4.7: Makarioi hōn aphethēsan hai anomiai kai hōn epekalyphthēsan hai hamartiai;
4.8: makarios anēr hou ou mē logisētai Kyrios hamartian.
4.9: ho makarismos oun houtos epi tēn peritomēn ē kai epi tēn akrobystian? legomen gar Elogisthē tō Abraam hē pistis eis dikaiosynēn.
4.10: pōs oun elogisthē? en peritomē onti ē en akrobystia? ouk en peritomē all’ en akrobystia;
4.11: kai sēmeion elaben peritomēs sphragida tēs dikaiosynēs tēs pisteōs tēs en tē akrobystia, eis to einai auton patera pantōn tōn pisteuontōn di’ akrobystias, eis to logisthēnai autois tēn dikaiosynēn,
4.12: kai patera peritomēs tois ouk ek peritomēs monon alla kai tois stoichousin tois ichnesin tēs en akrobystia pisteōs tou patros hēmōn Abraam.
4.13: Ou gar dia nomou hē epangelia tō Abraam ē tō spermati autou, to klēronomon auton einai kosmou, alla dia dikaiosynēs pisteōs.
4.14: ei gar hoi ek nomou klēronomoi, kekenōtai hē pistis kai katērgētai hē epangelia;
4.15: ho gar nomos orgēn katergazetai; hou de ouk estin nomos, oude parabasis.
4.16: Dia touto ek pisteōs, hina kata charin, eis to einai bebaian tēn epangelian panti tō spermati, ou tō ek tou nomou monon alla kai tō ek pisteōs Abraam, (hos estin patēr pantōn hēmōn,
4.17: kathōs gegraptai hoti Patera pollōn ethnōn tetheika se,) katenanti hou episteusen Theou tou zōopoiountos tous nekrous kai kalountos ta mē onta hōs onta;
4.18: hos par’ elpida ep’ elpidi episteusen eis to genesthai auton patera pollōn ethnōn kata to eirēmenon Houtōs estai to sperma sou;
4.19: kai mē asthenēsas tē pistei katenoēsen to heautou sōma nenekrōmenon, hekatontaetēs pou hyparchōn, kai tēn nekrōsin tēs mētras Sarras;
4.20: eis de tēn epangelian tou Theou ou diekrithē tē apistia, alla enedynamōthē tē pistei, dous doxan tō Theō
4.21: kai plērophorētheis hoti ho epēngeltai dynatos estin kai poiēsai.
4.22: dio kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosynēn.
4.23: Ouk egraphē de di’ auton monon hoti elogisthē autō,
4.24: alla kai di’ hēmas, hois mellei logizesthai, tois pisteuousin epi ton egeiranta Iēsoun ton Kyrion hēmōn ek nekrōn,
4.25: hos paredothē dia ta paraptōmata hēmōn kai ēgerthē dia tēn dikaiōsin hēmōn.

5.1: Dikaiōthentes oun ek pisteōs eirēnēn echōmen pros ton Theon dia tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou,
5.2: di’ hou kai tēn prosagōgēn eschēkamen tē pistei eis tēn charin tautēn en hē hestēkamen, kai kauchōmetha ep’ elpidi tēs doxēs tou Theou.
5.3: ou monon de, alla kai kauchōmetha en tais thlipsesin, eidotes hoti hē thlipsis hypomonēn katergazetai,
5.4: hē de hypomonē dokimēn, hē de dokimē elpida;
5.5: hē de elpis ou kataischynei, hoti hē agapē tou Theou ekkechytai en tais kardiais hēmōn dia Pneumatos Hagiou tou dothentos hēmin.
5.6: eti gar Christos ontōn hēmōn asthenōn eti kata kairon hyper asebōn apethanen.
5.7: molis gar hyper dikaiou tis apothaneitai; hyper gar tou agathou tacha tis kai tolma apothanein;
5.8: synistēsin de tēn heautou agapēn eis hēmas ho Theos hoti eti hamartōlōn ontōn hēmōn Christos hyper hēmōn apethanen.
5.9: pollō oun mallon dikaiōthentes nyn en tō haimati autou sōthēsometha di’ autou apo tēs orgēs.
5.10: ei gar echthroi ontes katēllagēmen tō Theō dia tou thanatou tou Huiou autou, pollō mallon katallagentes sōthēsometha en tē zōē autou;
5.11: ou monon de, alla kai kauchōmenoi en tō Theō dia tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou, di’ hou nyn tēn katallagēn elabomen.
5.12: Dia touto hōsper di’ henos anthrōpou hē hamartia eis ton kosmon eisēlthen, kai dia tēs hamartias ho thanatos, kai houtōs eis pantas anthrōpous ho thanatos diēlthen, eph’ hō pantes hēmarton;
5.13: achri gar nomou hamartia ēn en kosmō, hamartia de ouk ellogeitai mē ontos nomou;
5.14: alla ebasileusen ho thanatos apo Adam mechri Mōuseōs kai epi tous mē hamartēsantas epi tō homoiōmati tēs parabaseōs Adam, hos estin typos tou mellontos.
5.15: All’ ouch hōs to paraptōma, houtōs kai to charisma; ei gar tō tou henos paraptōmati hoi polloi apethanon, pollō mallon hē charis tou Theou kai hē dōrea en chariti tē tou henos anthrōpou Iēsou Christou eis tous pollous eperisseusen.
5.16: kai ouch hōs di’ henos hamartēsantos to dōrēma; to men gar krima ex henos eis katakrima, to de charisma ek pollōn paraptōmatōn eis dikaiōma.
5.17: ei gar tō tou henos paraptōmati ho thanatos ebasileusen dia tou henos, pollō mallon hoi tēn perisseian tēs charitos kai tēs dōreas tēs dikaiosynēs lambanontes en zōē basileusousin dia tou henos Iēsou Christou.
5.18: Ara oun hōs di’ henos paraptōmatos eis pantas anthrōpous eis katakrima, houtōs kai di’ henos dikaiōmatos eis pantas anthrōpous eis dikaiōsin zōēs;
5.19: hōsper gar dia tēs parakoēs tou henos anthrōpou hamartōloi katestathēsan hoi polloi, houtōs kai dia tēs hypakoēs tou henos dikaioi katastathēsontai hoi polloi.
5.20: nomos de pareisēlthen hina pleonasē to paraptōma; hou de epleonasen hē hamartia, hypereperisseusen hē charis,
5.21: hina hōsper ebasileusen hē hamartia en tō thanatō, houtōs kai hē charis basileusē dia dikaiosynēs eis zōēn aiōnion dia Iēsou Christou tou Kyriou hēmōn.

6.1: Ti oun eroumen? epimenōmen tē hamartia, hina hē charis pleonasē?
6.2: mē genoito. hoitines apethanomen tē hamartia, pōs eti zēsomen en autē?
6.3: ē agnoeite hoti hosoi ebaptisthēmen eis Christon Iēsoun, eis ton thanaton autou ebaptisthēmen?
6.4: synetaphēmen oun autō dia tou baptismatos eis ton thanaton, hina hōsper ēgerthē Christos ek nekrōn dia tēs doxēs tou Patros, houtōs kai hēmeis en kainotēti zōēs peripatēsōmen.
6.5: ei gar symphytoi gegonamen tō homoiōmati tou thanatou autou, alla kai tēs anastaseōs esometha;
6.6: touto ginōskontes, hoti ho palaios hēmōn anthrōpos synestaurōthē, hina katargēthē to sōma tēs hamartias, tou mēketi douleuein hēmas tē hamartia;
6.7: ho gar apothanōn dedikaiōtai apo tēs hamartias.
6.8: ei de apethanomen syn Christō, pisteuomen hoti kai synzēsomen autō,
6.9: eidotes hoti Christos egertheis ek nekrōn ouketi apothnēskei, thanatos autou ouketi kyrieuei.
6.10: ho gar apethanen, tē hamartia apethanen ephapax; ho de zē, zē tō Theō.
6.11: houtōs kai hymeis logizesthe heautous einai nekrous men tē hamartia zōntas de tō Theō en Christō Iēsou.
6.12: Mē oun basileuetō hē hamartia en tō thnētō hymōn sōmati eis to hypakouein tais epithymiais autou,
6.13: mēde paristanete ta melē hymōn hopla adikias tē hamartia, alla parastēsate heautous tō Theō hōsei ek nekrōn zōntas kai ta melē hymōn hopla dikaiosynēs tō Theō,
6.14: hamartia gar hymōn ou kyrieusei; ou gar este hypo nomon alla hypo charin.
6.15: Ti oun? hamartēsōmen hoti ouk esmen hypo nomon alla hypo charin? mē genoito.
6.16: ouk oidate hoti hō paristanete heautous doulous eis hypakoēn, douloi este hō hypakouete, ētoi hamartias eis thanaton ē hypakoēs eis dikaiosynēn?
6.17: charis de tō Theō hoti ēte douloi tēs hamartias, hypēkousate de ek kardias eis hon paredothēte typon didachēs,
6.18: eleutherōthentes de apo tēs hamartias edoulōthēte tē dikaiosynē.
6.19: anthrōpinon legō dia tēn astheneian tēs sarkos hymōn. hōsper gar parestēsate ta melē hymōn doula tē akatharsia kai tē anomia eis tēn anomian, houtōs nyn parastēsate ta melē hymōn doula tē dikaiosynē eis hagiasmon.
6.20: hote gar douloi ēte tēs hamartias, eleutheroi ēte tē dikaiosynē.
6.21: tina oun karpon eichete tote? eph’ hois nyn epaischynesthe; to gar telos ekeinōn thanatos.
6.22: nyni de eleutherōthentes apo tēs hamartias doulōthentes de tō Theō, echete ton karpon hymōn eis hagiasmon, to de telos zōēn aiōnion.
6.23: ta gar opsōnia tēs hamartias thanatos, to de charisma tou Theou zōē aiōnios en Christō Iēsou tō Kyriō hēmōn.

7.1: Ē agnoeite, adelphoi, ginōskousin gar nomon lalō, hoti ho nomos kyrieuei tou anthrōpou eph’ hoson chronon zē?
7.2: hē gar hypandros gynē tō zōnti andri dedetai nomō; ean de apothanē ho anēr, katērgētai apo tou nomou tou andros.
7.3: ara oun zōntos tou andros moichalis chrēmatisei ean genētai andri heterō; ean de apothanē ho anēr, eleuthera estin apo tou nomou, tou mē einai autēn moichalida genomenēn andri heterō.
7.4: hōste, adelphoi mou, kai hymeis ethanatōthēte tō nomō dia tou sōmatos tou Christou, eis to genesthai hymas heterō, tō ek nekrōn egerthenti, hina karpophorēsōmen tō Theō.
7.5: hote gar ēmen en tē sarki, ta pathēmata tōn hamartiōn ta dia tou nomou enērgeito en tois melesin hēmōn eis to karpophorēsai tō thanatō;
7.6: nyni de katērgēthēmen apo tou nomou, apothanontes en hō kateichometha, hōste douleuein hēmas en kainotēti pneumatos kai ou palaiotēti grammatos.
7.7: Ti oun eroumen? ho nomos hamartia? mē genoito; alla tēn hamartian ouk egnōn ei mē dia nomou; tēn te gar epithymian ouk ēdein ei mē ho nomos elegen Ouk epithymēseis;
7.8: aphormēn de labousa hē hamartia dia tēs entolēs kateirgasato en emoi pasan epithymian; chōris gar nomou hamartia nekra.
7.9: egō de ezōn chōris nomou pote; elthousēs de tēs entolēs hē hamartia anezēsen,
7.10: egō de apethanon, kai heurethē moi hē entolē hē eis zōēn, hautē eis thanaton;
7.11: hē gar hamartia aphormēn labousa dia tēs entolēs exēpatēsen me kai di’ autēs apekteinen.
7.12: hōste ho men nomos hagios, kai hē entolē hagia kai dikaia kai agathē.
7.13: To oun agathon emoi egeneto thanatos? mē genoito; alla hē hamartia, hina phanē hamartia, dia tou agathou moi katergazomenē thanaton, hina genētai kath’ hyperbolēn hamartōlos hē hamartia dia tēs entolēs.
7.14: oidamen gar hoti ho nomos pneumatikos estin; egō de sarkinos eimi, pepramenos hypo tēn hamartian.
7.15: ho gar katergazomai ou ginōskō; ou gar ho thelō touto prassō, all’ ho misō touto poiō.
7.16: ei de ho ou thelō touto poiō, synphēmi tō nomō hoti kalos.
7.17: nyni de ouketi egō katergazomai auto alla hē enoikousa en emoi hamartia.
7.18: oida gar hoti ouk oikei en emoi, tout’ estin en tē sarki mou, agathon; to gar thelein parakeitai moi, to de katergazesthai to kalon ou;
7.19: ou gar ho thelō poiō agathon, alla ho ou thelō kakon touto prassō.
7.20: ei de ho ou thelō egō touto poiō, ouketi egō katergazomai auto alla hē oikousa en emoi hamartia.
7.21: heuriskō ara ton nomon tō thelonti emoi poiein to kalon, hoti emoi to kakon parakeitai;
7.22: synēdomai gar tō nomō tou Theou kata ton esō anthrōpon,
7.23: blepō de heteron nomon en tois melesin mou antistrateuomenon tō nomō tou noos mou kai aichmalōtizonta me en tō nomō tēs hamartias tō onti en tois melesin mou.
7.24: Talaipōros egō anthrōpos; tis me rhysetai ek tou sōmatos tou thanatou toutou?
7.25: charis tō Theō dia Iēsou Christou tou Kyriou hēmōn. ara oun autos egō tō men noi douleuō nomō Theou, tē de sarki nomō hamartias.

8.1: Ouden ara nyn katakrima tois en Christō Iēsou.
8.2: ho gar nomos tou Pneumatos tēs zōēs en Christō Iēsou ēleutherōsen se apo tou nomou tēs hamartias kai tou thanatou.
8.3: to gar adynaton tou nomou, en hō ēsthenei dia tēs sarkos, ho Theos ton heautou Huion pempsas en homoiōmati sarkos hamartias kai peri hamartias katekrinen tēn hamartian en tē sarki,
8.4: hina to dikaiōma tou nomou plērōthē en hēmin tois mē kata sarka peripatousin alla kata pneuma.
8.5: hoi gar kata sarka ontes ta tēs sarkos phronousin, hoi de kata pneuma ta tou pneumatos.
8.6: to gar phronēma tēs sarkos thanatos, to de phronēma tou pneumatos zōē kai eirēnē.
8.7: dioti to phronēma tēs sarkos echthra eis Theon; tō gar nomō tou Theou ouch hypotassetai, oude gar dynatai;
8.8: hoi de en sarki ontes Theō aresai ou dynantai.
8.9: Hymeis de ouk este en sarki alla en pneumati, eiper Pneuma Theou oikei en hymin. ei de tis Pneuma Christou ouk echei, houtos ouk estin autou.
8.10: ei de Christos en hymin, to men sōma nekron dia hamartian, to de pneuma zōē dia dikaiosynēn.
8.11: ei de to Pneuma tou egeirantos ton Iēsoun ek nekrōn oikei en hymin, ho egeiras ek nekrōn Christon Iēsoun zōopoiēsei kai ta thnēta sōmata hymōn dia tou enoikountos autou Pneumatos en hymin.
8.12: Ara oun, adelphoi, opheiletai esmen, ou tē sarki tou kata sarka zēn.
8.13: ei gar kata sarka zēte, mellete apothnēskein; ei de pneumati tas praxeis tou sōmatos thanatoute, zēsesthe.
8.14: hosoi gar Pneumati Theou agontai, houtoi huioi eisin Theou.
8.15: ou gar elabete pneuma douleias palin eis phobon, alla elabete pneuma huiothesias, en hō krazomen Abba ho Patēr.
8.16: auto to Pneuma synmartyrei tō pneumati hēmōn hoti esmen tekna Theou.
8.17: ei de tekna, kai klēronomoi; klēronomoi men Theou, synklēronomoi de Christou, eiper synpaschomen hina kai syndoxasthōmen.
8.18: Logizomai gar hoti ouk axia ta pathēmata tou nyn kairou pros tēn mellousan doxan apokalyphthēnai eis hēmas.
8.19: hē gar apokaradokia tēs ktiseōs tēn apokalypsin tōn huiōn tou Theou apekdechetai.
8.20: tē gar mataiotēti hē ktisis hypetagē, ouch hekousa, alla dia ton hypotaxanta, eph’ helpidi
8.21: dioti kai autē hē ktisis eleutherōthēsetai apo tēs douleias tēs phthoras eis tēn eleutherian tēs doxēs tōn teknōn tou Theou.
8.22: oidamen gar hoti pasa hē ktisis synstenazei kai synōdinei achri tou nyn;
8.23: ou monon de, alla kai autoi tēn aparchēn tou Pneumatos echontes hēmeis kai autoi en heautois stenazomen, huiothesian apekdechomenoi, tēn apolytrōsin tou sōmatos hēmōn.
8.24: tē gar elpidi esōthēmen; elpis de blepomenē ouk estin elpis; ho gar blepei tis, ti elpizei?
8.25: ei de ho ou blepomen elpizomen, di’ hypomonēs apekdechometha.
8.26: Hōsautōs de kai to Pneuma synantilambanetai tē astheneia hēmōn; to gar ti proseuxōmetha katho dei ouk oidamen, alla auto to Pneuma hyperentynchanei stenagmois alalētois;
8.27: ho de eraunōn tas kardias oiden ti to phronēma tou Pneumatos, hoti kata Theon entynchanei hyper hagiōn.
8.28: Oidamen de hoti tois agapōsin ton Theon panta synergei eis agathon, tois kata prothesin klētois ousin.
8.29: hoti hous proegnō, kai proōrisen symmorphous tēs eikonos tou Huiou autou, eis to einai auton prōtotokon en pollois adelphois;
8.30: hous de proōrisen, toutous kai ekalesen; kai hous ekalesen, toutous kai edikaiōsen; hous de edikaiōsen, toutous kai edoxasen.
8.31: Ti oun eroumen pros tauta? ei ho Theos hyper hēmōn, tis kath’ hēmōn?
8.32: hos ge tou idiou Huiou ouk epheisato, alla hyper hēmōn pantōn paredōken auton, pōs ouchi kai syn autō ta panta hēmin charisetai?
8.33: tis enkalesei kata eklektōn Theou? Theos ho dikaiōn;
8.34: tis ho katakrinōn? Christos Iēsous ho apothanōn, mallon de egertheis, hos estin en dexia tou Theou, hos kai entynchanei hyper hēmōn.
8.35: tis hēmas chōrisei apo tēs agapēs tou Christou? thlipsis ē stenochōria ē diōgmos ē limos ē gymnotēs ē kindynos ē machaira?
8.36: kathōs gegraptai hoti Heneken sou thanatoumetha holēn tēn hēmeran, elogisthēmen hōs probata sphagēs.
8.37: all’ en toutois pasin hypernikōmen dia tou agapēsantos hēmas.
8.38: pepeismai gar hoti oute thanatos oute zōē oute angeloi oute archai oute enestōta oute mellonta oute dynameis
8.39: oute hypsōma oute bathos oute tis ktisis hetera dynēsetai hēmas chōrisai apo tēs agapēs tou Theou tēs en Christō Iēsou tō Kyriō hēmōn.

9.1: Alētheian legō en Christō, ou pseudomai, synmartyrousēs moi tēs syneidēseōs mou en Pneumati Hagiō,
9.2: hoti lypē moi estin megalē kai adialeiptos odynē tē kardia mou.
9.3: ēuchomēn gar anathema einai autos egō apo tou Christou hyper tōn adelphōn mou tōn syngenōn mou kata sarka,
9.4: hoitines eisin Israēleitai, hōn hē huiothesia kai hē doxa kai hai diathēkai kai hē nomothesia kai hē latreia kai hai epangeliai,
9.5: hōn hoi pateres, kai ex hōn ho Christos to kata sarka, ho ōn epi pantōn Theos eulogētos eis tous aiōnas, amēn.
9.6: Ouch hoion de hoti ekpeptōken ho logos tou Theou. ou gar pantes hoi ex Israēl, houtoi Israēl;
9.7: oud’ hoti eisin sperma Abraam, pantes tekna, all’ En Isaak klēthēsetai soi sperma.
9.8: tout’ estin, ou ta tekna tēs sarkos tauta tekna tou Theou, alla ta tekna tēs epangelias logizetai eis sperma.
9.9: epangelias gar ho logos houtos Kata ton kairon touton eleusomai kai estai tē Sarra huios.
9.10: ou monon de, alla kai Rhebekka ex henos koitēn echousa, Isaak tou patros hēmōn;
9.11: mēpō gar gennēthentōn mēde praxantōn ti agathon ē phaulon, hina hē kat’ eklogēn prothesis tou Theou menē,
9.12: ouk ex ergōn all’ ek tou kalountos, errethē autē hoti HO meizōn douleusei tō elassoni;
9.13: kathaper gegraptai Ton Iakōb ēgapēsa, ton de Ēsau emisēsa.
9.14: Ti oun eroumen? mē adikia para tō theō? mē genoito.
9.15: tō Mōusei gar legei Eleēsō hon an eleō, kai oikteirēsō hon an oikteirō.
9.16: ara oun ou tou thelontos oude tou trechontos, alla tou eleōntos Theou.
9.17: legei gar hē graphē tō Pharaō hoti Eis auto touto exēgeira se, hopōs endeixōmai en soi tēn dynamin mou, kai hopōs diangelē to onoma mou en pasē tē gē.
9.18: ara oun hon thelei eleei, hon de thelei sklērynei.
9.19: Ereis moi oun Ti eti memphetai? tō gar boulēmati autou tis anthestēken?
9.20: ō anthrōpe, menounge sy tis ei ho antapokrinomenos tō Theō? mē erei to plasma tō plasanti Ti me epoiēsas houtōs?
9.21: ē ouk echei exousian ho kerameus tou pēlou ek tou autou phyramatos poiēsai ho men eis timēn skeuos, ho de eis atimian?
9.22: ei de thelōn ho Theos endeixasthai tēn orgēn kai gnōrisai to dynaton autou ēnenken en pollē makrothymia skeuē orgēs katērtismena eis apōleian,
9.23: kai hina gnōrisē ton plouton tēs doxēs autou epi skeuē eleous, ha proētoimasen eis doxan,
9.24: hous kai ekalesen hēmas ou monon ex Ioudaiōn alla kai ex ethnōn?
9.25: hōs kai en tō Hōsēe legei Kalesō ton ou laon mou laon mou kai tēn ouk ēgapēmenēn ēgapēmenēn;
9.26: kai estai en tō topō hou errethē autois Ou laos mou hymeis, ekei klēthēsontai huioi Theou zōntos.
9.27: Hēsaias de krazei hyper tou Israēl Ean ē ho arithmos tōn huiōn Israēl hōs hē ammos tēs thalassēs, to hypoleimma sōthēsetai;
9.28: logon gar syntelōn kai syntemnōn poiēsei Kyrios epi tēs gēs.
9.29: kai kathōs proeirēken Hēsaias Ei mē Kyrios Sabaōth enkatelipen hēmin sperma, hōs Sodoma an egenēthēmen kai hōs Gomorra an hōmoiōthēmen.
9.30: Ti oun eroumen? hoti ethnē ta mē diōkonta dikaiosynēn katelaben dikaiosynēn, dikaiosynēn de tēn ek pisteōs;
9.31: Israēl de diōkōn nomon dikaiosynēs eis nomon ouk ephthasen.
9.32: dia ti? hoti ouk ek pisteōs all’ hōs ex ergōn; prosekopsan tō lithō tou proskommatos,
9.33: kathōs gegraptai Idou tithēmi en Siōn lithon proskommatos kai petran skandalou, kai ho pisteuōn ep’ autō ou kataischynthēsetai.

10.1: Adelphoi, hē men eudokia tēs emēs kardias kai hē deēsis pros ton Theon hyper autōn eis sōtērian.
10.2: martyrō gar autois hoti zēlon Theou echousin, all’ ou kat’ epignōsin;
10.3: agnoountes gar tēn tou Theou dikaiosynēn, kai tēn idian zētountes stēsai, tē dikaiosynē tou Theou ouch hypetagēsan.
10.4: telos gar nomou Christos eis dikaiosynēn panti tō pisteuonti.
10.5: Mōusēs gar graphei hoti tēn dikaiosynēn tēn ek nomou ho poiēsas anthrōpos zēsetai en autē.
10.6: hē de ek pisteōs dikaiosynē houtōs legei Mē eipēs en tē kardia sou Tis anabēsetai eis ton ouranon? tout’ estin Christon katagagein;
10.7: ē Tis katabēsetai eis tēn abysson? tout’ estin Christon ek nekrōn anagagein.
10.8: alla ti legei? Engys sou to rhēma estin, en tō stomati sou kai en tē kardia sou; tout’ estin to rhēma tēs pisteōs ho kēryssomen.
10.9: hoti ean homologēsēs en tō stomati sou Kyrion Iēsoun, kai pisteusēs en tē kardia sou hoti ho Theos auton ēgeiren ek nekrōn, sōthēsē;
10.10: kardia gar pisteuetai eis dikaiosynēn, stomati de homologeitai eis sōtērian.
10.11: legei gar hē graphē Pas ho pisteuōn ep’ autō ou kataischynthēsetai.
10.12: ou gar estin diastolē Ioudaiou te kai Hellēnos; ho gar autos Kyrios pantōn, ploutōn eis pantas tous epikaloumenous auton;
10.13: Pas gar hos an epikalesētai to onoma Kyriou sōthēsetai.
10.14: pōs oun epikalesōntai eis hon ouk episteusan? pōs de pisteusōsin hou ouk ēkousan? pōs de akousōsin chōris kēryssontos?
10.15: pōs de kēryxōsin ean mē apostalōsin? kathaper gegraptai Hōs hōraioi hoi podes tōn euangelizomenōn agatha.
10.16: All’ ou pantes hypēkousan tō euangeliō. Hēsaias gar legei Kyrie, tis episteusen tē akoē hēmōn?
10.17: ara hē pistis ex akoēs, hē de akoē dia rhēmatos Christou.
10.18: alla legō, mē ouk ēkousan? menounge Eis pasan tēn gēn exēlthen ho phthongos autōn, kai eis ta perata tēs oikoumenēs ta rhēmata autōn.
10.19: alla legō, mē Israēl ouk egnō? prōtos Mōusēs legei Egō parazēlōsō hymas ep’ ouk ethnei, ep’ ethnei asynetō parorgiō hymas.
10.20: Hēsaias de apotolma kai legei Heurethēn tois eme mē zētousin, emphanēs egenomēn tois eme mē eperōtōsin.
10.21: pros de ton Israēl legei Holēn tēn hēmeran exepetasa tas cheiras mou pros laon apeithounta kai antilegonta.

11.1: Legō oun, mē apōsato ho Theos ton laon autou? mē genoito; kai gar egō Israēleitēs eimi, ek spermatos Abraam, phylēs Beniamein.
11.2: ouk apōsato ho Theos ton laon autou hon proegnō. ē ouk oidate en Hēleia ti legei hē graphē, hōs entynchanei tō Theō kata tou Israēl?
11.3: Kyrie, tous prophētas sou apekteinan, ta thysiastēria sou kateskapsan, kagō hypeleiphthēn monos kai zētousin tēn psychēn mou.
11.4: alla ti legei autō ho chrēmatismos? Katelipon emautō heptakischilious andras, hoitines ouk ekampsan gony tē Baal.
11.5: houtōs oun kai en tō nyn kairō limma kat’ eklogēn charitos gegonen;
11.6: ei de chariti, ouketi ex ergōn, epei hē charis ouketi ginetai charis.
11.7: Ti oun? ho epizētei Israēl, touto ouk epetychen, hē de eklogē epetychen; hoi de loipoi epōrōthēsan,
11.8: kathaper gegraptai Edōken autois ho Theos pneuma katanyxeōs, ophthalmous tou mē blepein kai ōta tou mē akouein, heōs tēs sēmeron hēmeras.
11.9: kai Daueid legei Genēthētō hē trapeza autōn eis pagida kai eis thēran kai eis skandalon kai eis antapodoma autois,
11.10: skotisthētōsan hoi ophthalmoi autōn tou mē blepein, kai ton nōton autōn dia pantos synkampson.
11.11: Legō oun, mē eptaisan hina pesōsin? mē genoito; alla tō autōn paraptōmati hē sōtēria tois ethnesin, eis to parazēlōsai autous.
11.12: ei de to paraptōma autōn ploutos kosmou kai to hēttēma autōn ploutos ethnōn, posō mallon to plērōma autōn.
11.13: Hymin de legō tois ethnesin. eph’ hoson men oun eimi egō ethnōn apostolos, tēn diakonian mou doxazō,
11.14: ei pōs parazēlōsō mou tēn sarka kai sōsō tinas ex autōn.
11.15: ei gar hē apobolē autōn katallagē kosmou, tis hē proslēmpsis ei mē zōē ek nekrōn?
11.16: ei de hē aparchē hagia, kai to phyrama; kai ei hē rhiza hagia, kai hoi kladoi.
11.17: Ei de tines tōn kladōn exeklasthēsan, sy de agrielaios ōn enekentristhēs en autois kai synkoinōnos tēs rhizēs tēs piotētos tēs elaias egenou,
11.18: mē katakauchō tōn kladōn; ei de katakauchasai, ou sy tēn rhizan bastazeis alla hē rhiza se.
11.19: ereis oun Exeklasthēsan kladoi hina egō enkentristhō.
11.20: kalōs; tē apistia exeklasthēsan, sy de tē pistei hestēkas. mē hypsēla phronei, alla phobou;
11.21: ei gar ho Theos tōn kata physin kladōn ouk epheisato, oude sou pheisetai.
11.22: ide oun chrēstotēta kai apotomian Theou; epi men tous pesontas apotomia, epi de se chrēstotēs Theou, ean epimenēs tē chrēstotēti, epei kai sy ekkopēsē.
11.23: kakeinoi de, ean mē epimenōsin tē apistia, enkentristhēsontai; dynatos gar estin ho Theos palin enkentrisai autous.
11.24: ei gar sy ek tēs kata physin exekopēs agrielaiou kai para physin enekentristhēs eis kallielaion, posō mallon houtoi hoi kata physin enkentristhēsontai tē idia elaia.
11.25: Ou gar thelō hymas agnoein, adelphoi, to mystērion touto, hina mē ēte en heautois phronimoi, hoti pōrōsis apo merous tō Israēl gegonen achri hou to plērōma tōn ethnōn eiselthē,
11.26: kai houtōs pas Israēl sōthēsetai, kathōs gegraptai Hēxei ek Siōn ho Rhyomenos, apostrepsei asebeias apo Iakōb.
11.27: kai hautē autois hē par’ emou diathēkē, hotan aphelōmai tas hamartias autōn.
11.28: kata men to euangelion echthroi di’ hymas, kata de tēn eklogēn agapētoi dia tous pateras;
11.29: ametamelēta gar ta charismata kai hē klēsis tou Theou.
11.30: hōsper gar hymeis pote ēpeithēsate tō Theō, nyn de ēleēthēte tē toutōn apeitheia,
11.31: houtōs kai houtoi nyn ēpeithēsan tō hymeterō eleei hina kai autoi nyn eleēthōsin.
11.32: synekleisen gar ho Theos tous pantas eis apeitheian hina tous pantas eleēsē.
11.33: Ō bathos ploutou kai sophias kai gnōseōs Theou; hōs anexeraunēta ta krimata autou kai anexichniastoi hai hodoi autou.
11.34: Tis gar egnō noun Kyriou? ē tis symboulos autou egeneto?
11.35: ē tis proedōken autō, kai antapodothēsetai autō?
11.36: hoti ex autou kai di’ autou kai eis auton ta panta; autō hē doxa eis tous aiōnas; amēn.

12.1: Parakalō oun hymas, adelphoi, dia tōn oiktirmōn tou Theou parastēsai ta sōmata hymōn thysian zōsan hagian tō Theō euareston, tēn logikēn latreian hymōn;
12.2: kai mē synschēmatizesthe tō aiōni toutō, alla metamorphousthe tē anakainōsei tou noos, eis to dokimazein hymas ti to thelēma tou Theou, to agathon kai euareston kai teleion.
12.3: Legō gar dia tēs charitos tēs dotheisēs moi panti tō onti en hymin, mē hyperphronein par’ ho dei phronein, alla phronein eis to sōphronein, hekastō hōs ho Theos emerisen metron pisteōs.
12.4: kathaper gar en heni sōmati polla melē echomen, ta de melē panta ou tēn autēn echei praxin,
12.5: houtōs hoi polloi hen sōma esmen en Christō, to de kath’ heis allēlōn melē.
12.6: echontes de charismata kata tēn charin tēn dotheisan hēmin diaphora, eite prophēteian, kata tēn analogian tēs pisteōs;
12.7: eite diakonian, en tē diakonia; eite ho didaskōn, en tē didaskalia;
12.8: eite ho parakalōn, en tē paraklēsei; ho metadidous en haplotēti, ho proistamenos en spoudē, ho eleōn en hilarotēti.
12.9: hē agapē anypokritos. apostygountes to ponēron, kollōmenoi tō agathō;
12.10: tē philadelphia eis allēlous philostorgoi, tē timē allēlous proēgoumenoi,
12.11: tē spoudē mē oknēroi, tō pneumati zeontes, tō Kyriō douleuontes,
12.12: tē elpidi chairontes, tē thlipsei hypomenontes, tē proseuchē proskarterountes,
12.13: tais chreiais tōn hagiōn koinōnountes, tēn philoxenian diōkontes.
12.14: eulogeite tous diōkontas, eulogeite kai mē katarasthe.
12.15: chairein meta chairontōn, klaiein meta klaiontōn.
12.16: to auto eis allēlous phronountes; mē ta hypsēla phronountes alla tois tapeinois synapagomenoi. mē ginesthe phronimoi par’ heautois.
12.17: mēdeni kakon anti kakou apodidontes; pronooumenoi kala enōpion pantōn anthrōpōn;
12.18: ei dynaton, to ex hymōn meta pantōn anthrōpōn eirēneuontes;
12.19: mē heautous ekdikountes, agapētoi, alla dote topon tē orgē; gegraptai gar Emoi ekdikēsis, egō antapodōsō, legei Kyrios.
12.20: alla ean peina ho echthros sou, psōmize auton; ean dipsa, potize auton; touto gar poiōn anthrakas pyros sōreuseis epi tēn kephalēn autou.
12.21: mē nikō hypo tou kakou, alla nika en tō agathō to kakon.

13.1: Pasa psychē exousiais hyperechousais hypotassesthō. ou gar estin exousia ei mē hypo Theou, hai de ousai hypo Theou tetagmenai eisin.
13.2: hōste ho antitassomenos tē exousia tē tou Theou diatagē anthestēken; hoi de anthestēkotes heautois krima lēmpsontai.
13.3: hoi gar archontes ouk eisin phobos tō agathō ergō alla tō kakō. theleis de mē phobeisthai tēn exousian? to agathon poiei, kai hexeis epainon ex autēs;
13.4: Theou gar diakonos estin soi eis to agathon. ean de to kakon poiēs, phobou; ou gar eikē tēn machairan phorei; Theou gar diakonos estin, ekdikos eis orgēn tō to kakon prassonti.
13.5: dio anankē hypotassesthai, ou monon dia tēn orgēn alla kai dia tēn syneidēsin.
13.6: dia touto gar kai phorous teleite; leitourgoi gar Theou eisin eis auto touto proskarterountes.
13.7: apodote pasin tas opheilas, tō ton phoron ton phoron, tō to telos to telos, tō ton phobon ton phobon, tō tēn timēn tēn timēn.
13.8: Mēdeni mēden opheilete, ei mē to allēlous agapan; ho gar agapōn ton heteron nomon peplērōken.
13.9: to gar Ou moicheuseis, Ou phoneuseis, Ou klepseis, Ouk epithymēseis, kai ei tis hetera entolē, en tō logō toutō anakephalaioutai, en tō Agapēseis ton plēsion sou hōs seauton.
13.10: hē agapē tō plēsion kakon ouk ergazetai; plērōma oun nomou hē agapē.
13.11: Kai touto eidotes ton kairon, hoti hōra ēdē hymas ex hypnou egerthēnai; nyn gar engyteron hēmōn hē sōtēria ē hote episteusamen.
13.12: hē nyx proekopsen, hē de hēmera ēngiken. apothōmetha oun ta erga tou skotous, endysōmetha de ta hopla tou phōtos.
13.13: hōs en hēmera euschēmonōs peripatēsōmen, mē kōmois kai methais, mē koitais kai aselgeiais, mē eridi kai zēlō;
13.14: alla endysasthe ton Kyrion Iēsoun Christon, kai tēs sarkos pronoian mē poieisthe eis epithymias.

14.1: Ton de asthenounta tē pistei proslambanesthe, mē eis diakriseis dialogismōn.
14.2: hos men pisteuei phagein panta, ho de asthenōn lachana esthiei.
14.3: ho esthiōn ton mē esthionta mē exoutheneitō, ho de mē esthiōn ton esthionta mē krinetō, ho Theos gar auton proselabeto.
14.4: sy tis ei ho krinōn allotrion oiketēn? tō idiō kyriō stēkei ē piptei; stathēsetai de, dynatei gar ho Kyrios stēsai auton.
14.5: hos men gar krinei hēmeran par’ hēmeran, hos de krinei pasan hēmeran; hekastos en tō idiō noi plērophoreisthō.
14.6: ho phronōn tēn hēmeran Kyriō phronei; kai ho esthiōn Kyriō esthiei, eucharistei gar tō Theō; kai ho mē esthiōn Kyriō ouk esthiei, kai eucharistei tō Theō.
14.7: Oudeis gar hēmōn heautō zē, kai oudeis heautō apothnēskei;
14.8: ean te gar zōmen, tō Kyriō zōmen, ean te apothnēskōmen, tō Kyriō apothnēskomen. ean te oun zōmen ean te apothnēskōmen, tou Kyriou esmen.
14.9: eis touto gar Christos apethanen kai ezēsen, hina kai nekrōn kai zōntōn kyrieusē.
14.10: Sy de ti krineis ton adelphon sou? ē kai sy ti exoutheneis ton adelphon sou? pantes gar parastēsometha tō bēmati tou Theou.
14.11: gegraptai gar Zō egō, legei Kyrios, hoti emoi kampsei pan gony, kai pasa glōssa exomologēsetai tō Theō.
14.12: ara oun hekastos hēmōn peri heautou logon dōsei tō Theō.
14.13: Mēketi oun allēlous krinōmen; alla touto krinate mallon, to mē tithenai proskomma tō adelphō ē skandalon.
14.14: oida kai pepeismai en Kyriō Iēsou hoti ouden koinon di’ heautou; ei mē tō logizomenō ti koinon einai, ekeinō koinon.
14.15: ei gar dia brōma ho adelphos sou lypeitai, ouketi kata agapēn peripateis. mē tō brōmati sou ekeinon apollye, hyper hou Christos apethanen.
14.16: mē blasphēmeisthō oun hymōn to agathon.
14.17: ou gar estin hē basileia tou Theou brōsis kai posis, alla dikaiosynē kai eirēnē kai chara en Pneumati Hagiō;
14.18: ho gar en toutō douleuōn tō Christō euarestos tō Theō kai dokimos tois anthrōpois.
14.19: ara oun ta tēs eirēnēs diōkomen kai ta tēs oikodomēs tēs eis allēlous.
14.20: mē heneken brōmatos katalye to ergon tou Theou. panta men kathara, alla kakon tō anthrōpō tō dia proskommatos esthionti.
14.21: kalon to mē phagein krea mēde piein oinon mēde en hō ho adelphos sou proskoptei.
14.22: sy pistin hēn echeis kata seauton eche enōpion tou Theou. makarios ho mē krinōn heauton en hō dokimazei;
14.23: ho de diakrinomenos ean phagē katakekritai, hoti ouk ek pisteōs; pan de ho ouk ek pisteōs hamartia estin.

15.1: Opheilomen de hēmeis hoi dynatoi ta asthenēmata tōn adynatōn bastazein, kai mē heautois areskein.
15.2: hekastos hēmōn tō plēsion aresketō eis to agathon pros oikodomēn;
15.3: kai gar ho Christos ouch heautō ēresen; alla kathōs gegraptai Hoi oneidismoi tōn oneidizontōn se epepesan ep’ eme.
15.4: hosa gar proegraphē, eis tēn hēmeteran didaskalian egraphē, hina dia tēs hypomonēs kai dia tēs paraklēseōs tōn graphōn tēn elpida echōmen.
15.5: ho de Theos tēs hypomonēs kai tēs paraklēseōs dōē hymin to auto phronein en allēlois kata Christon Iēsoun,
15.6: hina homothymadon en heni stomati doxazēte ton Theon kai Patera tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou.
15.7: Dio proslambanesthe allēlous, kathōs kai ho Christos proselabeto hēmas, eis doxan tou Theou.
15.8: legō gar Christon diakonon gegenēsthai peritomēs hyper alētheias Theou, eis to bebaiōsai tas epangelias tōn paterōn,
15.9: ta de ethnē hyper eleous doxasai ton Theon, kathōs gegraptai Dia touto exomologēsomai soi en ethnesin kai tō onomati sou psalō.
15.10: kai palin legei Euphranthēte, ethnē, meta tou laou autou.
15.11: kai palin Aineite, panta ta ethnē, ton Kyrion, kai epainesatōsan auton pantes hoi laoi.
15.12: kai palin Hēsaias legei Estai hē rhiza tou Iessai, kai ho anistamenos archein ethnōn; ep’ autō ethnē elpiousin.
15.13: HO de Theos tēs elpidos plērōsai hymas pasēs charas kai eirēnēs en tō pisteuein, eis to perisseuein hymas en tē elpidi en dynamei Pneumatos Hagiou.
15.14: Pepeismai de, adelphoi mou, kai autos egō peri hymōn, hoti kai autoi mestoi este agathōsynēs, peplērōmenoi pasēs tēs gnōseōs, dynamenoi kai allēlous nouthetein.
15.15: tolmēroterōs de egrapsa hymin apo merous, hōs epanamimnēskōn hymas, dia tēn charin tēn dotheisan moi apo tou Theou
15.16: eis to einai me leitourgon Christou Iēsou eis ta ethnē, hierourgounta to euangelion tou Theou, hina genētai hē prosphora tōn ethnōn euprosdektos, hēgiasmenē en Pneumati Hagiō.
15.17: echō oun tēn kauchēsin en Christō Iēsou ta pros ton Theon;
15.18: ou gar tolmēsō ti lalein hōn ou kateirgasato Christos di’ emou eis hypakoēn ethnōn, logō kai ergō,
15.19: en dynamei sēmeiōn kai teratōn, en dynamei Pneumatos Hagiou; hōste me apo Ierousalēm kai kyklō mechri tou Illyrikou peplērōkenai to euangelion tou Christou.
15.20: houtōs de philotimoumenon euangelizesthai ouch hopou ōnomasthē Christos, hina mē ep’ allotrion themelion oikodomō,
15.21: alla kathōs gegraptai Opsontai hois ouk anēngelē peri autou, kai hoi ouk akēkoasin synēsousin.
15.22: Dio kai enekoptomēn ta polla tou elthein pros hymas;
15.23: nyni de mēketi topon echōn en tois klimasi toutois, epipothian de echōn tou elthein pros hymas apo hikanōn etōn,
15.24: hōs an poreuōmai eis tēn Spanian; elpizō gar diaporeuomenos theasasthai hymas kai hyph’ hymōn propemphthēnai ekei, ean hymōn prōton apo merous emplēsthō.
15.25: — nyni de poreuomai eis Hierousalēm diakonōn tois hagiois.
15.26: ēudokēsan gar Makedonia kai Achaia koinōnian tina poiēsasthai eis tous ptōchous tōn hagiōn tōn en Hierousalēm.
15.27: ēudokēsan gar, kai opheiletai eisin autōn; ei gar tois pneumatikois autōn ekoinōnēsan ta ethnē, opheilousin kai en tois sarkikois leitourgēsai autois.
15.28: touto oun epitelesas, kai sphragisamenos autois ton karpon touton, apeleusomai di’ hymōn eis Spanian;
15.29: oida de hoti erchomenos pros hymas en plērōmati eulogias Christou eleusomai.
15.30: Parakalō de hymas, adelphoi, dia tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou kai dia tēs agapēs tou Pneumatos synagōnisasthai moi en tais proseuchais hyper emou pros ton Theon,
15.31: hina rhysthō apo tōn apeithountōn en tē Ioudaia kai hē diakonia mou hē eis Hierousalēm euprosdektos tois hagiois genētai,
15.32: hina en chara elthōn pros hymas dia thelēmatos Theou synanapausōmai hymin.
15.33: ho de Theos tēs eirēnēs meta pantōn hymōn; amēn.

16.1: Synistēmi de hymin Phoibēn tēn adelphēn hēmōn, ousan diakonon tēs ekklēsias tēs en Kenchreais,
16.2: hina autēn prosdexēsthe en Kyriō axiōs tōn hagiōn, kai parastēte autē en hō an hymōn chrēzē pragmati; kai gar autē prostatis pollōn egenēthē kai emou autou.
16.3: Aspasasthe Priskan kai Akylan tous synergous mou en Christō Iēsou,
16.4: hoitines hyper tēs psychēs mou ton heautōn trachēlon hypethēkan, hois ouk egō monos eucharistō alla kai pasai hai ekklēsiai tōn ethnōn,
16.5: kai tēn kat’ oikon autōn ekklēsian. aspasasthe Epaineton ton agapēton mou, hos estin aparchē tēs Asias eis Christon.
16.6: aspasasthe Marian, hētis polla ekopiasen eis hymas.
16.7: aspasasthe Andronikon kai Iounian tous syngeneis mou kai synaichmalōtous mou, hoitines eisin episēmoi en tois apostolois, hoi kai pro emou gegonan en Christō.
16.8: aspasasthe Ampliaton ton agapēton mou en Kyriō.
16.9: aspasasthe Ourbanon ton synergon hēmōn en Christō kai Stachyn ton agapēton mou.
16.10: aspasasthe Apellēn ton dokimon en Christō. aspasasthe tous ek tōn Aristoboulou.
16.11: aspasasthe Hērōdiōna ton syngenē mou. aspasasthe tous ek tōn Narkissou tous ontas en Kyriō.
16.12: aspasasthe Tryphainan kai Tryphōsan tas kopiōsas en Kyriō. aspasasthe Persida tēn agapētēn, hētis polla ekopiasen en Kyriō.
16.13: aspasasthe Rhouphon ton eklekton en Kyriō kai tēn mētera autou kai emou.
16.14: aspasasthe Asynkriton, Phlegonta, Hermēn, Patroban, Herman, kai tous syn autois adelphous.
16.15: aspasasthe Philologon kai Ioulian, Nērea kai tēn adelphēn autou, kai Olympan, kai tous syn autois pantas hagious.
16.16: aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati hagiō. aspazontai hymas hai ekklēsiai pasai tou Christou.
16.17: Parakalō de hymas, adelphoi, skopein tous tas dichostasias kai ta skandala para tēn didachēn hēn hymeis emathete poiountas, kai ekklinete ap’ autōn;
16.18: hoi gar toioutoi tō Kyriō hēmōn Christō ou douleuousin alla tē heautōn koilia, kai dia tēs chrēstologias kai eulogias exapatōsin tas kardias tōn akakōn.
16.19: hē gar hymōn hypakoē eis pantas aphiketo; eph’ hymin oun chairō, thelō de hymas sophous einai eis to agathon, akeraious de eis to kakon.
16.20: ho de Theos tēs eirēnēs syntripsei ton Satanan hypo tous podas hymōn en tachei. HĒ charis tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou meth’ hymōn.
16.21: Aspazetai hymas Timotheos ho synergos mou, kai Loukios kai Iasōn kai Sōsipatros hoi syngeneis mou.
16.22: aspazomai hymas egō Tertios ho grapsas tēn epistolēn en Kyriō.
16.23: aspazetai hymas Gaios ho xenos mou kai holēs tēs ekklēsias. aspazetai hymas Erastos ho oikonomos tēs poleōs kai Kouartos ho adelphos.
16.25: Tō de dynamenō hymas stērixai kata to euangelion mou kai to kērygma Iēsou Christou, kata apokalypsin mystēriou chronois aiōniois sesigēmenou,
16.26: phanerōthentos de nyn dia te graphōn prophētikōn kat’ epitagēn tou aiōniou Theou eis hypakoēn pisteōs eis panta ta ethnē gnōristhentos,
16.27: monō sophō Theō, dia Iēsou Christou, hō hē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.

1.1: Paulos klētos apostolos Christou Iēsou dia thelēmatos Theou kai Sōsthenēs ho adelphos
1.2: tē ekklēsia tou Theou tē ousē en Korinthō, hēgiasmenois en Christō Iēsou, klētois hagiois, syn pasin tois epikaloumenois to onoma tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou en panti topō, autōn kai hēmōn;
1.3: charis hymin kai eirēnē apo Theou Patros hēmōn kai Kyriou Iēsou Christou.
1.4: Eucharistō tō Theō pantote peri hymōn epi tē chariti tou Theou tē dotheisē hymin en Christō Iēsou,
1.5: hoti en panti eploutisthēte en autō, en panti logō kai pasē gnōsei,
1.6: kathōs to martyrion tou Christou ebebaiōthē en hymin,
1.7: hōste hymas mē hystereisthai en mēdeni charismati, apekdechomenous tēn apokalypsin tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou;
1.8: hos kai bebaiōsei hymas heōs telous anenklētous en tē hēmera tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou.
1.9: pistos ho Theos, di’ hou eklēthēte eis koinōnian tou Huiou autou Iēsou Christou tou Kyriou hēmōn.
1.10: Parakalō de hymas, adelphoi, dia tou onomatos tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou, hina to auto legēte pantes, kai mē ē en hymin schismata, ēte de katērtismenoi en tō autō noi kai en tē autē gnōmē.
1.11: edēlōthē gar moi peri hymōn, adelphoi mou, hypo tōn Chloēs, hoti erides en hymin eisin.
1.12: legō de touto, hoti hekastos hymōn legei Egō men eimi Paulou, Egō de Apollō, Egō de Kēpha, Egō de Christou.
1.13: memeristai ho Christos? mē Paulos estaurōthē hyper hymōn, ē eis to onoma Paulou ebaptisthēte?
1.14: eucharistō hoti oudena hymōn ebaptisa ei mē Krispon kai Gaion;
1.15: hina mē tis eipē hoti eis to emon onoma ebaptisthēte.
1.16: ebaptisa de kai ton Stephana oikon; loipon ouk oida ei tina allon ebaptisa.
1.17: ou gar apesteilen me Christos baptizein alla euangelizesthai, ouk en sophia logou, hina mē kenōthē ho stauros tou Christou.
1.18: HO logos gar ho tou staurou tois men apollymenois mōria estin, tois de sōzomenois hēmin dynamis Theou estin.
1.19: gegraptai gar Apolō tēn sophian tōn sophōn, kai tēn synesin tōn synetōn athetēsō.
1.20: pou sophos? pou grammateus? pou synzētētēs tou aiōnos toutou? ouchi emōranen ho Theos tēn sophian tou kosmou?
1.21: epeidē gar en tē sophia tou Theou ouk egnō ho kosmos dia tēs sophias ton Theon, eudokēsen ho Theos dia tēs mōrias tou kērygmatos sōsai tous pisteuontas.
1.22: epeidē kai Ioudaioi sēmeia aitousin kai Hellēnes sophian zētousin,
1.23: hēmeis de kēryssomen Christon estaurōmenon, Ioudaiois men skandalon, ethnesin de mōrian,
1.24: autois de tois klētois, Ioudaiois te kai Hellēsin, Christon Theou dynamin kai Theou sophian.
1.25: hoti to mōron tou Theou sophōteron tōn anthrōpōn estin, kai to asthenes tou Theou ischyroteron tōn anthrōpōn.
1.26: Blepete gar tēn klēsin hymōn, adelphoi, hoti ou polloi sophoi kata sarka, ou polloi dynatoi, ou polloi eugeneis;
1.27: alla ta mōra tou kosmou exelexato ho Theos hina kataischynē tous sophous, kai ta asthenē tou kosmou exelexato ho Theos hina kataischynē ta ischyra,
1.28: kai ta agenē tou kosmou kai ta exouthenēmena exelexato ho Theos, ta mē onta, hina ta onta katargēsē,
1.29: hopōs mē kauchēsētai pasa sarx enōpion tou Theou.
1.30: ex autou de hymeis este en Christō Iēsou, hos egenēthē sophia hēmin apo Theou, dikaiosynē te kai hagiasmos kai apolytrōsis,
1.31: hina kathōs gegraptai HO kauchōmenos en Kyriō kauchasthō.

2.1: Kagō elthōn pros hymas, adelphoi, ēlthon ou kath’ hyperochēn logou ē sophias katangellōn hymin to martyrion tou Theou.
2.2: ou gar ekrina ti eidenai en hymin ei mē Iēsoun Christon kai touton estaurōmenon.
2.3: kagō en astheneia kai en phobō kai en tromō pollō egenomēn pros hymas,
2.4: kai ho logos mou kai to kērygma mou ouk en peithois sophias logois, all’ en apodeixei Pneumatos kai dynameōs,
2.5: hina hē pistis hymōn mē ē en sophia anthrōpōn all’ en dynamei Theou.
2.6: Sophian de laloumen en tois teleiois, sophian de ou tou aiōnos toutou oude tōn archontōn tou aiōnos toutou tōn katargoumenōn;
2.7: alla laloumen Theou sophian en mystēriō, tēn apokekrymmenēn, hēn proōrisen ho Theos pro tōn aiōnōn eis doxan hēmōn;
2.8: hēn oudeis tōn archontōn tou aiōnos toutou egnōken; ei gar egnōsan, ouk an ton Kyrion tēs doxēs estaurōsan;
2.9: alla kathōs gegraptai HA ophthalmos ouk eiden kai ous ouk ēkousen kai epi kardian anthrōpou ouk anebē, hosa hētoimasen ho Theos tois agapōsin auton.
2.10: hēmin gar apekalypsen ho Theos dia tou Pneumatos; to gar Pneuma panta erauna, kai ta bathē tou Theou.
2.11: tis gar oiden anthrōpōn ta tou anthrōpou ei mē to pneuma tou anthrōpou to en autō? houtōs kai ta tou Theou oudeis egnōken ei mē to Pneuma tou Theou.
2.12: hēmeis de ou to pneuma tou kosmou elabomen alla to pneuma to ek tou Theou, hina eidōmen ta hypo tou Theou charisthenta hēmin;
2.13: ha kai laloumen ouk en didaktois anthrōpinēs sophias logois, all’ en didaktois Pneumatos, pneumatikois pneumatika synkrinontes.
2.14: psychikos de anthrōpos ou dechetai ta tou Pneumatos tou Theou; mōria gar autō estin, kai ou dynatai gnōnai, hoti pneumatikōs anakrinetai.
2.15: ho de pneumatikos anakrinei men panta, autos de hyp’ oudenos anakrinetai.
2.16: tis gar egnō noun Kyriou, hos symbibasei auton? hēmeis de noun Christou echomen.

3.1: Kagō, adelphoi, ouk ēdynēthēn lalēsai hymin hōs pneumatikois all’ hōs sarkinois, hōs nēpiois en Christō.
3.2: gala hymas epotisa, ou brōma; oupō gar edynasthe. All’ oude eti nyn dynasthe,
3.3: eti gar sarkikoi este. hopou gar en hymin zēlos kai eris, ouchi sarkikoi este kai kata anthrōpon peripateite?
3.4: hotan gar legē tis Egō men eimi Paulou, heteros de Egō Apollō, ouk anthrōpoi este?
3.5: ti oun estin Apollōs? ti de estin Paulos? diakonoi di’ hōn episteusate, kai hekastō hōs ho Kyrios edōken.
3.6: egō ephyteusa, Apollōs epotisen, alla ho Theos ēuxanen;
3.7: hōste oute ho phyteuōn estin ti oute ho potizōn, all’ ho auxanōn Theos.
3.8: ho phyteuōn de kai ho potizōn hen eisin, hekastos de ton idion misthon lēmpsetai kata ton idion kopon.
3.9: Theou gar esmen synergoi; Theou geōrgion, Theou oikodomē este.
3.10: Kata tēn charin tou Theou tēn dotheisan moi hōs sophos architektōn themelion ethēka, allos de epoikodomei. hekastos de blepetō pōs epoikodomei.
3.11: themelion gar allon oudeis dynatai theinai para ton keimenon, hos estin Iēsous Christos.
3.12: ei de tis epoikodomei epi ton themelion chrysion, argyrion, lithous timious, xyla, chorton, kalamēn,
3.13: hekastou to ergon phaneron genēsetai; hē gar hēmera dēlōsei, hoti en pyri apokalyptetai, kai hekastou to ergon hopoion estin to pyr auto dokimasei.
3.14: ei tinos to ergon menei ho epoikodomēsen, misthon lēmpsetai;
3.15: ei tinos to ergon katakaēsetai, zēmiōthēsetai, autos de sōthēsetai, houtōs de hōs dia pyros.
3.16: Ouk oidate hoti naos Theou este kai to Pneuma tou Theou en hymin oikei?
3.17: ei tis ton naon tou Theou phtheirei, phtherei touton ho Theos; ho gar naos tou Theou hagios estin, hoitines este hymeis.
3.18: Mēdeis heauton exapatatō; ei tis dokei sophos einai en hymin en tō aiōni toutō, mōros genesthō, hina genētai sophos,
3.19: hē gar sophia tou kosmou toutou mōria para tō Theō estin. gegraptai gar HO drassomenos tous sophous en tē panourgia autōn;
3.20: kai palin Kyrios ginōskei tous dialogismous tōn sophōn, hoti eisin mataioi.
3.21: hōste mēdeis kauchasthō en anthrōpois; panta gar hymōn estin,
3.22: eite Paulos eite Apollōs eite Kēphas, eite kosmos eite zōē eite thanatos, eite enestōta eite mellonta, panta hymōn,
3.23: hymeis de Christou, Christos de Theou.

4.1: Houtōs hēmas logizesthō anthrōpos hōs hypēretas Christou kai oikonomous mystēriōn Theou.
4.2: hōde loipon zēteitai en tois oikonomois hina pistos tis heurethē.
4.3: emoi de eis elachiston estin hina hyph’ hymōn anakrithō ē hypo anthrōpinēs hēmeras; all’ oude emauton anakrinō;
4.4: ouden gar emautō synoida, all’ ouk en toutō dedikaiōmai; ho de anakrinōn me Kyrios estin.
4.5: hōste mē pro kairou ti krinete, heōs an elthē ho Kyrios, hos kai phōtisei ta krypta tou skotous kai phanerōsei tas boulas tōn kardiōn; kai tote ho epainos genēsetai hekastō apo tou Theou.
4.6: Tauta de, adelphoi, meteschēmatisa eis emauton kai Apollōn di’ hymas, hina en hēmin mathēte to Mē hyper ha gegraptai, hina mē heis hyper tou henos physiousthe kata tou heterou.
4.7: tis gar se diakrinei? ti de echeis ho ouk elabes? ei de kai elabes, ti kauchasai hōs mē labōn?
4.8: ēdē kekoresmenoi este; ēdē eploutēsate; chōris hēmōn ebasileusate; kai ophelon ge ebasileusate, hina kai hēmeis hymin synbasileusōmen.
4.9: dokō gar, ho Theos hēmas tous apostolous eschatous apedeixen hōs epithanatious, hoti theatron egenēthēmen tō kosmō kai angelois kai anthrōpois.
4.10: hēmeis mōroi dia Christon, hymeis de phronimoi en Christō; hēmeis astheneis, hymeis de ischyroi; hymeis endoxoi, hēmeis de atimoi.
4.11: achri tēs arti hōras kai peinōmen kai dipsōmen kai gymniteuomen kai kolaphizometha kai astatoumen
4.12: kai kopiōmen ergazomenoi tais idiais chersin; loidoroumenoi eulogoumen, diōkomenoi anechometha,
4.13: dysphēmoumenoi parakaloumen; hōs perikatharmata tou kosmou egenēthēmen, pantōn peripsēma heōs arti.
4.14: Ouk entrepōn hymas graphō tauta, all’ hōs tekna mou agapēta nouthetōn.
4.15: ean gar myrious paidagōgous echēte en Christō, all’ ou pollous pateras; en gar Christō Iēsou dia tou euangeliou egō hymas egennēsa.
4.16: parakalō oun hymas, mimētai mou ginesthe.
4.17: Dia touto auto epempsa hymin Timotheon, hos estin mou teknon agapēton kai piston en Kyriō, hos hymas anamnēsei tas hodous mou tas en Christō Iēsou, kathōs pantachou en pasē ekklēsia didaskō.
4.18: hōs mē erchomenou de mou pros hymas ephysiōthēsan tines;
4.19: eleusomai de tacheōs pros hymas, ean ho Kyrios thelēsē, kai gnōsomai ou ton logon tōn pephysiōmenōn alla tēn dynamin;
4.20: ou gar en logō hē basileia tou Theou, all’ en dynamei.
4.21: ti thelete? en rhabdō elthō pros hymas, ē en agapē pneumati te prautētos?

5.1: Holōs akouetai en hymin porneia, kai toiautē porneia hētis oude en tois ethnesin, hōste gynaika tina tou patros echein.
5.2: kai hymeis pephysiōmenoi este, kai ouchi mallon epenthēsate, hina arthē ek mesou hymōn ho to ergon touto praxas?
5.3: egō men gar, apōn tō sōmati parōn de tō pneumati, ēdē kekrika hōs parōn ton houtōs touto katergasamenon
5.4: en tō onomati tou Kyriou Iēsou synachthentōn hymōn kai tou emou pneumatos syn tē dynamei tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou,
5.5: paradounai ton toiouton tō Satana eis olethron tēs sarkos, hina to pneuma sōthē en tē hēmera tou Kyriou.
5.6: Ou kalon to kauchēma hymōn. ouk oidate hoti mikra zymē holon to phyrama zymoi?
5.7: ekkatharate tēn palaian zymēn, hina ēte neon phyrama, kathōs este azymoi. kai gar to pascha hēmōn etythē Christos.
5.8: hōste heortazōmen, mē en zymē palaia mēde en zymē kakias kai ponērias, all’ en azymois eilikrinias kai alētheias.
5.9: Egrapsa hymin en tē epistolē mē synanamignysthai pornois,
5.10: ou pantōs tois pornois tou kosmou toutou ē tois pleonektais kai harpaxin ē eidōlolatrais, epei ōpheilete ara ek tou kosmou exelthein.
5.11: nyn de egrapsa hymin mē synanamignysthai ean tis adelphos onomazomenos ē pornos ē pleonektēs ē eidōlolatrēs ē loidoros ē methysos ē harpax, tō toioutō mēde synesthiein.
5.12: ti gar moi tous exō krinein? ouchi tous esō hymeis krinete?
5.13: tous de exō ho Theos krinei. exarate ton ponēron ex hymōn autōn.

6.1: Tolma tis hymōn pragma echōn pros ton heteron krinesthai epi tōn adikōn, kai ouchi epi tōn hagiōn?
6.2: ē ouk oidate hoti hoi hagioi ton kosmon krinousin? kai ei en hymin krinetai ho kosmos, anaxioi este kritēriōn elachistōn?
6.3: ouk oidate hoti angelous krinoumen, mētige biōtika?
6.4: biōtika men oun kritēria ean echēte, tous exouthenēmenous en tē ekklēsia, toutous kathizete?
6.5: pros entropēn hymin legō. houtōs ouk eni en hymin oudeis sophos, hos dynēsetai diakrinai ana meson tou adelphou autou?
6.6: alla adelphos meta adelphou krinetai, kai touto epi apistōn?
6.7: ēdē men oun holōs hēttēma hymin estin hoti krimata echete meth’ heautōn. dia ti ouchi mallon adikeisthe? dia ti ouchi mallon apostereisthe?
6.8: alla hymeis adikeite kai apostereite, kai touto adelphous.
6.9: ē ouk oidate hoti adikoi Theou basileian ou klēronomēsousin? mē planasthe; oute pornoi oute eidōlolatrai oute moichoi oute malakoi oute arsenokoitai
6.10: oute kleptai oute pleonektai, ou methysoi, ou loidoroi, ouch harpages basileian Theou klēronomēsousin.
6.11: kai tauta tines ēte; alla apelousasthe, alla hēgiasthēte, alla edikaiōthēte en tō onomati tou Kyriou Iēsou Christou kai en tō Pneumati tou Theou hēmōn.
6.12: Panta moi exestin, all’ ou panta sympherei. panta moi exestin, all’ ouk egō exousiasthēsomai hypo tinos.
6.13: ta brōmata tē koilia, kai hē koilia tois brōmasin; ho de Theos kai tautēn kai tauta katargēsei. to de sōma ou tē porneia alla tō Kyriō, kai ho Kyrios tō sōmati;
6.14: ho de Theos kai ton Kyrion ēgeiren kai hēmas exegerei dia tēs dynameōs autou.
6.15: ouk oidate hoti ta sōmata hymōn melē Christou estin? aras oun ta melē tou Christou poiēsō pornēs melē? mē genoito.
6.16: ē ouk oidate hoti ho kollōmenos tē pornē hen sōma estin? Esontai gar, phēsin, hoi dyo eis sarka mian.
6.17: ho de kollōmenos tō Kyriō hen pneuma estin.
6.18: pheugete tēn porneian. pan hamartēma ho ean poiēsē anthrōpos ektos tou sōmatos estin; ho de porneuōn eis to idion sōma hamartanei.
6.19: ē ouk oidate hoti to sōma hymōn naos tou en hymin Hagiou Pneumatos estin, hou echete apo Theou? kai ouk este heautōn?
6.20: ēgorasthēte gar timēs; doxasate dē ton Theon en tō sōmati hymōn.

7.1: Peri de hōn egrapsate, kalon anthrōpō gynaikos mē haptesthai;
7.2: dia de tas porneias hekastos tēn heautou gynaika echetō, kai hekastē ton idion andra echetō.
7.3: tē gynaiki ho anēr tēn opheilēn apodidotō, homoiōs de kai hē gynē tō andri.
7.4: hē gynē tou idiou sōmatos ouk exousiazei alla ho anēr; homoiōs de kai ho anēr tou idiou sōmatos ouk exousiazei alla hē gynē.
7.5: mē apostereite allēlous, ei mēti an ek symphōnou pros kairon hina scholasēte tē proseuchē kai palin epi to auto ēte, hina mē peirazē hymas ho Satanas dia tēn akrasian hymōn.
7.6: touto de legō kata syngnōmēn, ou kat’ epitagēn.
7.7: thelō de pantas anthrōpous einai hōs kai emauton; alla hekastos idion echei charisma ek Theou, ho men houtōs, ho de houtōs.
7.8: Legō de tois agamois kai tais chērais, kalon autois ean meinōsin hōs kagō;
7.9: ei de ouk enkrateuontai, gamēsatōsan; kreitton gar estin gamein ē pyrousthai.
7.10: tois de gegamēkosin parangellō, ouk egō alla ho Kyrios, gynaika apo andros mē chōristhēnai,—
7.11: ean de kai chōristhē, menetō agamos ē tō andri katallagētō,— kai andra gynaika mē aphienai.
7.12: tois de loipois legō egō, ouch ho Kyrios; ei tis adelphos gynaika echei apiston, kai hautē syneudokei oikein met’ autou, mē aphietō autēn;
7.13: kai gynē hētis echei andra apiston, kai houtos syneudokei oikein met’ autēs, mē aphietō ton andra.
7.14: hēgiastai gar ho anēr ho apistos en tē gynaiki, kai hēgiastai hē gynē hē apistos en tō adelphō; epei ara ta tekna hymōn akatharta estin, nyn de hagia estin.
7.15: ei de ho apistos chōrizetai, chōrizesthō; ou dedoulōtai ho adelphos ē hē adelphē en tois toioutois; en de eirēnē keklēken hymas ho Theos.
7.16: ti gar oidas, gynai, ei ton andra sōseis? ē ti oidas, aner, ei tēn gynaika sōseis?
7.17: Ei mē hekastō hōs memeriken ho Kyrios, hekaston hōs keklēken ho Theos, houtōs peripateitō. kai houtōs en tais ekklēsiais pasais diatassomai.
7.18: peritetmēmenos tis eklēthē? mē epispasthō; en akrobystia keklētai tis? mē peritemnesthō.
7.19: hē peritomē ouden estin, kai hē akrobystia ouden estin, alla tērēsis entolōn Theou.
7.20: hekastos en tē klēsei hē eklēthē, en tautē menetō.
7.21: doulos eklēthēs? mē soi meletō; all’ ei kai dynasai eleutheros genesthai, mallon chrēsai.
7.22: ho gar en Kyriō klētheis doulos apeleutheros Kyriou estin; homoiōs ho eleutheros klētheis doulos estin Christou.
7.23: timēs ēgorasthēte; mē ginesthe douloi anthrōpōn.
7.24: hekastos en hō eklēthē, adelphoi, en toutō menetō para Theō.
7.25: Peri de tōn parthenōn epitagēn Kyriou ouk echō, gnōmēn de didōmi hōs ēleēmenos hypo Kyriou pistos einai.
7.26: Nomizō oun touto kalon hyparchein dia tēn enestōsan anankēn, hoti kalon anthrōpō to houtōs einai.
7.27: dedesai gynaiki? mē zētei lysin; lelysai apo gynaikos? mē zētei gynaika.
7.28: ean de kai gamēsēs, ouch hēmartes, kai ean gēmē hē parthenos, ouch hēmarten; thlipsin de tē sarki hexousin hoi toioutoi, egō de hymōn pheidomai.
7.29: Touto de phēmi, adelphoi, ho kairos synestalmenos estin; to loipon hina kai hoi echontes gynaikas hōs mē echontes ōsin,
7.30: kai hoi klaiontes hōs mē klaiontes, kai hoi chairontes hōs mē chairontes, kai hoi agorazontes hōs mē katechontes,
7.31: kai hoi chrōmenoi ton kosmon hōs mē katachrōmenoi; paragei gar to schēma tou kosmou toutou.
7.32: thelō de hymas amerimnous einai. ho agamos merimna ta tou Kyriou, pōs aresē tō Kyriō;
7.33: ho de gamēsas merimna ta tou kosmou, pōs aresē tē gynaiki,
7.34: kai memeristai. kai hē gynē hē agamos kai hē parthenos merimna ta tou Kyriou, hina ē hagia kai tō sōmati kai tō pneumati; hē de gamēsasa merimna ta tou kosmou, pōs aresē tō andri.
7.35: touto de pros to hymōn autōn symphoron legō, ouch hina brochon hymin epibalō, alla pros to euschēmon kai euparedron tō Kyriō aperispastōs.
7.36: Ei de tis aschēmonein epi tēn parthenon autou nomizei, ean ē hyperakmos, kai houtōs opheilei ginesthai, ho thelei poieitō; ouch hamartanei; gameitōsan.
7.37: hos de hestēken en tē kardia autou hedraios mē echōn anankēn, exousian de echei peri tou idiou thelēmatos, kai touto kekriken en tē idia kardia, tērein tēn heautou parthenon, kalōs poiēsei.
7.38: hōste kai ho gamizōn tēn heautou parthenon kalōs poiei, kai ho mē gamizōn kreisson poiēsei.
7.39: Gynē dedetai eph’ hoson chronon zē ho anēr autēs; ean de koimēthē ho anēr, eleuthera estin hō thelei gamēthēnai, monon en Kyriō;
7.40: makariōtera de estin ean houtōs meinē, kata tēn emēn gnōmēn; dokō de kagō Pneuma Theou echein.

8.1: Peri de tōn eidōlothytōn, oidamen hoti pantes gnōsin echomen. hē gnōsis physioi, hē de agapē oikodomei;
8.2: ei tis dokei egnōkenai ti, oupō egnō kathōs dei gnōnai;
8.3: ei de tis agapa ton Theon, houtos egnōstai hyp’ autou.
8.4: Peri tēs brōseōs oun tōn eidōlothytōn oidamen hoti ouden eidōlon en kosmō, kai hoti oudeis Theos ei mē heis.
8.5: kai gar eiper eisin legomenoi theoi eite en ouranō eite epi gēs, hōsper eisin theoi polloi kai kyrioi polloi,
8.6: all’ hēmin heis Theos ho Patēr, ex hou ta panta kai hēmeis eis auton, kai heis Kyrios Iēsous Christos, di’ hou ta panta kai hēmeis di’ autou.
8.7: all’ ouk en pasin hē gnōsis; tines de tē synētheia heōs arti tou eidōlou hōs eidōlothyton esthiousin, kai hē syneidēsis autōn asthenēs ousa molynetai.
8.8: brōma de hēmas ou parastēsei tō Theō; oute ean mē phagōmen hysteroumetha, oute ean phagōmen perisseuomen.
8.9: blepete de mē pōs hē exousia hymōn hautē proskomma genētai tois asthenesin.
8.10: ean gar tis idē se ton echonta gnōsin en eidōliō katakeimenon, ouchi hē syneidēsis autou asthenous ontos oikodomēthēsetai eis to ta eidōlothyta esthiein?
8.11: apollytai gar ho asthenōn en tē sē gnōsei, ho adelphos di’ hon Christos apethanen.
8.12: houtōs de hamartanontes eis tous adelphous kai typtontes autōn tēn syneidēsin asthenousan eis Christon hamartanete.
8.13: dioper ei brōma skandalizei ton adelphon mou, ou mē phagō krea eis ton aiōna, hina mē ton adelphon mou skandalisō.

9.1: Ouk eimi eleutheros? ouk eimi apostolos? ouchi Iēsoun ton Kyrion hēmōn heoraka? ou to ergon mou hymeis este en Kyriō?
9.2: ei allois ouk eimi apostolos, alla ge hymin eimi; hē gar sphragis mou tēs apostolēs hymeis este en Kyriō.
9.3: HĒ emē apologia tois eme anakrinousin estin hautē.
9.4: mē ouk echomen exousian phagein kai pein?
9.5: mē ouk echomen exousian adelphēn gynaika periagein, hōs kai hoi loipoi apostoloi kai hoi adelphoi tou Kyriou kai Kēphas?
9.6: ē monos egō kai Barnabas ouk echomen exousian mē ergazesthai?
9.7: tis strateuetai idiois opsōniois pote? tis phyteuei ampelōna kai ton karpon autou ouk esthiei? ē tis poimainei poimnēn kai ek tou galaktos tēs poimnēs ouk esthiei?
9.8: mē kata anthrōpon tauta lalō, ē kai ho nomos tauta ou legei?
9.9: en gar tō Mōuseōs nomō gegraptai Ou kēmōseis boun aloōnta. mē tōn boōn melei tō Theō?
9.10: ē di’ hēmas pantōs legei? di’ hēmas gar egraphē, hoti opheilei ep’ elpidi ho arotriōn arotrian, kai ho aloōn ep’ elpidi tou metechein.
9.11: Ei hēmeis hymin ta pneumatika espeiramen, mega ei hēmeis hymōn ta sarkika therisomen?
9.12: ei alloi tēs hymōn exousias metechousin, ou mallon hēmeis? all’ ouk echrēsametha tē exousia tautē, alla panta stegomen hina mē tina enkopēn dōmen tō euangeliō tou Christou.
9.13: ouk oidate hoti hoi ta hiera ergazomenoi ta ek tou hierou esthiousin, hoi tō thysiastēriō paredreuontes tō thysiastēriō synmerizontai?
9.14: houtōs kai ho Kyrios dietaxen tois to euangelion katangellousin ek tou euangeliou zēn;
9.15: egō de ou kechrēmai oudeni toutōn. ouk egrapsa de tauta hina houtōs genētai en emoi; kalon gar moi mallon apothanein ē —to kauchēma mou oudeis kenōsei.
9.16: ean gar euangelizōmai, ouk estin moi kauchēma; anankē gar moi epikeitai; ouai gar moi estin ean mē euangelisōmai.
9.17: ei gar hekōn touto prassō, misthon echō; ei de akōn, oikonomian pepisteumai.
9.18: tis oun mou estin ho misthos? hina euangelizomenos adapanon thēsō to euangelion, eis to mē katachrēsasthai tē exousia mou en tō euangeliō.
9.19: Eleutheros gar ōn ek pantōn pasin emauton edoulōsa, hina tous pleionas kerdēsō;
9.20: kai egenomēn tois Ioudaiois hōs Ioudaios, hina Ioudaious kerdēsō; tois hypo nomon hōs hypo nomon, mē ōn autos hypo nomon, hina tous hypo nomon kerdēsō;
9.21: tois anomois hōs anomos, mē ōn anomos Theou all’ ennomos Christou, hina kerdanō tous anomous;
9.22: egenomēn tois asthenesin asthenēs, hina tous astheneis kerdēsō; tois pasin gegona panta, hina pantōs tinas sōsō.
9.23: panta de poiō dia to euangelion, hina synkoinōnos autou genōmai.
9.24: Ouk oidate hoti hoi en stadiō trechontes pantes men trechousin, heis de lambanei to brabeion? houtōs trechete hina katalabēte.
9.25: pas de ho agōnizomenos panta enkrateuetai, ekeinoi men oun hina phtharton stephanon labōsin, hēmeis de aphtharton.
9.26: egō toinyn houtōs trechō hōs ouk adēlōs, houtōs pykteuō hōs ouk aera derōn;
9.27: alla hypōpiazō mou to sōma kai doulagōgō, mē pōs allois kēryxas autos adokimos genōmai.

10.1: Ou thelō gar hymas agnoein, adelphoi, hoti hoi pateres hēmōn pantes hypo tēn nephelēn ēsan kai pantes dia tēs thalassēs diēlthon,
10.2: kai pantes eis ton Mōusēn ebaptisanto en tē nephelē kai en tē thalassē,
10.3: kai pantes to auto pneumatikon brōma ephagon,
10.4: kai pantes to auto pneumatikon epion poma; epinon gar ek pneumatikēs akolouthousēs petras, hē petra de ēn ho Christos,
10.5: all’ ouk en tois pleiosin autōn eudokēsen ho Theos; katestrōthēsan gar en tē erēmō.
10.6: Tauta de typoi hēmōn egenēthēsan, eis to mē einai hēmas epithymētas kakōn, kathōs kakeinoi epethymēsan.
10.7: mēde eidōlolatrai ginesthe, kathōs tines autōn; hōsper gegraptai Ekathisen ho laos phagein kai pein, kai anestēsan paizein.
10.8: mēde porneuōmen, kathōs tines autōn eporneusan, kai epesan mia hēmera eikositreis chiliades.
10.9: mēde ekpeirazōmen ton Kyrion, kathōs tines autōn epeirasan kai hypo tōn opheōn apōllynto.
10.10: mēde gongyzete, kathaper tines autōn egongysan, kai apōlonto hypo tou olothreutou.
10.11: tauta de typikōs synebainen ekeinois, egraphē de pros nouthesian hēmōn, eis hous ta telē tōn aiōnōn katēntēken.
10.12: Hōste ho dokōn hestanai blepetō mē pesē,
10.13: peirasmos hymas ouk eilēphen ei mē anthrōpinos; pistos de ho Theos, hos ouk easei hymas peirasthēnai hyper ho dynasthe, alla poiēsei syn tō peirasmō kai tēn ekbasin tou dynasthai hypenenkein.
10.14: Dioper, agapētoi mou, pheugete apo tēs eidōlolatreias.
10.15: hōs phronimois legō; krinate hymeis ho phēmi.
10.16: To potērion tēs eulogias ho eulogoumen, ouchi koinōnia estin tou haimatos tou Christou? ton arton hon klōmen, ouchi koinōnia tou sōmatos tou Christou estin?
10.17: hoti heis artos, hen sōma hoi polloi esmen; hoi gar pantes ek tou henos artou metechomen.
10.18: blepete ton Israēl kata sarka; ouch hoi esthiontes tas thysias koinōnoi tou thysiastēriou eisin?
10.19: ti oun phēmi? hoti eidōlothyton ti estin, ē hoti eidōlon ti estin?
10.20: all’ hoti ha thyousin, daimoniois kai ou Theō thyousin; ou thelō de hymas koinōnous tōn daimoniōn ginesthai.
10.21: ou dynasthe potērion Kyriou pinein kai potērion daimoniōn; ou dynasthe trapezēs Kyriou metechein kai trapezēs daimoniōn.
10.22: ē parazēloumen ton Kyrion? mē ischyroteroi autou esmen?
10.23: Panta exestin, all’ ou panta sympherei. panta exestin, all’ ou panta oikodomei.
10.24: mēdeis to heautou zēteitō alla to tou heterou.
10.25: Pan to en makellō pōloumenon esthiete mēden anakrinontes dia tēn syneidēsin;
10.26: tou Kyriou gar hē gē kai to plērōma autēs.
10.27: ei tis kalei hymas tōn apistōn kai thelete poreuesthai, pan to paratithemenon hymin esthiete mēden anakrinontes dia tēn syneidēsin.
10.28: ean de tis hymin eipē Touto hierothyton estin, mē esthiete di’ ekeinon ton mēnysanta kai tēn syneidēsin;
10.29: syneidēsin de legō ouchi tēn heautou alla tēn tou heterou. hina ti gar hē eleutheria mou krinetai hypo allēs syneidēseōs?
10.30: ei egō chariti metechō, ti blasphēmoumai hyper hou egō eucharistō?
10.31: Eite oun esthiete eite pinete eite ti poieite, panta eis doxan Theou poieite.
10.32: aproskopoi kai Ioudaiois ginesthe kai Hellēsin kai tē ekklēsia tou Theou,
10.33: kathōs kagō panta pasin areskō, mē zētōn to emautou symphoron alla to tōn pollōn, hina sōthōsin.

11.1: mimētai mou ginesthe, kathōs kagō Christou.
11.2: Epainō de hymas hoti panta mou memnēsthe kai kathōs paredōka hymin tas paradoseis katechete.
11.3: Thelō de hymas eidenai hoti pantos andros hē kephalē ho Christos estin, kephalē de gynaikos ho anēr, kephalē de tou Christou ho Theos.
11.4: pas anēr proseuchomenos ē prophēteuōn kata kephalēs echōn kataischynei tēn kephalēn autou.
11.5: pasa de gynē proseuchomenē ē prophēteuousa akatakalyptō tē kephalē kataischynei tēn kephalēn autēs; hen gar estin kai to auto tē exyrēmenē.
11.6: ei gar ou katakalyptetai gynē, kai keirasthō; ei de aischron gynaiki to keirasthai ē xyrasthai, katakalyptesthō.
11.7: anēr men gar ouk opheilei katakalyptesthai tēn kephalēn, eikōn kai doxa Theou hyparchōn; hē gynē de doxa andros estin.
11.8: ou gar estin anēr ek gynaikos, alla gynē ex andros;
11.9: kai gar ouk ektisthē anēr dia tēn gynaika, alla gynē dia ton andra.
11.10: dia touto opheilei hē gynē exousian echein epi tēs kephalēs dia tous angelous.
11.11: plēn oute gynē chōris andros oute anēr chōris gynaikos en Kyriō;
11.12: hōsper gar hē gynē ek tou andros, houtōs kai ho anēr dia tēs gynaikos; ta de panta ek tou Theou.
11.13: en hymin autois krinate; prepon estin gynaika akatakalypton tō Theō proseuchesthai?
11.14: oude hē physis autē didaskei hymas hoti anēr men ean koma, atimia autō estin,
11.15: gynē de ean koma, doxa autē estin? hoti hē komē anti peribolaiou dedotai autē.
11.16: Ei de tis dokei philoneikos einai, hēmeis toiautēn synētheian ouk echomen, oude hai ekklēsiai tou Theou.
11.17: Touto de parangellōn ouk epainō hoti ouk eis to kreisson alla eis to hēsson synerchesthe.
11.18: prōton men gar synerchomenōn hymōn en ekklēsia akouō schismata en hymin hyparchein, kai meros ti pisteuō.
11.19: dei gar kai haireseis en hymin einai, hina kai hoi dokimoi phaneroi genōntai en hymin.
11.20: Synerchomenōn oun hymōn epi to auto ouk estin kyriakon deipnon phagein;
11.21: hekastos gar to idion deipnon prolambanei en tō phagein, kai hos men peina, hos de methyei.
11.22: mē gar oikias ouk echete eis to esthiein kai pinein? ē tēs ekklēsias tou Theou kataphroneite, kai kataischynete tous mē echontas? ti eipō hymin? epainesō hymas? en toutō ouk epainō.
11.23: egō gar parelabon apo tou Kyriou, ho kai paredōka hymin, hoti ho Kyrios Iēsous en tē nykti hē paredideto elaben arton
11.24: kai eucharistēsas eklasen kai eipen Touto mou estin to sōma to hyper hymōn; touto poieite eis tēn emēn anamnēsin.
11.25: hōsautōs kai to potērion meta to deipnēsai, legōn Touto to potērion hē kainē diathēkē estin en tō emō haimati; touto poieite, hosakis ean pinēte, eis tēn emēn anamnēsin.
11.26: hosakis gar ean esthiēte ton arton touton kai to potērion pinēte, ton thanaton tou Kyriou katangellete, achri hou elthē.
11.27: hōste hos an esthiē ton arton ē pinē to potērion tou Kyriou anaxiōs, enochos estai tou sōmatos kai tou haimatos tou Kyriou.
11.28: dokimazetō de anthrōpos heauton, kai houtōs ek tou artou esthietō kai ek tou potēriou pinetō;
11.29: ho gar esthiōn kai pinōn krima heautō esthiei kai pinei mē diakrinōn to sōma.
11.30: dia touto en hymin polloi astheneis kai arrōstoi kai koimōntai hikanoi.
11.31: ei de heautous diekrinomen, ouk an ekrinometha;
11.32: krinomenoi de hypo tou Kyriou paideuometha, hina mē syn tō kosmō katakrithōmen.
11.33: hōste, adelphoi mou, synerchomenoi eis to phagein allēlous ekdechesthe.
11.34: ei tis peina, en oikō esthietō, hina mē eis krima synerchēsthe. Ta de loipa hōs an elthō diataxomai.

12.1: Peri de tōn pneumatikōn, adelphoi, ou thelō hymas agnoein.
12.2: Oidate hoti hote ethnē ēte pros ta eidōla ta aphōna hōs an ēgesthe apagomenoi.
12.3: dio gnōrizō hymin hoti oudeis en Pneumati Theou lalōn legei ANATHEMA IĒSOUS, kai oudeis dynatai eipein KYRIOS IĒSOUS, ei mē en Pneumati Hagiō.
12.4: Diaireseis de charismatōn eisin, to de auto Pneuma;
12.5: kai diaireseis diakoniōn eisin, kai ho autos Kyrios;
12.6: kai diaireseis energēmatōn eisin, ho de autos Theos ho energōn ta panta en pasin.
12.7: hekastō de didotai hē phanerōsis tou Pneumatos pros to sympheron.
12.8: hō men gar dia tou Pneumatos didotai logos sophias, allō de logos gnōseōs kata to auto Pneuma,
12.9: heterō pistis en tō autō Pneumati, allō de charismata iamatōn en tō heni Pneumati,
12.10: allō de energēmata dynameōn, allō de prophēteia, allō de diakriseis pneumatōn, heterō genē glōssōn, allō de hermēneia glōssōn;
12.11: panta de tauta energei to hen kai to auto Pneuma, diairoun idia hekastō kathōs bouletai.
12.12: Kathaper gar to sōma hen estin kai melē polla echei, panta de ta melē tou sōmatos polla onta hen estin sōma, houtōs kai ho Christos;
12.13: kai gar en heni Pneumati hēmeis pantes eis hen sōma ebaptisthēmen, eite Ioudaioi eite Hellēnes, eite douloi eite eleutheroi. kai pantes hen Pneuma epotisthēmen.
12.14: kai gar to sōma ouk estin hen melos alla polla.
12.15: ean eipē ho pous Hoti ouk eimi cheir, ouk eimi ek tou sōmatos, ou para touto ouk estin ek tou sōmatos.
12.16: kai ean eipē to ous Hoti ouk eimi ophthalmos, ouk eimi ek tou sōmatos, ou para touto ouk estin ek tou sōmatos.
12.17: ei holon to sōma ophthalmos, pou hē akoē? ei holon akoē, pou hē osphrēsis?
12.18: nyn de ho Theos etheto ta melē, hen hekaston autōn en tō sōmati kathōs ēthelēsen.
12.19: ei de ēn ta panta hen melos, pou to sōma?
12.20: nyn de polla men melē, hen de sōma.
12.21: ou dynatai de ho ophthalmos eipein tē cheiri Chreian sou ouk echō, ē palin hē kephalē tois posin Chreian hymōn ouk echō;
12.22: alla pollō mallon ta dokounta melē tou sōmatos asthenestera hyparchein anankaia estin,
12.23: kai ha dokoumen atimotera einai tou sōmatos, toutois timēn perissoteran peritithemen, kai ta aschēmona hēmōn euschēmosynēn perissoteran echei,
12.24: ta de euschēmona hēmōn ou chreian echei. alla ho theos synekerasen to sōma, tō hysteroumenō perissoteran dous timēn,
12.25: hina mē ē schisma en tō sōmati, alla to auto hyper allēlōn merimnōsin ta melē.
12.26: kai eite paschei hen melos, synpaschei panta ta melē; eite doxazetai melos, synchairei panta ta melē.
12.27: hymeis de este sōma Christou kai melē ek merous.
12.28: Kai hous men etheto ho Theos en tē ekklēsia prōton apostolous, deuteron prophētas, triton didaskalous, epeita dynameis, epeita charismata iamatōn, antilēmpseis, kybernēseis, genē glōssōn.
12.29: mē pantes apostoloi? mē pantes prophētai? mē pantes didaskaloi? mē pantes dynameis?
12.30: mē pantes charismata echousin iamatōn? mē pantes glōssais lalousin? mē pantes diermēneuousin?
12.31: zēloute de ta charismata ta meizona. Kai eti kath’ hyperbolēn hodon hymin deiknymi.

13.1: Ean tais glōssais tōn anthrōpōn lalō kai tōn angelōn, agapēn de mē echō, gegona chalkos ēchōn ē kymbalon alalazon.
13.2: kai ean echō prophēteian kai eidō ta mystēria panta kai pasan tēn gnōsin, kai ean echō pasan tēn pistin hōste orē methistanai, agapēn de mē echō, outhen eimi.
13.3: kai ean psōmisō panta ta hyparchonta mou, kai ean paradō to sōma mou, hina kauthēsomai, agapēn de mē echō, ouden ōpheloumai.
13.4: HĒ agapē makrothymei, chrēsteuetai hē agapē, ou zēloi, hē agapē ou perpereuetai, ou physioutai,
13.5: ouk aschēmonei, ou zētei ta heautēs, ou paroxynetai, ou logizetai to kakon,
13.6: ou chairei epi tē adikia, synchairei de tē alētheia;
13.7: panta stegei, panta pisteuei, panta elpizei, panta hypomenei.
13.8: HĒ agapē oudepote piptei; eite de prophēteiai, katargēthēsontai; eite glōssai, pausontai; eite gnōsis, katargēthēsetai.
13.9: ek merous gar ginōskomen kai ek merous prophēteuomen;
13.10: hotan de elthē to teleion, to ek merous katargēthēsetai.
13.11: hote ēmēn nēpios, elaloun hōs nēpios, ephronoun hōs nēpios, elogizomēn hōs nēpios; hote gegona anēr, katērgēka ta tou nēpiou.
13.12: blepomen gar arti di’ esoptrou en ainigmati, tote de prosōpon pros prosōpon; arti ginōskō ek merous, tote de epignōsomai kathōs kai epegnōsthēn.
13.13: nyni de menei pistis, elpis, agapē, ta tria tauta; meizōn de toutōn hē agapē.

14.1: Diōkete tēn agapēn, zēloute de ta pneumatika, mallon de hina prophēteuēte.
14.2: ho gar lalōn glōssē ouk anthrōpois lalei alla Theō; oudeis gar akouei, pneumati de lalei mystēria;
14.3: ho de prophēteuōn anthrōpois lalei oikodomēn kai paraklēsin kai paramythian.
14.4: ho lalōn glōssē heauton oikodomei; ho de prophēteuōn ekklēsian oikodomei.
14.5: thelō de pantas hymas lalein glōssais, mallon de hina prophēteuēte; meizōn de ho prophēteuōn ē ho lalōn glōssais, ektos ei mē diermēneuē, hina hē ekklēsia oikodomēn labē.
14.6: nyn de, adelphoi, ean elthō pros hymas glōssais lalōn, ti hymas ōphelēsō, ean mē hymin lalēsō ē en apokalypsei ē en gnōsei ē en prophēteia ē didachē?
14.7: homōs ta apsycha phōnēn didonta, eite aulos eite kithara, ean diastolēn tois phthongois mē dō, pōs gnōsthēsetai to auloumenon ē to kitharizomenon?
14.8: kai gar ean adēlon salpinx phōnēn dō, tis paraskeuasetai eis polemon?
14.9: houtōs kai hymeis dia tēs glōssēs ean mē eusēmon logon dōte, pōs gnōsthēsetai to laloumenon? esesthe gar eis aera lalountes.
14.10: tosauta ei tychoi genē phōnōn eisin en kosmō, kai ouden aphōnon;
14.11: ean oun mē eidō tēn dynamin tēs phōnēs, esomai tō lalounti barbaros kai ho lalōn en emoi barbaros.
14.12: houtōs kai hymeis, epei zēlōtai este pneumatōn, pros tēn oikodomēn tēs ekklēsias zēteite hina perisseuēte.
14.13: Dio ho lalōn glōssē proseuchesthō hina diermēneuē.
14.14: ean gar proseuchōmai glōssē, to pneuma mou proseuchetai, ho de nous mou akarpos estin.
14.15: ti oun estin? proseuxomai tō pneumati, proseuxomai de kai tō noi; psalō tō pneumati, psalō de kai tō noi.
14.16: epei ean eulogēs pneumati, ho anaplērōn ton topon tou idiōtou pōs erei to Amēn epi tē sē eucharistia? epeidē ti legeis ouk oiden;
14.17: sy men gar kalōs eucharisteis, all’ ho heteros ouk oikodomeitai.
14.18: eucharistō tō Theō, pantōn hymōn mallon glōssais lalō;
14.19: alla en ekklēsia thelō pente logous tō noi mou lalēsai, hina kai allous katēchēsō, ē myrious logous en glōssē.
14.20: Adelphoi, mē paidia ginesthe tais phresin, alla tē kakia nēpiazete, tais de phresin teleioi ginesthe.
14.21: en tō nomō gegraptai hoti En heteroglōssois kai en cheilesin heterōn lalēsō tō laō toutō, kai oud’ houtōs eisakousontai mou, legei Kyrios.
14.22: hōste hai glōssai eis sēmeion eisin ou tois pisteuousin alla tois apistois, hē de prophēteia ou tois apistois alla tois pisteuousin.
14.23: Ean oun synelthē hē ekklēsia holē epi to auto kai pantes lalōsin glōssais, eiselthōsin de idiōtai ē apistoi, ouk erousin hoti mainesthe?
14.24: ean de pantes prophēteuōsin, eiselthē de tis apistos ē idiōtēs, elenchetai hypo pantōn, anakrinetai hypo pantōn,
14.25: ta krypta tēs kardias autou phanera ginetai, kai houtōs pesōn epi prosōpon proskynēsei tō Theō, apangellōn hoti Ontōs ho Theos en hymin estin.
14.26: Ti oun estin, adelphoi? hotan synerchēsthe, hekastos psalmon echei, didachēn echei, apokalypsin echei, glōssan echei, hermēneian echei; panta pros oikodomēn ginesthō.
14.27: eite glōssē tis lalei, kata dyo ē to pleiston treis, kai ana meros, kai heis diermēneuetō;
