4.6: mēden merimnate, all’ en panti tē proseuchē kai tē deēsei meta eucharistias ta aitēmata hymōn gnōrizesthō pros ton Theon.
4.7: kai hē eirēnē tou Theou hē hyperechousa panta noun phrourēsei tas kardias hymōn kai ta noēmata hymōn en Christō Iēsou.
4.8: To loipon, adelphoi, hosa estin alēthē, hosa semna, hosa dikaia, hosa hagna, hosa prosphilē, hosa euphēma, ei tis aretē kai ei tis epainos, tauta logizesthe;
4.9: ha kai emathete kai parelabete kai ēkousate kai eidete en emoi, tauta prassete; kai ho Theos tēs eirēnēs estai meth’ hymōn.
4.10: Echarēn de en Kyriō megalōs hoti ēdē pote anethalete to hyper emou phronein; eph’ hō kai ephroneite, ēkaireisthe de.
4.11: ouch hoti kath’ hysterēsin legō; egō gar emathon en hois eimi autarkēs einai.
4.12: oida kai tapeinousthai, oida kai perisseuein; en panti kai en pasin memyēmai, kai chortazesthai kai peinan, kai perisseuein kai hystereisthai.
4.13: panta ischyō en tō endynamounti me.
4.14: plēn kalōs epoiēsate synkoinōnēsantes mou tē thlipsei.
4.15: oidate de kai hymeis, Philippēsioi, hoti en archē tou euangeliou, hote exēlthon apo Makedonias, oudemia moi ekklēsia ekoinōnēsen eis logon doseōs kai lēmpseōs ei mē hymeis monoi,
4.16: hoti kai en Thessalonikē kai hapax kai dis eis tēn chreian moi epempsate.
4.17: ouch hoti epizētō to doma, alla epizētō ton karpon ton pleonazonta eis logon hymōn.
4.18: apechō de panta kai perisseuō; peplērōmai dexamenos para Epaphroditou ta par’ hymōn, osmēn euōdias, thysian dektēn, euareston tō Theō.
4.19: ho de Theos mou plērōsei pasan chreian hymōn kata to ploutos autou en doxē en Christō Iēsou.
4.20: tō de Theō kai Patri hēmōn hē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.
4.21: Aspasasthe panta hagion en Christō Iēsou. aspazontai hymas hoi syn emoi adelphoi.
4.22: aspazontai hymas pantes hoi hagioi, malista de hoi ek tēs Kaisaros oikias.
4.23: HĒ charis tou Kyriou Iēsou Christou meta tou pneumatos hymōn.

1.1: Paulos apostolos Christou Iēsou dia thelēmatos Theou kai Timotheos ho adelphos
1.2: tois en Kolossais hagiois kai pistois adelphois en Christō; charis hymin kai eirēnē apo Theou Patros hēmōn.
1.3: Eucharistoumen tō Theō Patri tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou pantote peri hymōn proseuchomenoi,
1.4: akousantes tēn pistin hymōn en Christō Iēsou kai tēn agapēn hēn echete eis pantas tous hagious
1.5: dia tēn elpida tēn apokeimenēn hymin en tois ouranois, hēn proēkousate en tō logō tēs alētheias tou euangeliou
1.6: tou parontos eis hymas, kathōs kai en panti tō kosmō estin karpophoroumenon kai auxanomenon kathōs kai en hymin, aph’ hēs hēmeras ēkousate kai epegnōte tēn charin tou Theou en alētheia;
1.7: kathōs emathete apo Epaphra tou agapētou syndoulou hēmōn, hos estin pistos hyper hymōn diakonos tou Christou,
1.8: ho kai dēlōsas hēmin tēn hymōn agapēn en Pneumati.
1.9: Dia touto kai hēmeis, aph’ hēs hēmeras ēkousamen, ou pauometha hyper hymōn proseuchomenoi kai aitoumenoi hina plērōthēte tēn epignōsin tou thelēmatos autou en pasē sophia kai synesei pneumatikē,
1.10: peripatēsai axiōs tou Kyriou eis pasan areskeian, en panti ergō agathō karpophorountes kai auxanomenoi tē epignōsei tou Theou,
1.11: en pasē dynamei dynamoumenoi kata to kratos tēs doxēs autou eis pasan hypomonēn kai makrothymian, meta charas
1.12: eucharistountes tō Patri tō hikanōsanti hymas eis tēn merida tou klērou tōn hagiōn en tō phōti;
1.13: hos erysato hēmas ek tēs exousias tou skotous kai metestēsen eis tēn basileian tou Huiou tēs agapēs autou,
1.14: en hō echomen tēn apolytrōsin, tēn aphesin tōn hamartiōn;
1.15: hos estin eikōn tou Theou tou aoratou, prōtotokos pasēs ktiseōs,
1.16: hoti en autō ektisthē ta panta en tois ouranois kai epi tēs gēs, ta horata kai ta aorata, eite thronoi eite kyriotētes eite archai eite exousiai; ta panta di’ autou kai eis auton ektistai;
1.17: kai autos estin pro pantōn kai ta panta en autō synestēken,
1.18: kai autos estin hē kephalē tou sōmatos, tēs ekklēsias; hos estin archē, prōtotokos ek tōn nekrōn, hina genētai en pasin autos prōteuōn,
1.19: hoti en autō eudokēsen pan to plērōma katoikēsai
1.20: kai di’ autou apokatallaxai ta panta eis auton, eirēnopoiēsas dia tou haimatos tou staurou autou, di’ autou eite ta epi tēs gēs eite ta en tois ouranois.
1.21: kai hymas pote ontas apēllotriōmenous kai echthrous tē dianoia en tois ergois tois ponērois,
1.22: nyni de apokatēllaxen en tō sōmati tēs sarkos autou dia tou thanatou, parastēsai hymas hagious kai amōmous kai anenklētous katenōpion autou,
1.23: ei ge epimenete tē pistei tethemeliōmenoi kai hedraioi kai mē metakinoumenoi apo tēs elpidos tou euangeliou hou ēkousate, tou kērychthentos en pasē ktisei tē hypo ton ouranon, hou egenomēn egō Paulos diakonos.
1.24: Nyn chairō en tois pathēmasin hyper hymōn, kai antanaplērō ta hysterēmata tōn thlipseōn tou Christou en tē sarki mou hyper tou sōmatos autou, ho estin hē ekklēsia,
1.25: hēs egenomēn egō diakonos kata tēn oikonomian tou Theou tēn dotheisan moi eis hymas plērōsai ton logon tou Theou,
1.26: to mystērion to apokekrymmenon apo tōn aiōnōn kai apo tōn geneōn— nyn de ephanerōthē tois hagiois autou,
1.27: hois ēthelēsen ho Theos gnōrisai ti to ploutos tēs doxēs tou mystēriou toutou en tois ethnesin, hos estin Christos en hymin, hē elpis tēs doxēs;
1.28: hon hēmeis katangellomen nouthetountes panta anthrōpon kai didaskontes panta anthrōpon en pasē sophia, hina parastēsōmen panta anthrōpon teleion en Christō;
1.29: eis ho kai kopiō agōnizomenos kata tēn energeian autou tēn energoumenēn en emoi en dynamei.

2.1: Thelō gar hymas eidenai hēlikon agōna echō hyper hymōn kai tōn en Laodikia kai hosoi ouch heorakan to prosōpon mou en sarki,
2.2: hina paraklēthōsin hai kardiai autōn, synbibasthentes en agapē kai eis pan ploutos tēs plērophorias tēs syneseōs, eis epignōsin tou mystēriou tou Theou, Christou,
2.3: en hō eisin pantes hoi thēsauroi tēs sophias kai gnōseōs apokryphoi.
2.4: Touto legō hina mēdeis hymas paralogizētai en pithanologia.
2.5: ei gar kai tē sarki apeimi, alla tō pneumati syn hymin eimi, chairōn kai blepōn hymōn tēn taxin kai to stereōma tēs eis Christon pisteōs hymōn.
2.6: Hōs oun parelabete ton Christon Iēsoun ton Kyrion, en autō peripateite,
2.7: errizōmenoi kai epoikodomoumenoi en autō kai bebaioumenoi tē pistei kathōs edidachthēte, perisseuontes en eucharistia.
2.8: Blepete mē tis hymas estai ho sylagōgōn dia tēs philosophias kai kenēs apatēs kata tēn paradosin tōn anthrōpōn, kata ta stoicheia tou kosmou kai ou kata Christon;
2.9: hoti en autō katoikei pan to plērōma tēs Theotētos sōmatikōs,
2.10: kai este en autō peplērōmenoi, hos estin hē kephalē pasēs archēs kai exousias,
2.11: en hō kai perietmēthēte peritomē acheiropoiētō en tē apekdysei tou sōmatos tēs sarkos, en tē peritomē tou Christou,
2.12: syntaphentes autō en tō baptismati, en hō kai synēgerthēte dia tēs pisteōs tēs energeias tou Theou tou egeirantos auton ek nekrōn;
2.13: kai hymas nekrous ontas tois paraptōmasin kai tē akrobystia tēs sarkos hymōn, synezōopoiēsen hymas syn autō, charisamenos hēmin panta ta paraptōmata,
2.14: exaleipsas to kath’ hēmōn cheirographon tois dogmasin ho ēn hypenantion hēmin, kai auto ērken ek tou mesou, prosēlōsas auto tō staurō;
2.15: apekdysamenos tas archas kai tas exousias edeigmatisen en parrēsia, thriambeusas autous en autō.
2.16: Mē oun tis hymas krinetō en brōsei kai en posei ē en merei heortēs ē neomēnias ē sabbatōn,
2.17: ha estin skia tōn mellontōn, to de sōma tou Christou.
2.18: mēdeis hymas katabrabeuetō thelōn en tapeinophrosynē kai thrēskeia tōn angelōn, ha heoraken embateuōn, eikē physioumenos hypo tou noos tēs sarkos autou,
2.19: kai ou kratōn tēn Kephalēn, ex hou pan to sōma dia tōn haphōn kai syndesmōn epichorēgoumenon kai synbibazomenon auxei tēn auxēsin tou Theou.
2.20: Ei apethanete syn Christō apo tōn stoicheiōn tou kosmou, ti hōs zōntes en kosmō dogmatizesthe
2.21: Mē hapsē mēde geusē mēde thigēs,
2.22: ha estin panta eis phthoran tē apochrēsei, kata ta entalmata kai didaskalias tōn anthrōpōn?
2.23: hatina estin logon men echonta sophias en ethelothrēskia kai tapeinophrosynē kai apheidia sōmatos, ouk en timē tini pros plēsmonēn tēs sarkos.

3.1: Ei oun synēgerthēte tō Christō, ta anō zēteite, hou ho Christos estin en dexia tou Theou kathēmenos;
3.2: ta anō phroneite, mē ta epi tēs gēs.
3.3: apethanete gar, kai hē zōē hymōn kekryptai syn tō Christō en tō Theō;
3.4: hotan ho Christos phanerōthē, hē zōē hēmōn, tote kai hymeis syn autō phanerōthēsesthe en doxē.
3.5: Nekrōsate oun ta melē ta epi tēs gēs, porneian, akatharsian, pathos, epithymian kakēn, kai tēn pleonexian hētis estin eidōlolatreia,
3.6: di’ ha erchetai hē orgē tou Theou;
3.7: en hois kai hymeis periepatēsate pote, hote ezēte en toutois;
3.8: nyni de apothesthe kai hymeis ta panta, orgēn, thymon, kakian, blasphēmian, aischrologian ek tou stomatos hymōn;
3.9: mē pseudesthe eis allēlous, apekdysamenoi ton palaion anthrōpon syn tais praxesin autou,
3.10: kai endysamenoi ton neon ton anakainoumenon eis epignōsin kat’ eikona tou ktisantos auton,
3.11: hopou ouk eni Hellēn kai Ioudaios, peritomē kai akrobystia, barbaros, Skythēs, doulos, eleutheros, alla panta kai en pasin Christos.
3.12: Endysasthe oun, hōs eklektoi tou Theou hagioi kai ēgapēmenoi, splanchna oiktirmou, chrēstotēta, tapeinophrosynēn, prautēta, makrothymian,
3.13: anechomenoi allēlōn kai charizomenoi heautois, ean tis pros tina echē momphēn; kathōs kai ho Kyrios echarisato hymin houtōs kai hymeis;
3.14: epi pasin de toutois tēn agapēn, ho estin syndesmos tēs teleiotētos.
3.15: kai hē eirēnē tou Christou brabeuetō en tais kardiais hymōn, eis hēn kai eklēthēte en heni sōmati; kai eucharistoi ginesthe.
3.16: ho logos tou Christou enoikeitō en hymin plousiōs, en pasē sophia; didaskontes kai nouthetountes heautous, psalmois hymnois ōdais pneumatikais en tē chariti adontes en tais kardiais hymōn tō Theō;
3.17: kai pan ho ti ean poiēte en logō ē en ergō, panta en onomati Kyriou Iēsou, eucharistountes tō Theō Patri di’ autou.
3.18: Hai gynaikes, hypotassesthe tois andrasin, hōs anēken en Kyriō.
3.19: Hoi andres, agapate tas gynaikas kai mē pikrainesthe pros autas.
3.20: Ta tekna, hypakouete tois goneusin kata panta, touto gar euareston estin en Kyriō.
3.21: Hoi pateres, mē erethizete ta tekna hymōn, hina mē athymōsin.
3.22: Hoi douloi, hypakouete kata panta tois kata sarka kyriois, mē en ophthalmodouliais, hōs anthrōpareskoi, all’ en haplotēti kardias phoboumenoi ton Kyrion.
3.23: ho ean poiēte, ek psychēs ergazesthe hōs tō Kyriō kai ouk anthrōpois,
3.24: eidotes hoti apo Kyriou apolēmpsesthe tēn antapodosin tēs klēronomias. tō Kyriō Christō douleuete;
3.25: ho gar adikōn komisetai ho ēdikēsen, kai ouk estin prosōpolēmpsia.

4.1: Hoi kyrioi, to dikaion kai tēn isotēta tois doulois parechesthe, eidotes hoti kai hymeis echete Kyrion en ouranō.
4.2: Tē proseuchē proskartereite, grēgorountes en autē en eucharistia,
4.3: proseuchomenoi hama kai peri hēmōn, hina ho Theos anoixē hēmin thyran tou logou, lalēsai to mystērion tou Christou, di’ ho kai dedemai,
4.4: hina phanerōsō auto hōs dei me lalēsai.
4.5: En sophia peripateite pros tous exō, ton kairon exagorazomenoi.
4.6: ho logos hymōn pantote en chariti, halati ērtymenos, eidenai pōs dei hymas heni hekastō apokrinesthai.
4.7: Ta kat’ eme panta gnōrisei hymin Tychikos ho agapētos adelphos kai pistos diakonos kai syndoulos en Kyriō,
4.8: hon epempsa pros hymas eis auto touto, hina gnōte ta peri hēmōn kai parakalesē tas kardias hymōn,
4.9: syn Onēsimō tō pistō kai agapētō adelphō, hos estin ex hymōn; panta hymin gnōrisousin ta hōde.
4.10: Aspazetai hymas Aristarchos ho synaichmalōtos mou, kai Markos ho anepsios Barnaba, (peri hou elabete entolas, ean elthē pros hymas, dexasthe auton,)
4.11: kai Iēsous ho legomenos Ioustos, hoi ontes ek peritomēs houtoi monoi synergoi eis tēn basileian tou Theou, hoitines egenēthēsan moi parēgoria.
4.12: aspazetai hymas Epaphras ho ex hymōn, doulos Christou Iēsou, pantote agōnizomenos hyper hymōn en tais proseuchais, hina stathēte teleioi kai peplērophorēmenoi en panti thelēmati tou Theou.
4.13: martyrō gar autō hoti echei polyn ponon hyper hymōn kai tōn en Laodikia kai tōn en Hierapolei.
4.14: aspazetai hymas Loukas ho iatros ho agapētos kai Dēmas.
4.15: Aspasasthe tous en Laodikia adelphous kai Nymphan kai tēn kat’ oikon autēs ekklēsian.
4.16: kai hotan anagnōsthē par’ hymin hē epistolē, poiēsate hina kai en tē Laodikeōn ekklēsia anagnōsthē, kai tēn ek Laodikias hina kai hymeis anagnōte.
4.17: kai eipate Archippō Blepe tēn diakonian hēn parelabes en Kyriō, hina autēn plērois.
4.18: HO aspasmos tē emē cheiri Paulou. mnēmoneuete mou tōn desmōn. hē charis meth’ hymōn.

1.1: Paulos kai Silouanos kai Timotheos tē ekklēsia Thessalonikeōn en Theō Patri kai Kyriō Iēsou Christō; charis hymin kai eirēnē.
1.2: Eucharistoumen tō Theō pantote peri pantōn hymōn, mneian poioumenoi epi tōn proseuchōn hēmōn, adialeiptōs
1.3: mnēmoneuontes hymōn tou ergou tēs pisteōs kai tou kopou tēs agapēs kai tēs hypomonēs tēs elpidos tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou emprosthen tou Theou kai Patros hēmōn,
1.4: eidotes, adelphoi ēgapēmenoi hypo tou Theou, tēn eklogēn hymōn,
1.5: hoti to euangelion hēmōn ouk egenēthē eis hymas en logō monon, alla kai en dynamei kai en Pneumati Hagiō kai plērophoria pollē, kathōs oidate hoioi egenēthēmen en hymin di’ hymas.
1.6: kai hymeis mimētai hēmōn egenēthēte kai tou Kyriou, dexamenoi ton logon en thlipsei pollē meta charas Pneumatos Hagiou,
1.7: hōste genesthai hymas typon pasin tois pisteuousin en tē Makedonia kai en tē Achaia.
1.8: aph’ hymōn gar exēchētai ho logos tou Kyriou ou monon en tē Makedonia kai Achaia, all’ en panti topō hē pistis hymōn hē pros ton Theon exelēlythen, hōste mē chreian echein hēmas lalein ti;
1.9: autoi gar peri hēmōn apangellousin hopoian eisodon eschomen pros hymas, kai pōs epestrepsate pros ton Theon apo tōn eidōlōn douleuein Theō zōnti kai alēthinō,
1.10: kai anamenein ton Huion autou ek tōn ouranōn, hon ēgeiren ek tōn nekrōn, Iēsoun ton rhyomenon hēmas ek tēs orgēs tēs erchomenēs.

2.1: Autoi gar oidate, adelphoi, tēn eisodon hēmōn tēn pros hymas, hoti ou kenē gegonen,
2.2: alla propathontes kai hybristhentes kathōs oidate en Philippois eparrēsiasametha en tō Theō hēmōn lalēsai pros hymas to euangelion tou Theou en pollō agōni.
2.3: hē gar paraklēsis hēmōn ouk ek planēs oude ex akatharsias oude en dolō,
2.4: alla kathōs dedokimasmetha hypo tou Theou pisteuthēnai to euangelion houtōs laloumen, ouch hōs anthrōpois areskontes, alla Theō tō dokimazonti tas kardias hēmōn.
2.5: oute gar pote en logō kolakias egenēthēmen, kathōs oidate, oute en prophasei pleonexias, Theos martys,
2.6: oute zētountes ex anthrōpōn doxan, oute aph’ hymōn oute ap’ allōn,
2.7: dynamenoi en barei einai hōs Christou apostoloi; alla egenēthēmen ēpioi en mesō hymōn, hōs ean trophos thalpē ta heautēs tekna;
2.8: houtōs homeiromenoi hymōn eudokoumen metadounai hymin ou monon to euangelion tou Theou alla kai tas heautōn psychas, dioti agapētoi hēmin egenēthēte.
2.9: mnēmoneuete gar, adelphoi, ton kopon hēmōn kai ton mochthon; nyktos kai hēmeras ergazomenoi pros to mē epibarēsai tina hymōn ekēryxamen eis hymas to euangelion tou Theou.
2.10: hymeis martyres kai ho Theos, hōs hosiōs kai dikaiōs kai amemptōs hymin tois pisteuousin egenēthēmen,
2.11: kathaper oidate hōs hena hekaston hymōn hōs patēr tekna heautou
2.12: parakalountes hymas kai paramythoumenoi kai martyromenoi eis to peripatein hymas axiōs tou Theou tou kalountos hymas eis tēn heautou basileian kai doxan.
2.13: Kai dia touto kai hēmeis eucharistoumen tō Theō adialeiptōs, hoti paralabontes logon akoēs par’ hēmōn tou Theou edexasthe ou logon anthrōpōn alla kathōs alēthōs estin logon Theou, hos kai energeitai en hymin tois pisteuousin.
2.14: hymeis gar mimētai egenēthēte, adelphoi, tōn ekklēsiōn tou Theou tōn ousōn en tē Ioudaia en Christō Iēsou, hoti ta auta epathete kai hymeis hypo tōn idiōn symphyletōn, kathōs kai autoi hypo tōn Ioudaiōn,
2.15: tōn kai ton Kyrion apokteinantōn Iēsoun kai tous prophētas kai hēmas ekdiōxantōn, kai Theō mē areskontōn, kai pasin anthrōpois enantiōn,
2.16: kōlyontōn hēmas tois ethnesin lalēsai hina sōthōsin, eis to anaplērōsai autōn tas hamartias pantote. ephthasen de ep’ autous hē orgē eis telos.
2.17: Hēmeis de, adelphoi, aporphanisthentes aph’ hymōn pros kairon hōras prosōpō ou kardia, perissoterōs espoudasamen to prosōpon hymōn idein en pollē epithymia.
2.18: dioti ēthelēsamen elthein pros hymas, egō men Paulos kai hapax kai dis, kai enekopsen hēmas ho Satanas.
2.19: tis gar hēmōn elpis ē chara ē stephanos kauchēseōs— ē ouchi kai hymeis— emprosthen tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou en tē autou parousia?
2.20: hymeis gar este hē doxa hēmōn kai hē chara.

3.1: Dio mēketi stegontes ēudokēsamen kataleiphthēnai en Athēnais monoi,
3.2: kai epempsamen Timotheon, ton adelphon hēmōn kai diakonon tou Theou en tō euangeliō tou Christou, eis to stērixai hymas kai parakalesai hyper tēs pisteōs hymōn
3.3: to mēdena sainesthai en tais thlipsesin tautais. autoi gar oidate hoti eis touto keimetha;
3.4: kai gar hote pros hymas ēmen, proelegomen hymin hoti mellomen thlibesthai, kathōs kai egeneto kai oidate.
3.5: dia touto kagō mēketi stegōn epempsa eis to gnōnai tēn pistin hymōn, mē pōs epeirasen hymas ho peirazōn kai eis kenon genētai ho kopos hēmōn.
3.6: Arti de elthontos Timotheou pros hēmas aph’ hymōn kai euangelisamenou hēmin tēn pistin kai tēn agapēn hymōn, kai hoti echete mneian hēmōn agathēn pantote, epipothountes hēmas idein kathaper kai hēmeis hymas,
3.7: dia touto pareklēthēmen, adelphoi, eph’ hymin epi pasē tē anankē kai thlipsei hēmōn dia tēs hymōn pisteōs,
3.8: hoti nyn zōmen ean hymeis stēkete en Kyriō.
3.9: tina gar eucharistian dynametha tō Theō antapodounai peri hymōn epi pasē tē chara hē chairomen di’ hymas emprosthen tou Theou hēmōn,
3.10: nyktos kai hēmeras hyperekperissou deomenoi eis to idein hymōn to prosōpon kai katartisai ta hysterēmata tēs pisteōs hymōn?
3.11: Autos de ho Theos kai Patēr hēmōn kai ho Kyrios hēmōn Iēsous kateuthynai tēn hodon hēmōn pros hymas;
3.12: hymas de ho Kyrios pleonasai kai perisseusai tē agapē eis allēlous kai eis pantas, kathaper kai hēmeis eis hymas,
3.13: eis to stērixai hymōn tas kardias amemptous en hagiōsynē emprosthen tou Theou kai patros hēmōn en tē parousia tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou meta pantōn tōn hagiōn autou.

4.1: Loipon oun, adelphoi, erōtōmen hymas kai parakaloumen en Kyriō Iēsou, hina kathōs parelabete par’ hēmōn to pōs dei hymas peripatein kai areskein Theō, kathōs kai peripateite, hina perisseuēte mallon.
4.2: oidate gar tinas parangelias edōkamen hymin dia tou Kyriou Iēsou.
4.3: Touto gar estin thelēma tou Theou, ho hagiasmos hymōn, apechesthai hymas apo tēs porneias,
4.4: eidenai hekaston hymōn to heautou skeuos ktasthai en hagiasmō kai timē,
4.5: mē en pathei epithymias kathaper kai ta ethnē ta mē eidota ton Theon,
4.6: to mē hyperbainein kai pleonektein en tō pragmati ton adelphon autou, dioti ekdikos Kyrios peri pantōn toutōn, kathōs kai proeipamen hymin kai diemartyrametha.
4.7: ou gar ekalesen hēmas ho Theos epi akatharsia all’ en hagiasmō.
4.8: toigaroun ho athetōn ouk anthrōpon athetei alla ton Theon ton kai didonta to Pneuma autou to hagion eis hymas.
4.9: Peri de tēs philadelphias ou chreian echete graphein hymin; autoi gar hymeis theodidaktoi este eis to agapan allēlous;
4.10: kai gar poieite auto eis pantas tous adelphous en holē tē Makedonia. Parakaloumen de hymas, adelphoi, perisseuein mallon,
4.11: kai philotimeisthai hēsychazein kai prassein ta idia kai ergazesthai tais chersin hymōn, kathōs hymin parēngeilamen,
4.12: hina peripatēte euschēmonōs pros tous exō kai mēdenos chreian echēte.
4.13: Ou thelomen de hymas agnoein, adelphoi, peri tōn koimōmenōn, hina mē lypēsthe kathōs kai hoi loipoi hoi mē echontes elpida.
4.14: ei gar pisteuomen hoti Iēsous apethanen kai anestē, houtōs kai ho Theos tous koimēthentas dia tou Iēsou axei syn autō.
4.15: Touto gar hymin legomen en logō Kyriou, hoti hēmeis hoi zōntes hoi perileipomenoi eis tēn parousian tou Kyriou ou mē phthasōmen tous koimēthentas;
4.16: hoti autos ho Kyrios en keleusmati, en phōnē archangelou kai en salpingi Theou, katabēsetai ap’ ouranou, kai hoi nekroi en Christō anastēsontai prōton,
4.17: epeita hēmeis hoi zōntes hoi perileipomenoi hama syn autois harpagēsometha en nephelais eis apantēsin tou Kyriou eis aera; kai houtōs pantote syn Kyriō esometha.
4.18: Hōste parakaleite allēlous en tois logois toutois.

5.1: Peri de tōn chronōn kai tōn kairōn, adelphoi, ou chreian echete hymin graphesthai;
5.2: autoi gar akribōs oidate hoti hēmera Kyriou hōs kleptēs en nykti houtōs erchetai.
5.3: hotan legōsin Eirēnē kai asphaleia, tote aiphnidios autois epistatai olethros hōsper hē ōdin tē en gastri echousē, kai ou mē ekphygōsin.
5.4: hymeis de, adelphoi, ouk este en skotei, hina hē hēmera hymas hōs kleptēs katalabē;
5.5: pantes gar hymeis huioi phōtos este kai huioi hēmeras. Ouk esmen nyktos oude skotous;
5.6: ara oun mē katheudōmen hōs hoi loipoi, alla grēgorōmen kai nēphōmen.
5.7: hoi gar katheudontes nyktos katheudousin, kai hoi methyskomenoi nyktos methyousin;
5.8: hēmeis de hēmeras ontes nēphōmen, endysamenoi thōraka pisteōs kai agapēs kai perikephalaian elpida sōtērias;
5.9: hoti ouk etheto hēmas ho Theos eis orgēn alla eis peripoiēsin sōtērias dia tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou,
5.10: tou apothanontos peri hēmōn, hina eite grēgorōmen eite katheudōmen hama syn autō zēsōmen.
5.11: Dio parakaleite allēlous kai oikodomeite heis ton hena, kathōs kai poieite.
5.12: Erōtōmen de hymas, adelphoi, eidenai tous kopiōntas en hymin kai proistamenous hymōn en Kyriō kai nouthetountas hymas,
5.13: kai hēgeisthai autous hyperekperissōs en agapē dia to ergon autōn. eirēneuete en heautois.
5.14: Parakaloumen de hymas, adelphoi, noutheteite tous ataktous, paramytheisthe tous oligopsychous, antechesthe tōn asthenōn, makrothymeite pros pantas.
5.15: horate mē tis kakon anti kakou tini apodō, alla pantote to agathon diōkete eis allēlous kai eis pantas.
5.18: en panti eucharisteite; touto gar thelēma Theou en Christō Iēsou eis hymas.
5.21: panta de dokimazete, to kalon katechete;
5.23: Autos de ho Theos tēs eirēnēs hagiasai hymas holoteleis, kai holoklēron hymōn to pneuma kai hē psychē kai to sōma amemptōs en tē parousia tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou tērētheiē.
5.24: pistos ho kalōn hymas, hos kai poiēsei.
5.26: Aspasasthe tous adelphous pantas en philēmati hagiō.
5.27: Enorkizō hymas ton Kyrion anagnōsthēnai tēn epistolēn pasin tois adelphois.
5.28: HĒ charis tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou meth’ hymōn.

1.1: Paulos kai Silouanos kai Timotheos tē ekklēsia Thessalonikeōn en Theō Patri hēmōn kai Kyriō Iēsou Christō;
1.2: charis hymin kai eirēnē apo Theou Patros kai Kyriou Iēsou Christou.
1.3: Eucharistein opheilomen tō Theō pantote peri hymōn, adelphoi, kathōs axion estin, hoti hyperauxanei hē pistis hymōn kai pleonazei hē agapē henos hekastou pantōn hymōn eis allēlous,
1.4: hōste autous hēmas en hymin enkauchasthai en tais ekklēsiais tou Theou hyper tēs hypomonēs hymōn kai pisteōs en pasin tois diōgmois hymōn kai tais thlipsesin hais anechesthe,
1.5: endeigma tēs dikaias kriseōs tou Theou, eis to kataxiōthēnai hymas tēs basileias tou Theou, hyper hēs kai paschete,
1.6: eiper dikaion para Theō antapodounai tois thlibousin hymas thlipsin
1.7: kai hymin tois thlibomenois anesin meth’ hēmōn, en tē apokalypsei tou Kyriou Iēsou ap’ ouranou met’ angelōn dynameōs autou
1.8: en pyri phlogos, didontos ekdikēsin tois mē eidosin Theon kai tois mē hypakouousin tō euangeliō tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou,
1.9: hoitines dikēn tisousin olethron aiōnion apo prosōpou tou Kyriou kai apo tēs doxēs tēs ischyos autou,
1.10: hotan elthē endoxasthēnai en tois hagiois autou kai thaumasthēnai en pasin tois pisteusasin, hoti episteuthē to martyrion hēmōn eph’ hymas, en tē hēmera ekeinē.
1.11: Eis ho kai proseuchometha pantote peri hymōn, hina hymas axiōsē tēs klēseōs ho Theos hēmōn kai plērōsē pasan eudokian agathōsynēs kai ergon pisteōs en dynamei,
1.12: hopōs endoxasthē to onoma tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou en hymin, kai hymeis en autō, kata tēn charin tou Theou hēmōn kai Kyriou Iēsou Christou.

2.1: Erōtōmen de hymas, adelphoi, hyper tēs parousias tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou kai hēmōn episynagōgēs ep’ auton,
2.2: eis to mē tacheōs saleuthēnai hymas apo tou noos mēde throeisthai mēte dia pneumatos mēte dia logou mēte di’ epistolēs hōs di’ hēmōn, hōs hoti enestēken hē hēmera tou Kyriou.
2.3: mē tis hymas exapatēsē kata mēdena tropon; hoti ean mē elthē hē apostasia prōton kai apokalyphthē ho anthrōpos tēs anomias, ho huios tēs apōleias,
2.4: ho antikeimenos kai hyperairomenos epi panta legomenon Theon ē sebasma, hōste auton eis ton naon tou Theou kathisai, apodeiknynta heauton hoti estin Theos.
2.5: Ou mnēmoneuete hoti eti ōn pros hymas tauta elegon hymin?
2.6: kai nyn to katechon oidate, eis to apokalyphthēnai auton en tō autou kairō.
2.7: to gar mystērion ēdē energeitai tēs anomias; monon ho katechōn arti heōs ek mesou genētai.
2.8: kai tote apokalyphthēsetai ho anomos, hon ho Kyrios Iēsous anelei tō pneumati tou stomatos autou kai katargēsei tē epiphaneia tēs parousias autou,
2.9: hou estin hē parousia kat’ energeian tou Satana en pasē dynamei kai sēmeiois kai terasin pseudous
2.10: kai en pasē apatē adikias tois apollymenois, anth’ hōn tēn agapēn tēs alētheias ouk edexanto eis to sōthēnai autous.
2.11: kai dia touto pempei autois ho Theos energeian planēs eis to pisteusai autous tō pseudei,
2.12: hina krithōsin pantes hoi mē pisteusantes tē alētheia alla eudokēsantes tē adikia.
2.13: Hēmeis de opheilomen eucharistein tō Theō pantote peri hymōn, adelphoi ēgapēmenoi hypo Kyriou, hoti heilato hymas ho Theos ap᾽ archēs eis sōtērian en hagiasmō Pneumatos kai pistei alētheias,
2.14: eis ho kai ekalesen hymas dia tou euangeliou hēmōn, eis peripoiēsin doxēs tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou.
2.15: Ara oun, adelphoi, stēkete, kai krateite tas paradoseis has edidachthēte eite dia logou eite di’ epistolēs hēmōn.
2.16: Autos de ho Kyrios hēmōn Iēsous Christos kai ho Theos ho Patēr hēmōn, ho agapēsas hēmas kai dous paraklēsin aiōnian kai elpida agathēn en chariti,
2.17: parakalesai hymōn tas kardias kai stērixai en panti ergō kai logō agathō.

3.1: To loipon proseuchesthe, adelphoi, peri hēmōn, hina ho logos tou Kyriou trechē kai doxazētai kathōs kai pros hymas,
3.2: kai hina rhysthōmen apo tōn atopōn kai ponērōn anthrōpōn; ou gar pantōn hē pistis.
3.3: Pistos de estin ho Kyrios, hos stērixei hymas kai phylaxei apo tou ponērou.
3.4: pepoithamen de en Kyriō eph’ hymas, hoti ha parangellomen kai poieite kai poiēsete.
3.5: HO de Kyrios kateuthynai hymōn tas kardias eis tēn agapēn tou Theou kai eis tēn hypomonēn tou Christou.
3.6: Parangellomen de hymin, adelphoi, en onomati tou Kyriou Iēsou Christou stellesthai hymas apo pantos adelphou ataktōs peripatountos kai mē kata tēn paradosin hēn parelabete par’ hēmōn.
3.7: autoi gar oidate pōs dei mimeisthai hēmas, hoti ouk ētaktēsamen en hymin,
3.8: oude dōrean arton ephagomen para tinos, all’ en kopō kai mochthō nyktos kai hēmeras ergazomenoi pros to mē epibarēsai tina hymōn;
3.9: ouch hoti ouk echomen exousian, all’ hina heautous typon dōmen hymin eis to mimeisthai hēmas.
3.10: kai gar hote ēmen pros hymas, touto parēngellomen hymin, hoti ei tis ou thelei ergazesthai, mēde esthietō.
3.11: akouomen gar tinas peripatountas en hymin ataktōs, mēden ergazomenous alla periergazomenous;
3.12: tois de toioutois parangellomen kai parakaloumen en Kyriō Iēsou Christō hina meta hēsychias ergazomenoi ton heautōn arton esthiōsin.
3.13: Hymeis de, adelphoi, mē enkakēsēte kalopoiountes.
3.14: ei de tis ouch hypakouei tō logō hēmōn dia tēs epistolēs, touton sēmeiousthe, mē synanamignysthai autō, hina entrapē;
3.15: kai mē hōs echthron hēgeisthe, alla noutheteite hōs adelphon.
3.16: Autos de ho Kyrios tēs eirēnēs dōē hymin tēn eirēnēn dia pantos en panti tropō. ho Kyrios meta pantōn hymōn.
3.17: HO aspasmos tē emē cheiri Paulou, ho estin sēmeion en pasē epistolē; houtōs graphō.
3.18: hē charis tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou meta pantōn hymōn.

1.1: Paulos apostolos Christou Iēsou kat’ epitagēn Theou Sōtēros hēmōn kai Christou Iēsou tēs elpidos hēmōn
1.2: Timotheō gnēsiō teknō en pistei; charis, eleos, eirēnē apo Theou patros kai Christou Iēsou tou kyriou hēmōn.
1.3: Kathōs parekalesa se prosmeinai en Ephesō, poreuomenos eis Makedonian, hina parangeilēs tisin mē heterodidaskalein
1.4: mēde prosechein mythois kai genealogiais aperantois, haitines ekzētēseis parechousin mallon ē oikonomian Theou tēn en pistei;
1.5: to de telos tēs parangelias estin agapē ek katharas kardias kai syneidēseōs agathēs kai pisteōs anypokritou,
1.6: hōn tines astochēsantes exetrapēsan eis mataiologian,
1.7: thelontes einai nomodidaskaloi, mē noountes mēte ha legousin mēte peri tinōn diabebaiountai.
1.8: Oidamen de hoti kalos ho nomos, ean tis autō nomimōs chrētai,
1.9: eidōs touto, hoti dikaiō nomos ou keitai, anomois de kai anypotaktois, asebesi kai hamartōlois, anosiois kai bebēlois, patrolōais kai mētrolōais, androphonois,
1.10: pornois, arsenokoitais, andrapodistais, pseustais, epiorkois, kai ei ti heteron tē hygiainousē didaskalia antikeitai,
1.11: kata to euangelion tēs doxēs tou makariou Theou, ho episteuthēn egō.
1.12: Charin echō tō endynamōsanti me Christō Iēsou tō Kyriō hēmōn, hoti piston me hēgēsato themenos eis diakonian,
1.13: to proteron onta blasphēmon kai diōktēn kai hybristēn; alla ēleēthēn, hoti agnoōn epoiēsa en apistia,
1.14: hyperepleonasen de hē charis tou Kyriou hēmōn meta pisteōs kai agapēs tēs en Christō Iēsou.
1.15: pistos ho logos kai pasēs apodochēs axios, hoti Christos Iēsous ēlthen eis ton kosmon hamartōlous sōsai; hōn prōtos eimi egō;
1.16: alla dia touto ēleēthēn, hina en emoi prōtō endeixētai Iēsous Christos tēn hapasan makrothymian, pros hypotypōsin tōn mellontōn pisteuein ep' autō eis zōēn aiōnion.
1.17: Tō de Basilei tōn aiōnōn, aphthartō aoratō monō Theō, timē kai doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.
1.18: Tautēn tēn parangelian paratithemai soi, teknon Timothee, kata tas proagousas epi se prophēteias, hina strateuē en autais tēn kalēn strateian,
1.19: echōn pistin kai agathēn syneidēsin, hēn tines apōsamenoi peri tēn pistin enauagēsan;
1.20: hōn estin Hymenaios kai Alexandros, hous paredōka tō Satana, hina paideuthōsin mē blasphēmein.

2.1: Parakalō oun prōton pantōn poieisthai deēseis, proseuchas, enteuxeis, eucharistias, hyper pantōn anthrōpōn,
2.2: hyper basileōn kai pantōn tōn en hyperochē ontōn, hina ēremon kai hēsychion bion diagōmen en pasē eusebeia kai semnotēti.
2.3: touto kalon kai apodekton enōpion tou Sōtēros hēmōn Theou,
2.4: hos pantas anthrōpous thelei sōthēnai kai eis epignōsin alētheias elthein.
2.5: heis gar Theos, heis kai mesitēs Theou kai anthrōpōn, anthrōpos Christos Iēsous,
2.6: ho dous heauton antilytron hyper pantōn, to martyrion kairois idiois;
2.7: eis ho etethēn egō kēryx kai apostolos, alētheian legō, ou pseudomai, didaskalos ethnōn en pistei kai alētheia.
2.8: Boulomai oun proseuchesthai tous andras en panti topō epairontas hosious cheiras chōris orgēs kai dialogismou.
2.9: Hōsautōs gynaikas en katastolē kosmiō meta aidous kai sōphrosynēs kosmein heautas, mē en plegmasin kai chrysiō ē margaritais ē himatismō polytelei,
2.10: all’ ho prepei gynaixin epangellomenais theosebeian, di’ ergōn agathōn.
2.11: Gynē en hēsychia manthanetō en pasē hypotagē;
2.12: didaskein de gynaiki ouk epitrepō, oude authentein andros, all’ einai en hēsychia.
2.13: Adam gar prōtos eplasthē, eita Eua.
2.14: kai Adam ouk ēpatēthē, hē de gynē exapatētheisa en parabasei gegonen;
2.15: sōthēsetai de dia tēs teknogonias, ean meinōsin en pistei kai agapē kai hagiasmō meta sōphrosynēs.

3.1: Pistos ho logos; ei tis episkopēs oregetai, kalou ergou epithymei.
3.2: dei oun ton episkopon anepilēmpton einai, mias gynaikos andra, nēphalion, sōphrona, kosmion, philoxenon, didaktikon,
3.3: mē paroinon, mē plēktēn, alla epieikē, amachon, aphilargyron,
3.4: tou idiou oikou kalōs proistamenon, tekna echonta en hypotagē meta pasēs semnotētos,
3.5: (ei de tis tou idiou oikou prostēnai ouk oiden, pōs ekklēsias Theou epimelēsetai?)
3.6: mē neophyton, hina mē typhōtheis eis krima empesē tou diabolou.
3.7: dei de kai martyrian kalēn echein apo tōn exōthen, hina mē eis oneidismon empesē kai pagida tou diabolou.
3.8: Diakonous hōsautōs semnous, mē dilogous, mē oinō pollō prosechontas, mē aischrokerdeis,
3.9: echontas to mystērion tēs pisteōs en kathara syneidēsei.
3.10: kai houtoi de dokimazesthōsan prōton, eita diakoneitōsan anenklētoi ontes.
3.11: gynaikas hōsautōs semnas, mē diabolous, nēphalious, pistas en pasin.
3.12: diakonoi estōsan mias gynaikos andres, teknōn kalōs proistamenoi kai tōn idiōn oikōn.
3.13: hoi gar kalōs diakonēsantes bathmon heautois kalon peripoiountai kai pollēn parrēsian en pistei tē en Christō Iēsou.
3.14: Tauta soi graphō elpizōn elthein pros se tacheion;
3.15: ean de bradynō, hina eidēs pōs dei en oikō Theou anastrephesthai, hētis estin ekklēsia Theou zōntos, stylos kai hedraiōma tēs alētheias.
3.16: kai homologoumenōs mega estin to tēs eusebeias mystērion; Hos ephanerōthē en sarki, edikaiōthē en pneumati, ōphthē angelois, ekērychthē en ethnesin, episteuthē en kosmō, anelēmphthē en doxē.

4.1: To de pneuma rhētōs legei hoti en hysterois kairois apostēsontai tines tēs pisteōs, prosechontes pneumasin planois kai didaskaliais daimoniōn,
4.2: en hypokrisei pseudologōn, kekaustēriasmenōn tēn idian syneidēsin,
4.3: kōlyontōn gamein, apechesthai brōmatōn, ha ho Theos ektisen eis metalēmpsin meta eucharistias tois pistois kai epegnōkosi tēn alētheian.
4.4: hoti pan ktisma Theou kalon, kai ouden apoblēton meta eucharistias lambanomenon;
4.5: hagiazetai gar dia logou Theou kai enteuxeōs.
4.6: Tauta hypotithemenos tois adelphois kalos esē diakonos Christou Iēsou, entrephomenos tois logois tēs pisteōs kai tēs kalēs didaskalias hē parēkolouthēkas;
4.7: tous de bebēlous kai graōdeis mythous paraitou. gymnaze de seauton pros eusebeian.
4.8: hē gar sōmatikē gymnasia pros oligon estin ōphelimos; hē de eusebeia pros panta ōphelimos estin, epangelian echousa zōēs tēs nyn kai tēs mellousēs.
4.9: pistos ho logos kai pasēs apodochēs axios;
4.10: eis touto gar kopiōmen kai agōnizometha, hoti ēlpikamen epi Theō zōnti, hos estin Sōtēr pantōn anthrōpōn, malista pistōn.
4.11: Parangelle tauta kai didaske.
4.12: mēdeis sou tēs neotētos kataphroneitō, alla typos ginou tōn pistōn en logō, en anastrophē, en agapē, en pistei, en hagneia.
4.13: heōs erchomai proseche tē anagnōsei, tē paraklēsei, tē didaskalia.
4.14: mē amelei tou en soi charismatos, ho edothē soi dia prophēteias meta epitheseōs tōn cheirōn tou presbyteriou.
4.15: tauta meleta, en toutois isthi, hina sou hē prokopē phanera ē pasin.
4.16: epeche seautō kai tē didaskalia, epimene autois; touto gar poiōn kai seauton sōseis kai tous akouontas sou.

5.1: Presbyterō mē epiplēxēs, alla parakalei hōs patera, neōterous hōs adelphous,
5.2: presbyteras hōs mēteras, neōteras hōs adelphas en pasē hagneia.
5.4: ei de tis chēra tekna ē ekgona echei, manthanetōsan prōton ton idion oikon eusebein kai amoibas apodidonai tois progonois; touto gar estin apodekton enōpion tou Theou.
5.5: hē de ontōs chēra kai memonōmenē ēlpiken epi Theon kai prosmenei tais deēsesin kai tais proseuchais nyktos kai hēmeras;
5.7: kai tauta parangelle, hina anepilēmptoi ōsin.
5.8: ei de tis tōn idiōn kai malista oikeiōn ou pronoei, tēn pistin ērnētai kai estin apistou cheirōn.
5.9: Chēra katalegesthō mē elatton etōn hexēkonta gegonuia, henos andros gynē,
5.10: en ergois kalois martyroumenē, ei eteknotrophēsen, ei exenodochēsen, ei hagiōn podas enipsen, ei thlibomenois epērkesen, ei panti ergō agathō epēkolouthēsen.
5.11: neōteras de chēras paraitou; hotan gar katastrēniasōsin tou Christou, gamein thelousin,
5.12: echousai krima hoti tēn prōtēn pistin ēthetēsan;
5.13: hama de kai argai manthanousin, perierchomenai tas oikias, ou monon de argai alla kai phlyaroi kai periergoi, lalousai ta mē deonta.
5.14: boulomai oun neōteras gamein, teknogonein, oikodespotein, mēdemian aphormēn didonai tō antikeimenō loidorias charin;
5.15: ēdē gar tines exetrapēsan opisō tou Satana.
5.16: ei tis pistē echei chēras, eparkeitō autais, kai mē bareisthō hē ekklēsia, hina tais ontōs chērais eparkesē.
5.17: Hoi kalōs proestōtes presbyteroi diplēs timēs axiousthōsan, malista hoi kopiōntes en logō kai didaskalia.
5.18: legei gar hē graphē Boun aloōnta ou phimōseis, kai Axios ho ergatēs tou misthou autou.
5.19: kata presbyterou katēgorian mē paradechou, ektos ei mē epi dyo ē triōn martyrōn.
5.20: Tous hamartanontas enōpion pantōn elenche, hina kai hoi loipoi phobon echōsin.
5.21: diamartyromai enōpion tou Theou kai Christou Iēsou kai tōn eklektōn angelōn hina tauta phylaxēs chōris prokrimatos, mēden poiōn kata prosklisin.
5.22: Cheiras tacheōs mēdeni epitithei, mēde koinōnei hamartiais allotriais; seauton hagnon tērei.
5.23: Mēketi hydropotei, alla oinō oligō chrō dia ton stomachon kai tas pyknas sou astheneias.
5.24: Tinōn anthrōpōn hai hamartiai prodēloi eisin proagousai eis krisin, tisin de kai epakolouthousin;
5.25: hōsautōs kai ta erga ta kala prodēla, kai ta allōs echonta krybēnai ou dynantai.

6.1: Hosoi eisin hypo zygon douloi, tous idious despotas pasēs timēs axious hēgeisthōsan, hina mē to onoma tou Theou kai hē didaskalia blasphēmētai.
6.2: hoi de pistous echontes despotas mē kataphroneitōsan, hoti adelphoi eisin, alla mallon douleuetōsan, hoti pistoi eisin kai agapētoi hoi tēs euergesias antilambanomenoi. Tauta didaske kai parakalei.
6.3: ei tis heterodidaskalei kai mē proserchetai hygiainousin logois, tois tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou, kai tē kat’ eusebeian didaskalia,
6.4: tetyphōtai, mēden epistamenos, alla nosōn peri zētēseis kai logomachias, ex hōn ginetai phthonos, eris, blasphēmiai, hyponoiai ponērai,
6.5: diaparatribai diephtharmenōn anthrōpōn ton noun kai apesterēmenōn tēs alētheias, nomizontōn porismon einai tēn eusebeian.
6.6: estin de porismos megas hē eusebeia meta autarkeias;
6.7: ouden gar eisēnenkamen eis ton kosmon, hoti oude exenenkein ti dynametha;
6.8: echontes de diatrophas kai skepasmata, toutois arkesthēsometha.
6.9: hoi de boulomenoi ploutein empiptousin eis peirasmon kai pagida kai epithymias pollas anoētous kai blaberas, haitines bythizousin tous anthrōpous eis olethron kai apōleian.
6.10: rhiza gar pantōn tōn kakōn estin hē philargyria, hēs tines oregomenoi apeplanēthēsan apo tēs pisteōs kai heautous periepeiran odynais pollais.
6.11: Sy de, ō anthrōpe Theou, tauta pheuge; diōke de dikaiosynēn, eusebeian, pistin, agapēn, hypomonēn, praupathian.
6.12: agōnizou ton kalon agōna tēs pisteōs, epilabou tēs aiōniou zōēs, eis hēn eklēthēs kai hōmologēsas tēn kalēn homologian enōpion pollōn martyrōn.
6.13: parangellō enōpion tou Theou tou zōogonountos ta panta kai Christou Iēsou tou martyrēsantos epi Pontiou Peilatou tēn kalēn homologian,
6.14: tērēsai se tēn entolēn aspilon anepilēmpton mechri tēs epiphaneias tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou,
6.15: hēn kairois idiois deixei ho makarios kai monos Dynastēs, ho Basileus tōn basileuontōn kai Kyrios tōn kyrieuontōn,
6.16: ho monos echōn athanasian, phōs oikōn aprositon, hon eiden oudeis anthrōpōn oude idein dynatai; hō timē kai kratos aiōnion; amēn.
6.17: Tois plousiois en tō nyn aiōni parangelle mē hypsēlophronein, mēde ēlpikenai epi ploutou adēlotēti, all’ epi Theō tō parechonti hēmin panta plousiōs eis apolausin,
6.18: agathoergein, ploutein en ergois kalois, eumetadotous einai, koinōnikous,
6.19: apothēsaurizontas heautois themelion kalon eis to mellon, hina epilabōntai tēs ontōs zōēs.
6.20: Ō Timothee, tēn parathēkēn phylaxon, ektrepomenos tas bebēlous kenophōnias kai antitheseis tēs pseudōnymou gnōseōs,
6.21: hēn tines epangellomenoi peri tēn pistin ēstochēsan. HĒ charis meth’ hymōn.

1.1: Paulos apostolos Christou Iēsou dia thelēmatos Theou kat’ epangelian zōēs tēs en Christō Iēsou
1.2: Timotheō agapētō teknō; charis, eleos, eirēnē apo Theou Patros kai Christou Iēsou tou Kyriou hēmōn.
1.3: Charin echō tō Theō, hō latreuō apo progonōn en kathara syneidēsei, hōs adialeipton echō tēn peri sou mneian en tais deēsesin mou nyktos kai hēmeras,
1.4: epipothōn se idein, memnēmenos sou tōn dakryōn, hina charas plērōthō,
1.5: hypomnēsin labōn tēs en soi anypokritou pisteōs, hētis enōkēsen prōton en tē mammē sou Lōidi kai tē mētri sou Eunikē, pepeismai de hoti kai en soi.
1.6: Di’ hēn aitian anamimnēskō se anazōpyrein to charisma tou Theou, ho estin en soi dia tēs epitheseōs tōn cheirōn mou.
1.7: ou gar edōken hēmin ho Theos pneuma deilias, alla dynameōs kai agapēs kai sōphronismou.
1.8: Mē oun epaischynthēs to martyrion tou Kyriou hēmōn mēde eme ton desmion autou, alla synkakopathēson tō euangeliō kata dynamin Theou,
1.9: tou sōsantos hēmas kai kalesantos klēsei hagia, ou kata ta erga hēmōn alla kata idian prothesin kai charin, tēn dotheisan hēmin en Christō Iēsou pro chronōn aiōniōn,
1.10: phanerōtheisan de nyn dia tēs epiphaneias tou Sōtēros hēmōn Christou Iēsou, katargēsantos men ton thanaton phōtisantos de zōēn kai aphtharsian dia tou euangeliou,
1.11: eis ho etethēn egō kēryx kai apostolos kai didaskalos;
1.12: di’ hēn aitian kai tauta paschō, all’ ouk epaischynomai, oida gar hō pepisteuka, kai pepeismai hoti dynatos estin tēn parathēkēn mou phylaxai eis ekeinēn tēn hēmeran.
1.13: hypotypōsin eche hygiainontōn logōn hōn par’ emou ēkousas en pistei kai agapē tē en Christō Iēsou;
1.14: tēn kalēn parathēkēn phylaxon dia Pneumatos Hagiou tou enoikountos en hēmin.
1.15: Oidas touto, hoti apestraphēsan me pantes hoi en tē Asia, hōn estin Phygelos kai Hermogenēs.
1.16: dōē eleos ho Kyrios tō Onēsiphorou oikō, hoti pollakis me anepsyxen, kai tēn halysin mou ouk epaischynthē,
1.17: alla genomenos en Rhōmē spoudaiōs ezētēsen me kai heuren;—
1.18: dōē autō ho Kyrios heurein eleos para Kyriou en ekeinē tē hēmera;— kai hosa en Ephesō diēkonēsen, beltion sy ginōskeis.

2.1: Sy oun, teknon mou, endynamou en tē chariti tē en Christō Iēsou,
2.2: kai ha ēkousas par’ emou dia pollōn martyrōn, tauta parathou pistois anthrōpois, hoitines hikanoi esontai kai heterous didaxai.
2.3: synkakopathēson hōs kalos stratiōtēs Christou Iēsou.
2.4: oudeis strateuomenos empleketai tais tou biou pragmateiais, hina tō stratologēsanti aresē.
2.5: ean de kai athlē tis, ou stephanoutai ean mē nomimōs athlēsē.
2.6: ton kopiōnta geōrgon dei prōton tōn karpōn metalambanein.
2.7: noei ho legō; dōsei gar soi ho Kyrios synesin en pasin.
2.8: Mnēmoneue Iēsoun Christon egēgermenon ek nekrōn, ek spermatos Daueid, kata to euangelion mou;
2.9: en hō kakopathō mechri desmōn hōs kakourgos, alla ho logos tou Theou ou dedetai.
2.10: dia touto panta hypomenō dia tous eklektous, hina kai autoi sōtērias tychōsin tēs en Christō Iēsou meta doxēs aiōniou.
2.11: Pistos ho logos; ei gar synapethanomen, kai syzēsomen;
2.12: ei hypomenomen, kai synbasileusomen; ei arnēsometha, kakeinos arnēsetai hēmas;
2.13: ei apistoumen, ekeinos pistos menei, arnēsasthai gar heauton ou dynatai.
2.14: Tauta hypomimnēske, diamartyromenos enōpion tou Theou mē logomachein, ep’ ouden chrēsimon, epi katastrophē tōn akouontōn.
2.15: spoudason seauton dokimon parastēsai tō Theō, ergatēn anepaischynton, orthotomounta ton logon tēs alētheias.
2.16: tas de bebēlous kenophōnias periistaso; epi pleion gar prokopsousin asebeias,
2.17: kai ho logos autōn hōs gangraina nomēn hexei; hōn estin Hymenaios kai Philētos,
2.18: hoitines peri tēn alētheian ēstochēsan, legontes anastasin ēdē gegonenai, kai anatrepousin tēn tinōn pistin.
2.19: ho mentoi stereos themelios tou Theou hestēken, echōn tēn sphragida tautēn Egnō Kyrios tous ontas autou, kai Apostētō apo adikias pas ho onomazōn to onoma Kyriou.
2.20: en megalē de oikia ouk estin monon skeuē chrysa kai argyra, alla kai xylina kai ostrakina, kai ha men eis timēn ha de eis atimian;
2.21: ean oun tis ekkatharē heauton apo toutōn, estai skeuos eis timēn, hēgiasmenon, euchrēston tō despotē, eis pan ergon agathon hētoimasmenon.
2.22: tas de neōterikas epithymias pheuge, diōke de dikaiosynēn, pistin, agapēn, eirēnēn meta tōn epikaloumenōn ton Kyrion ek katharas kardias.
2.23: tas de mōras kai apaideutous zētēseis paraitou, eidōs hoti gennōsin machas;
2.24: doulon de Kyriou ou dei machesthai alla ēpion einai pros pantas, didaktikon, anexikakon,
2.25: en prautēti paideuonta tous antidiatithemenous, mē pote dōē autois ho Theos metanoian eis epignōsin alētheias,
2.26: kai ananēpsōsin ek tēs tou diabolou pagidos, ezōgrēmenoi hyp’ autou eis to ekeinou thelēma.

3.1: Touto de ginōske, hoti en eschatais hēmerais enstēsontai kairoi chalepoi;
3.2: esontai gar hoi anthrōpoi philautoi, philargyroi, alazones, hyperēphanoi, blasphēmoi, goneusin apeitheis, acharistoi, anosioi,
3.3: astorgoi, aspondoi, diaboloi, akrateis, anēmeroi, aphilagathoi,
3.4: prodotai, propeteis, tetyphōmenoi, philēdonoi mallon ē philotheoi,
3.5: echontes morphōsin eusebeias tēn de dynamin autēs ērnēmenoi; kai toutous apotrepou.
3.6: ek toutōn gar eisin hoi endynontes eis tas oikias kai aichmalōtizontes gynaikaria sesōreumena hamartiais, agomena epithymiais poikilais,
3.7: pantote manthanonta kai mēdepote eis epignōsin alētheias elthein dynamena.
3.8: hon tropon de Iannēs kai Iambrēs antestēsan Mōusei, houtōs kai houtoi anthistantai tē alētheia, anthrōpoi katephtharmenoi ton noun, adokimoi peri tēn pistin.
3.9: all’ ou prokopsousin epi pleion; hē gar anoia autōn ekdēlos estai pasin, hōs kai hē ekeinōn egeneto.
3.10: Sy de parēkolouthēsas mou tē didaskalia, tē agōgē, tē prothesei, tē pistei, tē makrothymia, tē agapē, tē hypomonē,
3.11: tois diōgmois, tois pathēmasin, hoia moi egeneto en Antiocheia, en Ikoniō, en Lystrois; hoious diōgmous hypēnenka, kai ek pantōn me erysato ho Kyrios.
3.12: kai pantes de hoi thelontes zēn eusebōs en Christō Iēsou diōchthēsontai.
3.13: ponēroi de anthrōpoi kai goētes prokopsousin epi to cheiron, planōntes kai planōmenoi.
3.14: sy de mene en hois emathes kai epistōthēs, eidōs para tinōn emathes,
3.15: kai hoti apo brephous hiera grammata oidas, ta dynamena se sophisai eis sōtērian dia pisteōs tēs en Christō Iēsou.
3.16: pasa graphē theopneustos kai ōphelimos pros didaskalian, pros elegmon, pros epanorthōsin, pros paideian tēn en dikaiosynē,
3.17: hina artios ē ho tou Theou anthrōpos, pros pan ergon agathon exērtismenos.

4.1: Diamartyromai enōpion tou Theou kai Christou Iēsou, tou mellontos krinein zōntas kai nekrous, kai tēn epiphaneian autou kai tēn basileian autou;
4.2: kēryxon ton logon, epistēthi eukairōs akairōs, elenxon, epitimēson, parakaleson, en pasē makrothymia kai didachē.
4.3: estai gar kairos hote tēs hygiainousēs didaskalias ouk anexontai, alla kata tas idias epithymias heautois episōreusousin didaskalous knēthomenoi tēn akoēn,
4.4: kai apo men tēs alētheias tēn akoēn apostrepsousin, epi de tous mythous ektrapēsontai.
4.5: sy de nēphe en pasin, kakopathēson, ergon poiēson euangelistou, tēn diakonian sou plērophorēson.
4.6: Egō gar ēdē spendomai, kai ho kairos tēs analyseōs mou ephestēken.
4.7: ton kalon agōna ēgōnismai, ton dromon teteleka, tēn pistin tetērēka;
4.8: loipon apokeitai moi ho tēs dikaiosynēs stephanos, hon apodōsei moi ho kyrios en ekeinē tē hēmera, ho dikaios kritēs, ou monon de emoi alla kai pasi tois ēgapēkosi tēn epiphaneian autou.
4.9: Spoudason elthein pros me tacheōs;
4.10: Dēmas gar me enkatelipen agapēsas ton nyn aiōna, kai eporeuthē eis Thessalonikēn, Krēskēs eis Galatian, Titos eis Dalmatian;
4.11: Loukas estin monos met’ emou. Markon analabōn age meta seautou; estin gar moi euchrēstos eis diakonian.
4.13: ton phelonēn, hon apelipon en Trōadi para Karpō, erchomenos phere, kai ta biblia, malista tas membranas.
4.14: Alexandros ho chalkeus polla moi kaka enedeixato; apodōsei autō ho Kyrios kata ta erga autou;
4.15: hon kai sy phylassou; lian gar antestē tois hēmeterois logois.
4.16: En tē prōtē mou apologia oudeis moi paregeneto, alla pantes me enkatelipon; mē autois logistheiē;
4.17: ho de Kyrios moi parestē kai enedynamōsen me, hina di’ emou to kērygma plērophorēthē kai akousōsin panta ta ethnē, kai erysthēn ek stomatos leontos.
4.18: rhysetai me ho Kyrios apo pantos ergou ponērou kai sōsei eis tēn basileian autou tēn epouranion; hō hē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn, amēn.
4.19: Aspasai Priskan kai Akylan kai ton Onēsiphorou oikon.
4.20: Erastos emeinen en Korinthō, Trophimon de apelipon en Milētō asthenounta.
4.21: Spoudason pro cheimōnos elthein. Aspazetai se Euboulos kai Poudēs kai Linos kai Klaudia kai hoi adelphoi pantes.
4.22: HO Kyrios meta tou pneumatos sou. hē charis meth’ hymōn.

1.1: Paulos doulos Theou, apostolos de Iēsou Christou kata pistin eklektōn Theou kai epignōsin alētheias tēs kat’ eusebeian
1.2: ep’ elpidi zōēs aiōniou, hēn epēngeilato ho apseudēs Theos pro chronōn aiōniōn,
1.3: ephanerōsen de kairois idiois ton logon autou en kērygmati ho episteuthēn egō kat’ epitagēn tou Sōtēros hēmōn Theou,
1.4: Titō gnēsiō teknō kata koinēn pistin; charis kai eirēnē apo Theou Patros kai Christou Iēsou tou Sōtēros hēmōn.
1.5: Toutou charin apelipon se en Krētē hina ta leiponta epidiorthōsē, kai katastēsēs kata polin presbyterous, hōs egō soi dietaxamēn,
1.6: ei tis estin anenklētos, mias gynaikos anēr, tekna echōn pista, mē en katēgoria asōtias ē anypotakta.
1.7: dei gar ton episkopon anenklēton einai hōs Theou oikonomon, mē authadē, mē orgilon, mē paroinon, mē plēktēn, mē aischrokerdē,
1.8: alla philoxenon, philagathon, sōphrona, dikaion, hosion, enkratē,
1.9: antechomenon tou kata tēn didachēn pistou logou, hina dynatos ē kai parakalein en tē didaskalia tē hygiainousē kai tous antilegontas elenchein.
1.10: Eisin gar polloi anypotaktoi, mataiologoi kai phrenapatai, malista hoi ek tēs peritomēs,
1.11: hous dei epistomizein, hoitines holous oikous anatrepousin didaskontes ha mē dei aischrou kerdous charin.
1.12: eipen tis ex autōn idios autōn prophētēs Krētes aei pseustai, kaka thēria, gasteres argai.
1.13: hē martyria hautē estin alēthēs. di’ hēn aitian elenche autous apotomōs, hina hygiainōsin en tē pistei,
1.14: mē prosechontes Ioudaikois mythois kai entolais anthrōpōn apostrephomenōn tēn alētheian.
1.15: panta kathara tois katharois; tois de memiammenois kai apistois ouden katharon, alla memiantai autōn kai ho nous kai hē syneidēsis.
1.16: Theon homologousin eidenai, tois de ergois arnountai, bdelyktoi ontes kai apeitheis kai pros pan ergon agathon adokimoi.

2.1: Sy de lalei ha prepei tē hygiainousē didaskalia.
2.2: presbytas nēphalious einai, semnous, sōphronas, hygiainontas tē pistei, tē agapē, tē hypomonē;
2.3: presbytidas hōsautōs en katastēmati hieroprepeis, mē diabolous mēde oinō pollō dedoulōmenas, kalodidaskalous,
2.4: hina sōphronizōsin tas neas philandrous einai, philoteknous,
2.5: sōphronas, hagnas, oikourgous, agathas, hypotassomenas tois idiois andrasin, hina mē ho logos tou Theou blasphēmētai.
2.6: Tous neōterous hōsautōs parakalei sōphronein
2.7: peri panta, seauton parechomenos typon kalōn ergōn, en tē didaskalia aphthorian, semnotēta,
2.8: logon hygiē akatagnōston, hina ho ex enantias entrapē mēden echōn legein peri hēmōn phaulon.
2.9: doulous idiois despotais hypotassesthai en pasin, euarestous einai, mē antilegontas,
2.10: mē nosphizomenous, alla pasan pistin endeiknymenous agathēn, hina tēn didaskalian tēn tou Sōtēros hēmōn Theou kosmōsin en pasin.
2.11: Epephanē gar hē charis tou Theou sōtērios pasin anthrōpois,
2.12: paideuousa hēmas, hina arnēsamenoi tēn asebeian kai tas kosmikas epithymias sōphronōs kai dikaiōs kai eusebōs zēsōmen en tō nyn aiōni,
2.13: prosdechomenoi tēn makarian elpida kai epiphaneian tēs doxēs tou megalou Theou kai Sōtēros hēmōn Christou Iēsou,
2.14: hos edōken heauton hyper hēmōn hina lytrōsētai hēmas apo pasēs anomias kai katharisē heautō laon periousion, zēlōtēn kalōn ergōn.
2.15: Tauta lalei kai parakalei kai elenche meta pasēs epitagēs; mēdeis sou periphroneitō.

3.1: Hypomimnēske autous archais exousiais hypotassesthai, peitharchein, pros pan ergon agathon hetoimous einai,
3.2: mēdena blasphēmein, amachous einai, epieikeis, pasan endeiknymenous prautēta pros pantas anthrōpous.
3.3: Ēmen gar pote kai hēmeis anoētoi, apeitheis, planōmenoi, douleuontes epithymiais kai hēdonais poikilais, en kakia kai phthonō diagontes, stygētoi, misountes allēlous.
3.4: hote de hē chrēstotēs kai hē philanthrōpia epephanē tou Sōtēros hēmōn Theou,
3.5: ouk ex ergōn tōn en dikaiosynē ha epoiēsamen hēmeis alla kata to autou eleos esōsen hēmas dia loutrou palingenesias kai anakainōseōs Pneumatos Hagiou,
3.6: hou execheen eph’ hēmas plousiōs dia Iēsou Christou tou Sōtēros hēmōn,
3.7: hina dikaiōthentes tē ekeinou chariti klēronomoi genēthōmen kat’ elpida zōēs aiōniou.
3.8: Pistos ho logos, kai peri toutōn boulomai se diabebaiousthai, hina phrontizōsin kalōn ergōn proistasthai hoi pepisteukotes Theō. tauta estin kala kai ōphelima tois anthrōpois;
3.9: mōras de zētēseis kai genealogias kai erin kai machas nomikas periistaso; eisin gar anōpheleis kai mataioi.
3.10: hairetikon anthrōpon meta mian kai deuteran nouthesian paraitou,
3.11: eidōs hoti exestraptai ho toioutos kai hamartanei, ōn autokatakritos.
3.12: Hotan pempsō Arteman pros se ē Tychikon, spoudason elthein pros me eis Nikopolin; ekei gar kekrika paracheimasai.
3.13: Zēnan ton nomikon kai Apollōn spoudaiōs propempson, hina mēden autois leipē.
3.14: manthanetōsan de kai hoi hēmeteroi kalōn ergōn proistasthai eis tas anankaias chreias, hina mē ōsin akarpoi.
3.15: Aspazontai se hoi met’ emou pantes. aspasai tous philountas hēmas en pistei. HĒ charis meta pantōn hymōn.

1.1: Paulos desmios Christou Iēsou kai Timotheos ho adelphos Philēmoni tō agapētō kai synergō hēmōn
1.2: kai Apphia tē adelphē kai Archippō tō systratiōtē hēmōn kai tē kat’ oikon sou ekklēsia;
1.3: charis hymin kai eirēnē apo Theou Patros hēmōn kai Kyriou Iēsou Christou.
1.4: Eucharistō tō Theō mou pantote mneian sou poioumenos epi tōn proseuchōn mou,
1.5: akouōn sou tēn agapēn kai tēn pistin hēn echeis pros ton Kyrion Iēsoun kai eis pantas tous hagious,
1.6: hopōs hē koinōnia tēs pisteōs sou energēs genētai en epignōsei pantos agathou tou en hēmin eis Christon;
1.7: charan gar pollēn eschon kai paraklēsin epi tē agapē sou, hoti ta splanchna tōn hagiōn anapepautai dia sou, adelphe.
1.8: Dio, pollēn en Christō parrēsian echōn epitassein soi to anēkon,
1.9: dia tēn agapēn mallon parakalō, toioutos ōn hōs Paulos presbytēs nyni de kai desmios Christou Iēsou,
1.10: parakalō se peri tou emou teknou, hon egennēsa en tois desmois, Onēsimon,
1.11: ton pote soi achrēston nyni de kai soi kai emoi euchrēston,
1.12: hon anepempsa soi auton, tout’ estin ta ema splanchna;
1.13: hon egō eboulomēn pros emauton katechein, hina hyper sou moi diakonē en tois desmois tou euangeliou,
1.14: chōris de tēs sēs gnōmēs ouden ēthelēsa poiēsai, hina mē hōs kata anankēn to agathon sou ē alla kata hekousion.
1.15: tacha gar dia touto echōristhē pros hōran, hina aiōnion auton apechēs,
1.16: ouketi hōs doulon alla hyper doulon, adelphon agapēton, malista emoi, posō de mallon soi kai en sarki kai en Kyriō.
1.17: ei oun me echeis koinōnon, proslabou auton hōs eme.
1.18: ei de ti ēdikēsen se ē opheilei, touto emoi elloga;
1.19: egō Paulos egrapsa tē emē cheiri, egō apotisō; hina mē legō soi hoti kai seauton moi prosopheileis.
1.20: nai, adelphe, egō sou onaimēn en Kyriō; anapauson mou ta splanchna en Christō.
1.21: Pepoithōs tē hypakoē sou egrapsa soi, eidōs hoti kai hyper ha legō poiēseis.
1.22: hama de kai hetoimaze moi xenian; elpizō gar hoti dia tōn proseuchōn hymōn charisthēsomai hymin.
1.23: Aspazetai se Epaphras ho synaichmalōtos mou en Christō Iēsou,
1.24: Markos, Aristarchos, Dēmas, Loukas, hoi synergoi mou.
1.25: HĒ charis tou Kyriou Iēsou Christou meta tou pneumatos hymōn.

1.1: Polymerōs kai polytropōs palai ho Theos lalēsas tois patrasin en tois prophētais
1.2: ep’ eschatou tōn hēmerōn toutōn elalēsen hēmin en Huiō, hon ethēken klēronomon pantōn, di’ hou kai epoiēsen tous aiōnas;
1.3: hos ōn apaugasma tēs doxēs kai charaktēr tēs hypostaseōs autou, pherōn te ta panta tō rhēmati tēs dynameōs autou, katharismon tōn hamartiōn poiēsamenos ekathisen en dexia tēs Megalōsynēs en hypsēlois,
1.4: tosoutō kreittōn genomenos tōn angelōn hosō diaphorōteron par’ autous keklēronomēken onoma.
1.5: Tini gar eipen pote tōn angelōn Huios mou ei sy, egō sēmeron gegennēka se? kai palin Egō esomai autō eis Patera, kai autos estai moi eis Huion?
1.6: hotan de palin eisagagē ton prōtotokon eis tēn oikoumenēn, legei Kai proskynēsatōsan autō pantes angeloi Theou.
1.7: kai pros men tous angelous legei HO poiōn tous angelous autou pneumata, kai tous leitourgous autou pyros phloga;
1.8: pros de ton Huion HO thronos sou ho Theos eis ton aiōna tou aiōnos, kai hē rhabdos tēs euthytētos rhabdos tēs basileias autou.
1.9: ēgapēsas dikaiosynēn kai emisēsas anomian; dia touto echrisen se, ho Theos, ho Theos sou elaion agalliaseōs para tous metochous sou.
1.10: kai Sy kat’ archas, Kyrie, tēn gēn ethemeliōsas, kai erga tōn cheirōn sou eisin hoi ouranoi;
1.11: autoi apolountai, sy de diameneis; kai pantes hōs himation palaiōthēsontai,
1.12: kai hōsei peribolaion helixeis autous, hōs himation kai allagēsontai; sy de ho autos ei kai ta etē sou ouk ekleipsousin.
1.13: pros tina de tōn angelōn eirēken pote Kathou ek dexiōn mou heōs an thō tous echthrous sou hypopodion tōn podōn sou?
1.14: ouchi pantes eisin leitourgika pneumata eis diakonian apostellomena dia tous mellontas klēronomein sōtērian?

2.1: Dia touto dei perissoterōs prosechein hēmas tois akoustheisin, mē pote pararyōmen.
2.2: ei gar ho di’ angelōn lalētheis logos egeneto bebaios, kai pasa parabasis kai parakoē elaben endikon misthapodosian,
2.3: pōs hēmeis ekpheuxometha tēlikautēs amelēsantes sōtērias? hētis archēn labousa laleisthai dia tou Kyriou, hypo tōn akousantōn eis hēmas ebebaiōthē,
2.4: synepimartyrountos tou Theou sēmeiois te kai terasin kai poikilais dynamesin kai Pneumatos Hagiou merismois kata tēn autou thelēsin.
2.5: Ou gar angelois hypetaxen tēn oikoumenēn tēn mellousan, peri hēs laloumen.
2.6: diemartyrato de pou tis legōn Ti estin anthrōpos hoti mimnēskē autou? ē huios anthrōpou hoti episkeptē auton?
2.7: ēlattōsas auton brachy ti par’ angelous, doxē kai timē estephanōsas auton,
2.8: panta hypetaxas hypokatō tōn podōn autou. en tō gar hypotaxai autō ta panta ouden aphēken autō anypotakton. nyn de oupō horōmen autō ta panta hypotetagmena;
2.9: ton de brachy ti par’ angelous ēlattōmenon blepomen Iēsoun dia to pathēma tou thanatou doxē kai timē estephanōmenon, hopōs chariti Theou hyper pantos geusētai thanatou.
2.10: Eprepen gar autō, di’ hon ta panta kai di’ hou ta panta, pollous huious eis doxan agagonta ton archēgon tēs sōtērias autōn dia pathēmatōn teleiōsai.
2.11: ho te gar hagiazōn kai hoi hagiazomenoi ex henos pantes; di’ hēn aitian ouk epaischynetai adelphous autous kalein,
2.12: legōn Apangelō to onoma sou tois adelphois mou, en mesō ekklēsias hymnēsō se;
2.13: kai palin Egō esomai pepoithōs ep’ autō; kai palin Idou egō kai ta paidia ha moi edōken ho Theos.
2.14: epei oun ta paidia kekoinōnēken haimatos kai sarkos, kai autos paraplēsiōs meteschen tōn autōn, hina dia tou thanatou katargēsē ton to kratos echonta tou thanatou, tout’ estin ton diabolon,
2.15: kai apallaxē toutous, hosoi phobō thanatou dia pantos tou zēn enochoi ēsan douleias.
2.16: ou gar dēpou angelōn epilambanetai, alla spermatos Abraam epilambanetai.
2.17: hothen ōpheilen kata panta tois adelphois homoiōthēnai, hina eleēmōn genētai kai pistos archiereus ta pros ton Theon, eis to hilaskesthai tas hamartias tou laou.
2.18: en hō gar peponthen autos peirastheis, dynatai tois peirazomenois boēthēsai.

3.1: Hothen, adelphoi hagioi, klēseōs epouraniou metochoi, katanoēsate ton Apostolon kai Archierea tēs homologias hēmōn Iēsoun,
3.2: piston onta tō poiēsanti auton, hōs kai Mōusēs en holō tō oikō autou.
3.3: pleionos gar houtos doxēs para Mōusēn ēxiōtai kath’ hoson pleiona timēn echei tou oikou ho kataskeuasas auton.
3.4: pas gar oikos kataskeuazetai hypo tinos, ho de panta kataskeuasas Theos.
3.5: kai Mōusēs men pistos en holō tō oikō autou hōs therapōn eis martyrion tōn lalēthēsomenōn,
3.6: Christos de hōs huios epi ton oikon autou; hou oikos esmen hēmeis, ean tēn parrēsian kai to kauchēma tēs elpidos mechri telous bebaian kataschōmen.
3.7: Dio, kathōs legei to Pneuma to Hagion Sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte,
3.8: mē sklērynēte tas kardias hymōn hōs en tō parapikrasmō kata tēn hēmeran tou peirasmou en tē erēmō,
3.9: hou epeirasan hoi pateres hymōn en dokimasia kai eidon ta erga mou
3.10: tesserakonta etē. dio prosōchthisa tē genea tautē kai eipon Aei planōntai tē kardia; autoi de ouk egnōsan tas hodous mou,
3.11: hōs ōmosa en tē orgē mou Ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou.
3.12: blepete, adelphoi, mē pote estai en tini hymōn kardia ponēra apistias en tō apostēnai apo Theou zōntos,
3.13: alla parakaleite heautous kath’ hekastēn hēmeran, achris hou to Sēmeron kaleitai, hina mē sklērynthē tis ex hymōn apatē tēs hamartias;
3.14: metochoi gar tou Christou gegonamen, eanper tēn archēn tēs hypostaseōs mechri telous bebaian kataschōmen.
3.15: en tō legesthai Sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte, Mē sklērynēte tas kardias hymōn hōs en tō parapikrasmō.
3.16: tines gar akousantes parepikranan? all’ ou pantes hoi exelthontes ex Aigyptou dia Mōuseōs?
3.17: tisin de prosōchthisen tesserakonta etē? ouchi tois hamartēsasin, hōn ta kōla epesen en tē erēmō?
3.18: tisin de ōmosen mē eiseleusesthai eis tēn katapausin autou ei mē tois apeithēsasin?
3.19: kai blepomen hoti ouk ēdynēthēsan eiselthein di’ apistian.

4.1: phobēthōmen oun mē pote kataleipomenēs epangelias eiselthein eis tēn katapausin autou dokē tis ex hymōn hysterēkenai.
4.2: kai gar esmen euēngelismenoi kathaper kakeinoi; all’ ouk ōphelēsen ho logos tēs akoēs ekeinous mē synkekerasmenos tē pistei tois akousasin.
4.3: Eiserchometha gar eis tēn katapausin hoi pisteusantes, kathōs eirēken Hōs ōmosa en tē orgē mou Ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou, kaitoi tōn ergōn apo katabolēs kosmou genēthentōn.
4.4: eirēken gar pou peri tēs hebdomēs houtōs Kai katepausen ho Theos en tē hēmera tē hebdomē apo pantōn tōn ergōn autou;
4.5: kai en toutō palin Ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou.
4.6: epei oun apoleipetai tinas eiselthein eis autēn, kai hoi proteron euangelisthentes ouk eisēlthon di’ apeitheian,
4.7: palin tina horizei hēmeran, Sēmeron, en Daueid legōn meta tosouton chronon, kathōs proeirētai Sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte, mē sklērynēte tas kardias hymōn.
4.8: ei gar autous Iēsous katepausen, ouk an peri allēs elalei meta tauta hēmeras.
4.9: ara apoleipetai sabbatismos tō laō tou Theou.
4.10: ho gar eiselthōn eis tēn katapausin autou kai autos katepausen apo tōn ergōn autou, hōsper apo tōn idiōn ho Theos.
4.11: Spoudasōmen oun eiselthein eis ekeinēn tēn katapausin, hina mē en tō autō tis hypodeigmati pesē tēs apeitheias.
4.12: Zōn gar ho logos tou Theou kai energēs kai tomōteros hyper pasan machairan distomon kai diiknoumenos achri merismou psychēs kai pneumatos, harmōn te kai myelōn, kai kritikos enthymēseōn kai ennoiōn kardias;
4.13: kai ouk estin ktisis aphanēs enōpion autou, panta de gymna kai tetrachēlismena tois ophthalmois autou, pros hon hēmin ho logos.
4.14: Echontes oun archierea megan dielēlythota tous ouranous, Iēsoun ton Huion tou Theou, kratōmen tēs homologias.
4.15: ou gar echomen archierea mē dynamenon synpathēsai tais astheneiais hēmōn, pepeirasmenon de kata panta kath’ homoiotēta chōris hamartias.
4.16: proserchōmetha oun meta parrēsias tō thronō tēs charitos, hina labōmen eleos kai charin heurōmen eis eukairon boētheian.

5.1: Pas gar archiereus ex anthrōpōn lambanomenos hyper anthrōpōn kathistatai ta pros ton Theon, hina prospherē dōra te kai thysias hyper hamartiōn,
5.2: metriopathein dynamenos tois agnoousin kai planōmenois, epei kai autos perikeitai astheneian,
5.3: kai di’ autēn opheilei, kathōs peri tou laou, houtōs kai peri heautou prospherein peri hamartiōn.
5.4: kai ouch heautō tis lambanei tēn timēn, alla kaloumenos hypo tou Theou, kathōsper kai Aarōn.
5.5: Houtōs kai ho Christos ouch heauton edoxasen genēthēnai archierea, all’ ho lalēsas pros auton Huios mou ei sy, egō sēmeron gegennēka se;
5.6: kathōs kai en heterō legei Sy hiereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin Melchisedek.
5.7: hos en tais hēmerais tēs sarkos autou deēseis te kai hiketērias pros ton dynamenon sōzein auton ek thanatou meta kraugēs ischyras kai dakryōn prosenenkas kai eisakoustheis apo tēs eulabeias,
5.8: kaiper ōn Huios, emathen aph’ hōn epathen tēn hypakoēn,
5.9: kai teleiōtheis egeneto pasin tois hypakouousin autō aitios sōtērias aiōniou,
5.10: prosagoreutheis hypo tou Theou archiereus kata tēn taxin Melchisedek.
5.11: Peri hou polys hēmin ho logos kai dysermēneutos legein, epei nōthroi gegonate tais akoais.
5.12: kai gar opheilontes einai didaskaloi dia ton chronon, palin chreian echete tou didaskein hymas tina ta stoicheia tēs archēs tōn logiōn tou Theou, kai gegonate chreian echontes galaktos, ou stereas trophēs.
5.13: pas gar ho metechōn galaktos apeiros logou dikaiosynēs, nēpios gar estin;
5.14: teleiōn de estin hē sterea trophē, tōn dia tēn hexin ta aisthētēria gegymnasmena echontōn pros diakrisin kalou te kai kakou.

6.1: Dio aphentes ton tēs archēs tou Christou logon epi tēn teleiotēta pherōmetha, mē palin themelion kataballomenoi metanoias apo nekrōn ergōn, kai pisteōs epi Theon,
6.2: baptismōn didachēn, epitheseōs te cheirōn, anastaseōs nekrōn, kai krimatos aiōniou.
6.3: kai touto poiēsomen, eanper epitrepē ho Theos.
6.4: Adynaton gar tous hapax phōtisthentas geusamenous te tēs dōreas tēs epouraniou kai metochous genēthentas Pneumatos Hagiou
6.5: kai kalon geusamenous Theou rhēma dynameis te mellontos aiōnos,
6.6: kai parapesontas, palin anakainizein eis metanoian, anastaurountas heautois ton Huion tou Theou kai paradeigmatizontas.
6.7: gē gar hē piousa ton ep’ autēs erchomenon pollakis hyeton, kai tiktousa botanēn eutheton ekeinois di’ hous kai geōrgeitai, metalambanei eulogias apo tou Theou;
6.8: ekpherousa de akanthas kai tribolous adokimos kai kataras engys, hēs to telos eis kausin.
6.9: Pepeismetha de peri hymōn, agapētoi, ta kreissona kai echomena sōtērias, ei kai houtōs laloumen.
6.10: ou gar adikos ho Theos epilathesthai tou ergou hymōn kai tēs agapēs hēs enedeixasthe eis to onoma autou, diakonēsantes tois hagiois kai diakonountes.
6.11: epithymoumen de hekaston hymōn tēn autēn endeiknysthai spoudēn pros tēn plērophorian tēs elpidos achri telous,
6.12: hina mē nōthroi genēsthe, mimētai de tōn dia pisteōs kai makrothymias klēronomountōn tas epangelias.
6.13: Tō gar Abraam epangeilamenos ho Theos, epei kat’ oudenos eichen meizonos omosai, ōmosen kath’ heautou,
6.14: legōn Ei mēn eulogōn eulogēsō se kai plēthynōn plēthynō se;
6.15: kai houtōs makrothymēsas epetychen tēs epangelias.
6.16: anthrōpoi gar kata tou meizonos omnyousin, kai pasēs autois antilogias peras eis bebaiōsin ho horkos;
6.17: en hō perissoteron boulomenos ho Theos epideixai tois klēronomois tēs epangelias to ametatheton tēs boulēs autou emesiteusen horkō,
6.18: hina dia dyo pragmatōn ametathetōn, en hois adynaton pseusasthai Theon, ischyran paraklēsin echōmen hoi kataphygontes kratēsai tēs prokeimenēs elpidos;
6.19: hēn hōs ankyran echomen tēs psychēs asphalē te kai bebaian kai eiserchomenēn eis to esōteron tou katapetasmatos,
6.20: hopou prodromos hyper hēmōn eisēlthen Iēsous, kata tēn taxin Melchisedek archiereus genomenos eis ton aiōna.

7.1: Houtos gar ho Melchisedek, basileus Salēm, hiereus tou Theou tou Hypsistou, ho synantēsas Abraam hypostrephonti apo tēs kopēs tōn basileōn kai eulogēsas auton,
7.2: hō kai dekatēn apo pantōn emerisen Abraam, prōton men hermēneuomenos basileus dikaiosynēs, epeita de kai basileus Salēm, ho estin basileus eirēnēs,
7.3: apatōr, amētōr, agenealogētos, mēte archēn hēmerōn mēte zōēs telos echōn, aphōmoiōmenos de tō Huiō tou Theou, menei hiereus eis to diēnekes.
7.4: Theōreite de pēlikos houtos hō dekatēn Abraam edōken ek tōn akrothiniōn ho patriarchēs.
7.5: kai hoi men ek tōn huiōn Leuei tēn hierateian lambanontes entolēn echousin apodekatoin ton laon kata ton nomon, tout’ estin tous adelphous autōn, kaiper exelēlythotas ek tēs osphyos Abraam;
7.6: ho de mē genealogoumenos ex autōn dedekatōken Abraam, kai ton echonta tas epangelias eulogēken.
7.7: chōris de pasēs antilogias to elatton hypo tou kreittonos eulogeitai.
7.8: kai hōde men dekatas apothnēskontes anthrōpoi lambanousin, ekei de martyroumenos hoti zē.
7.9: kai hōs epos eipein, di’ Abraam kai Leueis ho dekatas lambanōn dedekatōtai;
7.10: eti gar en tē osphui tou patros ēn hote synēntēsen autō Melchisedek.
7.11: Ei men oun teleiōsis dia tēs Leueitikēs hierōsynēs ēn, ho laos gar ep’ autēs nenomothetētai, tis eti chreia kata tēn taxin Melchisedek heteron anistasthai hierea kai ou kata tēn taxin Aarōn legesthai?
7.12: metatithemenēs gar tēs hierōsynēs ex anankēs kai nomou metathesis ginetai.
7.13: eph’ hon gar legetai tauta, phylēs heteras meteschēken, aph’ hēs oudeis proseschēken tō thysiastēriō;
7.14: prodēlon gar hoti ex Iouda anatetalken ho Kyrios hēmōn, eis hēn phylēn peri hiereōn ouden Mōusēs elalēsen.
7.15: Kai perissoteron eti katadēlon estin, ei kata tēn homoiotēta Melchisedek anistatai hiereus heteros,
7.16: hos ou kata nomon entolēs sarkinēs gegonen alla kata dynamin zōēs akatalytou.
7.17: martyreitai gar hoti Sy hiereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin Melchisedek.
7.18: athetēsis men gar ginetai proagousēs entolēs dia to autēs asthenes kai anōpheles,
7.19: ouden gar eteleiōsen ho nomos, epeisagōgē de kreittonos elpidos, di’ hēs engizomen tō Theō.
7.20: Kai kath’ hoson ou chōris horkōmosias, —hoi men gar chōris horkōmosias eisin hiereis gegonotes,
7.21: ho de meta horkōmosias dia tou legontos pros auton Ōmosen Kyrios, kai ou metamelēthēsetai Sy hiereus eis ton aiōna;
7.22: —kata tosouto kai kreittonos diathēkēs gegonen engyos Iēsous.
7.23: Kai hoi men pleiones eisin gegonotes hiereis dia to thanatō kōlyesthai paramenein;
7.24: ho de dia to menein auton eis ton aiōna aparabaton echei tēn hierōsynēn;
7.25: hothen kai sōzein eis to panteles dynatai tous proserchomenous di’ autou tō Theō, pantote zōn eis to entynchanein hyper autōn.
7.26: Toioutos gar hēmin kai eprepen archiereus, hosios, akakos, amiantos, kechōrismenos apo tōn hamartōlōn, kai hypsēloteros tōn ouranōn genomenos;
7.27: hos ouk echei kath’ hēmeran anankēn, hōsper hoi archiereis, proteron hyper tōn idiōn hamartiōn thysias anapherein, epeita tōn tou laou; touto gar epoiēsen ephapax heauton anenenkas.
7.28: ho nomos gar anthrōpous kathistēsin archiereis echontas astheneian, ho logos de tēs horkōmosias tēs meta ton nomon Huion eis ton aiōna teteleiōmenon.

8.1: Kephalaion de epi tois legomenois, toiouton echomen archierea, hos ekathisen en dexia tou thronou tēs Megalōsynēs en tois ouranois,
8.2: tōn hagiōn leitourgos kai tēs skēnēs tēs alēthinēs, hēn epēxen ho Kyrios, ouk anthrōpos.
8.3: Pas gar archiereus eis to prospherein dōra te kai thysias kathistatai; hothen anankaion echein ti kai touton ho prosenenkē.
8.4: ei men oun ēn epi gēs, oud’ an ēn hiereus, ontōn tōn prospherontōn kata nomon ta dōra;
8.5: hoitines hypodeigmati kai skia latreuousin tōn epouraniōn, kathōs kechrēmatistai Mōusēs mellōn epitelein tēn skēnēn. Hora gar phēsin, poiēseis panta kata ton typon ton deichthenta soi en tō orei;
8.6: nyn de diaphorōteras tetychen leitourgias, hosō kai kreittonos estin diathēkēs mesitēs, hētis epi kreittosin epangeliais nenomothetētai.
8.7: ei gar hē prōtē ekeinē ēn amemptos, ouk an deuteras ezēteito topos.
8.8: memphomenos gar autous legei Idou hēmerai erchontai, legei Kyrios, kai syntelesō epi ton oikon Israēl kai epi ton oikon Iouda diathēkēn kainēn,
8.9: ou kata tēn diathēkēn hēn epoiēsa tois patrasin autōn en hēmera epilabomenou mou tēs cheiros autōn exagagein autous ek gēs Aigyptou, hoti autoi ouk enemeinan en tē diathēkē mou, kagō ēmelēsa autōn, legei Kyrios.
8.10: hoti hautē hē diathēkē hēn diathēsomai tō oikō Israēl meta tas hēmeras ekeinas, legei Kyrios, didous nomous mou eis tēn dianoian autōn, kai epi kardias autōn epigrapsō autous, kai esomai autois eis Theon kai autoi esontai moi eis laon.
8.11: kai ou mē didaxōsin hekastos ton politēn autou kai hekastos ton adelphon autou, legōn Gnōthi ton Kyrion, hoti pantes eidēsousin me apo mikrou heōs megalou autōn.
8.12: hoti hileōs esomai tais adikiais autōn, kai tōn hamartiōn autōn ou mē mnēsthō eti.
8.13: en tō legein Kainēn pepalaiōken tēn prōtēn; to de palaioumenon kai gēraskon engys aphanismou.

9.1: Eiche men oun kai hē prōtē dikaiōmata latreias to te hagion kosmikon.
9.2: skēnē gar kateskeuasthē hē prōtē, en hē hē te lychnia kai hē trapeza kai hē prothesis tōn artōn, hētis legetai Hagia;
9.3: meta de to deuteron katapetasma skēnē hē legomenē Hagia hagiōn,
9.4: chrysoun echousa thymiatērion kai tēn kibōton tēs diathēkēs perikekalymmenēn pantothen chrysiō, en hē stamnos chrysē echousa to manna kai hē rhabdos Aarōn hē blastēsasa kai hai plakes tēs diathēkēs,
9.5: hyperanō de autēs Cheroubein doxēs kataskiazonta to hilastērion; peri hōn ouk estin nyn legein kata meros.
9.6: Toutōn de houtōs kateskeuasmenōn eis men tēn prōtēn skēnēn dia pantos eisiasin hoi hiereis tas latreias epitelountes,
9.7: eis de tēn deuteran hapax tou eniautou monos ho archiereus, ou chōris haimatos, ho prospherei hyper heautou kai tōn tou laou agnoēmatōn,
9.8: touto dēlountos tou Pneumatos tou Hagiou, mēpō pephanerōsthai tēn tōn hagiōn hodon eti tēs prōtēs skēnēs echousēs stasin,
9.9: hētis parabolē eis ton kairon ton enestēkota, kath’ hēn dōra te kai thysiai prospherontai mē dynamenai kata syneidēsin teleiōsai ton latreuonta,
9.10: monon epi brōmasin kai pomasin kai diaphorois baptismois, dikaiōmata sarkos mechri kairou diorthōseōs epikeimena.
9.11: Christos de paragenomenos archiereus tōn genomenōn agathōn, dia tēs meizonos kai teleioteras skēnēs ou cheiropoiētou, tout’ estin ou tautēs tēs ktiseōs,
9.12: oude di’ haimatos tragōn kai moschōn, dia de tou idiou haimatos, eisēlthen ephapax eis ta hagia, aiōnian lytrōsin heuramenos.
9.13: ei gar to haima tragōn kai taurōn kai spodos damaleōs rhantizousa tous kekoinōmenous hagiazei pros tēn tēs sarkos katharotēta,
9.14: posō mallon to haima tou Christou, hos dia Pneumatos aiōniou heauton prosēnenken amōmon tō Theō, kathariei tēn syneidēsin hēmōn apo nekrōn ergōn eis to latreuein Theō zōnti.
9.15: Kai dia touto diathēkēs kainēs mesitēs estin, hopōs thanatou genomenou eis apolytrōsin tōn epi tē prōtē diathēkē parabaseōn tēn epangelian labōsin hoi keklēmenoi tēs aiōniou klēronomias.
9.16: hopou gar diathēkē, thanaton anankē pheresthai tou diathemenou;
9.17: diathēkē gar epi nekrois bebaia, epei mē pote ischyei hote zē ho diathemenos.
9.18: Hothen oude hē prōtē chōris haimatos enkekainistai.
9.19: lalētheisēs gar pasēs entolēs kata ton nomon hypo Mōuseōs panti tō laō, labōn to haima tōn moschōn kai tōn tragōn meta hydatos kai eriou kokkinou kai hyssōpou, auto te to biblion kai panta ton laon erantisen,
9.20: legōn Touto to haima tēs diathēkēs hēs eneteilato pros hymas ho Theos.
9.21: kai tēn skēnēn de kai panta ta skeuē tēs leitourgias tō haimati homoiōs erantisen.
9.22: kai schedon en haimati panta katharizetai kata ton nomon, kai chōris haimatekchysias ou ginetai aphesis.
9.23: Anankē oun ta men hypodeigmata tōn en tois ouranois toutois katharizesthai, auta de ta epourania kreittosin thysiais para tautas.
9.24: ou gar eis cheiropoiēta eisēlthen hagia Christos, antitypa tōn alēthinōn, all’ eis auton ton ouranon, nyn emphanisthēnai tō prosōpō tou Theou hyper hēmōn;
9.25: oud’ hina pollakis prospherē heauton, hōsper ho archiereus eiserchetai eis ta hagia kat’ eniauton en haimati allotriō,
9.26: epei edei auton pollakis pathein apo katabolēs kosmou; nyni de hapax epi synteleia tōn aiōnōn eis athetēsin tēs hamartias dia tēs thysias autou pephanerōtai.
9.27: kai kath’ hoson apokeitai tois anthrōpois hapax apothanein, meta de touto krisis,
9.28: houtōs kai ho Christos, hapax prosenechtheis eis to pollōn anenenkein hamartias, ek deuterou chōris hamartias ophthēsetai tois auton apekdechomenois eis sōtērian.

10.1: Skian gar echōn ho nomos tōn mellontōn agathōn, ouk autēn tēn eikona tōn pragmatōn, kat’ eniauton tais autais thysiais has prospherousin eis to diēnekes oudepote dynatai tous proserchomenous teleiōsai;
10.2: epei ouk an epausanto prospheromenai, dia to mēdemian echein eti syneidēsin hamartiōn tous latreuontas hapax kekatharismenous?
10.3: all’ en autais anamnēsis hamartiōn kat’ eniauton;
10.4: adynaton gar haima taurōn kai tragōn aphairein hamartias.
10.5: Dio eiserchomenos eis ton kosmon legei Thysian kai prosphoran ouk ēthelēsas, sōma de katērtisō moi;
10.6: holokautōmata kai peri hamartias ouk eudokēsas.
10.7: tote eipon Idou hēkō, en kephalidi bibliou gegraptai peri emou, tou poiēsai ho Theos, to thelēma sou.
10.8: anōteron legōn hoti Thysias kai prosphoras kai holokautōmata kai peri hamartias ouk ēthelēsas oude eudokēsas, haitines kata nomon prospherontai,
10.9: tote eirēken Idou hēkō tou poiēsai to thelēma sou. anairei to prōton hina to deuteron stēsē.
10.10: en hō thelēmati hēgiasmenoi esmen dia tēs prosphoras tou sōmatos Iēsou Christou ephapax.
10.11: Kai pas men hiereus hestēken kath’ hēmeran leitourgōn kai tas autas pollakis prospherōn thysias, haitines oudepote dynantai perielein hamartias;
10.12: houtos de mian hyper hamartiōn prosenenkas thysian eis to diēnekes ekathisen en dexia tou Theou,
10.13: to loipon ekdechomenos heōs tethōsin hoi echthroi autou hypopodion tōn podōn autou.
10.14: mia gar prosphora teteleiōken eis to diēnekes tous hagiazomenous.
10.15: Martyrei de hēmin kai to Pneuma to Hagion; meta gar to eirēkenai
10.16: Hautē hē diathēkē hēn diathēsomai pros autous meta tas hēmeras ekeinas, legei Kyrios; didous nomous mou epi kardias autōn, kai epi tēn dianoian autōn epigrapsō autous,
10.17: kai tōn hamartiōn autōn kai tōn anomiōn autōn ou mē mnēsthēsomai eti.
10.18: hopou de aphesis toutōn, ouketi prosphora peri hamartias.
10.19: Echontes oun, adelphoi, parrēsian eis tēn eisodon tōn hagiōn en tō haimati Iēsou,
10.20: hēn enekainisen hēmin hodon prosphaton kai zōsan dia tou katapetasmatos, tout’ estin tēs sarkos autou,
10.21: kai hierea megan epi ton oikon tou Theou,
10.22: proserchōmetha meta alēthinēs kardias en plērophoria pisteōs, rherantismenoi tas kardias apo syneidēseōs ponēras kai lelousmenoi to sōma hydati katharō;
10.23: katechōmen tēn homologian tēs elpidos aklinē, pistos gar ho epangeilamenos,
10.24: kai katanoōmen allēlous eis paroxysmon agapēs kai kalōn ergōn,
10.25: mē enkataleipontes tēn episynagōgēn heautōn, kathōs ethos tisin, alla parakalountes, kai tosoutō mallon hosō blepete engizousan tēn hēmeran.
10.26: Hekousiōs gar hamartanontōn hēmōn meta to labein tēn epignōsin tēs alētheias, ouketi peri hamartiōn apoleipetai thysia,
10.27: phobera de tis ekdochē kriseōs kai pyros zēlos esthiein mellontos tous hypenantious.
10.28: athetēsas tis nomon Mōuseōs chōris oiktirmōn epi dysin ē trisin martysin apothnēskei;
10.29: posō dokeite cheironos axiōthēsetai timōrias ho ton Huion tou Theou katapatēsas kai to haima tēs diathēkēs koinon hēgēsamenos en hō hēgiasthē, kai to Pneuma tēs charitos enybrisas.
10.30: oidamen gar ton eiponta Emoi ekdikēsis, egō antapodōsō; kai palin Krinei Kyrios ton laon autou.
10.31: phoberon to empesein eis cheiras Theou zōntos.
10.32: Anamimnēskesthe de tas proteron hēmeras, en hais phōtisthentes pollēn athlēsin hypemeinate pathēmatōn,
10.33: touto men oneidismois te kai thlipsesin theatrizomenoi, touto de koinōnoi tōn houtōs anastrephomenōn genēthentes.
10.34: kai gar tois desmiois synepathēsate, kai tēn harpagēn tōn hyparchontōn hymōn meta charas prosedexasthe, ginōskontes echein heautous kreissona hyparxin kai menousan.
10.35: Mē apobalēte oun tēn parrēsian hymōn, hētis echei megalēn misthapodosian.
10.36: hypomonēs gar echete chreian hina to thelēma tou Theou poiēsantes komisēsthe tēn epangelian.
10.37: eti gar mikron hoson hoson, ho erchomenos hēxei kai ou chronisei;
