10.38: ho de dikaios mou ek pisteōs zēsetai, kai ean hyposteilētai, ouk eudokei hē psychē mou en autō.
10.39: hēmeis de ouk esmen hypostolēs eis apōleian, alla pisteōs eis peripoiēsin psychēs.

11.1: Estin de pistis elpizomenōn hypostasis, pragmatōn elenchos ou blepomenōn.
11.2: en tautē gar emartyrēthēsan hoi presbyteroi.
11.3: Pistei nooumen katērtisthai tous aiōnas rhēmati Theou, eis to mē ek phainomenōn to blepomenon gegonenai.
11.4: Pistei pleiona thysian Abel para Kain prosēnenken tō Theō, di’ hēs emartyrēthē einai dikaios, martyrountos epi tois dōrois autou tou Theou, kai di’ autēs apothanōn eti lalei.
11.5: Pistei Enōch metetethē tou mē idein thanaton, kai ouch hēurisketo dioti metethēken auton ho Theos. pro gar tēs metatheseōs memartyrētai euarestēkenai tō Theō;
11.6: chōris de pisteōs adynaton euarestēsai; pisteusai gar dei ton proserchomenon tō Theō, hoti estin kai tois ekzētousin auton misthapodotēs ginetai.
11.7: Pistei chrēmatistheis Nōe peri tōn mēdepō blepomenōn, eulabētheis kateskeuasen kibōton eis sōtērian tou oikou autou, di’ hēs katekrinen ton kosmon, kai tēs kata pistin dikaiosynēs egeneto klēronomos.
11.8: Pistei kaloumenos Abraam hypēkousen exelthein eis topon hon ēmellen lambanein eis klēronomian, kai exēlthen mē epistamenos pou erchetai.
11.9: Pistei parōkēsen eis gēn tēs epangelias hōs allotrian, en skēnais katoikēsas, meta Isaak kai Iakōb tōn synklēronomōn tēs epangelias tēs autēs;
11.10: exedecheto gar tēn tous themelious echousan polin, hēs technitēs kai dēmiourgos ho Theos.
11.11: Pistei kai autē Sarra dynamin eis katabolēn spermatos elaben kai para kairon hēlikias, epei piston hēgēsato ton epangeilamenon.
11.12: dio kai aph’ henos egennēthēsan, kai tauta nenekrōmenou, kathōs ta astra tou ouranou tō plēthei kai hōs hē ammos hē para to cheilos tēs thalassēs hē anarithmētos.
11.13: Kata pistin apethanon houtoi pantes, mē komisamenoi tas epangelias, alla porrōthen autas idontes kai aspasamenoi, kai homologēsantes hoti xenoi kai parepidēmoi eisin epi tēs gēs.
11.14: hoi gar toiauta legontes emphanizousin hoti patrida epizētousin.
11.15: kai ei men ekeinēs emnēmoneuon aph’ hēs exebēsan, eichon an kairon anakampsai;
11.16: nyn de kreittonos oregontai, tout’ estin epouraniou. dio ouk epaischynetai autous ho Theos Theos epikaleisthai autōn; hētoimasen gar autois polin.
11.17: Pistei prosenēnochen Abraam ton Isaak peirazomenos, kai ton monogenē prosepheren ho tas epangelias anadexamenos,
11.18: pros hon elalēthē hoti En Isaak klēthēsetai soi sperma,
11.19: logisamenos hoti kai ek nekrōn egeirein dynatos ho Theos; hothen auton kai en parabolē ekomisato.
11.20: Pistei kai peri mellontōn eulogēsen Isaak ton Iakōb kai ton Ēsau.
11.21: Pistei Iakōb apothnēskōn hekaston tōn huiōn Iōsēph eulogēsen, kai prosekynēsen epi to akron tēs rhabdou autou.
11.22: Pistei Iōsēph teleutōn peri tēs exodou tōn huiōn Israēl emnēmoneusen kai peri tōn osteōn autou eneteilato.
11.23: Pistei Mōusēs gennētheis ekrybē trimēnon hypo tōn paterōn autou, dioti eidon asteion to paidion, kai ouk ephobēthēsan to diatagma tou basileōs.
11.24: Pistei Mōusēs megas genomenos ērnēsato legesthai huios thygatros Pharaō,
11.25: mallon helomenos synkakoucheisthai tō laō tou Theou ē proskairon echein hamartias apolausin,
11.26: meizona plouton hēgēsamenos tōn Aigyptou thēsaurōn ton oneidismon tou Christou; apeblepen gar eis tēn misthapodosian.
11.27: Pistei katelipen Aigypton, mē phobētheis ton thymon tou basileōs; ton gar aoraton hōs horōn ekarterēsen.
11.28: Pistei pepoiēken to pascha kai tēn proschysin tou haimatos, hina mē ho olothreuōn ta prōtotoka thigē autōn.
11.29: Pistei diebēsan tēn Erythran Thalassan hōs dia xēras gēs, hēs peiran labontes hoi Aigyptioi katepothēsan.
11.30: Pistei ta teichē Iereichō epesan kyklōthenta epi hepta hēmeras.
11.31: Pistei Rhaab hē pornē ou synapōleto tois apeithēsasin, dexamenē tous kataskopous met’ eirēnēs.
11.32: Kai ti eti legō? epileipsei me gar diēgoumenon ho chronos peri Gedeōn, Barak, Sampsōn, Iephthae, Daueid te kai Samouēl kai tōn prophētōn,
11.33: hoi dia pisteōs katēgōnisanto basileias, ērgasanto dikaiosynēn, epetychon epangeliōn, ephraxan stomata leontōn,
11.34: esbesan dynamin pyros, ephygon stomata machairēs, edynamōthēsan apo astheneias, egenēthēsan ischyroi en polemō, parembolas eklinan allotriōn.
11.35: elabon gynaikes ex anastaseōs tous nekrous autōn; alloi de etympanisthēsan, ou prosdexamenoi tēn apolytrōsin, hina kreittonos anastaseōs tychōsin;
11.36: heteroi de empaigmōn kai mastigōn peiran elabon, eti de desmōn kai phylakēs;
11.37: elithasthēsan, epeirasthēsan, epristhēsan, en phonō machairēs apethanon, periēlthon en mēlōtais, en aigeiois dermasin, hysteroumenoi, thlibomenoi, kakouchoumenoi,
11.38: hōn ouk ēn axios ho kosmos, epi erēmiais planōmenoi kai oresin kai spēlaiois kai tais opais tēs gēs.
11.39: Kai houtoi pantes martyrēthentes dia tēs pisteōs ouk ekomisanto tēn epangelian,
11.40: tou Theou peri hēmōn kreitton ti problepsamenou, hina mē chōris hēmōn teleiōthōsin.

12.1: Toigaroun kai hēmeis, tosouton echontes perikeimenon hēmin nephos martyrōn, onkon apothemenoi panta kai tēn euperistaton hamartian, di’ hypomonēs trechōmen ton prokeimenon hēmin agōna,
12.2: aphorōntes eis ton tēs pisteōs archēgon kai teleiōtēn Iēsoun, hos anti tēs prokeimenēs autō charas hypemeinen stauron aischynēs kataphronēsas, en dexia te tou thronou tou Theou kekathiken.
12.3: analogisasthe gar ton toiautēn hypomemenēkota hypo tōn hamartōlōn eis heauton antilogian, hina mē kamēte tais psychais hymōn eklyomenoi.
12.4: Oupō mechris haimatos antikatestēte pros tēn hamartian antagōnizomenoi,
12.5: kai eklelēsthe tēs paraklēseōs, hētis hymin hōs huiois dialegetai Huie mou, mē oligōrei paideias Kyriou, mēde eklyou hyp’ autou elenchomenos;
12.6: hon gar agapa Kyrios paideuei, mastigoi de panta huion hon paradechetai.
12.7: eis paideian hypomenete; hōs huiois hymin prospheretai ho Theos; tis gar huios hon ou paideuei patēr?
12.8: ei de chōris este paideias, hēs metochoi gegonasin pantes, ara nothoi kai ouch huioi este.
12.9: eita tous men tēs sarkos hēmōn pateras eichomen paideutas kai enetrepometha; ou poly mallon hypotagēsometha tō Patri tōn pneumatōn kai zēsomen?
12.10: hoi men gar pros oligas hēmeras kata to dokoun autois epaideuon, ho de epi to sympheron eis to metalabein tēs hagiotētos autou.
12.11: pasa men paideia pros men to paron ou dokei charas einai alla lypēs, hysteron de karpon eirēnikon tois di’ autēs gegymnasmenois apodidōsin dikaiosynēs.
12.12: Dio tas pareimenas cheiras kai ta paralelymena gonata anorthōsate,
12.13: kai trochias orthas poieite tois posin hymōn, hina mē to chōlon ektrapē, iathē de mallon.
12.14: Eirēnēn diōkete meta pantōn, kai ton hagiasmon, hou chōris oudeis opsetai ton Kyrion,
12.15: episkopountes mē tis hysterōn apo tēs charitos tou Theou, mē tis rhiza pikrias anō phyousa enochlē kai dia tautēs mianthōsin hoi polloi,
12.16: mē tis pornos ē bebēlos hōs Ēsau, hos anti brōseōs mias apedeto ta prōtotokia heautou.
12.17: iste gar hoti kai metepeita thelōn klēronomēsai tēn eulogian apedokimasthē, metanoias gar topon ouch heuren, kaiper meta dakryōn ekzētēsas autēn.
12.18: Ou gar proselēlythate psēlaphōmenō kai kekaumenō pyri kai gnophō kai zophō kai thyellē
12.19: kai salpingos ēchō kai phōnē rhēmatōn, hēs hoi akousantes parētēsanto mē prostethēnai autois logon;
12.20: ouk epheron gar to diastellomenon Kan thērion thigē tou orous, lithobolēthēsetai;
12.21: kai, houtō phoberon ēn to phantazomenon, Mōusēs eipen Ekphobos eimi kai entromos;
12.22: alla proselēlythate Siōn orei kai polei Theou zōntos, Hierousalēm epouraniō, kai myriasin angelōn, panēgyrei
12.23: kai ekklēsia prōtotokōn apogegrammenōn en ouranois, kai Kritē Theō pantōn, kai pneumasi dikaiōn teteleiōmenōn,
12.24: kai diathēkēs neas mesitē Iēsou, kai haimati rhantismou kreitton lalounti para ton Abel.
12.25: Blepete mē paraitēsēsthe ton lalounta; ei gar ekeinoi ouk exephygon epi gēs paraitēsamenoi ton chrēmatizonta, poly mallon hēmeis hoi ton ap’ ouranōn apostrephomenoi;
12.26: hou hē phōnē tēn gēn esaleusen tote, nyn de epēngeltai legōn Eti hapax egō seisō ou monon tēn gēn alla kai ton ouranon.
12.27: to de Eti hapax dēloi tēn tōn saleuomenōn metathesin hōs pepoiēmenōn, hina meinē ta mē saleuomena.
12.28: Dio basileian asaleuton paralambanontes echōmen charin, di’ hēs latreuōmen euarestōs tō Theō, meta eulabeias kai deous;
12.29: kai gar ho Theos hēmōn pyr katanaliskon.

13.2: tēs philoxenias mē epilanthanesthe; dia tautēs gar elathon tines xenisantes angelous.
13.3: mimnēskesthe tōn desmiōn hōs syndedemenoi, tōn kakouchoumenōn hōs kai autoi ontes en sōmati.
13.4: Timios ho gamos en pasin kai hē koitē amiantos, pornous gar kai moichous krinei ho Theos.
13.5: Aphilargyros ho tropos, arkoumenoi tois parousin; autos gar eirēken Ou mē se anō oud’ ou mē se enkatalipō;
13.6: hōste tharrountas hēmas legein Kyrios emoi boēthos, ou phobēthēsomai; ti poiēsei moi anthrōpos?
13.7: Mnēmoneuete tōn hēgoumenōn hymōn, hoitines elalēsan hymin ton logon tou Theou, hōn anatheōrountes tēn ekbasin tēs anastrophēs mimeisthe tēn pistin.
13.8: Iēsous Christos echthes kai sēmeron ho autos kai eis tous aiōnas.
13.9: didachais poikilais kai xenais mē parapheresthe; kalon gar chariti bebaiousthai tēn kardian, ou brōmasin, en hois ouk ōphelēthēsan hoi peripatountes.
13.10: Echomen thysiastērion ex hou phagein ouk echousin exousian hoi tē skēnē latreuontes.
13.11: hōn gar eispheretai zōōn to haima peri hamartias eis ta hagia dia tou archiereōs, toutōn ta sōmata katakaietai exō tēs parembolēs.
13.12: dio kai Iēsous, hina hagiasē dia tou idiou haimatos ton laon, exō tēs pylēs epathen.
13.13: toinyn exerchōmetha pros auton exō tēs parembolēs, ton oneidismon autou pherontes;
13.14: ou gar echomen hōde menousan polin, alla tēn mellousan epizētoumen.
13.15: di’ autou oun anapherōmen thysian aineseōs dia pantos tō Theō, tout’ estin karpon cheileōn homologountōn tō onomati autou.
13.16: tēs de eupoiias kai koinōnias mē epilanthanesthe; toiautais gar thysiais euaresteitai ho Theos.
13.17: Peithesthe tois hēgoumenois hymōn kai hypeikete; autoi gar agrypnousin hyper tōn psychōn hymōn hōs logon apodōsontes; hina meta charas touto poiōsin kai mē stenazontes; alysiteles gar hymin touto.
13.18: Proseuchesthe peri hēmōn; peithometha gar hoti kalēn syneidēsin echomen, en pasin kalōs thelontes anastrephesthai.
13.19: perissoterōs de parakalō touto poiēsai, hina tacheion apokatastathō hymin.
13.20: HO de Theos tēs eirēnēs, ho anagagōn ek nekrōn ton poimena tōn probatōn ton megan en haimati diathēkēs aiōniou, ton Kyrion hēmōn Iēsoun,
13.21: katartisai hymas en panti agathō eis to poiēsai to thelēma autou, poiōn en hēmin to euareston enōpion autou dia Iēsou Christou, hō hē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.
13.22: Parakalō de hymas, adelphoi, anechesthe tou logou tēs paraklēseōs; kai gar dia bracheōn epesteila hymin.
13.23: Ginōskete ton adelphon hēmōn Timotheon apolelymenon, meth’ hou ean tacheion erchētai opsomai hymas.
13.24: Aspasasthe pantas tous hēgoumenous hymōn kai pantas tous hagious. Aspazontai hymas hoi apo tēs Italias.

1.1: Iakōbos Theou kai Kyriou Iēsou Christou doulos tais dōdeka phylais tais en tē Diaspora chairein.
1.2: Pasan charan hēgēsasthe, adelphoi mou, hotan peirasmois peripesēte poikilois,
1.3: ginōskontes hoti to dokimion hymōn tēs pisteōs katergazetai hypomonēn.
1.4: hē de hypomonē ergon teleion echetō, hina ēte teleioi kai holoklēroi, en mēdeni leipomenoi.
1.5: Ei de tis hymōn leipetai sophias, aiteitō para tou didontos Theou pasin haplōs kai mē oneidizontos, kai dothēsetai autō.
1.6: aiteitō de en pistei, mēden diakrinomenos; ho gar diakrinomenos eoiken klydōni thalassēs anemizomenō kai rhipizomenō.
1.7: mē gar oiesthō ho anthrōpos ekeinos hoti lēmpsetai ti para tou Kyriou,
1.8: anēr dipsychos, akatastatos en pasais tais hodois autou.
1.9: Kauchasthō de ho adelphos ho tapeinos en tō hypsei autou,
1.10: ho de plousios en tē tapeinōsei autou, hoti hōs anthos chortou pareleusetai.
1.11: aneteilen gar ho hēlios syn tō kausōni kai exēranen ton chorton, kai to anthos autou exepesen kai hē euprepeia tou prosōpou autou apōleto; houtōs kai ho plousios en tais poreiais autou maranthēsetai.
1.12: Makarios anēr hos hypomenei peirasmon, hoti dokimos genomenos lēmpsetai ton stephanon tēs zōēs, hon epēngeilato tois agapōsin auton.
1.13: Mēdeis peirazomenos legetō hoti Apo Theou peirazomai; ho gar Theos apeirastos estin kakōn, peirazei de autos oudena.
1.14: hekastos de peirazetai hypo tēs idias epithymias exelkomenos kai deleazomenos;
1.15: eita hē epithymia syllabousa tiktei hamartian, hē de hamartia apotelestheisa apokyei thanaton.
1.16: Mē planasthe, adelphoi mou agapētoi.
1.17: pasa dosis agathē kai pan dōrēma teleion anōthen estin katabainon apo tou Patros tōn phōtōn, par’ hō ouk eni parallagē ē tropēs aposkiasma.
1.18: boulētheis apekyēsen hēmas logō alētheias, eis to einai hēmas aparchēn tina tōn autou ktismatōn.
1.19: Iste, adelphoi mou agapētoi. estō de pas anthrōpos tachys eis to akousai, bradys eis to lalēsai, bradys eis orgēn;
1.20: orgē gar andros dikaiosynēn Theou ouk ergazetai.
1.21: dio apothemenoi pasan rhyparian kai perisseian kakias en prautēti dexasthe ton emphyton logon ton dynamenon sōsai tas psychas hymōn.
1.22: ginesthe de poiētai logou, kai mē akroatai monon paralogizomenoi heautous.
1.23: hoti ei tis akroatēs logou estin kai ou poiētēs, houtos eoiken andri katanoounti to prosōpon tēs geneseōs autou en esoptrō;
1.24: katenoēsen gar heauton kai apelēlythen, kai eutheōs epelatheto hopoios ēn.
1.25: ho de parakypsas eis nomon teleion ton tēs eleutherias kai parameinas, ouk akroatēs epilēsmonēs genomenos alla poiētēs ergou, houtos makarios en tē poiēsei autou estai.
1.26: Ei tis dokei thrēskos einai, mē chalinagōgōn glōssan heautou alla apatōn kardian heautou, toutou mataios hē thrēskeia.
1.27: thrēskeia kathara kai amiantos para tō Theō kai Patri hautē estin, episkeptesthai orphanous kai chēras en tē thlipsei autōn, aspilon heauton tērein apo tou kosmou.

2.1: Adelphoi mou, mē en prosōpolēmpsiais echete tēn pistin tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou tēs doxēs.
2.2: ean gar eiselthē eis synagōgēn hymōn anēr chrysodaktylios en esthēti lampra, eiselthē de kai ptōchos en rhypara esthēti,
2.3: epiblepsēte de epi ton phorounta tēn esthēta tēn lampran kai eipēte Sy kathou hōde kalōs, kai tō ptōchō eipēte Sy stēthi ekei ē kathou hypo to hypopodion mou,
2.4: ou diekrithēte en heautois kai egenesthe kritai dialogismōn ponērōn?
2.5: Akousate, adelphoi mou agapētoi. ouch ho Theos exelexato tous ptōchous tō kosmō plousious en pistei kai klēronomous tēs basileias hēs epēngeilato tois agapōsin auton?
2.6: hymeis de ētimasate ton ptōchon. ouch hoi plousioi katadynasteuousin hymōn, kai autoi helkousin hymas eis kritēria?
2.7: ouk autoi blasphēmousin to kalon onoma to epiklēthen eph’ hymas?
2.8: ei mentoi nomon teleite basilikon kata tēn graphēn Agapēseis ton plēsion sou hōs seauton, kalōs poieite;
2.9: ei de prosōpolēmpteite, hamartian ergazesthe, elenchomenoi hypo tou nomou hōs parabatai.
2.10: hostis gar holon ton nomon tērēsē, ptaisē de en heni, gegonen pantōn enochos.
2.11: ho gar eipōn Mē moicheusēs, eipen kai Mē phoneusēs; ei de ou moicheueis, phoneueis de, gegonas parabatēs nomou.
2.12: houtōs laleite kai houtōs poieite hōs dia nomou eleutherias mellontes krinesthai.
2.13: hē gar krisis aneleos tō mē poiēsanti eleos; katakauchatai eleos kriseōs.
2.14: Ti to ophelos, adelphoi mou, ean pistin legē tis echein erga de mē echē? mē dynatai hē pistis sōsai auton?
2.15: ean adelphos ē adelphē gymnoi hyparchōsin kai leipomenoi tēs ephēmerou trophēs,
2.16: eipē de tis autois ex hymōn Hypagete en eirēnē, thermainesthe kai chortazesthe, mē dōte de autois ta epitēdeia tou sōmatos, ti to ophelos?
2.17: houtōs kai hē pistis, ean mē echē erga, nekra estin kath’ heautēn.
2.18: all’ erei tis Sy pistin echeis, kagō erga echō; deixon moi tēn pistin sou chōris tōn ergōn, kagō soi deixō ek tōn ergōn mou tēn pistin.
2.19: sy pisteueis hoti heis estin ho Theos? kalōs poieis; kai ta daimonia pisteuousin kai phrissousin.
2.20: theleis de gnōnai, ō anthrōpe kene, hoti hē pistis chōris tōn ergōn argē estin?
2.21: Abraam ho patēr hēmōn ouk ex ergōn edikaiōthē, anenenkas Isaak ton huion autou epi to thysiastērion?
2.22: blepeis hoti hē pistis synērgei tois ergois autou, kai ek tōn ergōn hē pistis eteleiōthē,
2.23: kai eplērōthē hē graphē hē legousa Episteusen de Abraam tō Theō, kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosynēn, kai philos Theou eklēthē.
2.24: horate hoti ex ergōn dikaioutai anthrōpos kai ouk ek pisteōs monon.
2.25: homoiōs de kai Rhaab hē pornē ouk ex ergōn edikaiōthē, hypodexamenē tous angelous kai hetera hodō ekbalousa?
2.26: hōsper gar to sōma chōris pneumatos nekron estin, houtōs kai hē pistis chōris ergōn nekra estin.

3.1: Mē polloi didaskaloi ginesthe, adelphoi mou, eidotes hoti meizon krima lēmpsometha.
3.2: polla gar ptaiomen hapantes; ei tis en logō ou ptaiei, houtos teleios anēr, dynatos chalinagōgēsai kai holon to sōma.
3.3: ei de tōn hippōn tous chalinous eis ta stomata ballomen eis to peithesthai autous hēmin, kai holon to sōma autōn metagomen.
3.4: idou kai ta ploia, tēlikauta onta kai hypo anemōn sklērōn elaunomena, metagetai hypo elachistou pēdaliou hopou hē hormē tou euthynontos bouletai;
3.5: houtōs kai hē glōssa mikron melos estin kai megala auchei. idou hēlikon pyr hēlikēn hylēn anaptei;
3.6: kai hē glōssa pyr, ho kosmos tēs adikias, hē glōssa kathistatai en tois melesin hēmōn, hē spilousa holon to sōma kai phlogizousa ton trochon tēs geneseōs kai phlogizomenē hypo tēs geennēs.
3.7: pasa gar physis thēriōn te kai peteinōn herpetōn te kai enaliōn damazetai kai dedamastai tē physei tē anthrōpinē,
3.8: tēn de glōssan oudeis damasai dynatai anthrōpōn; akatastaton kakon, mestē iou thanatēphorou.
3.9: en autē eulogoumen ton Kyrion kai Patera, kai en autē katarōmetha tous anthrōpous tous kath’ homoiōsin Theou gegonotas;
3.10: ek tou autou stomatos exerchetai eulogia kai katara. ou chrē, adelphoi mou, tauta houtōs ginesthai.
3.11: mēti hē pēgē ek tēs autēs opēs bryei to glyky kai to pikron?
3.12: mē dynatai, adelphoi mou, sykē elaias poiēsai ē ampelos syka? oute halykon glyky poiēsai hydōr.
3.13: Tis sophos kai epistēmōn en hymin? deixatō ek tēs kalēs anastrophēs ta erga autou en prautēti sophias.
3.14: ei de zēlon pikron echete kai eritheian en tē kardia hymōn, mē katakauchasthe kai pseudesthe kata tēs alētheias.
3.15: ouk estin hautē hē sophia anōthen katerchomenē, alla epigeios, psychikē, daimoniōdēs;
3.16: hopou gar zēlos kai eritheia, ekei akatastasia kai pan phaulon pragma.
3.17: hē de anōthen sophia prōton men hagnē estin, epeita eirēnikē, epieikēs, eupeithēs, mestē eleous kai karpōn agathōn, adiakritos, anypokritos.
3.18: karpos de dikaiosynēs en eirēnē speiretai tois poiousin eirēnēn.

4.1: Pothen polemoi kai pothen machai en hymin? ouk enteuthen, ek tōn hēdonōn hymōn tōn strateuomenōn en tois melesin hymōn?
4.2: epithymeite, kai ouk echete; phoneuete kai zēloute, kai ou dynasthe epitychein; machesthe kai polemeite. ouk echete dia to mē aiteisthai hymas;
4.3: aiteite kai ou lambanete, dioti kakōs aiteisthe, hina en tais hēdonais hymōn dapanēsēte.
4.4: moichalides, ouk oidate hoti hē philia tou kosmou echthra tou Theou estin? hos ean oun boulēthē philos einai tou kosmou, echthros tou Theou kathistatai.
4.5: ē dokeite hoti kenōs hē graphē legei Pros phthonon epipothei to pneuma ho katōkisen en hēmin?
4.6: meizona de didōsin charin; dio legei HO Theos hyperēphanois antitassetai, tapeinois de didōsin charin.
4.7: hypotagēte oun tō Theō; antistēte de tō diabolō, kai pheuxetai aph’ hymōn;
4.8: engisate tō Theō, kai engisei hymin. katharisate cheiras, hamartōloi, kai hagnisate kardias, dipsychoi. talaipōrēsate kai penthēsate kai klausate;
4.9: ho gelōs hymōn eis penthos metatrapētō kai hē chara eis katēpheian.
4.10: tapeinōthēte enōpion Kyriou, kai hypsōsei hymas.
4.11: Mē katalaleite allēlōn, adelphoi. ho katalalōn adelphou ē krinōn ton adelphon autou katalalei nomou kai krinei nomon; ei de nomon krineis, ouk ei poiētēs nomou alla kritēs.
4.12: heis estin nomothetēs kai kritēs, ho dynamenos sōsai kai apolesai; sy de tis ei, ho krinōn ton plēsion?
4.13: Age nyn hoi legontes Sēmeron ē aurion poreusometha eis tēnde tēn polin kai poiēsomen ekei eniauton kai emporeusometha kai kerdēsomen;
4.14: hoitines ouk epistasthe tēs aurion poia hē zōē hymōn; atmis gar este hē pros oligon phainomenē, epeita kai aphanizomenē;
4.15: anti tou legein hymas Ean ho Kyrios thelēsē, kai zēsomen kai poiēsomen touto ē ekeino.
4.16: nyn de kauchasthe en tais alazoniais hymōn; pasa kauchēsis toiautē ponēra estin.
4.17: eidoti oun kalon poiein kai mē poiounti, hamartia autō estin.

5.1: Age nyn hoi plousioi, klausate ololyzontes epi tais talaipōriais hymōn tais eperchomenais.
5.2: ho ploutos hymōn sesēpen, kai ta himatia hymōn sētobrōta gegonen,
5.3: ho chrysos hymōn kai ho argyros katiōtai, kai ho ios autōn eis martyrion hymin estai kai phagetai tas sarkas hymōn hōs pyr. ethēsaurisate en eschatais hēmerais.
5.4: idou ho misthos tōn ergatōn tōn amēsantōn tas chōras hymōn ho aphysterēmenos aph’ hymōn krazei, kai hai boai tōn therisantōn eis ta ōta Kyriou Sabaōth eiselēlythan.
5.5: etryphēsate epi tēs gēs kai espatalēsate, ethrepsate tas kardias hymōn en hēmera sphagēs.
5.6: katedikasate, ephoneusate ton dikaion; ouk antitassetai hymin.
5.7: Makrothymēsate oun, adelphoi, heōs tēs parousias tou Kyriou. idou ho geōrgos ekdechetai ton timion karpon tēs gēs, makrothymōn ep’ autō heōs labē proimon kai opsimon.
5.8: makrothymēsate kai hymeis, stērixate tas kardias hymōn, hoti hē parousia tou Kyriou ēngiken.
5.9: mē stenazete, adelphoi, kat’ allēlōn, hina mē krithēte; idou ho kritēs pro tōn thyrōn hestēken.
5.10: hypodeigma labete, adelphoi, tēs kakopatheias kai tēs makrothymias tous prophētas, hoi elalēsan en tō onomati Kyriou.
5.11: idou makarizomen tous hypomeinantas; tēn hypomonēn Iōb ēkousate, kai to telos Kyriou eidete, hoti polysplanchnos estin ho Kyrios kai oiktirmōn.
5.12: Pro pantōn de, adelphoi mou, mē omnyete, mēte ton ouranon mēte tēn gēn mēte allon tina horkon; ētō de hymōn to Nai nai, kai to Ou ou, hina mē hypo krisin pesēte.
5.13: Kakopathei tis en hymin? proseuchesthō; euthymei tis? psalletō.
5.14: asthenei tis en hymin? proskalesasthō tous presbyterous tēs ekklēsias, kai proseuxasthōsan ep’ auton aleipsantes elaiō en tō onomati tou Kyriou.
5.15: kai hē euchē tēs pisteōs sōsei ton kamnonta, kai egerei auton ho Kyrios; kan hamartias ē pepoiēkōs, aphethēsetai autō.
5.16: exomologeisthe oun allēlois tas hamartias, kai proseuchesthe hyper allēlōn, hopōs iathēte. poly ischyei deēsis dikaiou energoumenē.
5.17: Ēleias anthrōpos ēn homoiopathēs hēmin, kai proseuchē prosēuxato tou mē brexai, kai ouk ebrexen epi tēs gēs eniautous treis kai mēnas hex;
5.18: kai palin prosēuxato, kai ho ouranos hyeton edōken kai hē gē eblastēsen ton karpon autēs.
5.19: Adelphoi mou, ean tis en hymin planēthē apo tēs alētheias kai epistrepsē tis auton,
5.20: ginōskete hoti ho epistrepsas hamartōlon ek planēs hodou autou sōsei psychēn autou ek thanatou kai kalypsei plēthos hamartiōn.

1.1: Petros apostolos Iēsou Christou eklektois parepidēmois Diasporas Pontou, Galatias, Kappadokias, Asias, kai Bithynias,
1.2: kata prognōsin Theou Patros, en hagiasmō Pneumatos, eis hypakoēn kai rhantismon haimatos Iēsou Christou; charis hymin kai eirēnē plēthyntheiē.
1.3: Eulogētos ho Theos kai Patēr tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou, ho kata to poly autou eleos anagennēsas hēmas eis elpida zōsan di’ anastaseōs Iēsou Christou ek nekrōn,
1.4: eis klēronomian aphtharton kai amianton kai amaranton, tetērēmenēn en ouranois eis hymas
1.5: tous en dynamei Theou phrouroumenous dia pisteōs eis sōtērian hetoimēn apokalyphthēnai en kairō eschatō.
1.6: en hō agalliasthe, oligon arti ei deon lypēthentes en poikilois peirasmois,
1.7: hina to dokimion hymōn tēs pisteōs polytimoteron chrysiou tou apollymenou, dia pyros de dokimazomenou, heurethē eis epainon kai doxan kai timēn en apokalypsei Iēsou Christou;
1.8: hon ouk idontes agapate, eis hon arti mē horōntes pisteuontes de agalliasthe chara aneklalētō kai dedoxasmenē,
1.9: komizomenoi to telos tēs pisteōs sōtērian psychōn.
1.10: peri hēs sōtērias exezētēsan kai exēraunēsan prophētai hoi peri tēs eis hymas charitos prophēteusantes,
1.11: eraunōntes eis tina ē poion kairon edēlou to en autois Pneuma Christou promartyromenon ta eis Christon pathēmata kai tas meta tauta doxas;
1.12: hois apekalyphthē hoti ouch heautois hymin de diēkonoun auta, ha nyn anēngelē hymin dia tōn euangelisamenōn hymas en Pneumati Hagiō apostalenti ap’ ouranou, eis ha epithymousin angeloi parakypsai.
1.13: Dio anazōsamenoi tas osphyas tēs dianoias hymōn, nēphontes, teleiōs, elpisate epi tēn pheromenēn hymin charin en apokalypsei Iēsou Christou.
1.14: hōs tekna hypakoēs, mē syschēmatizomenoi tais proteron en tē agnoia hymōn epithymiais,
1.15: alla kata ton kalesanta hymas hagion kai autoi hagioi en pasē anastrophē genēthēte,
1.16: dioti gegraptai Hagioi esesthe, hoti egō hagios.
1.17: kai ei Patera epikaleisthe ton aprosōpolēmptōs krinonta kata to hekastou ergon, en phobō ton tēs paroikias hymōn chronon anastraphēte,
1.18: eidotes hoti ou phthartois, argyriō ē chrysiō, elytrōthēte ek tēs mataias hymōn anastrophēs patroparadotou,
1.19: alla timiō haimati hōs amnou amōmou kai aspilou Christou,
1.20: proegnōsmenou men pro katabolēs kosmou, phanerōthentos de ep’ eschatou tōn chronōn di’ hymas
1.21: tous di’ autou pistous eis Theon ton egeiranta auton ek nekrōn kai doxan autō donta, hōste tēn pistin hymōn kai elpida einai eis Theon.
1.22: Tas psychas hymōn hēgnikotes en tē hypakoē tēs alētheias eis philadelphian anypokriton, ek kardias allēlous agapēsate ektenōs,
1.23: anagegennēmenoi ouk ek sporas phthartēs alla aphthartou, dia logou zōntos Theou kai menontos.
1.24: dioti pasa sarx hōs chortos, kai pasa doxa autēs hōs anthos chortou; exēranthē ho chortos, kai to anthos exepesen;
1.25: to de rhēma Kyriou menei eis ton aiōna. touto de estin to rhēma to euangelisthen eis hymas.

2.1: Apothemenoi oun pasan kakian kai panta dolon kai hypokriseis kai phthonous kai pasas katalalias,
2.2: hōs artigennēta brephē to logikon adolon gala epipothēsate, hina en autō auxēthēte eis sōtērian,
2.3: ei egeusasthe hoti chrēstos ho Kyrios.
2.4: pros hon proserchomenoi, lithon zōnta, hypo anthrōpōn men apodedokimasmenon para de Theō eklekton entimon,
2.5: kai autoi hōs lithoi zōntes oikodomeisthe oikos pneumatikos eis hierateuma hagion, anenenkai pneumatikas thysias euprosdektous Theō dia Iēsou Christou.
2.6: dioti periechei en graphē Idou tithēmi en Siōn lithon eklekton akrogōniaion entimon, kai ho pisteuōn ep’ autō ou mē kataischynthē.
2.7: hymin oun hē timē tois pisteuousin; apistousin de lithos hon apedokimasan hoi oikodomountes, houtos egenēthē eis kephalēn gōnias
2.8: kai lithos proskommatos kai petra skandalou; hoi proskoptousin tō logō apeithountes, eis ho kai etethēsan;
2.9: hymeis de genos eklekton, basileion hierateuma, ethnos hagion, laos eis peripoiēsin, hopōs tas aretas exangeilēte tou ek skotous hymas kalesantos eis to thaumaston autou phōs;
2.10: hoi pote ou laos, nyn de laos Theou, hoi ouk ēleēmenoi, nyn de eleēthentes.
2.11: Agapētoi, parakalō hōs paroikous kai parepidēmous apechesthai tōn sarkikōn epithymiōn, haitines strateuontai kata tēs psychēs;
2.12: tēn anastrophēn hymōn en tois ethnesin echontes kalēn, hina en hō katalalousin hymōn hōs kakopoiōn, ek tōn kalōn ergōn epopteuontes doxasōsin ton Theon en hēmera episkopēs.
2.13: Hypotagēte pasē anthrōpinē ktisei dia ton Kyrion; eite basilei hōs hyperechonti,
2.14: eite hēgemosin hōs di’ autou pempomenois eis ekdikēsin kakopoiōn epainon de agathopoiōn;
2.15: hoti houtōs estin to thelēma tou Theou, agathopoiountas phimoun tēn tōn aphronōn anthrōpōn agnōsian;
2.16: hōs eleutheroi, kai mē hōs epikalymma echontes tēs kakias tēn eleutherian, all’ hōs Theou douloi.
2.17: pantas timēsate, tēn adelphotēta agapate, ton Theon phobeisthe, ton basilea timate.
2.18: Hoi oiketai, hypotassomenoi en panti phobō tois despotais, ou monon tois agathois kai epieikesin alla kai tois skoliois.
2.19: touto gar charis ei dia syneidēsin Theou hypopherei tis lypas paschōn adikōs.
2.20: poion gar kleos ei hamartanontes kai kolaphizomenoi hypomeneite? all’ ei agathopoiountes kai paschontes hypomeneite, touto charis para Theō.
2.21: eis touto gar eklēthēte, hoti kai Christos epathen hyper hymōn, hymin hypolimpanōn hypogrammon hina epakolouthēsēte tois ichnesin autou;
2.22: hos hamartian ouk epoiēsen oude heurethē dolos en tō stomati autou;
2.23: hos loidoroumenos ouk anteloidorei, paschōn ouk ēpeilei, paredidou de tō krinonti dikaiōs;
2.24: hos tas hamartias hēmōn autos anēnenken en tō sōmati autou epi to xylon, hina tais hamartiais apogenomenoi tē dikaiosynē zēsōmen; hou tō mōlōpi iathēte.
2.25: ēte gar hōs probata planōmenoi, alla epestraphēte nyn epi ton Poimena kai Episkopon tōn psychōn hymōn.

3.1: Homoiōs gynaikes, hypotassomenai tois idiois andrasin, hina kai ei tines apeithousin tō logō, dia tēs tōn gynaikōn anastrophēs aneu logou kerdēthēsontai,
3.2: epopteusantes tēn en phobō hagnēn anastrophēn hymōn.
3.3: hōn estō ouch ho exōthen emplokēs trichōn kai peritheseōs chrysiōn ē endyseōs himatiōn kosmos,
3.4: all’ ho kryptos tēs kardias anthrōpos en tō aphthartō tou praeōs kai hēsychiou pneumatos, ho estin enōpion tou Theou polyteles.
3.5: houtōs gar pote kai hai hagiai gynaikes hai elpizousai eis Theon ekosmoun heautas, hypotassomenai tois idiois andrasin,
3.6: hōs Sarra hypēkousen tō Abraam, kyrion auton kalousa; hēs egenēthēte tekna agathopoiousai kai mē phoboumenai mēdemian ptoēsin.
3.7: Hoi andres homoiōs synoikountes kata gnōsin hōs asthenesterō skeuei tō gynaikeiō, aponemontes timēn hōs kai synklēronomois charitos zōēs, eis to mē enkoptesthai tas proseuchas hymōn.
3.8: To de telos pantes homophrones, sympatheis, philadelphoi, eusplanchnoi, tapeinophrones,
3.9: mē apodidontes kakon anti kakou ē loidorian anti loidorias, tounantion de eulogountes, hoti eis touto eklēthēte hina eulogian klēronomēsēte.
3.10: ho gar thelōn zōēn agapan kai idein hēmeras agathas pausatō tēn glōssan apo kakou kai cheilē tou mē lalēsai dolon,
3.11: ekklinatō de apo kakou kai poiēsatō agathon, zētēsatō eirēnēn kai diōxatō autēn;
3.12: hoti ophthalmoi Kyriou epi dikaious kai ōta autou eis deēsin autōn, prosōpon de Kyriou epi poiountas kaka.
3.13: Kai tis ho kakōsōn hymas ean tou agathou zēlōtai genēsthe?
3.14: all’ ei kai paschoite dia dikaiosynēn, makarioi. ton de phobon autōn mē phobēthēte mēde tarachthēte,
3.15: Kyrion de ton Christon hagiasate en tais kardiais hymōn, hetoimoi aei pros apologian panti tō aitounti hymas logon peri tēs en hymin elpidos,
3.16: alla meta prautētos kai phobou, syneidēsin echontes agathēn, hina en hō katalaleisthe kataischynthōsin hoi epēreazontes hymōn tēn agathēn en Christō anastrophēn.
3.17: kreitton gar agathopoiountas, ei theloi to thelēma tou Theou, paschein ē kakopoiountas.
3.18: hoti kai Christos hapax peri hamartiōn apethanen, dikaios hyper adikōn, hina hymas prosagagē tō Theō, thanatōtheis men sarki zōopoiētheis de pneumati;
3.19: en hō kai tois en phylakē pneumasin poreutheis ekēryxen,
3.20: apeithēsasin pote hote apexedecheto hē tou Theou makrothymia en hēmerais Nōe kataskeuazomenēs kibōtou, eis hēn oligoi, tout’ estin oktō psychai, diesōthēsan di’ hydatos.
3.21: ho kai hymas antitypon nyn sōzei baptisma, ou sarkos apothesis rhypou alla syneidēseōs agathēs eperōtēma eis Theon, di’ anastaseōs Iēsou Christou,
3.22: hos estin en dexia Theou, poreutheis eis ouranon, hypotagentōn autō angelōn kai exousiōn kai dynameōn.

4.1: Christou oun pathontos sarki kai hymeis tēn autēn ennoian hoplisasthe, hoti ho pathōn sarki pepautai hamartias,
4.2: eis to mēketi anthrōpōn epithymiais alla thelēmati Theou ton epiloipon en sarki biōsai chronon.
4.3: arketos gar ho parelēlythōs chronos to boulēma tōn ethnōn kateirgasthai, peporeumenous en aselgeiais, epithymiais, oinophlygiais, kōmois, potois, kai athemitois eidōlolatreiais.
4.4: en hō xenizontai mē syntrechontōn hymōn eis tēn autēn tēs asōtias anachysin, blasphēmountes;
4.5: hoi apodōsousin logon tō hetoimōs echonti krinai zōntas kai nekrous.
4.6: eis touto gar kai nekrois euēngelisthē, hina krithōsi men kata anthrōpous sarki, zōsi de kata Theon pneumati.
4.7: Pantōn de to telos ēngiken. sōphronēsate oun kai nēpsate eis proseuchas;
4.8: pro pantōn tēn eis heautous agapēn ektenē echontes, hoti agapē kalyptei plēthos hamartiōn;
4.9: philoxenoi eis allēlous aneu gongysmou;
4.10: hekastos kathōs elaben charisma, eis heautous auto diakonountes hōs kaloi oikonomoi poikilēs charitos Theou;
4.11: ei tis lalei, hōs logia Theou; ei tis diakonei, hōs ex ischyos hēs chorēgei ho Theos; hina en pasin doxazētai ho Theos dia Iēsou Christou, hō estin hē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.
4.12: Agapētoi, mē xenizesthe tē en hymin pyrōsei pros peirasmon hymin ginomenē, hōs xenou hymin symbainontos,
4.13: alla katho koinōneite tois tou Christou pathēmasin chairete, hina kai en tē apokalypsei tēs doxēs autou charēte agalliōmenoi.
4.14: ei oneidizesthe en onomati Christou, makarioi, hoti to tēs doxēs kai to tou Theou Pneuma eph’ hymas anapauetai.
4.15: mē gar tis hymōn paschetō hōs phoneus ē kleptēs ē kakopoios ē hōs allotriepiskopos;
4.16: ei de hōs Christianos, mē aischynesthō, doxazetō de ton Theon en tō onomati toutō.
4.17: hoti ho kairos tou arxasthai to krima apo tou oikou tou Theou; ei de prōton aph’ hēmōn, ti to telos tōn apeithountōn tō tou Theou euangeliō?
4.18: kai ei ho dikaios molis sōzetai, ho asebēs kai hamartōlos pou phaneitai?
4.19: hōste kai hoi paschontes kata to thelēma tou Theou pistō Ktistē paratithesthōsan tas psychas autōn en agathopoiia.

5.1: Presbyterous oun en hymin parakalō ho synpresbyteros kai martys tōn tou Christou pathēmatōn, ho kai tēs mellousēs apokalyptesthai doxēs koinōnos,
5.2: poimanate to en hymin poimnion tou Theou, mē anankastōs alla hekousiōs kata Theon, mēde aischrokerdōs alla prothymōs,
5.3: mēd’ hōs katakyrieuontes tōn klērōn alla typoi ginomenoi tou poimniou;
5.4: kai phanerōthentos tou Archipoimenos komieisthe ton amarantinon tēs doxēs stephanon.
5.5: Homoiōs, neōteroi, hypotagēte presbyterois; pantes de allēlois tēn tapeinophrosynēn enkombōsasthe, hoti ho Theos hyperēphanois antitassetai, tapeinois de didōsin charin.
5.6: Tapeinōthēte oun hypo tēn krataian cheira tou Theou, hina hymas hypsōsē en kairō,
5.7: pasan tēn merimnan hymōn epiripsantes ep’ auton, hoti autō melei peri hymōn.
5.8: Nēpsate, grēgorēsate. ho antidikos hymōn diabolos hōs leōn ōryomenos peripatei zētōn tina katapiein;
5.9: hō antistēte stereoi tē pistei, eidotes ta auta tōn pathēmatōn tē en tō kosmō hymōn adelphotēti epiteleisthai.
5.10: HO de Theos pasēs charitos, ho kalesas hymas eis tēn aiōnion autou doxan en Christō, oligon pathontas autos katartisei, stērixei, sthenōsei, themeliōsei.
5.11: autō to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.
5.12: Dia Silouanou hymin tou pistou adelphou, hōs logizomai, di’ oligōn egrapsa, parakalōn kai epimartyrōn tautēn einai alēthē charin tou Theou, eis hēn stēte.
5.13: Aspazetai hymas hē en Babylōni syneklektē kai Markos ho huios mou.
5.14: aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati agapēs. Eirēnē hymin pasin tois en Christō.

1.1: Symeōn Petros doulos kai apostolos Iēsou Christou tois isotimon hēmin lachousin pistin en dikaiosynē tou Theou hēmōn kai Sōtēros Iēsou Christou;
1.2: charis hymin kai eirēnē plēthyntheiē en epignōsei tou Theou kai Iēsou tou Kyriou hēmōn.
1.3: Hōs ta panta hēmin tēs theias dynameōs autou ta pros zōēn kai eusebeian dedōrēmenēs dia tēs epignōseōs tou kalesantos hēmas idia doxē kai aretē,
1.4: di’ hōn ta timia kai megista hēmin epangelmata dedōrētai, hina dia toutōn genēsthe theias koinōnoi physeōs, apophygontes tēs en tō kosmō en epithymia phthoras.
1.5: kai auto touto de spoudēn pasan pareisenenkantes epichorēgēsate en tē pistei hymōn tēn aretēn, en de tē aretē tēn gnōsin,
1.6: en de tē gnōsei tēn enkrateian, en de tē enkrateia tēn hypomonēn, en de tē hypomonē tēn eusebeian,
1.7: en de tē eusebeia tēn philadelphian, en de tē philadelphia tēn agapēn.
1.8: tauta gar hymin hyparchonta kai pleonazonta ouk argous oude akarpous kathistēsin eis tēn tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou epignōsin;
1.9: hō gar mē parestin tauta, typhlos estin myōpazōn, lēthēn labōn tou katharismou tōn palai autou hamartiōn.
1.10: dio mallon, adelphoi, spoudasate bebaian hymōn tēn klēsin kai eklogēn poieisthai; tauta gar poiountes ou mē ptaisēte pote.
1.11: houtōs gar plousiōs epichorēgēthēsetai hymin hē eisodos eis tēn aiōnion basileian tou Kyriou hēmōn kai Sōtēros Iēsou Christou.
1.12: Dio mellēsō aei hymas hypomimnēskein peri toutōn, kaiper eidotas kai estērigmenous en tē parousē alētheia.
1.13: dikaion de hēgoumai, eph’ hoson eimi en toutō tō skēnōmati, diegeirein hymas en hypomnēsei,
1.14: eidōs hoti tachinē estin hē apothesis tou skēnōmatos mou, kathōs kai ho Kyrios hēmōn Iēsous Christos edēlōsen moi;
1.15: spoudasō de kai hekastote echein hymas meta tēn emēn exodon tēn toutōn mnēmēn poieisthai.
1.16: ou gar sesophismenois mythois exakolouthēsantes egnōrisamen hymin tēn tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou dynamin kai parousian, all’ epoptai genēthentes tēs ekeinou megaleiotētos.
1.17: labōn gar para Theou Patros timēn kai doxan phōnēs enechtheisēs autō toiasde hypo tēs megaloprepous doxēs HO Huios mou ho agapētos mou houtos estin, eis hon egō eudokēsa,—
1.18: kai tautēn tēn phōnēn hēmeis ēkousamen ex ouranou enechtheisan syn autō ontes en tō hagiō orei.
1.19: kai echomen bebaioteron ton prophētikon logon, hō kalōs poieite prosechontes hōs lychnō phainonti en auchmērō topō, heōs hou hēmera diaugasē kai phōsphoros anateilē en tais kardiais hymōn;
1.20: touto prōton ginōskontes, hoti pasa prophēteia graphēs idias epilyseōs ou ginetai;
1.21: ou gar thelēmati anthrōpou ēnechthē prophēteia pote, alla hypo Pneumatos Hagiou pheromenoi elalēsan apo Theou anthrōpoi.

2.1: Egenonto de kai pseudoprophētai en tō laō, hōs kai en hymin esontai pseudodidaskaloi, hoitines pareisaxousin haireseis apōleias, kai ton agorasanta autous despotēn arnoumenoi, epagontes heautois tachinēn apōleian;
2.2: kai polloi exakolouthēsousin autōn tais aselgeiais, di’ hous hē hodos tēs alētheias blasphēmēthēsetai;
2.3: kai en pleonexia plastois logois hymas emporeusontai; hois to krima ekpalai ouk argei, kai hē apōleia autōn ou nystazei.
2.4: ei gar ho Theos angelōn hamartēsantōn ouk epheisato, alla seirois zophou tartarōsas paredōken eis krisin tēroumenous,
2.5: kai archaiou kosmou ouk epheisato, alla ogdoon Nōe dikaiosynēs kēryka ephylaxen, kataklysmon kosmō asebōn epaxas,
2.6: kai poleis Sodomōn kai Gomorras tephrōsas katastrophē katekrinen, hypodeigma mellontōn asebein tetheikōs,
2.7: kai dikaion Lōt kataponoumenon hypo tēs tōn athesmōn en aselgeia anastrophēs erysato,—
2.8: blemmati gar kai akoē ho dikaios enkatoikōn en autois hēmeran ex hēmeras psychēn dikaian anomois ergois ebasanizen,—
2.9: oiden Kyrios eusebeis ek peirasmou rhyesthai, adikous de eis hēmeran kriseōs kolazomenous tērein,
2.10: malista de tous opisō sarkos en epithymia miasmou poreuomenous kai kyriotētos kataphronountas. tolmētai, authadeis, doxas ou tremousin blasphēmountes,
2.11: hopou angeloi ischui kai dynamei meizones ontes ou pherousin kat’ autōn para Kyriō blasphēmon krisin.
2.12: houtoi de, hōs aloga zōa gegennēmena physika eis halōsin kai phthoran, en hois agnoousin blasphēmountes, en tē phthora autōn kai phtharēsontai,
2.13: adikoumenoi misthon adikias; hēdonēn hēgoumenoi tēn en hēmera tryphēn, spiloi kai mōmoi entryphōntes en tais apatais autōn syneuōchoumenoi hymin,
2.14: ophthalmous echontes mestous moichalidos kai akatapaustous hamartias, deleazontes psychas astēriktous, kardian gegymnasmenēn pleonexias echontes, kataras tekna;
2.15: kataleipontes eutheian hodon eplanēthēsan, exakolouthēsantes tē hodō tou Balaam tou Beōr, hos misthon adikias ēgapēsen,
2.16: elenxin de eschen idias paranomias; hypozygion aphōnon en anthrōpou phōnē phthenxamenon ekōlysen tēn tou prophētou paraphronian.
2.17: houtoi eisin pēgai anydroi kai homichlai hypo lailapos elaunomenai, hois ho zophos tou skotous tetērētai.
2.18: hyperonka gar mataiotētos phthengomenoi deleazousin en epithymiais sarkos aselgeiais tous oligōs apopheugontas tous en planē anastrephomenous,
2.19: eleutherian autois epangellomenoi, autoi douloi hyparchontes tēs phthoras; hō gar tis hēttētai, toutō dedoulōtai.
2.20: ei gar apophygontes ta miasmata tou kosmou en epignōsei tou Kyriou kai Sōtēros Iēsou Christou, toutois de palin emplakentes hēttōntai, gegonen autois ta eschata cheirona tōn prōtōn.
2.21: kreitton gar ēn autois mē epegnōkenai tēn hodon tēs dikaiosynēs, ē epignousin hypostrepsai ek tēs paradotheisēs autois hagias entolēs.
2.22: symbebēken autois to tēs alēthous paroimias Kyōn epistrepsas epi to idion exerama, kai Hys lousamenē eis kylismon borborou.

3.1: Tautēn ēdē, agapētoi, deuteran hymin graphō epistolēn, en hais diegeirō hymōn en hypomnēsei tēn eilikrinē dianoian,
3.2: mnēsthēnai tōn proeirēmenōn rhēmatōn hypo tōn hagiōn prophētōn kai tēs tōn apostolōn hymōn entolēs tou Kyriou kai Sōtēros,
3.3: touto prōton ginōskontes, hoti eleusontai ep’ eschatōn tōn hēmerōn en empaigmonē empaiktai kata tas idias epithymias autōn poreuomenoi
3.4: kai legontes Pou estin hē epangelia tēs parousias autou? aph’ hēs gar hoi pateres ekoimēthēsan, panta houtōs diamenei ap’ archēs ktiseōs.
3.5: lanthanei gar autous touto thelontas hoti ouranoi ēsan ekpalai kai gē ex hydatos kai di’ hydatos synestōsa tō tou Theou logō,
3.6: di’ hōn ho tote kosmos hydati kataklystheis apōleto;
3.7: hoi de nyn ouranoi kai hē gē tō autō logō tethēsaurismenoi eisin pyri tēroumenoi eis hēmeran kriseōs kai apōleias tōn asebōn anthrōpōn.
3.8: Hen de touto mē lanthanetō hymas, agapētoi, hoti mia hēmera para Kyriō hōs chilia etē kai chilia etē hōs hēmera mia.
3.9: ou bradynei Kyrios tēs epangelias, hōs tines bradytēta hēgountai, alla makrothymei eis hymas, mē boulomenos tinas apolesthai alla pantas eis metanoian chōrēsai.
3.10: Hēxei de hēmera Kyriou hōs kleptēs, en hē hoi ouranoi rhoizēdon pareleusontai, stoicheia de kausoumena lythēsetai, kai gē kai ta en autē erga heurethēsetai.
3.11: Toutōn houtōs pantōn lyomenōn potapous dei hyparchein hymas en hagiais anastrophais kai eusebeiais,
3.12: prosdokōntas kai speudontas tēn parousian tēs tou Theou hēmeras, di’ hēn ouranoi pyroumenoi lythēsontai kai stoicheia kausoumena tēketai;
3.13: kainous de ouranous kai gēn kainēn kata to epangelma autou prosdokōmen, en hois dikaiosynē katoikei.
3.14: Dio, agapētoi, tauta prosdokōntes spoudasate aspiloi kai amōmētoi autō heurethēnai en eirēnē,
3.15: kai tēn tou Kyriou hēmōn makrothymian sōtērian hēgeisthe, kathōs kai ho agapētos hēmōn adelphos Paulos kata tēn dotheisan autō sophian egrapsen hymin,
3.16: hōs kai en pasais epistolais lalōn en autais peri toutōn, en hais estin dysnoēta tina, ha hoi amatheis kai astēriktoi streblousin hōs kai tas loipas graphas pros tēn idian autōn apōleian.
3.17: Hymeis oun, agapētoi, proginōskontes phylassesthe hina mē tē tōn athesmōn planē synapachthentes ekpesēte tou idiou stērigmou,
3.18: auxanete de en chariti kai gnōsei tou Kyriou hēmōn kai Sōtēros Iēsou Christou. autō hē doxa kai nyn kai eis hēmeran aiōnos.

1.1: HO ēn ap’ archēs, ho akēkoamen, ho heōrakamen tois ophthalmois hēmōn, ho etheasametha kai hai cheires hēmōn epsēlaphēsan, peri tou Logou tēs zōēs,—
1.2: kai hē zōē ephanerōthē, kai heōrakamen kai martyroumen kai apangellomen hymin tēn zōēn tēn aiōnion, hētis ēn pros ton Patera kai ephanerōthē hēmin,—
1.3: ho heōrakamen kai akēkoamen, apangellomen kai hymin, hina kai hymeis koinōnian echēte meth’ hēmōn. kai hē koinōnia de hē hēmetera meta tou Patros kai meta tou Huiou autou Iēsou Christou.
1.4: kai tauta graphomen hēmeis hina hē chara hēmōn ē peplērōmenē.
1.5: Kai estin hautē hē angelia hēn akēkoamen ap’ autou kai anangellomen hymin, hoti ho Theos phōs estin kai skotia en autō ouk estin oudemia.
1.6: Ean eipōmen hoti koinōnian echomen met’ autou kai en tō skotei peripatōmen, pseudometha kai ou poioumen tēn alētheian;
1.7: ean de en tō phōti peripatōmen hōs autos estin en tō phōti, koinōnian echomen met’ allēlōn kai to haima Iēsou tou Huiou autou katharizei hēmas apo pasēs hamartias.
1.8: ean eipōmen hoti hamartian ouk echomen, heautous planōmen kai hē alētheia ouk estin en hēmin.
1.9: ean homologōmen tas hamartias hēmōn, pistos estin kai dikaios, hina aphē hēmin tas hamartias kai katharisē hēmas apo pasēs adikias.
1.10: ean eipōmen hoti ouch hēmartēkamen, pseustēn poioumen auton kai ho logos autou ouk estin en hēmin.

2.1: Teknia mou, tauta graphō hymin hina mē hamartēte. kai ean tis hamartē, Paraklēton echomen pros ton Patera Iēsoun Christon dikaion;
2.2: kai autos hilasmos estin peri tōn hamartiōn hēmōn, ou peri tōn hēmeterōn de monon alla kai peri holou tou kosmou.
2.3: kai en toutō ginōskomen hoti egnōkamen auton, ean tas entolas autou tērōmen.
2.4: ho legōn hoti Egnōka auton, kai tas entolas autou mē tērōn, pseustēs estin, kai en toutō hē alētheia ouk estin;
2.5: hos d’ an tērē autou ton logon alēthōs en toutō hē agapē tou Theou teteleiōtai. En toutō ginōskomen hoti en autō esmen;
2.6: ho legōn en autō menein opheilei kathōs ekeinos periepatēsen kai autos houtōs peripatein.
2.7: Agapētoi, ouk entolēn kainēn graphō hymin, all’ entolēn palaian hēn eichete ap’ archēs; hē entolē hē palaia estin ho logos hon ēkousate.
2.8: palin entolēn kainēn graphō hymin, ho estin alēthes en autō kai en hymin, hoti hē skotia paragetai kai to phōs to alēthinon ēdē phainei.
2.9: HO legōn en tō phōti einai kai ton adelphon autou misōn en tē skotia estin heōs arti.
2.10: ho agapōn ton adelphon autou en tō phōti menei, kai skandalon en autō ouk estin;
2.11: ho de misōn ton adelphon autou en tē skotia estin kai en tē skotia peripatei, kai ouk oiden pou hypagei, hoti hē skotia etyphlōsen tous ophthalmous autou.
2.12: Graphō hymin, teknia, hoti apheōntai hymin hai hamartiai dia to onoma autou.
2.13: graphō hymin, pateres, hoti egnōkate ton ap’ archēs; graphō hymin, neaniskoi, hoti nenikēkate ton ponēron.
2.14: egrapsa hymin, paidia, hoti egnōkate ton Patera. egrapsa hymin, pateres, hoti egnōkate ton ap’ archēs. egrapsa hymin, neaniskoi, hoti ischyroi este kai ho logos tou Theou en hymin menei kai nenikēkate ton ponēron.
2.15: Mē agapate ton kosmon mēde ta en tō kosmō. ean tis agapa ton kosmon, ouk estin hē agapē tou Patros en autō;
2.16: hoti pan to en tō kosmō, hē epithymia tēs sarkos kai hē epithymia tōn ophthalmōn kai hē alazonia tou biou, ouk estin ek tou patros, alla ek tou kosmou estin.
2.17: kai ho kosmos paragetai kai hē epithymia autou; ho de poiōn to thelēma tou Theou menei eis ton aiōna.
2.18: Paidia, eschatē hōra estin, kai kathōs ēkousate hoti antichristos erchetai, kai nyn antichristoi polloi gegonasin; hothen ginōskomen hoti eschatē hōra estin.
2.19: ex hēmōn exēlthan, all’ ouk ēsan ex hēmōn; ei gar ex hēmōn ēsan, memenēkeisan an meth’ hēmōn; all’ hina phanerōthōsin hoti ouk eisin pantes ex hēmōn.
2.20: kai hymeis chrisma echete apo tou Hagiou, kai oidate pantes.
2.21: ouk egrapsa hymin hoti ouk oidate tēn alētheian, all’ hoti oidate autēn, kai hoti pan pseudos ek tēs alētheias ouk estin.
2.22: Tis estin ho pseustēs ei mē ho arnoumenos hoti Iēsous ouk estin ho Christos? houtos estin ho antichristos, ho arnoumenos ton Patera kai ton Huion.
2.23: pas ho arnoumenos ton Huion oude ton Patera echei; ho homologōn ton Huion kai ton Patera echei.
2.24: hymeis ho ēkousate ap’ archēs, en hymin menetō. ean en hymin meinē ho ap’ archēs ēkousate, kai hymeis en tō Huiō kai en tō Patri meneite.
2.25: kai hautē estin hē epangelia hēn autos epēngeilato hēmin, tēn zōēn tēn aiōnion.
2.26: Tauta egrapsa hymin peri tōn planōntōn hymas.
2.27: kai hymeis to chrisma ho elabete ap’ autou menei en hymin, kai ou chreian echete hina tis didaskē hymas; all’ hōs to autou chrisma didaskei hymas peri pantōn, kai alēthes estin kai ouk estin pseudos, kai kathōs edidaxen hymas, menete en autō.
2.28: Kai nyn, teknia, menete en autō, hina ean phanerōthē schōmen parrēsian kai mē aischynthōmen ap’ autou en tē parousia autou.
2.29: ean eidēte hoti dikaios estin, ginōskete hoti kai pas ho poiōn tēn dikaiosynēn ex autou gegennētai.

3.1: Idete potapēn agapēn dedōken hēmin ho Patēr hina tekna Theou klēthōmen, kai esmen. dia touto ho kosmos ou ginōskei hēmas, hoti ouk egnō auton.
3.2: Agapētoi, nyn tekna Theou esmen, kai oupō ephanerōthē ti esometha. oidamen hoti ean phanerōthē homoioi autō esometha, hoti opsometha auton kathōs estin.
3.3: kai pas ho echōn tēn elpida tautēn ep’ autō hagnizei heauton kathōs ekeinos hagnos estin.
3.4: Pas ho poiōn tēn hamartian kai tēn anomian poiei, kai hē hamartia estin hē anomia.
3.5: kai oidate hoti ekeinos ephanerōthē hina tas hamartias arē, kai hamartia en autō ouk estin.
3.6: pas ho en autō menōn ouch hamartanei; pas ho hamartanōn ouch heōraken auton oude egnōken auton.
3.7: Teknia, mēdeis planatō hymas; ho poiōn tēn dikaiosynēn dikaios estin, kathōs ekeinos dikaios estin;
3.8: ho poiōn tēn hamartian ek tou diabolou estin, hoti ap’ archēs ho diabolos hamartanei. eis touto ephanerōthē ho Huios tou Theou, hina lysē ta erga tou diabolou.
3.9: Pas ho gegennēmenos ek tou Theou hamartian ou poiei, hoti sperma autou en autō menei; kai ou dynatai hamartanein, hoti ek tou Theou gegennētai.
3.10: en toutō phanera estin ta tekna tou Theou kai ta tekna tou diabolou; pas ho mē poiōn dikaiosynēn ouk estin ek tou Theou, kai ho mē agapōn ton adelphon autou.
3.11: hoti hautē estin hē angelia hēn ēkousate ap’ archēs, hina agapōmen allēlous;
3.12: ou kathōs Kain ek tou ponērou ēn kai esphaxen ton adelphon autou; kai charin tinos esphaxen auton? hoti ta erga autou ponēra ēn, ta de tou adelphou autou dikaia.
3.13: Mē thaumazete, adelphoi, ei misei hymas ho kosmos.
3.14: hēmeis oidamen hoti metabebēkamen ek tou thanatou eis tēn zōēn, hoti agapōmen tous adelphous; ho mē agapōn menei en tō thanatō.
3.15: pas ho misōn ton adelphon autou anthrōpoktonos estin, kai oidate hoti pas anthrōpoktonos ouk echei zōēn aiōnion en autō menousan.
3.16: En toutō egnōkamen tēn agapēn, hoti ekeinos hyper hēmōn tēn psychēn autou ethēken; kai hēmeis opheilomen hyper tōn adelphōn tas psychas theinai.
3.17: hos d’ an echē ton bion tou kosmou kai theōrē ton adelphon autou chreian echonta kai kleisē ta splanchna autou ap’ autou, pōs hē agapē tou Theou menei en autō?
3.18: Teknia, mē agapōmen logō mēde tē glōssē, alla en ergō kai alētheia.
3.19: en toutō gnōsometha hoti ek tēs alētheias esmen, kai emprosthen autou peisomen tēn kardian hēmōn
3.20: hoti ean kataginōskē hēmōn hē kardia, hoti meizōn estin ho Theos tēs kardias hēmōn kai ginōskei panta.
3.21: Agapētoi, ean hē kardia mē kataginōskē, parrēsian echomen pros ton Theon,
3.22: kai ho ean aitōmen lambanomen ap’ autou, hoti tas entolas autou tēroumen kai ta aresta enōpion autou poioumen.
3.23: kai hautē estin hē entolē autou, hina pisteusōmen tō onomati tou Huiou autou Iēsou Christou kai agapōmen allēlous kathōs edōken entolēn hēmin.
3.24: kai ho tērōn tas entolas autou en autō menei kai autos en autō; kai en toutō ginōskomen hoti menei en hēmin, ek tou Pneumatos hou hēmin edōken.

4.1: Agapētoi, mē panti pneumati pisteuete, alla dokimazete ta pneumata ei ek tou Theou estin, hoti polloi pseudoprophētai exelēlythasin eis ton kosmon.
4.2: En toutō ginōskete to Pneuma tou Theou; pan pneuma ho homologei Iēsoun Christon en sarki elēlythota ek tou Theou estin,
4.3: kai pan pneuma ho mē homologei ton Iēsoun ek tou Theou ouk estin; kai touto estin to tou antichristou, ho akēkoate hoti erchetai, kai nyn en tō kosmō estin ēdē.
4.4: Hymeis ek tou Theou este, teknia, kai nenikēkate autous, hoti meizōn estin ho en hymin ē ho en tō kosmō.
4.5: autoi ek tou kosmou eisin; dia touto ek tou kosmou lalousin kai ho kosmos autōn akouei.
4.6: hēmeis ek tou Theou esmen; ho ginōskōn ton Theon akouei hēmōn, hos ouk estin ek tou Theou ouk akouei hēmōn. ek toutou ginōskomen to pneuma tēs alētheias kai to pneuma tēs planēs.
4.7: Agapētoi, agapōmen allēlous, hoti hē agapē ek tou Theou estin, kai pas ho agapōn ek tou Theou gegennētai kai ginōskei ton Theon.
4.8: ho mē agapōn ouk egnō ton Theon, hoti ho Theos agapē estin.
4.9: en toutō ephanerōthē hē agapē tou Theou en hēmin, hoti ton Huion autou ton monogenē apestalken ho Theos eis ton kosmon hina zēsōmen di’ autou.
4.10: en toutō estin hē agapē, ouch hoti hēmeis ēgapēkamen ton Theon, all’ hoti autos ēgapēsen hēmas kai apesteilen ton Huion autou hilasmon peri tōn hamartiōn hēmōn.
4.11: Agapētoi, ei houtōs ho Theos ēgapēsen hēmas, kai hēmeis opheilomen allēlous agapan.
4.12: Theon oudeis pōpote tetheatai; ean agapōmen allēlous, ho Theos en hēmin menei kai hē agapē autou teteleiōmenē en hēmin estin.
4.13: en toutō ginōskomen hoti en autō menomen kai autos en hēmin, hoti ek tou Pneumatos autou dedōken hēmin.
4.14: kai hēmeis tetheametha kai martyroumen hoti ho Patēr apestalken ton Huion Sōtēra tou kosmou.
4.15: hos ean homologēsē hoti Iēsous estin ho Huios tou Theou, ho Theos en autō menei kai autos en tō Theō.
4.16: kai hēmeis egnōkamen kai pepisteukamen tēn agapēn hēn echei ho Theos en hēmin. HO Theos agapē estin, kai ho menōn en tē agapē en tō Theō menei kai ho Theos en autō menei.
4.17: En toutō teteleiōtai hē agapē meth’ hēmōn, hina parrēsian echōmen en tē hēmera tēs kriseōs, hoti kathōs ekeinos estin kai hēmeis esmen en tō kosmō toutō.
4.18: phobos ouk estin en tē agapē, all’ hē teleia agapē exō ballei ton phobon, hoti ho phobos kolasin echei, ho de phoboumenos ou teteleiōtai en tē agapē.
4.19: Hēmeis agapōmen, hoti autos prōtos ēgapēsen hēmas.
4.20: ean tis eipē hoti Agapō ton Theon, kai ton adelphon autou misē, pseustēs estin; ho gar mē agapōn ton adelphon autou hon heōraken, ton Theon hon ouch heōraken ou dynatai agapan.
4.21: kai tautēn tēn entolēn echomen ap’ autou, hina ho agapōn ton Theon agapa kai ton adelphon autou.

5.1: Pas ho pisteuōn hoti Iēsous estin ho Christos ek tou Theou gegennētai, kai pas ho agapōn ton gennēsanta agapa ton gegennēmenon ex autou.
5.2: en toutō ginōskomen hoti agapōmen ta tekna tou Theou, hotan ton Theon agapōmen kai tas entolas autou poiōmen.
5.3: hautē gar estin hē agapē tou Theou, hina tas entolas autou tērōmen; kai hai entolai autou bareiai ouk eisin,
5.4: hoti pan to gegennēmenon ek tou Theou nika ton kosmon; kai hautē estin hē nikē hē nikēsasa ton kosmon, hē pistis hēmōn.
5.5: tis estin ho nikōn ton kosmon ei mē ho pisteuōn hoti Iēsous estin ho Huios tou Theou?
5.6: houtos estin ho elthōn di’ hydatos kai haimatos, Iēsous Christos; ouk en tō hydati monon, all’ en tō hydati kai en tō haimati; kai to Pneuma estin to martyroun, hoti to Pneuma estin hē alētheia.
5.8: to Pneuma kai to hydōr kai to haima, kai hoi treis eis to hen eisin.
5.9: ei tēn martyrian tōn anthrōpōn lambanomen, hē martyria tou Theou meizōn estin, hoti hautē estin hē martyria tou Theou hoti memartyrēken peri tou Huiou autou.
5.10: ho pisteuōn eis ton Huion tou Theou echei tēn martyrian en hautō. ho mē pisteuōn tō Theō pseustēn pepoiēken auton, hoti ou pepisteuken eis tēn martyrian hēn memartyrēken ho Theos peri tou Huiou autou.
5.11: kai hautē estin hē martyria, hoti zōēn aiōnion edōken ho Theos hēmin, kai hautē hē zōē en tō Huiō autou estin.
5.12: ho echōn ton Huion echei tēn zōēn; ho mē echōn ton Huion tou Theou tēn zōēn ouk echei.
5.13: Tauta egrapsa hymin hina eidēte hoti zōēn echete aiōnion, tois pisteuousin eis to onoma tou Huiou tou Theou.
5.14: Kai hautē estin hē parrēsia hēn echomen pros auton, hoti ean ti aitōmetha kata to thelēma autou akouei hēmōn.
5.15: kai ean oidamen hoti akouei hēmōn ho ean aitōmetha, oidamen hoti echomen ta aitēmata ha ētēkamen ap’ autou.
5.16: Ean tis idē ton adelphon autou hamartanonta hamartian mē pros thanaton, aitēsei, kai dōsei autō zōēn, tois hamartanousin mē pros thanaton. estin hamartia pros thanaton; ou peri ekeinēs legō hina erōtēsē.
5.17: pasa adikia hamartia estin, kai estin hamartia ou pros thanaton.
5.18: Oidamen hoti pas ho gegennēmenos ek tou Theou ouch hamartanei, all’ ho gennētheis ek tou Theou tērei auton, kai ho ponēros ouch haptetai autou.
5.19: oidamen hoti ek tou Theou esmen, kai ho kosmos holos en tō ponērō keitai.
5.20: oidamen de hoti ho Huios tou Theou hēkei, kai dedōken hēmin dianoian hina ginōskomen ton alēthinon; kai esmen en tō alēthinō, en tō Huiō autou Iēsou Christō. houtos estin ho alēthinos Theos kai zōē aiōnios.
5.21: Teknia, phylaxate heauta apo tōn eidōlōn.

1.1: HO presbyteros eklektē kyria kai tois teknois autēs, hous egō agapō en alētheia, kai ouk egō monos alla kai pantes hoi egnōkotes tēn alētheian,
1.2: dia tēn alētheian tēn menousan en hēmin, kai meth’ hēmōn estai eis ton aiōna.
1.3: estai meth’ hēmōn charis eleos eirēnē para Theou Patros, kai para Iēsou Christou tou Huiou tou Patros, en alētheia kai agapē.
1.4: Echarēn lian hoti heurēka ek tōn teknōn sou peripatountas en alētheia, kathōs entolēn elabomen para tou Patros.
1.5: kai nyn erōtō se, kyria, ouch hōs entolēn graphōn soi kainēn, alla hēn eichamen ap’ archēs, hina agapōmen allēlous.
1.6: kai hautē estin hē agapē, hina peripatōmen kata tas entolas autou; hautē hē entolē estin, kathōs ēkousate ap’ archēs, hina en autē peripatēte.
1.7: hoti polloi planoi exēlthon eis ton kosmon, hoi mē homologountes Iēsoun Christon erchomenon en sarki; houtos estin ho planos kai ho antichristos.
1.8: blepete heautous, hina mē apolesēte ha ērgasametha, alla misthon plērē apolabēte.
1.9: pas ho proagōn kai mē menōn en tē didachē tou Christou Theon ouk echei; ho menōn en tē didachē, houtos kai ton Patera kai ton Huion echei.
1.10: ei tis erchetai pros hymas kai tautēn tēn didachēn ou pherei, mē lambanete auton eis oikian, kai chairein autō mē legete;
1.11: ho legōn gar autō chairein koinōnei tois ergois autou tois ponērois.
1.12: Polla echōn hymin graphein ouk eboulēthēn dia chartou kai melanos, alla elpizō genesthai pros hymas kai stoma pros stoma lalēsai, hina hē chara hēmōn peplērōmenē ē.
1.13: Aspazetai se ta tekna tēs adelphēs sou tēs eklektēs.

1.1: HO presbyteros Gaiō tō agapētō, hon egō agapō en alētheia.
1.2: Agapēte, peri pantōn euchomai se euodousthai kai hygiainein, kathōs euodoutai sou hē psychē.
1.3: echarēn gar lian erchomenōn adelphōn kai martyrountōn sou tē alētheia, kathōs sy en alētheia peripateis.
1.4: meizoteran toutōn ouk echō charan, hina akouō ta ema tekna en tē alētheia peripatounta.
1.5: Agapēte, piston poieis ho ean ergasē eis tous adelphous kai touto xenous,
1.6: hoi emartyrēsan sou tē agapē enōpion ekklēsias, hous kalōs poiēseis propempsas axiōs tou Theou;
1.7: hyper gar tou Onomatos exēlthan mēden lambanontes apo tōn ethnikōn.
1.8: hēmeis oun opheilomen hypolambanein tous toioutous, hina synergoi ginōmetha tē alētheia.
1.9: Egrapsa ti tē ekklēsia; all’ ho philoprōteuōn autōn Diotrephēs ouk epidechetai hēmas.
1.10: dia touto, ean elthō, hypomnēsō autou ta erga ha poiei logois ponērois phlyarōn hēmas, kai mē arkoumenos epi toutois oute autos epidechetai tous adelphous kai tous boulomenous kōlyei kai ek tēs ekklēsias ekballei.
1.11: Agapēte, mē mimou to kakon alla to agathon. ho agathopoiōn ek tou Theou estin; ho kakopoiōn ouch heōraken ton Theon.
1.12: Dēmētriō memartyrētai hypo pantōn kai hypo autēs tēs alētheias; kai hēmeis de martyroumen, kai oidas hoti hē martyria hēmōn alēthēs estin.
1.13: Polla eichon grapsai soi, all’ ou thelō dia melanos kai kalamou soi graphein;
1.14: elpizō de eutheōs se idein, kai stoma pros stoma lalēsomen. Eirēnē soi. aspazontai se hoi philoi. aspazou tous philous kat’ onoma.

1.1: Ioudas Iēsou Christou doulos, adelphos de Iakōbou, tois en Theō Patri ēgapēmenois kai Iēsou Christō tetērēmenois klētois.
1.2: eleos hymin kai eirēnē kai agapē plēthyntheiē.
1.3: Agapētoi, pasan spoudēn poioumenos graphein hymin peri tēs koinēs hēmōn sōtērias, anankēn eschon grapsai hymin parakalōn epagōnizesthai tē hapax paradotheisē tois hagiois pistei.
1.4: pareisedyēsan gar tines anthrōpoi, hoi palai progegrammenoi eis touto to krima, asebeis, tēn tou Theou hēmōn charita metatithentes eis aselgeian kai ton monon Despotēn kai Kyrion hēmōn Iēsoun Christon arnoumenoi.
1.5: Hypomnēsai de hymas boulomai, eidotas hapax panta, hoti Kyrios laon ek gēs Aigyptou sōsas to deuteron tous mē pisteusantas apōlesen,
1.6: angelous te tous mē tērēsantas tēn heautōn archēn alla apolipontas to idion oikētērion eis krisin megalēs hēmeras desmois aidiois hypo zophon tetērēken;
1.7: hōs Sodoma kai Gomorra kai hai peri autas poleis, ton homoion tropon toutois ekporneusasai kai apelthousai opisō sarkos heteras, prokeintai deigma pyros aiōniou dikēn hypechousai.
1.8: Homoiōs mentoi kai houtoi enypniazomenoi sarka men miainousin, kyriotēta de athetousin, doxas de blasphēmousin.
1.9: ho de Michaēl ho archangelos, hote tō diabolō diakrinomenos dielegeto peri tou Mōuseōs sōmatos, ouk etolmēsen krisin epenenkein blasphēmias, alla eipen Epitimēsai soi Kyrios.
1.10: houtoi de hosa men ouk oidasin blasphēmousin, hosa de physikōs hōs ta aloga zōa epistantai, en toutois phtheirontai.
1.11: ouai autois, hoti tē hodō tou Kain eporeuthēsan, kai tē planē tou Balaam misthou exechythēsan, kai tē antilogia tou Kore apōlonto.
1.12: Houtoi eisin hoi en tais agapais hymōn spilades syneuōchoumenoi aphobōs, heautous poimainontes, nephelai anydroi hypo anemōn parapheromenai, dendra phthinopōrina akarpa dis apothanonta ekrizōthenta,
1.13: kymata agria thalassēs epaphrizonta tas heautōn aischynas, asteres planētai, hois ho zophos tou skotous eis aiōna tetērētai.
1.14: Eprophēteusen de kai toutois hebdomos apo Adam Henōch legōn Idou ēlthen Kyrios en hagiais myriasin autou,
1.15: poiēsai krisin kata pantōn kai elenxai pantas tous asebeis peri pantōn tōn ergōn asebeias autōn hōn ēsebēsan kai peri pantōn tōn sklērōn hōn elalēsan kat’ autou hamartōloi asebeis.
1.16: Houtoi eisin gongystai, mempsimoiroi, kata tas epithymias autōn poreuomenoi, kai to stoma autōn lalei hyperonka, thaumazontes prosōpa ōpheleias charin.
1.17: Hymeis de, agapētoi, mnēsthēte tōn rhēmatōn tōn proeirēmenōn hypo tōn apostolōn tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou,
1.18: hoti elegon hymin Ep’ eschatou tou chronou esontai empaiktai kata tas heautōn epithymias poreuomenoi tōn asebeiōn.
1.19: Houtoi eisin hoi apodiorizontes, psychikoi, Pneuma mē echontes.
1.20: hymeis de, agapētoi, epoikodomountes heautous tē hagiōtatē hymōn pistei, en Pneumati Hagiō proseuchomenoi,
1.21: heautous en agapē Theou tērēsate, prosdechomenoi to eleos tou Kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou eis zōēn aiōnion.
1.23: sōzete ek pyros harpazontes, hous de eleate en phobō, misountes kai ton apo tēs sarkos espilōmenon chitōna.
1.24: Tō de dynamenō phylaxai hymas aptaistous kai stēsai katenōpion tēs doxēs autou amōmous en agalliasei,
1.25: monō Theō Sōtēri hēmōn dia Iēsou Christou tou Kyriou hēmōn doxa megalōsynē kratos kai exousia pro pantos tou aiōnos kai nyn kai eis pantas tous aiōnas; amēn.

1.1: Apokalypsis Iēsou Christou, hēn edōken autō ho Theos, deixai tois doulois autou ha dei genesthai en tachei, kai esēmanen aposteilas dia tou angelou autou, tō doulō autou Iōanē,
1.2: hos emartyrēsen ton logon tou Theou kai tēn martyrian Iēsou Christou, hosa eiden.
1.3: Makarios ho anaginōskōn kai hoi akouontes tous logous tēs prophēteias kai tērountes ta en autē gegrammena; ho gar kairos engys.
1.4: Iōanēs tais hepta ekklēsiais tais en tē Asia; charis hymin kai eirēnē apo ho ōn kai ho ēn kai ho erchomenos, kai apo tōn hepta Pneumatōn ha enōpion tou thronou autou,
1.5: kai apo Iēsou Christou, ho martys ho pistos, ho prōtotokos tōn nekrōn kai ho archōn tōn basileōn tēs gēs. Tō agapōnti hēmas kai lysanti hēmas ek tōn hamartiōn hēmōn en tō haimati autou,
1.6: kai epoiēsen hēmas basileian, hiereis tō Theō kai Patri autou, autō hē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.
1.7: Idou erchetai meta tōn nephelōn, kai opsetai auton pas ophthalmos kai hoitines auton exekentēsan, kai kopsontai ep’ auton pasai hai phylai tēs gēs. nai, amēn.
1.8: Egō eimi to Alpha kai to Ō, legei Kyrios ho Theos, ho ōn kai ho ēn kai ho erchomenos, ho Pantokratōr.
1.9: Egō Iōanēs, ho adelphos hymōn kai synkoinōnos en tē thlipsei kai basileia kai hypomonē en Iēsou, egenomēn en tē nēsō tē kaloumenē Patmō dia ton logon tou Theou kai tēn martyrian Iēsou.
1.10: egenomēn en Pneumati en tē kyriakē hēmera, kai ēkousa opisō mou phōnēn megalēn hōs salpingos
1.11: legousēs HO blepeis grapson eis biblion kai pempson tais hepta ekklēsiais, eis Epheson kai eis Smyrnan kai eis Pergamon kai eis Thyateira kai eis Sardeis kai eis Philadelphian kai eis Laodikian.
1.12: Kai epestrepsa blepein tēn phōnēn hētis elalei met’ emou; kai epistrepsas eidon hepta lychnias chrysas,
1.13: kai en mesō tōn lychniōn homoion huion anthrōpou, endedymenon podērē kai periezōsmenon pros tois mastois zōnēn chrysan;
1.14: hē de kephalē autou kai hai triches leukai hōs erion leukon hōs chiōn, kai hoi ophthalmoi autou hōs phlox pyros,
1.15: kai hoi podes autou homoioi chalkolibanō hōs en kaminō pepyrōmenēs, kai hē phōnē autou hōs phōnē hydatōn pollōn,
1.16: kai echōn en tē dexia cheiri autou asteras hepta, kai ek tou stomatos autou rhomphaia distomos oxeia ekporeuomenē, kai hē opsis autou hōs ho hēlios phainei en tē dynamei autou.
1.17: Kai hote eidon auton, epesa pros tous podas autou hōs nekros; kai ethēken tēn dexian autou ep’ eme legōn Mē phobou; egō eimi ho prōtos kai ho eschatos
1.18: kai ho Zōn, kai egenomēn nekros kai idou zōn eimi eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn, kai echō tas kleis tou thanatou kai tou Haidou.
1.19: grapson oun ha eides kai ha eisin kai ha mellei genesthai meta tauta.
1.20: to mystērion tōn hepta asterōn hous eides epi tēs dexias mou, kai tas hepta lychnias tas chrysas; hoi hepta asteres angeloi tōn hepta ekklēsiōn eisin, kai hai lychniai hai hepta hepta ekklēsiai eisin.

2.1: Tō angelō tēs en Ephesō ekklēsias grapson Tade legei ho kratōn tous hepta asteras en tē dexia autou, ho peripatōn en mesō tōn hepta lychniōn tōn chrysōn
2.2: Oida ta erga sou kai ton kopon kai tēn hypomonēn sou, kai hoti ou dynē bastasai kakous, kai epeirasas tous legontas heautous apostolous kai ouk eisin, kai heures autous pseudeis;
2.3: kai hypomonēn echeis, kai ebastasas dia to onoma mou, kai ou kekopiakes.
2.4: alla echō kata sou hoti tēn agapēn sou tēn prōtēn aphēkes.
2.5: mnēmoneue oun pothen peptōkes, kai metanoēson kai ta prōta erga poiēson; ei de mē, erchomai soi kai kinēsō tēn lychnian sou ek tou topou autēs, ean mē metanoēsēs.
2.6: alla touto echeis, hoti miseis ta erga tōn Nikolaitōn, ha kagō misō.
2.7: HO echōn ous akousatō ti to Pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais. Tō nikōnti dōsō autō phagein ek tou xylou tēs zōēs, ho estin en tō Paradeisō tou Theou.
2.8: Kai tō angelō tēs en Smyrnē ekklēsias grapson Tade legei ho prōtos kai ho eschatos, hos egeneto nekros kai ezēsen
2.9: Oida sou tēn thlipsin kai tēn ptōcheian, alla plousios ei, kai tēn blasphēmian ek tōn legontōn Ioudaious einai heautous, kai ouk eisin alla synagōgē tou Satana.
2.10: mē phobou ha melleis paschein. idou mellei ballein ho diabolos ex hymōn eis phylakēn hina peirasthēte, kai hexete thlipsin hēmerōn deka. ginou pistos achri thanatou, kai dōsō soi ton stephanon tēs zōēs.
2.11: HO echōn ous akousatō ti to Pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais. HO nikōn ou mē adikēthē ek tou thanatou tou deuterou.
2.12: Kai tō angelō tēs en Pergamō ekklēsias grapson Tade legei ho echōn tēn rhomphaian tēn distomon tēn oxeian
2.13: Oida pou katoikeis; hopou ho thronos tou Satana; kai krateis to onoma mou, kai ouk ērnēsō tēn pistin mou kai en tais hēmerais Antipas ho martys mou ho pistos mou, hos apektanthē par’ hymin, hopou ho Satanas katoikei.
2.14: all’ echō kata sou oliga, hoti echeis ekei kratountas tēn didachēn Balaam, hos edidasken tō Balak balein skandalon enōpion tōn huiōn Israēl, phagein eidōlothyta kai porneusai.
2.15: houtōs echeis kai sy kratountas tēn didachēn tōn Nikolaitōn homoiōs.
2.16: metanoēson oun; ei de mē, erchomai soi tachy kai polemēsō met’ autōn en tē rhomphaia tou stomatos mou.
2.17: HO echōn ous akousatō ti to Pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais. Tō nikōnti dōsō autō tou manna tou kekrymmenou, kai dōsō autō psēphon leukēn, kai epi tēn psēphon onoma kainon gegrammenon, ho oudeis oiden ei mē ho lambanōn.
2.18: Kai tō angelō tēs en Thyateirois ekklēsias grapson Tade legei ho Huios tou Theou, ho echōn tous ophthalmous autou hōs phloga pyros, kai hoi podes autou homoioi chalkolibanō
2.19: Oida sou ta erga kai tēn agapēn kai tēn pistin kai tēn diakonian kai tēn hypomonēn sou, kai ta erga sou ta eschata pleiona tōn prōtōn.
2.20: alla echō kata sou hoti apheis tēn gynaika Iezabel, hē legousa heautēn prophētin, kai didaskei kai plana tous emous doulous porneusai kai phagein eidōlothyta;
2.21: kai edōka autē chronon hina metanoēsē, kai ou thelei metanoēsai ek tēs porneias autēs.
2.22: idou ballō autēn eis klinēn, kai tous moicheuontas met’ autēs eis thlipsin megalēn, ean mē metanoēsousin ek tōn ergōn autēs;
2.23: kai ta tekna autēs apoktenō en thanatō; kai gnōsontai pasai hai ekklēsiai hoti egō eimi ho eraunōn nephrous kai kardias, kai dōsō hymin hekastō kata ta erga hymōn.
2.24: hymin de legō tois loipois tois en Thyateirois, hosoi ouk echousin tēn didachēn tautēn, hoitines ouk egnōsan ta bathea tou Satana, hōs legousin, ou ballō eph’ hymas allo baros;
2.25: plēn ho echete kratēsate achri hou an hēxō.
2.26: Kai ho nikōn kai ho tērōn achri telous ta erga mou, dōsō autō exousian epi tōn ethnōn,
2.27: kai poimanei autous en rhabdō sidēra, hōs ta skeuē ta keramika syntribetai,
2.28: hōs kagō eilēpha para tou Patros mou, kai dōsō autō ton astera ton prōinon.
2.29: HO echōn ous akousatō ti to Pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais.

3.1: Kai tō angelō tēs en Sardesin ekklēsias grapson Tade legei ho echōn ta hepta Pneumata tou Theou kai tous hepta asteras Oida sou ta erga, hoti onoma echeis hoti zēs, kai nekros ei.
3.2: ginou grēgorōn, kai stērison ta loipa ha emellon apothanein; ou gar heurēka sou erga peplērōmena enōpion tou Theou mou;
3.3: mnēmoneue oun pōs eilēphas kai ēkousas, kai tērei kai metanoēson. ean oun mē grēgorēsēs, hēxō hōs kleptēs, kai ou mē gnōs poian hōran hēxō epi se.
3.4: alla echeis oliga onomata en Sardesin ha ouk emolynan ta himatia autōn, kai peripatēsousin met’ emou en leukois, hoti axioi eisin.
3.5: HO nikōn houtōs peribaleitai en himatiois leukois, kai ou mē exaleipsō to onoma autou ek tēs biblou tēs zōēs, kai homologēsō to onoma autou enōpion tou Patros mou kai enōpion tōn angelōn autou.
3.6: HO echōn ous akousatō ti to Pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais.
3.7: Kai tō angelō tēs en Philadelphia ekklēsias grapson Tade legei ho hagios, ho alēthinos, ho echōn tēn klein Daueid, ho anoigōn kai oudeis kleisei, kai kleiōn kai oudeis anoigei
3.8: Oida sou ta erga; idou dedōka enōpion sou thyran ēneōgmenēn, hēn oudeis dynatai kleisai autēn; hoti mikran echeis dynamin, kai etērēsas mou ton logon kai ouk ērnēsō to onoma mou.
3.9: idou didō ek tēs synagōgēs tou Satana, tōn legontōn heautous Ioudaious einai, kai ouk eisin alla pseudontai; idou poiēsō autous hina hēxousin kai proskynēsousin enōpion tōn podōn sou, kai gnōsin hoti egō ēgapēsa se.
3.10: hoti etērēsas ton logon tēs hypomonēs mou, kagō se tērēsō ek tēs hōras tou peirasmou tēs mellousēs erchesthai epi tēs oikoumenēs holēs, peirasai tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs.
3.11: erchomai tachy; kratei ho echeis, hina mēdeis labē ton stephanon sou.
3.12: HO nikōn, poiēsō auton stylon en tō naō tou Theou mou, kai exō ou mē exelthē eti, kai grapsō ep’ auton to onoma tou Theou mou kai to onoma tēs poleōs tou Theou mou, tēs kainēs Hierousalēm hē katabainousa ek tou ouranou apo tou Theou mou, kai to onoma mou to kainon.
3.13: HO echōn ous akousatō ti to Pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais.
3.14: Kai tō angelō tēs en Laodikia ekklēsias grapson Tade legei ho Amēn, ho martys ho pistos kai alēthinos, hē archē tēs ktiseōs tou Theou
3.15: Oida sou ta erga, hoti oute psychros ei oute zestos. ophelon psychros ēs ē zestos.
3.16: houtōs, hoti chliaros ei, kai oute zestos oute psychros, mellō se emesai ek tou stomatos mou.
3.17: hoti legeis hoti Plousios eimi kai peploutēka kai ouden chreian echō, kai ouk oidas hoti sy ei ho talaipōros kai eleeinos kai ptōchos kai typhlos kai gymnos,
3.18: symbouleuō soi agorasai par’ emou chrysion pepyrōmenon ek pyros hina ploutēsēs, kai himatia leuka hina peribalē kai mē phanerōthē hē aischynē tēs gymnotētos sou, kai kollourion enchrisai tous ophthalmous sou hina blepēs.
3.19: egō hosous ean philō elenchō kai paideuō; zēleue oun kai metanoēson.
3.20: Idou hestēka epi tēn thyran kai krouō; ean tis akousē tēs phōnēs mou kai anoixē tēn thyran, eiseleusomai pros auton kai deipnēsō met’ autou kai autos met’ emou.
3.21: HO nikōn dōsō autō kathisai met’ emou en tō thronō mou, hōs kagō enikēsa kai ekathisa meta tou Patros mou en tō thronō autou.
3.22: HO echōn ous akousatō ti to Pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais.

4.1: Meta tauta eidon, kai idou thyra ēneōgmenē en tō ouranō, kai hē phōnē hē prōtē hēn ēkousa hōs salpingos lalousēs met’ emou, legōn Anaba hōde, kai deixō soi ha dei genesthai meta tauta.
4.2: eutheōs egenomēn en Pneumati; kai idou thronos ekeito en tō ouranō, kai epi ton thronon kathēmenos,
4.3: kai ho kathēmenos homoios horasei lithō iaspidi kai sardiō, kai iris kyklothen tou thronou homoios horasei smaragdinō.
4.4: kai kyklothen tou thronou thronous eikosi tessaras, kai epi tous thronous eikosi tessaras presbyterous kathēmenous peribeblēmenous en himatiois leukois, kai epi tas kephalas autōn stephanous chrysous.
4.5: kai ek tou thronou ekporeuontai astrapai kai phōnai kai brontai; kai hepta lampades pyros kaiomenai enōpion tou thronou, ha eisin ta hepta Pneumata tou Theou;
4.6: kai enōpion tou thronou hōs thalassa hyalinē homoia krystallō; kai en mesō tou thronou kai kyklō tou thronou tessera zōa gemonta ophthalmōn emprosthen kai opisthen.
4.7: kai to zōon to prōton homoion leonti, kai to deuteron zōon homoion moschō, kai to triton zōon echōn to prosōpon hōs anthrōpou, kai to tetarton zōon homoion aetō petomenō.
4.8: kai ta tessera zōa, hen kath’ hen autōn echōn ana pterygas hex, kyklothen kai esōthen gemousin ophthalmōn; kai anapausin ouk echousin hēmeras kai nyktos legontes Hagios hagios hagios Kyrios ho Theos ho Pantokratōr, ho ēn kai ho ōn kai ho erchomenos.
4.9: Kai hotan dōsousin ta zōa doxan kai timēn kai eucharistian tō kathēmenō epi tō thronō tō zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn,
4.10: pesountai hoi eikosi tessares presbyteroi enōpion tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou, kai proskynēsousin tō zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn, kai balousin tous stephanous autōn enōpion tou thronou, legontes
4.11: Axios ei, ho Kyrios kai ho Theos hēmōn, labein tēn doxan kai tēn timēn kai tēn dynamin, hoti sy ektisas ta panta, kai dia to thelēma sou ēsan kai ektisthēsan.

5.1: Kai eidon epi tēn dexian tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou biblion gegrammenon esōthen kai opisthen, katesphragismenon sphragisin hepta.
5.2: kai eidon angelon ischyron kēryssonta en phōnē megalē Tis axios anoixai to biblion kai lysai tas sphragidas autou?
5.3: kai oudeis edynato en tō ouranō oude epi tēs gēs oude hypokatō tēs gēs anoixai to biblion oute blepein auto.
5.4: kai eklaion poly, hoti oudeis axios heurethē anoixai to biblion oute blepein auto.
5.5: kai heis ek tōn presbyterōn legei moi Mē klaie; idou enikēsen ho Leōn ho ek tēs phylēs Iouda, hē Rhiza Daueid, anoixai to biblion kai tas hepta sphragidas autou.
5.6: Kai eidon en mesō tou thronou kai tōn tessarōn zōōn kai en mesō tōn presbyterōn Arnion hestēkos hōs esphagmenon, echōn kerata hepta kai ophthalmous hepta, hoi eisin ta hepta Pneumata tou Theou apestalmenoi eis pasan tēn gēn.
5.7: kai ēlthen kai eilēphen ek tēs dexias tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou.
5.8: Kai hote elaben to biblion, ta tessera zōa kai hoi eikosi tessares presbyteroi epesan enōpion tou Arniou, echontes hekastos kitharan kai phialas chrysas gemousas thymiamatōn, hai eisin hai proseuchai tōn hagiōn.
5.9: kai adousin ōdēn kainēn legontes Axios ei labein to biblion kai anoixai tas sphragidas autou, hoti esphagēs kai ēgorasas tō Theō en tō haimati sou ek pasēs phylēs kai glōssēs kai laou kai ethnous,
5.10: kai epoiēsas autous tō Theō hēmōn basileian kai hiereis, kai basileusousin epi tēs gēs.
5.11: kai eidon, kai ēkousa phōnēn angelōn pollōn kyklō tou thronou kai tōn zōōn kai tōn presbyterōn, kai ēn ho arithmos autōn myriades myriadōn kai chiliades chiliadōn,
5.12: legontes phōnē megalē Axios estin to Arnion to esphagmenon labein tēn dynamin kai plouton kai sophian kai ischyn kai timēn kai doxan kai eulogian.
5.13: kai pan ktisma ho en tō ouranō kai epi tēs gēs kai hypokatō tēs gēs kai epi tēs thalassēs estin, kai ta en autois panta, ēkousa legontas Tō kathēmenō epi tō thronō kai tō Arniō hē eulogia kai hē timē kai hē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn.
5.14: kai ta tessera zōa elegon Amēn, kai hoi presbyteroi epesan kai prosekynēsan.

6.1: Kai eidon hote ēnoixen to Arnion mian ek tōn hepta sphragidōn, kai ēkousa henos ek tōn tessarōn zōōn legontos hōs phōnē brontēs Erchou.
6.2: kai eidon, kai idou hippos leukos, kai ho kathēmenos ep’ auton echōn toxon, kai edothē autō stephanos, kai exēlthen nikōn kai hina nikēsē.
6.3: Kai hote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn deuteran, ēkousa tou deuterou zōou legontos Erchou.
6.4: kai exēlthen allos hippos pyrros, kai tō kathēmenō ep’ auton edothē autō labein tēn eirēnēn ek tēs gēs kai hina allēlous sphaxousin, kai edothē autō machaira megalē.
6.5: Kai hote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn tritēn, ēkousa tou tritou zōou legontos Erchou. kai eidon, kai idou hippos melas, kai ho kathēmenos ep’ auton echōn zygon en tē cheiri autou.
6.6: kai ēkousa hōs phōnēn en mesō tōn tessarōn zōōn legousan Choinix sitou dēnariou, kai treis choinikes krithōn dēnariou; kai to elaion kai ton oinon mē adikēsēs.
6.7: Kai hote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn tetartēn, ēkousa phōnēn tou tetartou zōou legontos Erchou.
6.8: kai eidon, kai idou hippos chlōros, kai ho kathēmenos epanō autou, onoma autō HO Thanatos, kai ho Haidēs ēkolouthei met’ autou, kai edothē autois exousia epi to tetarton tēs gēs, apokteinai en rhomphaia kai en limō kai en thanatō kai hypo tōn thēriōn tēs gēs.
6.9: Kai hote ēnoixen tēn pemptēn sphragida, eidon hypokatō tou thysiastēriou tas psychas tōn esphagmenōn dia ton logon tou Theou kai dia tēn martyrian hēn eichon.
6.10: kai ekraxan phōnē megalē legontes Heōs pote, ho Despotēs ho hagios kai alēthinos, ou krineis kai ekdikeis to haima hēmōn ek tōn katoikountōn epi tēs gēs?
6.11: kai edothē autois hekastō stolē leukē, kai errethē autois hina anapausōntai eti chronon mikron, heōs plērōthōsin kai hoi syndouloi autōn kai hoi adelphoi autōn hoi mellontes apoktennesthai hōs kai autoi.
6.12: Kai eidon hote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn hektēn, kai seismos megas egeneto, kai ho hēlios egeneto melas hōs sakkos trichinos, kai hē selēnē holē egeneto hōs haima,
6.13: kai hoi asteres tou ouranou epesan eis tēn gēn, hōs sykē ballei tous olynthous autēs hypo anemou megalou seiomenē,
6.14: kai ho ouranos apechōristhē hōs biblion helissomenon, kai pan oros kai nēsos ek tōn topōn autōn ekinēthēsan.
6.15: kai hoi basileis tēs gēs kai hoi megistanes kai hoi chiliarchoi kai hoi plousioi kai hoi ischyroi kai pas doulos kai eleutheros ekrypsan heautous eis ta spēlaia kai eis tas petras tōn oreōn,
6.16: kai legousin tois oresin kai tais petrais Pesete eph’ hēmas kai krypsate hēmas apo prosōpou tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou kai apo tēs orgēs tou Arniou,
6.17: hoti ēlthen hē hēmera hē megalē tēs orgēs autōn, kai tis dynatai stathēnai?

7.1: Meta touto eidon tessaras angelous hestōtas epi tas tessaras gōnias tēs gēs, kratountas tous tessaras anemous tēs gēs, hina mē pneē anemos epi tēs gēs mēte epi tēs thalassēs mēte epi pan dendron.
7.2: kai eidon allon angelon anabainonta apo anatolēs hēliou, echonta sphragida Theou zōntos, kai ekraxen phōnē megalē tois tessarsin angelois hois edothē autois adikēsai tēn gēn kai tēn thalassan,
