7.3: legōn Mē adikēsēte tēn gēn mēte tēn thalassan mēte ta dendra, achri sphragisōmen tous doulous tou Theou hēmōn epi tōn metōpōn autōn.
7.4: Kai ēkousa ton arithmon tōn esphragismenōn, hekaton tesserakonta tessares chiliades esphragismenoi ek pasēs phylēs huiōn Israēl;
7.5: ek phylēs Iouda dōdeka chiliades esphragismenoi, ek phylēs Rhoubēn dōdeka chiliades, ek phylēs Gad dōdeka chiliades,
7.6: ek phylēs Asēr dōdeka chiliades, ek phylēs Nephthaleim dōdeka chiliades, ek phylēs Manassē dōdeka chiliades,
7.7: ek phylēs Symeōn dōdeka chiliades, ek phylēs Leuei dōdeka chiliades, ek phylēs Issachar dōdeka chiliades,
7.8: ek phylēs Zaboulōn dōdeka chiliades, ek phylēs Iōsēph dōdeka chiliades, ek phylēs Beniamein dōdeka chiliades esphragismenoi.
7.9: Meta tauta eidon, kai idou ochlos polys, hon arithmēsai auton oudeis edynato, ek pantos ethnous kai phylōn kai laōn kai glōssōn, hestōtes enōpion tou thronou kai enōpion tou Arniou, peribeblēmenous stolas leukas, kai phoinikes en tais chersin autōn;
7.10: kai krazousin phōnē megalē legontes HĒ sōtēria tō Theō hēmōn tō kathēmenō epi tō thronō kai tō Arniō.
7.11: kai pantes hoi angeloi heistēkeisan kyklō tou thronou kai tōn presbyterōn kai tōn tessarōn zōōn, kai epesan enōpion tou thronou epi ta prosōpa autōn kai prosekynēsan tō Theō,
7.12: legontes Amēn, hē eulogia kai hē doxa kai hē sophia kai hē eucharistia kai hē timē kai hē dynamis kai hē ischys tō Theō hēmōn eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.
7.13: Kai apekrithē heis ek tōn presbyterōn legōn moi Houtoi hoi peribeblēmenoi tas stolas tas leukas tines eisin kai pothen ēlthon?
7.14: kai eirēka autō Kyrie mou, sy oidas. kai eipen moi Houtoi eisin hoi erchomenoi ek tēs thlipseōs tēs megalēs, kai eplynan tas stolas autōn kai eleukanan autas en tō haimati tou Arniou.
7.15: dia touto eisin enōpion tou thronou tou Theou, kai latreuousin autō hēmeras kai nyktos en tō naō autou, kai ho kathēmenos epi tou thronou skēnōsei ep’ autous.
7.16: ou peinasousin eti oude dipsēsousin eti, oude mē pesē ep’ autous ho hēlios oude pan kauma,
7.17: hoti to Arnion to ana meson tou thronou poimanei autous kai hodēgēsei autous epi zōēs pēgas hydatōn; kai exaleipsei ho Theos pan dakryon ek tōn ophthalmōn autōn.

8.1: Kai hotan ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn hebdomēn, egeneto sigē en tō ouranō hōs hēmiōrion.
8.2: kai eidon tous hepta angelous hoi enōpion tou Theou hestēkasin, kai edothēsan autois hepta salpinges.
8.3: Kai allos angelos ēlthen kai estathē epi tou thysiastēriou echōn libanōton chrysoun, kai edothē autō thymiamata polla hina dōsei tais proseuchais tōn hagiōn pantōn epi to thysiastērion to chrysoun to enōpion tou thronou.
8.4: kai anebē ho kapnos tōn thymiamatōn tais proseuchais tōn hagiōn ek cheiros tou angelou enōpion tou Theou.
8.5: kai eilēphen ho angelos ton libanōton, kai egemisen auton ek tou pyros tou thysiastēriou kai ebalen eis tēn gēn; kai egenonto brontai kai phōnai kai astrapai kai seismos.
8.6: Kai hoi hepta angeloi hoi echontes tas hepta salpingas hētoimasan hautous hina salpisōsin.
8.7: Kai ho prōtos esalpisen; kai egeneto chalaza kai pyr memigmena en haimati kai eblēthē eis tēn gēn; kai to triton tēs gēs katekaē, kai to triton tōn dendrōn katekaē, kai pas chortos chlōros katekaē.
8.8: Kai ho deuteros angelos esalpisen; kai hōs oros mega pyri kaiomenon eblēthē eis tēn thalassan; kai egeneto to triton tēs thalassēs haima,
8.9: kai apethanen to triton tōn ktismatōn tōn en tē thalassē, ta echonta psychas, kai to triton tōn ploiōn diephtharēsan.
8.10: Kai ho tritos angelos esalpisen; kai epesen ek tou ouranou astēr megas kaiomenos hōs lampas, kai epesen epi to triton tōn potamōn kai epi tas pēgas tōn hydatōn.
8.11: kai to onoma tou asteros legetai HO Apsinthos. kai egeneto to triton tōn hydatōn eis apsinthon, kai polloi tōn anthrōpōn apethanon ek tōn hydatōn hoti epikranthēsan.
8.12: Kai ho tetartos angelos esalpisen; kai eplēgē to triton tou hēliou kai to triton tēs selēnēs kai to triton tōn asterōn, hina skotisthē to triton autōn kai hē hēmera mē phanē to triton autēs, kai hē nyx homoiōs.
8.13: Kai eidon, kai ēkousa henos aetou petomenou en mesouranēmati legontos phōnē megalē Ouai ouai ouai tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs ek tōn loipōn phōnōn tēs salpingos tōn triōn angelōn tōn mellontōn salpizein.

9.1: Kai ho pemptos angelos esalpisen; kai eidon astera ek tou ouranou peptōkota eis tēn gēn, kai edothē autō hē kleis tou phreatos tēs abyssou.
9.2: kai ēnoixen to phrear tēs abyssou; kai anebē kapnos ek tou phreatos hōs kapnos kaminou megalēs, kai eskotōthē ho hēlios kai ho aēr ek tou kapnou tou phreatos.
9.3: kai ek tou kapnou exēlthon akrides eis tēn gēn, kai edothē autois exousia hōs echousin exousian hoi skorpioi tēs gēs.
9.4: kai errethē autois hina mē adikēsousin ton chorton tēs gēs oude pan chlōron oude pan dendron, ei mē tous anthrōpous hoitines ouk echousin tēn sphragida tou Theou epi tōn metōpōn.
9.5: kai edothē autois hina mē apokteinōsin autous, all’ hina basanisthēsontai mēnas pente; kai ho basanismos autōn hōs basanismos skorpiou, hotan paisē anthrōpon.
9.6: kai en tais hēmerais ekeinais zētēsousin hoi anthrōpoi ton thanaton kai ou mē heurēsousin auton, kai epithymēsousin apothanein kai pheugei ho thanatos ap’ autōn.
9.7: kai ta homoiōmata tōn akridōn homoioi hippois hētoimasmenois eis polemon, kai epi tas kephalas autōn hōs stephanoi homoioi chrysō, kai ta prosōpa autōn hōs prosōpa anthrōpōn,
9.8: kai eichan trichas hōs trichas gynaikōn, kai hoi odontes autōn hōs leontōn ēsan,
9.9: kai eichon thōrakas hōs thōrakas sidērous, kai hē phōnē tōn pterygōn autōn hōs phōnē harmatōn hippōn pollōn trechontōn eis polemon.
9.10: kai echousin ouras homoias skorpiois kai kentra, kai en tais ourais autōn hē exousia autōn adikēsai tous anthrōpous mēnas pente.
9.11: echousin ep’ autōn basilea ton angelon tēs abyssou, onoma autō Hebraisti Abaddōn kai en tē Hellēnikē onoma echei Apollyōn.
9.12: HĒ Ouai hē mia apēlthen; idou erchetai eti dyo Ouai meta tauta.
9.13: Kai ho hektos angelos esalpisen; kai ēkousa phōnēn mian ek tōn tessarōn keratōn tou thysiastēriou tou chrysou tou enōpion tou Theou,
9.14: legonta tō hektō angelō, ho echōn tēn salpinga Lyson tous tessaras angelous tous dedemenous epi tō potamō tō megalō Euphratē.
9.15: kai elythēsan hoi tessares angeloi hoi hētoimasmenoi eis tēn hōran kai hēmeran kai mēna kai eniauton, hina apokteinōsin to triton tōn anthrōpōn.
9.16: kai ho arithmos tōn strateumatōn tou hippikou dismyriades myriadōn; ēkousa ton arithmon autōn.
9.17: kai houtōs eidon tous hippous en tē horasei kai tous kathēmenous ep’ autōn, echontas thōrakas pyrinous kai hyakinthinous kai theiōdeis; kai hai kephalai tōn hippōn hōs kephalai leontōn, kai ek tōn stomatōn autōn ekporeuetai pyr kai kapnos kai theion.
9.18: apo tōn triōn plēgōn toutōn apektanthēsan to triton tōn anthrōpōn, ek tou pyros kai tou kapnou kai tou theiou tou ekporeuomenou ek tōn stomatōn autōn.
9.19: hē gar exousia tōn hippōn en tō stomati autōn estin kai en tais ourais autōn; hai gar ourai autōn homoiai ophesin, echousai kephalas, kai en autais adikousin.
9.21: kai ou metenoēsan ek tōn phonōn autōn oute ek tōn pharmakiōn autōn oute ek tēs porneias autōn oute ek tōn klemmatōn autōn.

10.1: Kai eidon allon angelon ischyron katabainonta ek tou ouranou, peribeblēmenon nephelēn, kai hē iris epi tēn kephalēn autou, kai to prosōpon autou hōs ho hēlios, kai hoi podes autou hōs styloi pyros,
10.2: kai echōn en tē cheiri autou biblaridion ēneōgmenon. kai ethēken ton poda autou ton dexion epi tēs thalassēs, ton de euōnymon epi tēs gēs,
10.3: kai ekraxen phōnē megalē hōsper leōn mykatai. kai hote ekraxen, elalēsan hai hepta brontai tas heautōn phōnas.
10.4: Kai hote elalēsan hai hepta brontai, ēmellon graphein; kai ēkousa phōnēn ek tou ouranou legousan Sphragison ha elalēsan hai hepta brontai, kai mē auta grapsēs.
10.5: Kai ho angelos, hon eidon hestōta epi tēs thalassēs kai epi tēs gēs, ēren tēn cheira autou tēn dexian eis ton ouranon,
10.6: kai ōmosen en tō zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn, hos ektisen ton ouranon kai ta en autō kai tēn gēn kai ta en autē kai tēn thalassan kai ta en autē, hoti chronos ouketi estai,
10.7: all’ en tais hēmerais tēs phōnēs tou hebdomou angelou, hotan mellē salpizein, kai etelesthē to mystērion tou Theou, hōs euēngelisen tous heautou doulous tous prophētas.
10.8: Kai hē phōnē hēn ēkousa ek tou ouranou, palin lalousan met’ emou kai legousan Hypage labe to biblion to ēneōgmenon en tē cheiri tou angelou tou hestōtos epi tēs thalassēs kai epi tēs gēs.
10.9: kai apēltha pros ton angelon, legōn autō dounai moi to biblaridion. kai legei moi Labe kai kataphage auto, kai pikranei sou tēn koilian, all’ en tō stomati sou estai glyky hōs meli.
10.10: kai elabon to biblaridion ek tēs cheiros tou angelou kai katephagon auto, kai ēn en tō stomati mou hōs meli glyky; kai hote ephagon auto, epikranthē hē koilia mou.
10.11: kai legousin moi Dei se palin prophēteusai epi laois kai ethnesin kai glōssais kai basileusin pollois.

11.1: Kai edothē moi kalamos homoios rhabdō, legōn Egeire kai metrēson ton naon tou Theou kai to thysiastērion kai tous proskynountas en autō.
11.2: kai tēn aulēn tēn exōthen tou naou ekbale exōthen kai mē autēn metrēsēs, hoti edothē tois ethnesin, kai tēn polin tēn hagian patēsousin mēnas tesserakonta dyo.
11.3: kai dōsō tois dysin martysin mou, kai prophēteusousin hēmeras chilias diakosias hexēkonta peribeblēmenoi sakkous.
11.4: Houtoi eisin hai dyo elaiai kai hai dyo lychniai hai enōpion tou Kyriou tēs gēs hestōtes.
11.5: kai ei tis autous thelei adikēsai, pyr ekporeuetai ek tou stomatos autōn kai katesthiei tous echthrous autōn; kai ei tis thelēsē autous adikēsai, houtōs dei auton apoktanthēnai.
11.6: houtoi echousin tēn exousian kleisai ton ouranon, hina mē hyetos brechē tas hēmeras tēs prophēteias autōn, kai exousian echousin epi tōn hydatōn strephein auta eis haima kai pataxai tēn gēn en pasē plēgē hosakis ean thelēsōsin.
11.7: kai hotan telesōsin tēn martyrian autōn, to thērion to anabainon ek tēs abyssou poiēsei met’ autōn polemon kai nikēsei autous kai apoktenei autous.
11.8: kai to ptōma autōn epi tēs plateias tēs poleōs tēs megalēs, hētis kaleitai pneumatikōs Sodoma kai Aigyptos, hopou kai ho Kyrios autōn estaurōthē.
11.9: kai blepousin ek tōn laōn kai phylōn kai glōssōn kai ethnōn to ptōma autōn hēmeras treis kai hēmisy, kai ta ptōmata autōn ouk aphiousin tethēnai eis mnēma.
11.10: kai hoi katoikountes epi tēs gēs chairousin ep’ autois kai euphrainontai, kai dōra pempsousin allēlois, hoti houtoi hoi dyo prophētai ebasanisan tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs.
11.11: kai meta tas treis hēmeras kai hēmisy pneuma zōēs ek tou Theou eisēlthen en autois, kai estēsan epi tous podas autōn, kai phobos megas epepesen epi tous theōrountas autous.
11.12: kai ēkousan phōnēs megalēs ek tou ouranou legousēs autois Anabate hōde; kai anebēsan eis ton ouranon en tē nephelē, kai etheōrēsan autous hoi echthroi autōn.
11.13: Kai en ekeinē tē hōra egeneto seismos megas, kai to dekaton tēs poleōs epesen, kai apektanthēsan en tō seismō onomata anthrōpōn chiliades hepta, kai hoi loipoi emphoboi egenonto kai edōkan doxan tō Theō tou ouranou.
11.14: HĒ Ouai hē deutera apēlthen; idou hē Ouai hē tritē erchetai tachy.
11.15: Kai ho hebdomos angelos esalpisen; kai egenonto phōnai megalai en tō ouranō, legontes Egeneto hē basileia tou kosmou tou Kyriou hēmōn kai tou Christou autou, kai basileusei eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn.
11.16: kai hoi eikosi tessares presbyteroi hoi enōpion tou Theou kathēmenoi epi tous thronous autōn, epesan epi ta prosōpa autōn kai prosekynēsan tō Theō,
11.17: legontes Eucharistoumen soi, Kyrie ho Theos ho Pantokratōr, ho ōn kai ho ēn, hoti eilēphas tēn dynamin sou tēn megalēn kai ebasileusas;
11.18: kai ta ethnē ōrgisthēsan, kai ēlthen hē orgē sou kai ho kairos tōn nekrōn krithēnai kai dounai ton misthon tois doulois sou tois prophētais kai tois hagiois kai tois phoboumenois to onoma sou, tois mikrois kai tois megalois, kai diaphtheirai tous diaphtheirontas tēn gēn.
11.19: kai ēnoigē ho naos tou Theou ho en tō ouranō, kai ōphthē hē kibōtos tēs diathēkēs autou en tō naō autou, kai egenonto astrapai kai phōnai kai brontai kai seismos kai chalaza megalē.

12.1: Kai sēmeion mega ōphthē en tō ouranō, gynē peribeblēmenē ton hēlion, kai hē selēnē hypokatō tōn podōn autēs, kai epi tēs kephalēs autēs stephanos asterōn dōdeka,
12.2: kai en gastri echousa, kai krazei ōdinousa kai basanizomenē tekein.
12.3: kai ōphthē allo sēmeion en tō ouranō, kai idou drakōn pyrros megas, echōn kephalas hepta kai kerata deka kai epi tas kephalas autou hepta diadēmata,
12.4: kai hē oura autou syrei to triton tōn asterōn tou ouranou, kai ebalen autous eis tēn gēn. kai ho drakōn hestēken enōpion tēs gynaikos tēs mellousēs tekein, hina hotan tekē to teknon autēs kataphagē.
12.5: kai eteken huion, arsen, hos mellei poimainein panta ta ethnē en rhabdō sidēra; kai hērpasthē to teknon autēs pros ton Theon kai pros ton thronon autou.
12.6: kai hē gynē ephygen eis tēn erēmon, hopou echei ekei topon hētoimasmenon apo tou Theou, hina ekei trephōsin autēn hēmeras chilias diakosias hexēkonta.
12.7: Kai egeneto polemos en tō ouranō, ho Michaēl kai hoi angeloi autou tou polemēsai meta tou drakontos. kai ho drakōn epolemēsen kai hoi angeloi autou,
12.8: kai ouk ischysan, oude topos heurethē autōn eti en tō ouranō.
12.9: kai eblēthē ho drakōn ho megas, ho ophis ho archaios, ho kaloumenos Diabolos kai HO Satanas, ho planōn tēn oikoumenēn holēn, eblēthē eis tēn gēn, kai hoi angeloi autou met’ autou eblēthēsan.
12.10: kai ēkousa phōnēn megalēn en tō ouranō legousan Arti egeneto hē sōtēria kai hē dynamis kai hē basileia tou Theou hēmōn kai hē exousia tou Christou autou, hoti eblēthē ho katēgōr tōn adelphōn hēmōn, ho katēgorōn autous enōpion tou Theou hēmōn hēmeras kai nyktos.
12.11: kai autoi enikēsan auton dia to haima tou Arniou kai dia ton logon tēs martyrias autōn, kai ouk ēgapēsan tēn psychēn autōn achri thanatou.
12.12: dia touto euphrainesthe, ouranoi kai hoi en autois skēnountes; ouai tēn gēn kai tēn thalassan, hoti katebē ho diabolos pros hymas echōn thymon megan, eidōs hoti oligon kairon echei.
12.13: Kai hote eiden ho drakōn hoti eblēthē eis tēn gēn, ediōxen tēn gynaika hētis eteken ton arsena.
12.14: kai edothēsan tē gynaiki hai dyo pteryges tou aetou tou megalou, hina petētai eis tēn erēmon eis ton topon autēs, hopou trephetai ekei kairon kai kairous kai hēmisy kairou apo prosōpou tou opheōs.
12.15: kai ebalen ho ophis ek tou stomatos autou opisō tēs gynaikos hydōr hōs potamon, hina autēn potamophorēton poiēsē.
12.16: kai eboēthēsen hē gē tē gynaiki, kai ēnoixen hē gē to stoma autēs kai katepien ton potamon hon ebalen ho drakōn ek tou stomatos autou.
12.17: kai ōrgisthē ho drakōn epi tē gynaiki, kai apēlthen poiēsai polemon meta tōn loipōn tou spermatos autēs, tōn tērountōn tas entolas tou Theou kai echontōn tēn martyrian Iēsou; kai estathē epi tēn ammon tēs thalassēs.

13.1: Kai eidon ek tēs thalassēs thērion anabainon, echon kerata deka kai kephalas hepta, kai epi tōn keratōn autou deka diadēmata, kai epi tas kephalas autou onomata blasphēmias.
13.2: kai to thērion ho eidon ēn homoion pardalei, kai hoi podes autou hōs arkou, kai to stoma autou hōs stoma leontos. kai edōken autō ho drakōn tēn dynamin autou kai ton thronon autou kai exousian megalēn.
13.3: kai mian ek tōn kephalōn autou hōs esphagmenēn eis thanaton, kai hē plēgē tou thanatou autou etherapeuthē. kai ethaumasthē holē hē gē opisō tou thēriou,
13.4: kai prosekynēsan tō drakonti hoti edōken tēn exousian tō thēriō, kai prosekynēsan tō thēriō legontes Tis homoios tō thēriō, kai tis dynatai polemēsai met’ autou?
13.5: kai edothē autō stoma laloun megala kai blasphēmias, kai edothē autō exousia poiēsai mēnas tesserakonta dyo.
13.6: kai ēnoixen to stoma autou eis blasphēmias pros ton Theon, blasphēmēsai to onoma autou kai tēn skēnēn autou, tous en tō ouranō skēnountas.
13.7: kai edothē autō poiēsai polemon meta tōn hagiōn kai nikēsai autous, kai edothē autō exousia epi pasan phylēn kai laon kai glōssan kai ethnos.
13.8: kai proskynēsousin auton pantes hoi katoikountes epi tēs gēs, hou ou gegraptai to onoma autou en tō bibliō tēs zōēs tou Arniou tou esphagmenou apo katabolēs kosmou.
13.10: ei tis eis aichmalōsian, eis aichmalōsian hypagei; ei tis en machairē apoktenei, dei auton en machairē apoktanthēnai. Hōde estin hē hypomonē kai hē pistis tōn hagiōn.
13.11: Kai eidon allo thērion anabainon ek tēs gēs, kai eichen kerata dyo homoia arniō, kai elalei hōs drakōn.
13.12: kai tēn exousian tou prōtou thēriou pasan poiei enōpion autou. kai poiei tēn gēn kai tous en autē katoikountas hina proskynēsousin to thērion to prōton, hou etherapeuthē hē plēgē tou thanatou autou.
13.13: kai poiei sēmeia megala, hina kai pyr poiē ek tou ouranou katabainein eis tēn gēn enōpion tōn anthrōpōn.
13.14: kai plana tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs dia ta sēmeia ha edothē autō poiēsai enōpion tou thēriou, legōn tois katoikousin epi tēs gēs poiēsai eikona tō thēriō, hos echei tēn plēgēn tēs machairēs kai ezēsen.
13.15: kai edothē autō dounai pneuma tē eikoni tou thēriou, hina kai lalēsē hē eikōn tou thēriou, kai poiēsē hina hosoi ean mē proskynēsōsin tē eikoni tou thēriou apoktanthōsin.
13.16: kai poiei pantas, tous mikrous kai tous megalous, kai tous plousious kai tous ptōchous, kai tous eleutherous kai tous doulous, hina dōsin autois charagma epi tēs cheiros autōn tēs dexias ē epi to metōpon autōn,
13.17: kai hina mē tis dynētai agorasai ē pōlēsai ei mē ho echōn to charagma to onoma tou thēriou ē ton arithmon tou onomatos autou.
13.18: Hōde hē sophia estin. ho echōn noun psēphisatō ton arithmon tou thēriou; arithmos gar anthrōpou estin. kai ho arithmos autou hexakosioi hexēkonta hex.

14.1: Kai eidon, kai idou to Arnion hestos epi to oros Siōn, kai met’ autou hekaton tesserakonta tessares chiliades echousai to onoma autou kai to onoma tou Patros autou gegrammenon epi tōn metōpōn autōn.
14.2: kai ēkousa phōnēn ek tou ouranou hōs phōnēn hydatōn pollōn kai hōs phōnēn brontēs megalēs, kai hē phōnē hēn ēkousa hōs kitharōdōn kitharizontōn en tais kitharais autōn.
14.3: kai adousin ōdēn kainēn enōpion tou thronou kai enōpion tōn tessarōn zōōn kai tōn presbyterōn; kai oudeis edynato mathein tēn ōdēn ei mē hai hekaton tesserakonta tessares chiliades, hoi ēgorasmenoi apo tēs gēs.
14.4: houtoi eisin hoi meta gynaikōn ouk emolynthēsan; parthenoi gar eisin. houtoi hoi akolouthountes tō Arniō hopou an hypagē; houtoi ēgorasthēsan apo tōn anthrōpōn aparchē tō Theō kai tō Arniō,
14.5: kai en tō stomati autōn ouch heurethē pseudos; amōmoi eisin.
14.6: Kai eidon allon angelon petomenon en mesouranēmati, echonta euangelion aiōnion euangelisai epi tous kathēmenous epi tēs gēs kai epi pan ethnos kai phylēn kai glōssan kai laon,
14.7: legōn en phōnē megalē; Phobēthēte ton Theon kai dote autō doxan, hoti ēlthen hē hōra tēs kriseōs autou, kai proskynēsate tō poiēsanti ton ouranon kai tēn gēn kai thalassan kai pēgas hydatōn.
14.8: Kai allos angelos deuteros ēkolouthēsen legōn Epesen epesen Babylōn hē megalē, hē ek tou oinou tou thymou tēs porneias autēs pepotiken panta ta ethnē.
14.9: Kai allos angelos tritos ēkolouthēsen autois legōn en phōnē megalē Ei tis proskynei to thērion kai tēn eikona autou, kai lambanei charagma epi tou metōpou autou ē epi tēn cheira autou,
14.10: kai autos pietai ek tou oinou tou thymou tou Theou tou kekerasmenou akratou en tō potēriō tēs orgēs autou, kai basanisthēsetai en pyri kai theiō enōpion angelōn hagiōn kai enōpion tou Arniou.
14.11: kai ho kapnos tou basanismou autōn eis aiōnas aiōnōn anabainei, kai ouk echousin anapausin hēmeras kai nyktos hoi proskynountes to thērion kai tēn eikona autou, kai ei tis lambanei to charagma tou onomatos autou.
14.12: Hōde hē hypomonē tōn hagiōn estin, hoi tērountes tas entolas tou Theou kai tēn pistin Iēsou.
14.13: Kai ēkousa phōnēs ek tou ouranou legousēs Grapson Makarioi hoi nekroi hoi en Kyriō apothnēskontes aparti. nai, legei to Pneuma, hina anapaēsontai ek tōn kopōn autōn; ta gar erga autōn akolouthei met’ autōn.
14.14: Kai eidon, kai idou nephelē leukē, kai epi tēn nephelēn kathēmenon homoion huion anthrōpou, echōn epi tēs kephalēs autou stephanon chrysoun kai en tē cheiri autou drepanon oxy.
14.15: Kai allos angelos exēlthen ek tou naou, krazōn en phōnē megalē tō kathēmenō epi tēs nephelēs Pempson to drepanon sou kai therison, hoti ēlthen hē hōra therisai, hoti exēranthē ho therismos tēs gēs.
14.16: kai ebalen ho kathēmenos epi tēs nephelēs to drepanon autou epi tēn gēn, kai etheristhē hē gē.
14.17: Kai allos angelos exēlthen ek tou naou tou en tō ouranō, echōn kai autos drepanon oxy.
14.18: Kai allos angelos exēlthen ek tou thysiastēriou, ho echōn exousian epi tou pyros, kai ephōnēsen phōnē megalē tō echonti to drepanon to oxy legōn Pempson sou to drepanon to oxy kai trygēson tous botryas tēs ampelou tēs gēs, hoti ēkmasan hai staphylai autēs.
14.19: kai ebalen ho angelos to drepanon autou eis tēn gēn, kai etrygēsen tēn ampelon tēs gēs kai ebalen eis tēn lēnon tou thymou tou Theou ton megan.
14.20: kai epatēthē hē lēnos exōthen tēs poleōs, kai exēlthen haima ek tēs lēnou achri tōn chalinōn tōn hippōn, apo stadiōn chiliōn hexakosiōn.

15.1: Kai eidon allo sēmeion en tō ouranō mega kai thaumaston, angelous hepta echontas plēgas hepta tas eschatas, hoti en autais etelesthē ho thymos tou Theou.
15.2: Kai eidon hōs thalassan hyalinēn memigmenēn pyri, kai tous nikōntas ek tou thēriou kai ek tēs eikonos autou kai ek tou arithmou tou onomatos autou hestōtas epi tēn thalassan tēn hyalinēn, echontas kitharas tou Theou.
15.3: kai adousin tēn ōdēn Mōuseōs tou doulou tou Theou kai tēn ōdēn tou Arniou, legontes Megala kai thaumasta ta erga sou, Kyrie ho Theos ho Pantokratōr; dikaiai kai alēthinai hai hodoi sou, ho Basileus tōn ethnōn;
15.4: tis ou mē phobēthē, Kyrie, kai doxasei to onoma sou? hoti monos hosios, hoti panta ta ethnē hēxousin kai proskynēsousin enōpion sou, hoti ta dikaiōmata sou ephanerōthēsan.
15.5: Kai meta tauta eidon, kai ēnoigē ho naos tēs skēnēs tou martyriou en tō ouranō,
15.6: kai exēlthon hoi hepta angeloi hoi echontes tas hepta plēgas ek tou naou, endedymenoi linon katharon lampron kai periezōsmenoi peri ta stēthē zōnas chrysas.
15.7: kai hen ek tōn tessarōn zōōn edōken tois hepta angelois hepta phialas chrysas gemousas tou thymou tou Theou tou zōntos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn.
15.8: kai egemisthē ho naos kapnou ek tēs doxēs tou Theou kai ek tēs dynameōs autou, kai oudeis edynato eiselthein eis ton naon achri telesthōsin hai hepta plēgai tōn hepta angelōn.

16.1: Kai ēkousa megalēs phōnēs ek tou naou legousēs tois hepta angelois Hypagete kai ekcheete tas hepta phialas tou thymou tou Theou eis tēn gēn.
16.2: Kai apēlthen ho prōtos kai execheen tēn phialēn autou eis tēn gēn; kai egeneto helkos kakon kai ponēron epi tous anthrōpous tous echontas to charagma tou thēriou kai tous proskynountas tē eikoni autou.
16.3: Kai ho deuteros execheen tēn phialēn autou eis tēn thalassan; kai egeneto haima hōs nekrou, kai pasa psychē zōēs apethanen, ta en tē thalassē.
16.4: Kai ho tritos execheen tēn phialēn autou eis tous potamous kai tas pēgas tōn hydatōn; kai egeneto haima.
16.5: Kai ēkousa tou angelou tōn hydatōn legontos Dikaios ei, ho ōn kai ho ēn, ho Hosios, hoti tauta ekrinas,
16.6: hoti haima hagiōn kai prophētōn exechean, kai haima autois dedōkas pein; axioi eisin.
16.7: Kai ēkousa tou thysiastēriou legontos Nai, Kyrie ho Theos ho Pantokratōr, alēthinai kai dikaiai hai kriseis sou.
16.8: Kai ho tetartos execheen tēn phialēn autou epi ton hēlion; kai edothē autō kaumatisai tous anthrōpous en pyri.
16.9: kai ekaumatisthēsan hoi anthrōpoi kauma mega, kai eblasphēmēsan to onoma tou Theou tou echontos tēn exousian epi tas plēgas tautas, kai ou metenoēsan dounai autō doxan.
16.10: Kai ho pemptos execheen tēn phialēn autou epi ton thronon tou thēriou; kai egeneto hē basileia autou eskotōmenē, kai emasōnto tas glōssas autōn ek tou ponou,
16.11: kai eblasphēmēsan ton Theon tou ouranou ek tōn ponōn autōn kai ek tōn helkōn autōn, kai ou metenoēsan ek tōn ergōn autōn.
16.12: Kai ho hektos execheen tēn phialēn autou epi ton potamon ton megan Euphratēn; kai exēranthē to hydōr autou, hina hetoimasthē hē hodos tōn basileōn tōn apo anatolēs hēliou.
16.13: Kai eidon ek tou stomatos tou drakontos kai ek tou stomatos tou thēriou kai ek tou stomatos tou pseudoprophētou pneumata tria akatharta hōs batrachoi;
16.14: eisin gar pneumata daimoniōn poiounta sēmeia, ha ekporeuetai epi tous basileis tēs oikoumenēs holēs, synagagein autous eis ton polemon tēs hēmeras tēs megalēs tou Theou tou Pantokratoros.
16.15: Idou erchomai hōs kleptēs; makarios ho grēgorōn kai tērōn ta himatia autou, hina mē gymnos peripatē kai blepōsin tēn aschēmosynēn autou.
16.16: kai synēgagen autous eis ton topon ton kaloumenon Hebraisti Harmagedōn.
16.17: Kai ho hebdomos execheen tēn phialēn autou epi ton aera; kai exēlthen phōnē megalē ek tou naou apo tou thronou legousa Gegonen.
16.18: kai egenonto astrapai kai phōnai kai brontai, kai seismos egeneto megas, hoios ouk egeneto aph’ hou anthrōpos egeneto epi tēs gēs, tēlikoutos seismos houtō megas.
16.19: kai egeneto hē polis hē megalē eis tria merē, kai hai poleis tōn ethnōn epesan. kai Babylōn hē megalē emnēsthē enōpion tou Theou dounai autē to potērion tou oinou tou thymou tēs orgēs autou.
16.20: kai pasa nēsos ephygen, kai orē ouch heurethēsan.
16.21: kai chalaza megalē hōs talantiaia katabainei ek tou ouranou epi tous anthrōpous; kai eblasphēmēsan hoi anthrōpoi ton Theon ek tēs plēgēs tēs chalazēs, hoti megalē estin hē plēgē autēs sphodra.

17.1: Kai ēlthen heis ek tōn hepta angelōn tōn echontōn tas hepta phialas, kai elalēsen met’ emou legōn Deuro, deixō soi to krima tēs pornēs tēs megalēs tēs kathēmenēs epi hydatōn pollōn,
17.2: meth’ hēs eporneusan hoi basileis tēs gēs, kai emethysthēsan hoi katoikountes tēn gēn ek tou oinou tēs porneias autēs.
17.3: kai apēnenken me eis erēmon en Pneumati. kai eidon gynaika kathēmenēn epi thērion kokkinon, gemonta onomata blasphēmias, echōn kephalas hepta kai kerata deka.
17.4: kai hē gynē ēn peribeblēmenē porphyroun kai kokkinon, kai kechrysōmenē chrysiō kai lithō timiō kai margaritais, echousa potērion chrysoun en tē cheiri autēs gemon bdelygmatōn kai ta akatharta tēs porneias autēs,
17.5: kai epi to metōpon autēs onoma gegrammenon, mystērion, BABYLŌN Ē MEGALĒ, Ē MĒTĒR TŌN PORNŌN KAI TŌN BDELYGMATŌN TĒS GĒS.
17.6: kai eidon tēn gynaika methyousan ek tou haimatos tōn hagiōn kai ek tou haimatos tōn martyrōn Iēsou. Kai ethaumasa idōn autēn thauma mega.
17.7: kai eipen moi ho angelos Dia ti ethaumasas? egō erō soi to mystērion tēs gynaikos kai tou thēriou tou bastazontos autēn tou echontos tas hepta kephalas kai ta deka kerata.
17.8: to thērion ho eides ēn kai ouk estin, kai mellei anabainein ek tēs abyssou kai eis apōleian hypagei; kai thaumasthēsontai hoi katoikountes epi tēs gēs, hōn ou gegraptai to onoma epi to biblion tēs zōēs apo katabolēs kosmou, blepontōn to thērion hoti ēn kai ouk estin kai parestai.
17.9: Hōde ho nous ho echōn sophian. hai hepta kephalai hepta orē eisin, hopou hē gynē kathētai ep’ autōn. kai basileis hepta eisin;
17.10: hoi pente epesan, ho heis estin, ho allos oupō ēlthen, kai hotan elthē oligon auton dei meinai.
17.11: kai to thērion ho ēn kai ouk estin, kai autos ogdoos estin kai ek tōn hepta estin, kai eis apōleian hypagei.
17.12: kai ta deka kerata ha eides deka basileis eisin, hoitines basileian oupō elabon, alla exousian hōs basileis mian hōran lambanousin meta tou thēriou.
17.13: houtoi mian gnōmēn echousin, kai tēn dynamin kai exousian autōn tō thēriō didoasin.
17.14: houtoi meta tou Arniou polemēsousin kai to Arnion nikēsei autous, hoti Kyrios kyriōn estin kai Basileus basileōn, kai hoi met’ autou klētoi kai eklektoi kai pistoi.
17.15: Kai legei moi Ta hydata ha eides, hou hē pornē kathētai, laoi kai ochloi eisin kai ethnē kai glōssai.
17.16: kai ta deka kerata ha eides kai to thērion, houtoi misēsousin tēn pornēn, kai ērēmōmenēn poiēsousin autēn kai gymnēn, kai tas sarkas autēs phagontai, kai autēn katakausousin en pyri;
17.17: ho gar Theos edōken eis tas kardias autōn poiēsai tēn gnōmēn autou, kai poiēsai mian gnōmēn kai dounai tēn basileian autōn tō thēriō, achri telesthēsontai hoi logoi tou Theou.
17.18: kai hē gynē hēn eides estin hē polis hē megalē hē echousa basileian epi tōn basileōn tēs gēs.

18.1: Meta tauta eidon allon angelon katabainonta ek tou ouranou, echonta exousian megalēn, kai hē gē ephōtisthē ek tēs doxēs autou.
18.2: kai ekraxen en ischyra phōnē legōn Epesen epesen Babylōn hē megalē, kai egeneto katoikētērion daimoniōn kai phylakē pantos pneumatos akathartou kai phylakē pantos orneou akathartou kai memisēmenou,
18.3: hoti ek tou oinou tou thymou tēs porneias autēs pepōkan panta ta ethnē, kai hoi basileis tēs gēs met’ autēs eporneusan, kai hoi emporoi tēs gēs ek tēs dynameōs tou strēnous autēs eploutēsan.
18.4: Kai ēkousa allēn phōnēn ek tou ouranou legousan Exelthate ho laos mou ex autēs, hina mē synkoinōnēsēte tais hamartiais autēs, kai ek tōn plēgōn autēs hina mē labēte;
18.5: hoti ekollēthēsan autēs hai hamartiai achri tou ouranou, kai emnēmoneusen ho Theos ta adikēmata autēs.
18.6: apodote autē hōs kai autē apedōken, kai diplōsate ta dipla kata ta erga autēs; en tō potēriō hō ekerasen kerasate autē diploun;
18.7: hosa edoxasen hautēn kai estrēniasen, tosouton dote autē basanismon kai penthos. hoti en tē kardia autēs legei hoti Kathēmai basilissa kai chēra ouk eimi, kai penthos ou mē idō;
18.8: dia touto en mia hēmera hēxousin hai plēgai autēs, thanatos kai penthos kai limos, kai en pyri katakauthēsetai; hoti ischyros Kyrios ho Theos ho krinas autēn.
18.9: kai klausousin kai kopsontai ep’ autēn hoi basileis tēs gēs hoi met’ autēs porneusantes kai strēniasantes, hotan blepōsin ton kapnon tēs pyrōseōs autēs,
18.10: apo makrothen hestēkotes dia ton phobon tou basanismou autēs, legontes Ouai ouai, hē polis hē megalē, Babylōn hē polis hē ischyra, hoti mia hōra ēlthen hē krisis sou.
18.11: kai hoi emporoi tēs gēs klaiousin kai penthousin ep’ autēn, hoti ton gomon autōn oudeis agorazei ouketi,
18.12: gomon chrysou kai argyrou kai lithou timiou kai margaritōn kai byssinou kai porphyras kai sirikou kai kokkinou, kai pan xylon thuinon kai pan skeuos elephantinon kai pan skeuos ek xylou timiōtatou kai chalkou kai sidērou kai marmarou,
18.13: kai kinnamōmon kai amōmon kai thymiamata kai myron kai libanon kai oinon kai elaion kai semidalin kai siton kai ktēnē kai probata, kai hippōn kai rhedōn kai sōmatōn, kai psychas anthrōpōn.
18.14: kai hē opōra sou tēs epithymias tēs psychēs apēlthen apo sou, kai panta ta lipara kai ta lampra apōleto apo sou, kai ouketi ou mē auta heurēsousin.
18.15: hoi emporoi toutōn, hoi ploutēsantes ap’ autēs, apo makrothen stēsontai dia ton phobon tou basanismou autēs klaiontes kai penthountes,
18.16: legontes Ouai ouai, hē polis hē megalē, hē peribeblēmenē byssinon kai porphyroun kai kokkinon, kai kechrysōmenē en chrysiō kai lithō timiō kai margaritē,
18.17: hoti mia hōra ērēmōthē ho tosoutos ploutos. kai pas kybernētēs kai pas ho epi topon pleōn kai nautai kai hosoi tēn thalassan ergazontai, apo makrothen estēsan
18.18: kai ekrazon blepontes ton kapnon tēs pyrōseōs autēs legontes Tis homoia tē polei tē megalē?
18.19: kai ebalon choun epi tas kephalas autōn kai ekrazon klaiontes kai penthountes, legontes Ouai ouai, hē polis hē megalē, en hē eploutēsan pantes hoi echontes ta ploia en tē thalassē ek tēs timiotētos autēs, hoti mia hōra ērēmōthē.
18.20: Euphrainou ep’ autē, ourane kai hoi hagioi kai hoi apostoloi kai hoi prophētai, hoti ekrinen ho Theos to krima hymōn ex autēs.
18.21: Kai ēren heis angelos ischyros lithon hōs mylinon megan, kai ebalen eis tēn thalassan legōn Houtōs hormēmati blēthēsetai Babylōn hē megalē polis, kai ou mē heurethē eti.
18.22: kai phōnē kitharōdōn kai mousikōn kai aulētōn kai salpistōn ou mē akousthē en soi eti, kai pas technitēs pasēs technēs ou mē heurethē en soi eti, kai phōnē mylou ou mē akousthē en soi eti,
18.23: kai phōs lychnou ou mē phanē en soi eti, kai phōnē nymphiou kai nymphēs ou mē akousthē en soi eti; hoti hoi emporoi sou ēsan hoi megistanes tēs gēs, hoti en tē pharmakia sou eplanēthēsan panta ta ethnē,
18.24: kai en autē haima prophētōn kai hagiōn heurethē kai pantōn tōn esphagmenōn epi tēs gēs.

19.1: Meta tauta ēkousa hōs phōnēn megalēn ochlou pollou en tō ouranō legontōn Hallēlouia; hē sōtēria kai hē doxa kai hē dynamis tou Theou hēmōn,
19.2: hoti alēthinai kai dikaiai hai kriseis autou; hoti ekrinen tēn pornēn tēn megalēn hētis ephtheiren tēn gēn en tē porneia autēs, kai exedikēsen to haima tōn doulōn autou ek cheiros autēs.
19.3: kai deuteron eirēkan Hallēlouia; kai ho kapnos autēs anabainei eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn.
19.4: kai epesan hoi presbyteroi hoi eikosi tessares kai ta tessera zōa, kai prosekynēsan tō Theō tō kathēmenō epi tō thronō legontes Amēn, Hallēlouia.
19.5: kai phōnē apo tou thronou exēlthen legousa Aineite tō Theō hēmōn, pantes hoi douloi autou, hoi phoboumenoi auton, hoi mikroi kai hoi megaloi.
19.6: Kai ēkousa hōs phōnēn ochlou pollou kai hōs phōnēn hydatōn pollōn kai hōs phōnēn brontōn ischyrōn, legontōn Hallēlouia, hoti ebasileusen Kyrios ho Theos hēmōn ho Pantokratōr.
19.7: chairōmen kai agalliōmen, kai dōsomen tēn doxan autō, hoti ēlthen ho gamos tou Arniou, kai hē gynē autou hētoimasen heautēn,
19.8: kai edothē autē hina peribalētai byssinon lampron katharon; to gar byssinon ta dikaiōmata tōn hagiōn estin.
19.9: Kai legei moi Grapson Makarioi hoi eis to deipnon tou gamou tou Arniou keklēmenoi. kai legei moi Houtoi hoi logoi alēthinoi tou Theou eisin.
19.10: kai epesa emprosthen tōn podōn autou proskynēsai autō. kai legei moi Hora mē; syndoulos sou eimi kai tōn adelphōn sou tōn echontōn tēn martyrian Iēsou; tō Theō proskynēson; hē gar martyria Iēsou estin to pneuma tēs prophēteias.
19.11: Kai eidon ton ouranon ēneōgmenon, kai idou hippos leukos, kai ho kathēmenos ep’ auton kaloumenos Pistos kai Alēthinos, kai en dikaiosynē krinei kai polemei.
19.12: hoi de ophthalmoi autou phlox pyros, kai epi tēn kephalēn autou diadēmata polla, echōn onoma gegrammenon ho oudeis oiden ei mē autos,
19.13: kai peribeblēmenos himation bebammenon haimati, kai keklētai to onoma autou HO Logos tou Theou.
19.14: kai ta strateumata ta en tō ouranō ēkolouthei autō eph’ hippois leukois, endedymenoi byssinon leukon katharon.
19.15: kai ek tou stomatos autou ekporeuetai rhomphaia oxeia, hina en autē pataxē ta ethnē; kai autos poimanei autous en rhabdō sidēra; kai autos patei tēn lēnon tou oinou tou thymou tēs orgēs tou Theou tou Pantokratoros.
19.16: kai echei epi to himation kai epi ton mēron autou onoma gegrammenon BASILEUS BASILEŌN KAI KYRIOS KYRIŌN.
19.17: Kai eidon hena angelon hestōta en tō hēliō, kai ekraxen en phōnē megalē legōn pasin tois orneois tois petomenois en mesouranēmati Deute synachthēte eis to deipnon to mega tou Theou,
19.18: hina phagēte sarkas basileōn kai sarkas chiliarchōn kai sarkas ischyrōn kai sarkas hippōn kai tōn kathēmenōn ep’ autōn, kai sarkas pantōn eleutherōn te kai doulōn kai mikrōn kai megalōn.
19.19: Kai eidon to thērion kai tous basileis tēs gēs kai ta strateumata autōn synēgmena poiēsai ton polemon meta tou kathēmenou epi tou hippou kai meta tou strateumatos autou.
19.20: kai epiasthē to thērion kai met’ autou ho pseudoprophētēs ho poiēsas ta sēmeia enōpion autou, en hois eplanēsen tous labontas to charagma tou thēriou kai tous proskynountas tē eikoni autou; zōntes eblēthēsan hoi dyo eis tēn limnēn tou pyros tēs kaiomenēs en theiō.
19.21: kai hoi loipoi apektanthēsan en tē rhomphaia tou kathēmenou epi tou hippou tē exelthousē ek tou stomatos autou, kai panta ta ornea echortasthēsan ek tōn sarkōn autōn.

20.1: Kai eidon angelon katabainonta ek tou ouranou, echonta tēn klein tēs abyssou kai halysin megalēn epi tēn cheira autou.
20.2: kai ekratēsen ton drakonta, ho ophis ho archaios, hos estin Diabolos kai HO Satanas, kai edēsen auton chilia etē,
20.3: kai ebalen auton eis tēn abysson, kai ekleisen kai esphragisen epanō autou, hina mē planēsē eti ta ethnē, achri telesthē ta chilia etē; meta tauta dei lythēnai auton mikron chronon.
20.5: hoi loipoi tōn nekrōn ouk ezēsan achri telesthē ta chilia etē. hautē hē anastasis hē prōtē.
20.6: makarios kai hagios ho echōn meros en tē anastasei tē prōtē; epi toutōn ho deuteros thanatos ouk echei exousian, all’ esontai hiereis tou Theou kai tou Christou, kai basileusousin met’ autou ta chilia etē.
20.7: Kai hotan telesthē ta chilia etē, lythēsetai ho Satanas ek tēs phylakēs autou,
20.8: kai exeleusetai planēsai ta ethnē ta en tais tessarsin gōniais tēs gēs, ton Gōg kai Magōg, synagagein autous eis ton polemon, hōn ho arithmos autōn hōs hē ammos tēs thalassēs.
20.9: kai anebēsan epi to platos tēs gēs, kai ekykleusan tēn parembolēn tōn hagiōn kai tēn polin tēn ēgapēmenēn; kai katebē pyr ek tou ouranou kai katephagen autous;
20.10: kai ho diabolos ho planōn autous eblēthē eis tēn limnēn tou pyros kai theiou, hopou kai to thērion kai ho pseudoprophētēs, kai basanisthēsontai hēmeras kai nyktos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn.
20.11: Kai eidon thronon megan leukon kai ton kathēmenon ep’ auton hou apo tou prosōpou ephygen hē gē kai ho ouranos, kai topos ouch heurethē autois.
20.12: kai eidon tous nekrous, tous megalous kai tous mikrous, hestōtas enōpion tou thronou, kai biblia ēnoichthēsan; kai allo biblion ēnoichthē, ho estin tēs zōēs; kai ekrithēsan hoi nekroi ek tōn gegrammenōn en tois bibliois kata ta erga autōn.
20.13: kai edōken hē thalassa tous nekrous tous en autē, kai ho thanatos kai ho Haidēs edōkan tous nekrous tous en autois, kai ekrithēsan hekastos kata ta erga autōn.
20.14: kai ho thanatos kai ho Haidēs eblēthēsan eis tēn limnēn tou pyros. houtos ho thanatos ho deuteros estin, hē limnē tou pyros.
20.15: kai ei tis ouch heurethē en tē biblō tēs zōēs gegrammenos, eblēthē eis tēn limnēn tou pyros.

21.1: Kai eidon ouranon kainon kai gēn kainēn; ho gar prōtos ouranos kai hē prōtē gē apēlthan, kai hē thalassa ouk estin eti.
21.2: kai tēn polin tēn hagian Hierousalēm kainēn eidon katabainousan ek tou ouranou apo tou Theou, hētoimasmenēn hōs nymphēn kekosmēmenēn tō andri autēs.
21.3: kai ēkousa phōnēs megalēs ek tou thronou legousēs Idou hē skēnē tou Theou meta tōn anthrōpōn, kai skēnōsei met’ autōn, kai autoi laoi autou esontai, kai autos ho Theos met’ autōn estai,
21.4: kai exaleipsei pan dakryon ek tōn ophthalmōn autōn, kai ho thanatos ouk estai eti, oute penthos oute kraugē oute ponos ouk estai eti; hoti ta prōta apēlthan.
21.5: kai eipen ho kathēmenos epi tō thronō Idou kaina poiō panta. kai legei Grapson, hoti houtoi hoi logoi pistoi kai alēthinoi eisin.
21.6: kai eipen moi Gegonan. egō to Alpha kai to Ō, hē archē kai to telos. egō tō dipsōnti dōsō ek tēs pēgēs tou hydatos tēs zōēs dōrean.
21.7: ho nikōn klēronomēsei tauta, kai esomai autō Theos kai autos estai moi huios.
21.8: tois de deilois kai apistois kai ebdelygmenois kai phoneusin kai pornois kai pharmakois kai eidōlolatrais kai pasin tois pseudesin to meros autōn en tē limnē tē kaiomenē pyri kai theiō, ho estin ho thanatos ho deuteros.
21.9: Kai ēlthen heis ek tōn hepta angelōn tōn echontōn tas hepta phialas, tōn gemontōn tōn hepta plēgōn tōn eschatōn, kai elalēsen met’ emou legōn Deuro, deixō soi tēn nymphēn tēn gynaika tou arniou.
21.10: kai apēnenken me en Pneumati epi oros mega kai hypsēlon, kai edeixen moi tēn polin tēn hagian Hierousalēm katabainousan ek tou ouranou apo tou Theou,
21.11: echousan tēn doxan tou Theou; ho phōstēr autēs homoios lithō timiōtatō, hōs lithō iaspidi krystallizonti;
21.12: echousa teichos mega kai hypsēlon, echousa pylōnas dōdeka, kai epi tois pylōsin angelous dōdeka, kai onomata epigegrammena, ha estin tōn dōdeka phylōn huiōn Israēl.
21.13: apo anatolēs pylōnes treis, kai apo borra pylōnes treis, kai apo notou pylōnes treis, kai apo dysmōn pylōnes treis.
21.14: kai to teichos tēs poleōs echōn themelious dōdeka, kai ep’ autōn dōdeka onomata tōn dōdeka apostolōn tou Arniou.
21.15: Kai ho lalōn met’ emou eichen metron kalamon chrysoun, hina metrēsē tēn polin kai tous pylōnas autēs kai to teichos autēs.
21.16: kai hē polis tetragōnos keitai, kai to mēkos autēs hoson to platos. kai emetrēsen tēn polin tō kalamō epi stadiōn dōdeka chiliadōn; to mēkos kai to platos kai to hypsos autēs isa estin.
21.17: kai emetrēsen to teichos autēs hekaton tesserakonta tessarōn pēchōn, metron anthrōpou, ho estin angelou.
21.18: kai hē endōmēsis tou teichous autēs iaspis, kai hē polis chrysion katharon homoion hyalō katharō.
21.19: hoi themelioi tou teichous tēs poleōs panti lithō timiō kekosmēmenoi; ho themelios ho prōtos iaspis, ho deuteros sappheiros, ho tritos chalkēdōn, ho tetartos smaragdos,
21.20: ho pemptos sardonyx, ho hektos sardion, ho hebdomos chrysolithos, ho ogdoos bēryllos, ho enatos topazion, ho dekatos chrysoprasos, ho hendekatos hyakinthos, ho dōdekatos amethystos.
21.21: kai hoi dōdeka pylōnes dōdeka margaritai; ana heis hekastos tōn pylōnōn ēn ex henos margaritou. kai hē plateia tēs poleōs chrysion katharon hōs hyalos diaugēs.
21.22: Kai naon ouk eidon en autē; ho gar Kyrios ho Theos ho Pantokratōr naos autēs estin, kai to Arnion.
21.23: kai hē polis ou chreian echei tou hēliou oude tēs selēnēs, hina phainōsin autē; hē gar doxa tou Theou ephōtisen autēn, kai ho lychnos autēs to Arnion.
21.24: kai peripatēsousin ta ethnē dia tou phōtos autēs, kai hoi basileis tēs gēs pherousin tēn doxan autōn eis autēn;
21.25: kai hoi pylōnes autēs ou mē kleisthōsin hēmeras, nyx gar ouk estai ekei;
21.26: kai oisousin tēn doxan kai tēn timēn tōn ethnōn eis autēn.
21.27: kai ou mē eiselthē eis autēn pan koinon kai ho poiōn bdelygma kai pseudos, ei mē hoi gegrammenoi en tō bibliō tēs zōēs tou Arniou.

22.1: kai edeixen moi potamon hydatos zōēs lampron hōs krystallon, ekporeuomenon ek tou thronou tou Theou kai tou Arniou.
22.2: en mesō tēs plateias autēs kai tou potamou enteuthen kai ekeithen xylon zōēs poioun karpous dōdeka, kata mēna hekaston apodidoun ton karpon autou, kai ta phylla tou xylou eis therapeian tōn ethnōn.
22.3: kai pan katathema ouk estai eti. kai ho thronos tou Theou kai tou Arniou en autē estai, kai hoi douloi autou latreusousin autō,
22.4: kai opsontai to prosōpon autou, kai to onoma autou epi tōn metōpōn autōn.
22.5: kai nyx ouk estai eti, kai ouk echousin chreian phōtos lychnou kai phōtos hēliou, hoti Kyrios ho Theos phōtisei ep’ autous, kai basileusousin eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn.
22.6: Kai eipen moi Houtoi hoi logoi pistoi kai alēthinoi, kai ho Kyrios ho Theos tōn pneumatōn tōn prophētōn apesteilen ton angelon autou deixai tois doulois autou ha dei genesthai en tachei.
22.7: kai Idou erchomai tachy. makarios ho tērōn tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou.
22.8: Kagō Iōanēs ho akouōn kai blepōn tauta. kai hote ēkousa kai eblepsa, epesa proskynēsai emprosthen tōn podōn tou angelou tou deiknyontos moi tauta.
22.9: kai legei moi Hora mē; syndoulos sou eimi kai tōn adelphōn sou tōn prophētōn kai tōn tērountōn tous logous tou bibliou toutou; tō Theō proskynēson.
22.10: Kai legei moi Mē sphragisēs tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou; ho kairos gar engys estin.
22.11: ho adikōn adikēsatō eti, kai ho rhyparos rhypanthētō eti, kai ho dikaios dikaiosynēn poiēsatō eti, kai ho hagios hagiasthētō eti.
22.12: Idou erchomai tachy, kai ho misthos mou met’ emou, apodounai hekastō hōs to ergon estin autou.
22.13: egō to Alpha kai to Ō, ho prōtos kai ho eschatos, hē archē kai to telos.
22.14: makarioi hoi plynontes tas stolas autōn, hina estai hē exousia autōn epi to xylon tēs zōēs kai tois pylōsin eiselthōsin eis tēn polin.
22.15: exō hoi kynes kai hoi pharmakoi kai hoi pornoi kai hoi phoneis kai hoi eidōlolatrai kai pas philōn kai poiōn pseudos.
22.16: Egō Iēsous epempsa ton angelon mou martyrēsai hymin tauta epi tais ekklēsiais. egō eimi hē rhiza kai to genos Daueid, ho astēr ho lampros, ho prōinos.
22.17: Kai to Pneuma kai hē nymphē legousin Erchou. kai ho akouōn eipatō Erchou. kai ho dipsōn erchesthō, ho thelōn labetō hydōr zōēs dōrean.
22.18: Martyrō egō panti tō akouonti tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou; ean tis epithē ep’ auta, epithēsei ho Theos ep’ auton tas plēgas tas gegrammenas en tō bibliō toutō;
22.19: kai ean tis aphelē apo tōn logōn tou bibliou tēs prophēteias tautēs, aphelei ho Theos to meros autou apo tou xylou tēs zōēs kai ek tēs poleōs tēs hagias, tōn gegrammenōn en tō bibliō toutō.
22.20: Legei ho martyrōn tauta Nai, erchomai tachy. Amēn, erchou Kyrie Iēsou.
22.21: HĒ charis tou Kyriou Iēsou meta pantōn.
